// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/index.html (2026-07-05 23:10:57) =====
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Design Commons</title>
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#f4f6fa" />
    <script>
      (() => {
        try {
          const saved = localStorage.getItem('design-commons-theme') || localStorage.getItem('canvasforge-theme') || 'system';
          if (localStorage.getItem('canvasforge-theme') && !localStorage.getItem('design-commons-theme')) {
            localStorage.setItem('design-commons-theme', localStorage.getItem('canvasforge-theme'));
            localStorage.removeItem('canvasforge-theme');
          }
          const resolved = saved === 'system'
            ? (matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
            : saved;
          document.documentElement.dataset.theme = resolved;
          document.documentElement.dataset.themePreference = saved;
          document.documentElement.style.colorScheme = resolved;
        } catch {}
      })();
    </script>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div id="root"></div>
    <script type="module" src="/src/main.jsx"></script>
  </body>
</html>

fs.mkdirSync(config.backupDir,{recursive:true});checkpoint();const stamp=new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-');const target=path.join(config.backupDir,`canvasforge-${stamp}.sqlite`);const escaped=target.replaceAll("'","''");db.exec(`VACUUM INTO '${escaped}'`);const files=fs.readdirSync(config.backupDir).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.sqlite')).sort().reverse();for(const old of files.slice(30))fs.rmSync(path.join(config.backupDir,old),{force:true});console.log(target);closeDb();

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/scripts/db-restore.js (2026-07-03 14:15:43) =====
import fs from'node:fs';import path from'node:path';import{config}from'../server/config.js';
const source=process.argv[2];if(!source)throw new Error('Usage: npm run db:restore -- /path/to/backup.sqlite');const absolute=path.resolve(source);if(!fs.existsSync(absolute))throw new Error(`Backup not found: ${absolute}`);const header=fs.readFileSync(absolute).subarray(0,16).toString('utf8');if(header!=='SQLite format 3\u0000')throw new Error('The supplied file is not a SQLite database.');fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(config.sqlitePath),{recursive:true});if(fs.existsSync(config.sqlitePath))fs.copyFileSync(config.sqlitePath,`${config.sqlitePath}.before-restore-${Date.now()}`);for(const suffix of ['','-wal','-shm'])fs.rmSync(`${config.sqlitePath}${suffix}`,{force:true});fs.copyFileSync(absolute,config.sqlitePath);console.log(`Restored ${absolute} to ${config.sqlitePath}. Restart CanvasForge now.`);

  copyFile(resolve(root, 'SKILLS.md'), resolve(root, 'public', 'SKILLS.md')),
  copyFile(resolve(root, 'SKILLS.md'), resolve(root, 'public', 'skills.md'))

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/ai-direct-routes.js (2026-07-03 22:47:46) =====
import express from 'express';
import { readFile } from 'node:fs/promises';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';
import { dirname, resolve } from 'node:path';
import {
  applyCommandBatch, createAIContext, diffDocuments, getAICapabilities, lintDocument,
  validateCommandBatch
} from '../src/ai/engine.js';
import { normalizeLLMCommandBatch } from '../src/ai/handoff.js';

const here = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const skillsPath = resolve(here, '..', 'SKILLS.md');
const wait = milliseconds => new Promise(resolvePromise => setTimeout(resolvePromise, milliseconds));

function required(name, value) {
  if (typeof value !== 'function') throw new Error(`createAIDirectRouter requires adapter.${name}().`);
  return value;
}

function revisionOf(design) {
  return Number(design?.revision ?? design?.document_revision ?? design?.document?.revision ?? 0);
}


function commandInput(body) {
  if (typeof body === 'string') return body;
  if (body?.text) return body.text;
  if (body?.batch) return body.batch;
  if (body?.commandBatch) return body.commandBatch;
  if (body?.schemaVersion && Array.isArray(body?.commands)) return body;
  if (body?.commands && !Array.isArray(body.commands)) return body.commands;
  return body;
}

function errorResponse(response, error) {
  const status = Number(error.status || error.statusCode || 400);
  response.status(status >= 400 && status < 600 ? status : 500).json({ error: error.message || 'AI route failed.', details: error.details || undefined });
}

/**
 * Mount direct AI routes inside the existing CanvasForge Express server.
 *
 * Required adapter functions:
 * - authorize(req,res,next)
 * - requireEditor(req,res,next)
 * - loadDesign(req, designId) -> design with a `document` property
 * - saveDesign(req, designId, { document, expectedRevision, versionLabel, metadata })
 *
 * Optional adapter functions:
 * - listAssets(req), listBrands(req), listComponents(req)
 * - createExport(req, designId, format, options), getExport(req, exportId)
 */
export function createAIDirectRouter(adapter = {}) {
  const router = express.Router();
  const loadDesign = required('loadDesign', adapter.loadDesign);
  const saveDesign = required('saveDesign', adapter.saveDesign);
  const authorize = required('authorize', adapter.authorize);
  const requireEditor = required('requireEditor', adapter.requireEditor);
  const listAssets = adapter.listAssets || (async () => []);
  const listBrands = adapter.listBrands || (async () => []);
  const listComponents = adapter.listComponents || (async () => []);

  const sendSkills = async (_request, response) => {
    try {
      response.type('text/markdown').send(await readFile(skillsPath, 'utf8'));
    } catch (error) { errorResponse(response, error); }
  };
  router.get(['/api/ai/skills', '/api/ai/skills.md'], sendSkills);
  router.get('/api/ai/capabilities', (_request, response) => response.json(getAICapabilities()));

  router.use(authorize);

  async function loadContext(request) {
    const design = await loadDesign(request, request.params.id);
    if (!design?.document) {
      const error = new Error('Design not found.'); error.status = 404; throw error;
    }
    const [assets, brands, components] = await Promise.all([listAssets(request), listBrands(request), listComponents(request)]);
    return {
      design,
      revision: revisionOf(design),
      assets: assets || [],
      brands: brands || [],
      components: components || []
    };
  }

  router.get('/api/designs/:id/ai/context', async (request, response) => {
    try {
      const loaded = await loadContext(request);
      response.json(createAIContext({
        document: loaded.design.document,
        design: loaded.design,
        pageIndex: Number(request.query.pageIndex || 0),
        selection: String(request.query.selection || '').split(',').filter(Boolean),
        assets: loaded.assets,
        brands: loaded.brands,
        components: loaded.components,
        revision: loaded.revision,
        renderUrl: request.query.renderUrl || null
      }));
    } catch (error) { errorResponse(response, error); }
  });

  router.post('/api/designs/:id/ai/commands/validate', express.json({ limit: '2mb' }), async (request, response) => {
    try {
      const loaded = await loadContext(request);
      const batch = normalizeLLMCommandBatch(commandInput(request.body), { revision: loaded.revision, instruction: request.body?.instruction });
      response.json({ valid: true, batch, validation: validateCommandBatch(batch, { revision: loaded.revision }) });
    } catch (error) { errorResponse(response, error); }
  });

  router.post('/api/designs/:id/ai/commands/preview', express.json({ limit: '2mb' }), async (request, response) => {
    try {
      const loaded = await loadContext(request);
      const batch = normalizeLLMCommandBatch(commandInput(request.body), { revision: loaded.revision, instruction: request.body?.instruction });
      const result = applyCommandBatch(loaded.design.document, batch, {
        pageIndex: Number(request.body?.pageIndex || 0),
        selection: request.body?.selection || [],
        assets: loaded.assets,
        brands: loaded.brands,
        components: loaded.components,
        revision: loaded.revision
      });
      response.json({
        baseRevision: loaded.revision,
        batch,
        document: request.body?.includeDocument === false ? undefined : result.document,
        createdIds: result.createdIds,
        deletedIds: result.deletedIds,
        warnings: result.warnings,
        diff: diffDocuments(loaded.design.document, result.document),
        lint: lintDocument(result.document)
      });
    } catch (error) { errorResponse(response, error); }
  });

  router.post('/api/designs/:id/ai/commands/apply', requireEditor, express.json({ limit: '2mb' }), async (request, response) => {
    try {
      if (request.body?.approved !== true) {
        const error = new Error('Set approved:true to apply AI commands.'); error.status = 409; throw error;
      }
      const loaded = await loadContext(request);
      const batch = normalizeLLMCommandBatch(commandInput(request.body), { revision: loaded.revision, instruction: request.body?.instruction });
      const result = applyCommandBatch(loaded.design.document, batch, {
        pageIndex: Number(request.body?.pageIndex || 0),
        selection: request.body?.selection || [],
        assets: loaded.assets,
        brands: loaded.brands,
        components: loaded.components,
        revision: loaded.revision
      });
      const diff = diffDocuments(loaded.design.document, result.document);
      const saved = await saveDesign(request, request.params.id, {
        document: result.document,
        expectedRevision: loaded.revision,
        versionLabel: request.body?.versionLabel || 'Before direct AI command batch',
        metadata: { source: 'ai-direct-api', instruction: batch.instruction || request.body?.instruction || '', commandCount: batch.commands.length, diff }
      });
      response.json({ design: saved, revision: revisionOf(saved), createdIds: result.createdIds, deletedIds: result.deletedIds, warnings: result.warnings, diff, lint: lintDocument(result.document) });
    } catch (error) { errorResponse(response, error); }
  });

  router.post('/api/designs/:id/ai/render', express.json({ limit: '256kb' }), async (request, response) => {
    try {
      if (!adapter.createExport || !adapter.getExport) {
        const error = new Error('Direct rendering is not configured on this server.'); error.status = 501; throw error;
      }
      let job = await adapter.createExport(request, request.params.id, 'png', {
        multiplier: Number(request.body?.multiplier || 1),
        pageIndex: Number(request.body?.pageIndex || 0),
        purpose: 'ai-preview'
      });
      const deadline = Date.now() + Math.min(180000, Math.max(5000, Number(request.body?.timeoutMs || 120000)));
      while (['queued', 'processing'].includes(job.status) && Date.now() < deadline) {
        await wait(500);
        job = await adapter.getExport(request, job.id);
      }
      if (job.status !== 'completed' || !job.output_url) {
        const error = new Error(job.error || 'Render did not complete before the timeout.'); error.status = 504; throw error;
      }
      response.json({ status: job.status, exportId: job.id, url: job.output_url, pageIndex: Number(request.body?.pageIndex || 0) });
    } catch (error) { errorResponse(response, error); }
  });

  return router;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/billing/stripe.js (2026-07-05 14:49:16) =====
import express from 'express';
import Stripe from 'stripe';

const asObject = value => value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value) ? value : {};
const asPositiveInteger = value => {
  const parsed = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0 ? parsed : null;
};
const safeError = (response, error, status = 500) => response.status(error?.status || status).json({ error: error?.message || 'Billing request failed.' });

function normalizeCreditPackages(input = {}) {
  return Object.entries(asObject(input)).reduce((output, [key, raw]) => {
    const credits = asPositiveInteger(key);
    if (!credits) return output;
    const item = typeof raw === 'string' ? { priceId: raw } : asObject(raw);
    if (!item.priceId) return output;
    output[credits] = {
      credits,
      priceId: item.priceId,
      label: item.label || `${credits.toLocaleString()} credits`,
      priceLabel: item.priceLabel || ''
    };
    return output;
  }, {});
}

function normalizePlans(input = {}) {
  return Object.entries(asObject(input)).reduce((output, [id, raw]) => {
    const item = typeof raw === 'string' ? { priceId: raw } : asObject(raw);
    if (!item.priceId) return output;
    output[id] = { id, priceId: item.priceId, name: item.name || id, monthlyCredits: asPositiveInteger(item.monthlyCredits) || 0 };
    return output;
  }, {});
}

function paymentMethodLabel(method) {
  const card = method?.card;
  if (!card) return method?.type ? method.type.replaceAll('_', ' ') : 'Payment method linked';
  return `${String(card.brand || 'Card').replace(/^./, value => value.toUpperCase())} •••• ${card.last4}`;
}

/**
 * Creates real Stripe Checkout, setup-card, portal, and webhook handlers.
 *
 * Required adapters:
 * - getWorkspace(req) -> { workspaceId, userId, email, name }
 * - billingStore.get(workspaceId)
 * - billingStore.setCustomer(workspaceId, stripeCustomerId)
 * - billingStore.setPaymentMethod(workspaceId, { stripePaymentMethodId, label })
 * - billingStore.setSubscription(workspaceId, subscription)
 * - creditStore.grant({ workspaceId, userId, amount, sourceType, externalReference, description })
 * Optional: creditStore.hasExternalReference(externalReference)
 */
export function createStripeBilling({
  authenticate = (_request, _response, next) => next(),
  getWorkspace,
  billingStore,
  creditStore,
  secretKey = process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY || '',
  webhookSecret = process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET || '',
  appOrigin = process.env.APP_ORIGIN || 'http://localhost:5173',
  currency = process.env.STRIPE_CURRENCY || 'cad',
  plans = {},
  creditPackages = {}
} = {}) {
  if (typeof getWorkspace !== 'function') throw new Error('createStripeBilling requires getWorkspace(req).');
  if (!billingStore?.get || !billingStore?.setCustomer) throw new Error('createStripeBilling requires billingStore.get and billingStore.setCustomer.');
  if (!creditStore?.grant) throw new Error('createStripeBilling requires creditStore.grant.');

  const configured = Boolean(secretKey);
  const stripe = configured ? new Stripe(secretKey) : null;
  const planMap = normalizePlans(plans);
  const packageMap = normalizeCreditPackages(creditPackages);
  const router = express.Router();
  router.use(authenticate);

  const workspaceContext = async request => {
    const value = await getWorkspace(request);
    if (!value?.workspaceId) {
      const error = new Error('Select a workspace before opening billing.');
      error.status = 400;
      throw error;
    }
    return value;
  };

  const assertConfigured = () => {
    if (!stripe) {
      const error = new Error('Stripe is not configured. Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and Stripe Price IDs on the server.');
      error.status = 503;
      throw error;
    }
  };

  const getOrCreateCustomer = async context => {
    const current = await billingStore.get(context.workspaceId);
    if (current?.stripeCustomerId) return current.stripeCustomerId;
    const customer = await stripe.customers.create({
      email: context.email || undefined,
      name: context.name || undefined,
      metadata: { canvasforgeWorkspaceId: String(context.workspaceId) }
    }, { idempotencyKey: `canvasforge-customer-${context.workspaceId}` });
    await billingStore.setCustomer(context.workspaceId, customer.id);
    return customer.id;
  };

  const returnUrl = (status, includeSession = true) => `${appOrigin.replace(/\/$/, '')}/?billing=${encodeURIComponent(status)}${includeSession ? '&session_id={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}' : ''}`;

  router.get('/status', async (request, response) => {
    try {
      const context = await workspaceContext(request);
      const account = await billingStore.get(context.workspaceId) || {};
      response.json({
        provider: 'stripe',
        configured,
        checkoutEnabled: configured && Object.keys(packageMap).length > 0,
        setupCardEnabled: configured,
        portalEnabled: configured && Boolean(account.stripeCustomerId),
        currency,
        hasPaymentMethod: Boolean(account.stripePaymentMethodId || account.hasPaymentMethod),
        paymentMethodLabel: account.paymentMethodLabel || '',
        creditPackages: Object.values(packageMap).map(({ priceId: _priceId, ...item }) => item),
        plans: Object.values(planMap).map(({ priceId: _priceId, ...item }) => item)
      });
    } catch (error) { safeError(response, error); }
  });

  router.post('/credit-topups', async (request, response) => {
    try {
      assertConfigured();
      const context = await workspaceContext(request);
      const amount = asPositiveInteger(request.body?.amount);
      const item = packageMap[amount];
      if (!item) return response.status(400).json({ error: 'Choose one of the available credit packages.' });
      const customer = await getOrCreateCustomer(context);
      const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
        mode: 'payment',
        customer,
        payment_method_types: ['card'],
        line_items: [{ price: item.priceId, quantity: 1 }],
        payment_intent_data: { setup_future_usage: 'off_session' },
        success_url: returnUrl('success'),
        cancel_url: returnUrl('cancelled', false),
        metadata: { kind: 'credit_topup', workspaceId: String(context.workspaceId), userId: String(context.userId || ''), credits: String(amount) }
      }, { idempotencyKey: `credit-topup-${context.workspaceId}-${request.get('idempotency-key') || crypto.randomUUID()}` });
      response.json({ url: session.url, sessionId: session.id });
    } catch (error) { safeError(response, error); }
  });

  router.post('/setup-card', async (request, response) => {
    try {
      assertConfigured();
      const context = await workspaceContext(request);
      const customer = await getOrCreateCustomer(context);
      const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
        mode: 'setup',
        currency,
        customer,
        payment_method_types: ['card'],
        success_url: returnUrl('card-added'),
        cancel_url: returnUrl('cancelled', false),
        metadata: { kind: 'card_setup', workspaceId: String(context.workspaceId), userId: String(context.userId || '') }
      });
      response.json({ url: session.url, sessionId: session.id });
    } catch (error) { safeError(response, error); }
  });

  router.post('/checkout', async (request, response) => {
    try {
      assertConfigured();
      const context = await workspaceContext(request);
      const plan = planMap[String(request.body?.plan || '')];
      if (!plan) return response.status(400).json({ error: 'Choose an available subscription plan.' });
      const customer = await getOrCreateCustomer(context);
      const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
        mode: 'subscription',
        customer,
        line_items: [{ price: plan.priceId, quantity: 1 }],
        success_url: returnUrl('success'),
        cancel_url: returnUrl('cancelled', false),
        subscription_data: { metadata: { canvasforgeWorkspaceId: String(context.workspaceId), plan: plan.id } },
        metadata: { kind: 'subscription', workspaceId: String(context.workspaceId), userId: String(context.userId || ''), plan: plan.id }
      });
      response.json({ url: session.url, sessionId: session.id });
    } catch (error) { safeError(response, error); }
  });

  router.post('/portal', async (request, response) => {
    try {
      assertConfigured();
      const context = await workspaceContext(request);
      const customer = await getOrCreateCustomer(context);
      const session = await stripe.billingPortal.sessions.create({ customer, return_url: appOrigin });
      response.json({ url: session.url });
    } catch (error) { safeError(response, error); }
  });

  const savePaymentMethodFromSetup = async (workspaceId, setupIntentId) => {
    if (!setupIntentId || !billingStore.setPaymentMethod) return;
    const setupIntent = await stripe.setupIntents.retrieve(setupIntentId, { expand: ['payment_method'] });
    const method = setupIntent.payment_method;
    if (!method || typeof method === 'string') return;
    await billingStore.setPaymentMethod(workspaceId, { stripePaymentMethodId: method.id, label: paymentMethodLabel(method) });
  };

  const saveSubscription = async subscription => {
    const workspaceId = subscription?.metadata?.canvasforgeWorkspaceId;
    if (!workspaceId || !billingStore.setSubscription) return;
    await billingStore.setSubscription(workspaceId, {
      stripeSubscriptionId: subscription.id,
      stripeCustomerId: typeof subscription.customer === 'string' ? subscription.customer : subscription.customer?.id,
      status: subscription.status,
      priceId: subscription.items?.data?.[0]?.price?.id || '',
      currentPeriodEnd: subscription.items?.data?.[0]?.current_period_end || null,
      cancelAtPeriodEnd: Boolean(subscription.cancel_at_period_end)
    });
  };

  const webhookHandler = async (request, response) => {
    if (!stripe || !webhookSecret) return response.status(503).send('Stripe webhook is not configured.');
    let event;
    try {
      event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(request.body, request.headers['stripe-signature'], webhookSecret);
    } catch (error) {
      return response.status(400).send(`Webhook signature verification failed: ${error.message}`);
    }
    try {
      if (event.type === 'checkout.session.completed') {
        const session = event.data.object;
        const workspaceId = session.metadata?.workspaceId;
        if (session.metadata?.kind === 'credit_topup' && session.payment_status === 'paid' && workspaceId) {
          const amount = asPositiveInteger(session.metadata.credits);
          const externalReference = `stripe:checkout:${session.id}`;
          const exists = creditStore.hasExternalReference ? await creditStore.hasExternalReference(externalReference) : false;
          if (amount && !exists) await creditStore.grant({ workspaceId, userId: session.metadata.userId || null, amount, sourceType: 'purchased', externalReference, description: `${amount.toLocaleString()} credit purchase` });
        }
        if (session.metadata?.kind === 'card_setup' && workspaceId) await savePaymentMethodFromSetup(workspaceId, session.setup_intent);
        if (session.subscription) await saveSubscription(await stripe.subscriptions.retrieve(session.subscription));
      }
      if (['customer.subscription.created', 'customer.subscription.updated', 'customer.subscription.deleted'].includes(event.type)) await saveSubscription(event.data.object);
      response.json({ received: true });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Stripe webhook processing failed', event?.id, error);
      response.status(500).json({ error: 'Webhook processing failed.' });
    }
  };

  return { router, webhookHandler, configured };
}

export function stripeConfigFromEnv() {
  const parse = (name, fallback = {}) => {
    try { return process.env[name] ? JSON.parse(process.env[name]) : fallback; }
    catch { throw new Error(`${name} must contain valid JSON.`); }
  };
  return {
    secretKey: process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY || '',
    webhookSecret: process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET || '',
    appOrigin: process.env.APP_ORIGIN || 'http://localhost:5173',
    currency: process.env.STRIPE_CURRENCY || 'cad',
    plans: parse('STRIPE_PLANS_JSON'),
    creditPackages: parse('STRIPE_CREDIT_PACKAGES_JSON')
  };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/commercial/aiGateway.js (2026-07-13 02:42:26) =====
import { createLLMHandoffPackage, normalizeLLMCommandBatch } from '../../src/ai/handoff.js';

const MODE_DEFAULTS = {
  fast: { provider: 'openrouter', model: 'openrouter/auto', imageModel: 'bytedance-seed/seedream-4.5', planningCredits: 8, imageCredits: 30 },
  balanced: { provider: 'gemini', model: 'gemini-2.5-flash', imageModel: 'gemini-3.1-flash-image', planningCredits: 18, imageCredits: 55 },
  best: { provider: 'openrouter', model: 'openrouter/auto', imageModel: 'bytedance-seed/seedream-4.5', planningCredits: 40, imageCredits: 110 }
};

const CONCEPT_PREVIEW_DEFAULTS = {
  provider: 'gemini',
  model: 'gemini-3.1-flash-image',
  credits: 30,
  label: 'Nano Banana 2'
};

const envName = value => String(value).toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]+/g, '_');
const routeFor = (mode = 'balanced', kind = 'planning') => {
  const safeMode = MODE_DEFAULTS[mode] ? mode : 'balanced';
  const defaults = MODE_DEFAULTS[safeMode];
  const prefix = `AI_${envName(safeMode)}`;
  return {
    mode: safeMode,
    provider: process.env[`${prefix}_PROVIDER`] || defaults.provider,
    model: process.env[`${prefix}_${kind === 'image' ? 'IMAGE_' : ''}MODEL`] || (kind === 'image' ? process.env.AI_IMAGE_MODEL || defaults.imageModel : defaults.model),
    credits: Math.max(1, Number(process.env[`${prefix}_${kind === 'image' ? 'IMAGE_' : 'PLANNING_'}CREDITS`] || (kind === 'image' ? defaults.imageCredits : defaults.planningCredits)))
  };
};

export function conceptPreviewRoute() {
  return {
    mode: 'concept-preview',
    provider: 'gemini',
    model: process.env.AI_CONCEPT_PREVIEW_MODEL || CONCEPT_PREVIEW_DEFAULTS.model,
    credits: Math.max(1, Number(process.env.AI_CONCEPT_PREVIEW_CREDITS || CONCEPT_PREVIEW_DEFAULTS.credits)),
    label: process.env.AI_CONCEPT_PREVIEW_LABEL || CONCEPT_PREVIEW_DEFAULTS.label,
    engine: 'nano-banana'
  };
}

async function providerFetch(url, options) {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const text = await response.text();
  let payload = {};
  try { payload = text ? JSON.parse(text) : {}; } catch { payload = { raw: text }; }
  if (!response.ok) {
    const message = payload?.error?.message || payload?.error || payload?.message || payload?.raw || `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
    const error = new Error(String(message)); error.status = 502; error.providerStatus = response.status; throw error;
  }
  return payload;
}

function collectText(value, output = []) {
  if (!value) return output;
  if (typeof value === 'string') return output;
  if (Array.isArray(value)) { value.forEach(item => collectText(item, output)); return output; }
  if (typeof value !== 'object') return output;
  for (const [key, item] of Object.entries(value)) {
    if ((key === 'text' || key === 'output_text') && typeof item === 'string') output.push(item);
    else collectText(item, output);
  }
  return output;
}

function extractText(payload) {
  const direct = payload?.output_text || payload?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || payload?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.map(part => part.text || '').join('');
  if (typeof direct === 'string' && direct.trim()) return direct.trim();
  const found = collectText(payload).filter(Boolean);
  if (found.length) return found.join('\n').trim();
  throw new Error('The configured AI provider returned no text response.');
}

const splitDataUrl = value => {
  const match = String(value || '').match(/^data:([^;,]+)?(?:;charset=[^;,]+)?;base64,(.+)$/s);
  if (!match) throw new Error('Visual inputs must be base64 data URLs.');
  return { mimeType: match[1] || 'image/png', data: match[2], dataUrl: value };
};

const normalizeImages = images => (images || [])
  .filter(item => item?.dataUrl)
  .slice(0, 12)
  .map(item => ({ ...splitDataUrl(item.dataUrl), label: item.label || item.name || 'Visual context' }));

async function openRouterText(route, prompt, images, json = true) {
  const key = process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY;
  if (!key) throw new Error('OPENROUTER_API_KEY is not configured on the server.');
  const content = [{ type: 'text', text: prompt }, ...images.map(image => ({ type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: image.dataUrl } }))];
  const payload = await providerFetch('https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${key}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'HTTP-Referer': process.env.PUBLIC_APP_URL || 'https://canvasforge.local', 'X-OpenRouter-Title': 'Design Commons' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ model: route.model, messages: [{ role: 'user', content }], ...(json ? { response_format: { type: 'json_object' } } : {}), temperature: 0.2 })
  });
  return { text: extractText(payload), usage: payload.usage || {} };
}

async function geminiText(route, prompt, images) {
  const key = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY;
  if (!key) throw new Error('GEMINI_API_KEY is not configured on the server.');
  const input = [{ type: 'text', text: prompt }, ...images.flatMap((image, index) => [
    { type: 'text', text: `Visual reference ${index + 1}: ${image.label}` },
    { type: 'image', data: image.data, mime_type: image.mimeType }
  ])];
  const payload = await providerFetch('https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/interactions', {
    method: 'POST', headers: { 'x-goog-api-key': key, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: route.model, input })
  });
  return { text: extractText(payload), usage: payload.usageMetadata || payload.usage || {} };
}

async function deepSeekText(route, prompt, images, json = true) {
  const key = process.env.DEEPSEEK_API_KEY;
  if (!key) throw new Error('DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is not configured on the server.');
  const visualNote = images.length ? '\n\nThe structured prompt describes visual attachments, but this text-only route cannot inspect pixels.' : '';
  const payload = await providerFetch('https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${key}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ model: route.model, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: json ? 'Return exactly one JSON object without markdown.' : 'Follow the requested output format exactly.' }, { role: 'user', content: `${prompt}${visualNote}` }], ...(json ? { response_format: { type: 'json_object' } } : {}), temperature: 0.2, stream: false })
  });
  return { text: extractText(payload), usage: payload.usage || {} };
}

async function generateText(route, prompt, images, json = true) {
  if (route.provider === 'openrouter') return openRouterText(route, prompt, images, json);
  if (route.provider === 'gemini') return geminiText(route, prompt, images);
  if (route.provider === 'deepseek') return deepSeekText(route, prompt, images, json);
  throw new Error(`Unsupported server AI provider route: ${route.provider}.`);
}

function findImageBlock(value) {
  if (!value) return null;
  if (Array.isArray(value)) { for (const item of value) { const found = findImageBlock(item); if (found) return found; } return null; }
  if (typeof value !== 'object') return null;
  if (typeof value.b64_json === 'string') return { data: value.b64_json, mimeType: value.mime_type || value.mimeType || 'image/png' };
  if (value.type === 'image' && typeof value.data === 'string') return { data: value.data, mimeType: value.mime_type || value.mimeType || 'image/png' };
  if (value.output_image?.data) return { data: value.output_image.data, mimeType: value.output_image.mime_type || value.output_image.mimeType || 'image/png' };
  for (const item of Object.values(value)) { const found = findImageBlock(item); if (found) return found; }
  return null;
}

const svgFromText = text => {
  const match = String(text || '').match(/<svg\b[\s\S]*?<\/svg\s*>/i);
  if (!match) throw new Error('The configured model did not return a complete SVG document.');
  return match[0];
};

const SUPPORTED_ASPECT_RATIOS = ['1:8', '1:4', '2:3', '3:4', '4:5', '1:1', '5:4', '4:3', '3:2', '16:9', '21:9', '9:16'];

export function closestImageAspectRatio(width, height) {
  const ratio = Number(width) / Math.max(1, Number(height));
  if (!Number.isFinite(ratio) || ratio <= 0) return '1:1';
  return SUPPORTED_ASPECT_RATIOS.reduce((best, item) => {
    const [w, h] = item.split(':').map(Number);
    const [bestW, bestH] = best.split(':').map(Number);
    return Math.abs(w / h - ratio) < Math.abs(bestW / bestH - ratio) ? item : best;
  }, '1:1');
}

const safeConceptRef = value => String(value || 'selected').replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]+/gi, '-').slice(0, 72) || 'selected';

/**
 * Preserve the approved Nano Banana output exactly while keeping the model's
 * editable reconstruction available on its own page. The exact page is added
 * last so the editor and approval dialog open on the selected visual result.
 */
export function buildApprovedConceptHybridBatch(batchInput = {}, { concept = {}, width = 1080, height = 1080 } = {}) {
  const batch = batchInput && typeof batchInput === 'object' ? batchInput : {};
  const commands = Array.isArray(batch.commands) ? batch.commands : [];
  if (!concept.previewUrl) return {
    commandBatch: { ...batch, commands },
    source: batch.source || 'approved-concept-vision-reconstruction',
    hybrid: null,
    fidelity: null
  };

  const canvasWidth = Math.max(1, Number(width) || 1080);
  const canvasHeight = Math.max(1, Number(height) || 1080);
  const refSuffix = safeConceptRef(concept.id || concept.title);
  const exactPageRef = `approved-preview-page-${refSuffix}`;
  const exactImageRef = `approved-preview-image-${refSuffix}`;
  const exactPageName = `${String(concept.title || 'Approved concept').slice(0, 120)} · Exact preview`;
  const editablePageNames = commands
    .filter(command => command?.op === 'create_page')
    .map(command => command.page?.name || command.name)
    .filter(Boolean);

  const exactCommands = [
    {
      op: 'create_page',
      ref: exactPageRef,
      page: { name: exactPageName, background: '#ffffff' }
    },
    {
      op: 'create_element',
      pageRef: exactPageRef,
      ref: exactImageRef,
      element: {
        type: 'image',
        name: 'Approved Nano Banana preview',
        semanticName: 'Exact approved concept',
        role: 'approved-concept-preview',
        src: concept.previewUrl,
        assetId: null,
        nativeWidth: canvasWidth,
        nativeHeight: canvasHeight,
        x: 0,
        y: 0,
        width: canvasWidth,
        height: canvasHeight,
        radius: 0,
        mask: 'rect',
        opacity: 1,
        locked: true,
        userLocked: true,
        aiEditable: false,
        decorative: false,
        altText: `Approved concept preview: ${String(concept.title || 'selected design')}`
      }
    }
  ];

  return {
    commandBatch: {
      ...batch,
      source: 'approved-concept-hybrid-fidelity',
      commands: [...commands, ...exactCommands]
    },
    source: 'approved-concept-hybrid-fidelity',
    hybrid: {
      mode: 'exact-preview-plus-editable-approximation',
      exactPageName,
      exactPageRef,
      editablePageNames,
      exactPageLocked: true,
      explanation: 'The last page is the exact approved Nano Banana preview. Earlier generated pages remain editable approximations.'
    },
    fidelity: {
      overall: 85,
      categories: { visualMatch: 100, layout: 100, palette: 100, copy: 100, editability: 25 },
      suggestions: ['Use the exact preview page for final output. Use the editable approximation page when individual objects must be changed.'],
      mode: 'hybrid-exact-preview'
    }
  };
}

async function openRouterImage(route, input, images) {
  const key = process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY;
  if (!key) throw new Error('OPENROUTER_API_KEY is not configured on the server.');
  const payload = await providerFetch('https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/images', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${key}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'HTTP-Referer': process.env.PUBLIC_APP_URL || 'https://canvasforge.local', 'X-OpenRouter-Title': 'Design Commons' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ model: route.model, prompt: input.prompt, aspect_ratio: input.aspectRatio || '1:1', background: input.transparent ? 'transparent' : 'auto', output_format: 'png', input_references: images.map(image => ({ image_url: image.dataUrl })) })
  });
  const block = findImageBlock(payload?.data || payload);
  if (!block) throw new Error('OpenRouter returned no generated image.');
  return { dataUrl: `data:${block.mimeType};base64,${block.data}`, mimeType: block.mimeType, usage: payload.usage || {} };
}

async function geminiImage(route, input, images) {
  const key = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY;
  if (!key) throw new Error('GEMINI_API_KEY is not configured on the server.');
  const requestInput = [{ type: 'text', text: input.prompt }, ...images.flatMap((image, index) => [
    { type: 'text', text: `Reference image ${index + 1}: ${image.label}` },
    { type: 'image', data: image.data, mime_type: image.mimeType }
  ])];
  const payload = await providerFetch('https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/interactions', {
    method: 'POST', headers: { 'x-goog-api-key': key, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ model: route.model, input: requestInput, response_format: { type: 'image', mime_type: 'image/jpeg', aspect_ratio: input.aspectRatio || '1:1', image_size: input.imageSize || '1K' } })
  });
  const block = findImageBlock(payload);
  if (!block) throw new Error('Gemini returned no generated image.');
  return { dataUrl: `data:${block.mimeType};base64,${block.data}`, mimeType: block.mimeType, usage: payload.usageMetadata || payload.usage || {} };
}

export function aiCapabilities() {
  const preview = conceptPreviewRoute();
  return {
    managed: true,
    modes: Object.keys(MODE_DEFAULTS).map(mode => ({ id: mode, planningCredits: routeFor(mode, 'planning').credits, imageCredits: routeFor(mode, 'image').credits })),
    conceptPreviews: { provider: preview.provider, model: preview.model, credits: preview.credits, label: preview.label, engine: preview.engine },
    providerKeysExposed: false
  };
}

export async function tagImage(input) {
  const route = routeFor(input.mode, 'planning');
  const images = normalizeImages([{ dataUrl: input.dataUrl, label: 'Image to tag' }]);
  const prompt = 'Analyze this image and generate 5-10 concise descriptive tags. Return ONLY a JSON object with a single key "tags" containing an array of strings. Use lowercase, single-word or hyphenated English tags describing subjects, objects, colors, style, mood, and composition. Example: {"tags":["sunset","ocean","nature","horizon","orange","calm","landscape"]}';
  const result = await generateText(route, prompt, images, true);
  let tags = [];
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(result.text);
    if (Array.isArray(parsed?.tags)) tags = parsed.tags.map(v => String(v).trim().toLowerCase().slice(0, 100)).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20);
    else if (Array.isArray(parsed)) tags = parsed.map(v => String(v).trim().toLowerCase().slice(0, 100)).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20);
  } catch {
    const match = result.text.match(/\[[\s\S]*?\]/);
    if (match) try { tags = JSON.parse(match[0]).map(v => String(v).trim().toLowerCase().slice(0, 100)).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20); } catch { /* fall through */ }
  }
  return { route, tags, usage: result.usage };
}

function briefValue(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.filter(Boolean).join(', ');
  if (value && typeof value === 'object') return JSON.stringify(value);
  return String(value || 'Not specified');
}

export async function generateAIConcepts(input) {
  const route = routeFor(input.mode, 'planning');
  const context = input.context || {};
  const brief = input.brief || {};
  const instruction = input.instruction || '';
  const count = Math.min(Number(input.count) || 3, 5);
  const refinement = input.refinement || '';
  const parentConceptId = input.parentConceptId || null;
  const steering = input.steering || [];
  const randomize = input.randomize === true;
  const variationNonce = input.variationNonce || '';

  const designSummary = context.design
    ? `Design canvas: ${context.design.width || '?'}×${context.design.height || '?'} ${context.design.unit || 'px'}, ${(context.design.pages || []).length || 1} page(s). Current page has ${(context.currentPage?.elements || context.design.pages?.[0]?.elements || []).length} elements.`
    : 'No current design metadata was supplied.';

  const steeringHistory = steering.length
    ? `\nPrevious steering feedback:\n${steering.map((s, i) => `${i + 1}. ${s.content}`).join('\n')}`
    : '';
  const refinementNote = refinement
    ? `\nThis is a targeted redesign of the selected parent concept. Parent concept ID: ${parentConceptId || 'none'}. Required revision: ${refinement}`
    : randomize
      ? `\nThis is a fresh redesign pass. Do not merely recolor or rearrange the earlier concepts. Create three materially different visual directions. Variation token: ${variationNonce || 'fresh-pass'}.`
      : '';

  const prompt = `You are the request-understanding and creative-direction stage of a professional design agent.

First, interpret the user's actual deliverable. Determine whether this is a new design, a revision, or an asset request; identify the design type, purpose, audience, required copy, visual constraints, and what must be preserved. Do not assume the user asked for a web form, wireframe, or editor UI unless they explicitly did.

Then generate ${count} genuinely different visual directions for the requested finished design.

USER INSTRUCTION:
${instruction}

CREATIVE BRIEF:
Task type: ${brief.taskType || brief.intent || 'Not specified'}
Deliverable: ${brief.deliverable || 'Not specified'}
Goal: ${brief.goal || instruction || 'Not specified'}
Audience: ${brief.audience || 'Not specified'}
Style preferences: ${briefValue(brief.style)}
Exact supplied copy: ${briefValue(brief.exactCopy)}
Existing text to preserve: ${briefValue((brief.existingText || []).map(item => item.text))}
Constraints: ${briefValue(brief.constraints)}
Must-use asset IDs: ${briefValue(brief.mustUseAssetIds)}
Must-use assets: ${briefValue((brief.mustUseAssets || []).map(asset => `${asset.name}${asset.description ? ` — ${asset.description}` : ''}`))}
Optional assets: ${briefValue((brief.optionalAssets || []).map(asset => `${asset.name}${asset.description ? ` — ${asset.description}` : ''}`))}

${designSummary}${steeringHistory}${refinementNote}

Preview requirements:
- Each direction must depict the finished design itself as a flat, front-facing canvas, not a screenshot of an editor and not a product mockup.
- Use meaningful, legible wording. Never invent gibberish or random characters.
- If the user supplied exact wording, preserve it exactly.
- If copy is missing, keep typography minimal and intentional rather than filling the design with placeholder text.
- Make the three directions materially different in composition, hierarchy, typography, palette, and imagery—not three slight recolors.
- When must-use assets are supplied, every direction must visibly incorporate them or reserve a clear intentional placement for them.
- The preview prompt must include enough layout detail for an image model to render the entire composition and explicitly mention how the supplied assets are used.

Return ONLY one JSON object with this shape:
{
  "understanding": {
    "action": "new_design | revise_design | create_asset | revise_asset | resize_or_adapt | create_template | hybrid",
    "deliverable": "plain-language design type",
    "summary": "one concise sentence explaining what will be designed",
    "audience": "audience or empty string",
    "requiredCopy": ["exact strings that must appear"],
    "preserve": ["things that must not change"],
    "constraints": ["important constraints"]
  },
  "concepts": [
    {
      "title": "3-5 word direction name",
      "description": "one concise paragraph describing the finished visual direction",
      "prompt": "complete image-generation prompt for the flat finished design",
      "negativePrompt": "things to avoid",
      "palette": ["#hex"],
      "layout": "short layout description",
      "typography": "short type direction",
      "seed": 12345
    }
  ]
}`;

  const images = normalizeImages(input.visuals || []);
  const result = await generateText(route, prompt, images, true);
  let concepts = [];
  let understanding = null;
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(result.text);
    const raw = Array.isArray(parsed?.concepts) ? parsed.concepts : (Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : []);
    understanding = parsed?.understanding && typeof parsed.understanding === 'object' ? parsed.understanding : null;
    concepts = raw.slice(0, count).map((c, i) => ({
      id: c.id || `concept-${i + 1}`,
      title: c.title || `Concept ${i + 1}`,
      description: c.description || '',
      prompt: c.prompt || '',
      negativePrompt: c.negativePrompt || '',
      palette: Array.isArray(c.palette) ? c.palette.slice(0, 8) : [],
      layout: c.layout || '',
      typography: c.typography || '',
      seed: typeof c.seed === 'number' ? c.seed : Math.floor(Math.random() * 2147483647)
    }));
  } catch {
    concepts = Array.from({ length: count }, (_, i) => ({
      id: `concept-${i + 1}`,
      title: `Concept ${i + 1}`,
      description: result.text.slice(0, 200),
      prompt: instruction,
      negativePrompt: '',
      palette: [],
      layout: '',
      typography: '',
      seed: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2147483647)
    }));
  }
  understanding ||= {
    action: brief.taskType || 'new_design',
    deliverable: brief.deliverable || 'design',
    summary: `Create ${brief.deliverable || 'a design'} for: ${brief.goal || instruction}`.slice(0, 240),
    audience: brief.audience || '',
    requiredCopy: brief.exactCopy || [],
    preserve: brief.constraints?.preserveExisting ? ['existing content and locked elements'] : [],
    constraints: []
  };
  return { route, concepts, understanding, usage: result.usage };
}

export function buildConceptPreviewPrompt(input = {}) {
  const concept = input.concept || {};
  const understanding = input.understanding || {};
  const brief = input.brief || {};
  const exactCopy = [...new Set([
    ...(understanding.requiredCopy || []),
    ...(brief.exactCopy || []),
    ...(brief.constraints?.preserveExactText ? (brief.existingText || []).map(item => item.text) : [])
  ].map(value => String(value || '').trim()).filter(Boolean))];
  const parentInstruction = input.parentConceptId || input.refinement
    ? `The first reference image is the selected parent preview. Preserve its successful visual identity and composition unless the revision instruction explicitly changes them. Revision instruction: ${input.refinement || 'Create a refined variation.'}`
    : input.randomize
      ? 'Create a fresh direction that is materially different from prior concepts. Do not merely recolor, mirror, or slightly rearrange an earlier design.'
      : 'Create this direction independently while respecting any supplied brand or asset references.';

  const referenceSummary = (input.references || [])
    .slice(0, 8)
    .map((reference, index) => `${index + 1}. ${reference.label || `Reference ${index + 1}`} (${reference.kind || 'reference'}${reference.required ? ', required' : ''}${reference.description ? ` — ${reference.description}` : ''})`)
    .join('\n');

  return `Generate one low-resolution visual concept preview for a professional design editor.

USER REQUEST:
${input.instruction || brief.goal || ''}

UNDERSTOOD DELIVERABLE:
${understanding.summary || brief.deliverable || 'A finished graphic design'}
Action: ${understanding.action || brief.taskType || 'new_design'}
Audience: ${understanding.audience || brief.audience || 'Not specified'}
Canvas: ${input.width || '?'} × ${input.height || '?'}

SELECTED VISUAL DIRECTION:
Title: ${concept.title || 'Untitled direction'}
Description: ${concept.description || ''}
Layout: ${concept.layout || 'Use a coherent professional layout.'}
Typography: ${concept.typography || 'Use legible professional typography.'}
Palette: ${(concept.palette || []).join(', ') || 'Choose an appropriate cohesive palette.'}
Direction prompt: ${concept.prompt || ''}

${parentInstruction}

VISUAL REFERENCES:
${referenceSummary || 'No direct reference images were supplied.'}

RENDERING RULES:
- Render exactly one complete, flat, front-facing design canvas, edge to edge.
- Do not show an editor UI, browser window, device, desk, hand, room scene, printed mockup, tilted card, perspective view, or surrounding presentation board.
- Make the composition look like the requested finished artifact, not a wireframe.
- Keep all typography legible and intentional. Never output gibberish, pseudo-letters, random words, or duplicated text.
- Exact required copy: ${exactCopy.length ? exactCopy.map(value => `"${value}"`).join(', ') : 'No exact copy supplied; use only minimal meaningful labels directly implied by the request.'}
- If a reference is marked required, directly use that reference as the imagery source rather than inventing a substitute.
- Leave intentional blank areas where user-entered details will later be added instead of filling them with nonsense text.
- Maintain safe margins, clear hierarchy, balanced spacing, and strong contrast.
- This is a concept preview only; prioritize composition and direction over tiny production detail.
- Avoid: ${concept.negativePrompt || 'watermark, illegible text, clipped content, overlap, malformed lettering, editor chrome, mockup scene'}.

Return only the generated image.`;
}

async function generateAssetWithRoute(input, route) {
  const images = normalizeImages(input.references);
  if (input.kind === 'svg') {
    const instruction = `Create a production-ready SVG asset from this request. Return only one complete <svg> document with a viewBox. Do not include scripts, event handlers, foreignObject, external URLs, or embedded raster images.\n\n${input.prompt}`;
    const result = await generateText(route, instruction, images, false);
    const svg = svgFromText(result.text);
    return { route, kind: 'svg', svg, mimeType: 'image/svg+xml', dataUrl: `data:image/svg+xml;base64,${Buffer.from(svg).toString('base64')}`, usage: result.usage };
  }
  if (route.provider === 'deepseek') throw new Error('The selected server route supports SVG generation but not raster images.');
  const generated = route.provider === 'gemini' ? await geminiImage(route, input, images) : await openRouterImage(route, input, images);
  return { route, kind: 'raster', ...generated };
}

export async function generateAIConceptPreview(input) {
  const route = conceptPreviewRoute();
  const prompt = buildConceptPreviewPrompt(input);
  const generated = await generateAssetWithRoute({
    kind: 'raster',
    prompt,
    references: input.references || input.visuals || [],
    aspectRatio: input.aspectRatio || closestImageAspectRatio(input.width, input.height),
    imageSize: input.imageSize || '1K',
    transparent: false
  }, route);
  return {
    ...generated,
    previewEngine: route.engine,
    previewLabel: route.label,
    previewProvider: route.provider,
    previewModel: route.model
  };
}

export async function generateAIImage(input, mode = 'balanced') {
  if (input.purpose === 'concept-preview') {
    return generateAIConceptPreview({
      ...input,
      concept: input.concept || {
        title: input.title || 'Visual direction',
        description: input.description || '',
        prompt: input.prompt || '',
        negativePrompt: input.negativePrompt || '',
        palette: input.palette || [],
        layout: input.layout || '',
        typography: input.typography || ''
      },
      references: input.references || []
    });
  }
  const route = routeFor(mode, 'image');
  return generateAssetWithRoute({
    prompt: input.prompt,
    kind: 'raster',
    references: input.references || [],
    aspectRatio: input.aspectRatio || closestImageAspectRatio(input.width, input.height),
    imageSize: input.imageSize || '1K',
    transparent: false
  }, route);
}

export async function planDesign(input) {
  const route = routeFor(input.mode, 'planning');
  const images = normalizeImages(input.visuals);
  const handoff = createLLMHandoffPackage({ context: input.context, request: input.instruction, scope: input.options?.scope || 'page', skillsUrl: 'skills.md', visuals: images.map((item, index) => ({ label: item.label, pageIndex: input.visuals?.[index]?.pageIndex, kind: input.visuals?.[index]?.kind })) });
  const result = await generateText(route, handoff.prompt, images, true);
  const batch = normalizeLLMCommandBatch(result.text, { revision: input.context?.design?.revision, instruction: input.instruction });
  return { route, batch, usage: result.usage };
}

export async function generateAsset(input) {
  return generateAssetWithRoute(input, routeFor(input.mode, 'image'));
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/commercial/index.js (2026-07-13 02:42:28) =====
export { CommercialStore } from './store.js';
export { createCommercialRouter } from './router.js';
export { aiCapabilities, buildApprovedConceptHybridBatch, buildConceptPreviewPrompt, closestImageAspectRatio, conceptPreviewRoute, generateAIConceptPreview, generateAsset, planDesign } from './aiGateway.js';
export { createStripeServices, createStripeWebhookHandler } from './stripe.js';
export { migrateLegacyAccounts, migrateResourceOwnership } from './resourceMigration.js';

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/commercial/resourceMigration.js (2026-07-04 14:52:58) =====
import { DatabaseSync } from 'node:sqlite';
import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
import { CommercialStore } from './store.js';

const tableExists = (db, table) => !!db.prepare("SELECT 1 FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name=?").get(table);
const columns = (db, table) => new Set(db.prepare(`PRAGMA table_info(${JSON.stringify(table)})`).all().map(item => item.name));
const addColumn = (db, table, definition) => {
  const name = definition.trim().split(/\s+/)[0];
  if (!columns(db, table).has(name)) db.exec(`ALTER TABLE ${table} ADD COLUMN ${definition}`);
};

const RESOURCE_COLUMNS = {
  designs: ['workspace_id TEXT', 'created_by_user_id TEXT', "visibility TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'workspace'"],
  assets: ['workspace_id TEXT', 'created_by_user_id TEXT', "visibility TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'workspace'", "source_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'upload'", 'source_job_id TEXT', 'original_owner_workspace_id TEXT', 'marketplace_listing_id TEXT', 'license_id TEXT', 'ai_generated INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0'],
  asset_folders: ['workspace_id TEXT', 'created_by_user_id TEXT', "visibility TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'workspace'", 'parent_id TEXT', 'system_key TEXT'],
  templates: ['workspace_id TEXT', 'created_by_user_id TEXT', 'folder_id TEXT', "visibility TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'workspace'", 'marketplace_listing_id TEXT', 'license_id TEXT'],
  components: ['workspace_id TEXT', 'created_by_user_id TEXT', "visibility TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'workspace'"],
  brand_kits: ['workspace_id TEXT', 'created_by_user_id TEXT', "visibility TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'workspace'"],
  exports: ['workspace_id TEXT', 'created_by_user_id TEXT'],
  shares: ['workspace_id TEXT', 'created_by_user_id TEXT']
};

export function migrateResourceOwnership(filename = process.env.CANVASFORGE_DB || 'data/canvasforge.sqlite') {
  const db = new DatabaseSync(filename);
  db.exec('BEGIN IMMEDIATE');
  try {
    for (const [table, definitions] of Object.entries(RESOURCE_COLUMNS)) {
      if (!tableExists(db, table)) continue;
      definitions.forEach(definition => addColumn(db, table, definition));
      const current = columns(db, table);
      if (current.has('organization_id') && current.has('workspace_id')) db.exec(`UPDATE ${table} SET workspace_id=organization_id WHERE workspace_id IS NULL`);
      if (current.has('user_id') && current.has('created_by_user_id')) db.exec(`UPDATE ${table} SET created_by_user_id=user_id WHERE created_by_user_id IS NULL`);
      if (current.has('owner_user_id') && current.has('created_by_user_id')) db.exec(`UPDATE ${table} SET created_by_user_id=owner_user_id WHERE created_by_user_id IS NULL`);
      db.exec(`CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_${table}_workspace ON ${table}(workspace_id)`);
    }
    db.exec('COMMIT');
  } catch (error) { db.exec('ROLLBACK'); db.close(); throw error; }
  db.close();
}

const firstExistingTable = (db, names) => names.find(name => tableExists(db, name));
const pickColumn = (set, names) => names.find(name => set.has(name));

export function migrateLegacyAccounts({ legacyDbPath = process.env.CANVASFORGE_DB || 'data/canvasforge.sqlite', commercialDbPath = process.env.CANVASFORGE_COMMERCIAL_DB || 'data/canvasforge-commercial.sqlite' } = {}) {
  const legacy = new DatabaseSync(legacyDbPath);
  const commercial = new CommercialStore(commercialDbPath);
  const usersTable = firstExistingTable(legacy, ['users', 'app_users']);
  if (usersTable) {
    const userColumns = columns(legacy, usersTable);
    const id = pickColumn(userColumns, ['id', 'user_id']);
    const name = pickColumn(userColumns, ['name', 'display_name']);
    const email = pickColumn(userColumns, ['email']);
    if (id) {
      const rows = legacy.prepare(`SELECT ${id} AS id,${name || "''"} AS name,${email || "''"} AS email FROM ${usersTable}`).all();
      rows.forEach(user => commercial.ensurePersonalWorkspace(user));
    }
  }

  const organizationsTable = firstExistingTable(legacy, ['organizations', 'workspaces']);
  const membersTable = firstExistingTable(legacy, ['organization_members', 'workspace_members', 'memberships']);
  if (organizationsTable) {
    const orgColumns = columns(legacy, organizationsTable);
    const idCol = pickColumn(orgColumns, ['id', 'organization_id', 'workspace_id']);
    const nameCol = pickColumn(orgColumns, ['name', 'title']);
    const createdCol = pickColumn(orgColumns, ['created_at']);
    const orgRows = legacy.prepare(`SELECT ${idCol} AS id,${nameCol || "'Organization'"} AS name,${createdCol || "datetime('now')"} AS created_at FROM ${organizationsTable}`).all();
    for (const org of orgRows) {
      let memberships = [];
      if (membersTable) {
        const memberColumns = columns(legacy, membersTable);
        const orgMemberCol = pickColumn(memberColumns, ['organization_id', 'workspace_id']);
        const userCol = pickColumn(memberColumns, ['user_id']);
        const roleCol = pickColumn(memberColumns, ['role']);
        if (orgMemberCol && userCol) memberships = legacy.prepare(`SELECT ${userCol} AS user_id,${roleCol || "'viewer'"} AS role FROM ${membersTable} WHERE ${orgMemberCol}=?`).all(org.id);
      }
      const owner = memberships.find(item => item.role === 'owner')?.user_id || memberships[0]?.user_id;
      if (!owner) continue;
      const createdAt = org.created_at || new Date().toISOString();
      commercial.db.prepare('INSERT OR IGNORE INTO workspaces (id,type,name,slug,owner_user_id,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(org.id, 'organization', org.name || 'Organization', `${String(org.name || 'organization').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')}-${String(org.id).slice(0, 8)}`, owner, createdAt, createdAt);
      commercial.db.prepare('INSERT OR IGNORE INTO billing_accounts (workspace_id,plan_code,subscription_status,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(org.id, 'team_free', 'active', createdAt, createdAt);
      for (const member of memberships) commercial.db.prepare('INSERT OR IGNORE INTO workspace_members (workspace_id,user_id,role,status,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(org.id, member.user_id, member.role || 'viewer', 'active', createdAt);
      commercial.ensureDefaultFolders(org.id, owner);
    }
  }
  legacy.close(); commercial.db.close();
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/commercial/router.js (2026-07-13 02:42:39) =====
import express from 'express';
import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
import { CommercialStore } from './store.js';
import { aiCapabilities, buildApprovedConceptHybridBatch, generateAsset, generateAIConceptPreview, generateAIConcepts, generateAIImage, planDesign, tagImage } from './aiGateway.js';

const asyncRoute = handler => (req, res, next) => Promise.resolve(handler(req, res, next)).catch(next);
const cleanUser = req => req.auth?.user || req.user || req.session?.user || null;

export function createCommercialRouter(options = {}) {
  const router = express.Router();
  const store = options.store || new CommercialStore(options.dbPath);
  const services = options.services || {};

  const requireUser = asyncRoute(async (req, res, next) => {
    if (options.authenticate) await options.authenticate(req, res);
    const user = cleanUser(req);
    if (!user?.id) { const error = new Error('Authentication required.'); error.status = 401; throw error; }
    req.commercialUser = user;
    next();
  });

  const requireWorkspace = asyncRoute(async (req, res, next) => {
    const user = req.commercialUser || cleanUser(req);
    const workspaceId = req.get('x-workspace-id') || req.get('x-organization-id') || req.body?.workspaceId || req.query?.workspaceId;
    if (!workspaceId) { const error = new Error('Choose a workspace first.'); error.status = 400; throw error; }
    req.commercialWorkspaceId = workspaceId;
    req.commercialMembership = store.requireMembership(workspaceId, user.id);
    next();
  });

  if (services.loginUser && services.issueSession) router.post('/api/auth/login', asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const user = await services.loginUser({ email: req.body?.email, password: req.body?.password, request: req });
    const personal = store.ensurePersonalWorkspace(user);
    const token = await services.issueSession(user, req);
    const workspaces = store.listWorkspaces(user.id);
    res.json({ token, user, workspaces, currentWorkspaceId: workspaces[0]?.id || personal.id });
  }));

  router.post('/api/auth/register', asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    if (!services.createUser || !services.issueSession) { const error = new Error('Connect createUser and issueSession when mounting the commercial router.'); error.status = 501; throw error; }
    const user = await services.createUser({ name: req.body?.name, email: req.body?.email, password: req.body?.password });
    const personal = store.ensurePersonalWorkspace(user);
    const token = await services.issueSession(user, req);
    res.status(201).json({ token, user, workspaces: store.listWorkspaces(user.id), currentWorkspaceId: personal.id });
  }));

  router.get('/api/auth/me', requireUser, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const personal = store.ensurePersonalWorkspace(req.commercialUser);
    const workspaces = store.listWorkspaces(req.commercialUser.id);
    const requested = req.get('x-workspace-id') || req.get('x-organization-id');
    res.json({ user: req.commercialUser, workspaces, currentWorkspaceId: workspaces.some(item => item.id === requested) ? requested : (workspaces[0]?.id || personal.id) });
  }));

  router.get('/api/workspaces', requireUser, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    store.ensurePersonalWorkspace(req.commercialUser);
    res.json(store.listWorkspaces(req.commercialUser.id));
  }));
  router.post('/api/workspaces', requireUser, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.status(201).json(store.createWorkspace(req.commercialUser.id, req.body || {}))));
  router.get('/api/workspaces/current/members', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const members = store.listMembers(req.commercialWorkspaceId);
    res.json(services.resolveUsers ? await services.resolveUsers(members) : members);
  }));
  router.post('/api/workspaces/current/invitations', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.status(201).json(store.invite(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, req.body?.email, req.body?.role))));
  router.patch('/api/workspaces/current/members/:id', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(store.updateMember(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, req.params.id, req.body?.role))));
  router.delete('/api/workspaces/current/members/:id', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => { store.removeMember(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, req.params.id); res.status(204).end(); }));

  router.get('/api/billing/summary', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(store.billingSummary(req.commercialWorkspaceId))));
  router.get('/api/credits/ledger', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json({ entries: store.ledger(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.query.limit) })));
  router.post('/api/billing/checkout', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    store.requireMembership(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, ['owner','admin','billing_manager']);
    if (!services.createCheckout) { const error = new Error('Stripe checkout is not configured.'); error.status = 501; throw error; }
    res.json(await services.createCheckout({ workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, user: req.commercialUser, ...req.body }));
  }));
  router.post('/api/billing/credit-topups', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    store.requireMembership(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, ['owner','admin','billing_manager']);
    if (!services.createCreditTopup) { const error = new Error('Credit top-up checkout is not configured.'); error.status = 501; throw error; }
    res.json(await services.createCreditTopup({ workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, user: req.commercialUser, amount: req.body?.amount }));
  }));
  router.post('/api/billing/portal', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    store.requireMembership(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, ['owner','admin','billing_manager']);
    if (!services.createBillingPortal) { const error = new Error('Stripe billing portal is not configured.'); error.status = 501; throw error; }
    res.json(await services.createBillingPortal({ workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, user: req.commercialUser }));
  }));

  router.get('/api/ai/capabilities', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(aiCapabilities())));
  router.get('/api/ai/usage', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json({ availableCredits: store.availableCredits(req.commercialWorkspaceId), recent: store.recentAIUsage(req.commercialWorkspaceId) })));

  const BYPASS_BILLING_EMAILS = ['luan.ngo@live.com'];

  router.post('/api/designs/:designId/ai/plan', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const input = req.body || {};
    const mode = input.options?.mode || 'balanced';
    const capabilities = aiCapabilities();
    const estimate = capabilities.modes.find(item => item.id === mode)?.planningCredits || 18;
    const preliminary = { workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, userId: req.commercialUser.id, jobType: 'design_plan', mode, provider: 'pending', model: 'pending', estimatedCredits: estimate };
    const bypass = BYPASS_BILLING_EMAILS.includes(req.commercialUser.email);
    const reservation = bypass ? { id: 'bypass', amount: 0 } : store.reserveCredits(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, estimate, 'AI design generation');
    let jobId = null;
    try {
      const planned = await planDesign({ ...input, mode });
      preliminary.provider = planned.route.provider; preliminary.model = planned.route.model;
      jobId = store.createAIJob(preliminary);
      const charged = bypass ? 0 : store.settleReservation(reservation.id, planned.route.credits, { entryType: 'ai_usage', aiJobId: jobId, description: `AI design · ${mode}` });
      store.completeAIJob(jobId, { chargedCredits: charged, inputTokens: planned.usage?.prompt_tokens || planned.usage?.promptTokenCount, outputTokens: planned.usage?.completion_tokens || planned.usage?.candidatesTokenCount });
      res.json({ ...planned.batch, billing: { jobId, creditsCharged: charged, mode } });
    } catch (error) {
      if (!bypass) store.releaseReservation(reservation.id);
      if (jobId) store.completeAIJob(jobId, { status: 'failed', errorCode: error.message });
      throw error;
    }
  }));

  router.post('/api/designs/:designId/ai/agent/concepts', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const input = req.body || {};
    const mode = input.quality === 'high' ? 'best' : (input.quality === 'low' ? 'fast' : 'balanced');
    const capabilities = aiCapabilities();
    const count = Math.max(1, Math.min(Number(input.count) || 3, 5));
    const renderPreviews = input.generatePreviews !== false;
    const planningEstimate = capabilities.modes.find(item => item.id === mode)?.planningCredits || 8;
    const previewEstimate = renderPreviews ? (capabilities.conceptPreviews?.credits || 30) * count : 0;
    const totalEstimate = planningEstimate + previewEstimate;
    const bypass = BYPASS_BILLING_EMAILS.includes(req.commercialUser.email);
    const reservation = bypass ? { id: 'bypass', amount: 0 } : store.reserveCredits(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, totalEstimate, 'AI concept generation and previews');
    let jobId = null;
    try {
      const result = await generateAIConcepts({ ...input, count, mode });
      let previewSuccesses = 0;
      let previewUsage = [];
      let concepts = result.concepts;
      if (renderPreviews) {
        const width = Number(input.context?.design?.width || input.width || 1080);
        const height = Number(input.context?.design?.height || input.height || 1080);
        const generated = await Promise.allSettled(result.concepts.map(concept => generateAIConceptPreview({
          instruction: input.instruction,
          brief: input.brief,
          understanding: result.understanding,
          concept,
          width,
          height,
          references: input.visuals || [],
          refinement: input.refinement || '',
          parentConceptId: input.parentConceptId || null,
          randomize: input.randomize === true,
          imageSize: input.previewImageSize || '1K'
        })));
        concepts = result.concepts.map((concept, index) => {
          const item = generated[index];
          if (item.status === 'fulfilled') {
            previewSuccesses += 1;
            previewUsage.push(item.value.usage || {});
            return {
              ...concept,
              previewUrl: item.value.dataUrl,
              previewMode: 'nano-banana',
              previewEngine: item.value.previewEngine,
              previewLabel: item.value.previewLabel,
              previewProvider: item.value.previewProvider,
              previewModel: item.value.previewModel
            };
          }
          return { ...concept, previewMode: 'structured-fallback', previewError: item.reason?.message || 'Nano Banana preview generation failed.' };
        });
      }
      const previewModel = concepts.find(item => item.previewModel)?.previewModel;
      const provider = previewSuccesses ? `${result.route.provider}+gemini` : result.route.provider;
      const model = previewModel ? `${result.route.model}+${previewModel}` : result.route.model;
      jobId = store.createAIJob({ workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, userId: req.commercialUser.id, jobType: 'agent_concepts', mode, provider, model, estimatedCredits: totalEstimate });
      const actualCredits = (result.route.credits || planningEstimate) + previewSuccesses * (capabilities.conceptPreviews?.credits || 30);
      const charged = bypass ? 0 : store.settleReservation(reservation.id, actualCredits, { entryType: 'ai_usage', aiJobId: jobId, description: `AI concepts + Nano Banana previews · ${mode}` });
      store.completeAIJob(jobId, {
        chargedCredits: charged,
        imageCount: previewSuccesses,
        inputTokens: (result.usage?.prompt_tokens || result.usage?.promptTokenCount || 0) + previewUsage.reduce((sum, usage) => sum + (usage.prompt_tokens || usage.promptTokenCount || 0), 0),
        outputTokens: (result.usage?.completion_tokens || result.usage?.candidatesTokenCount || 0) + previewUsage.reduce((sum, usage) => sum + (usage.completion_tokens || usage.candidatesTokenCount || 0), 0)
      });
      res.json({
        understanding: result.understanding,
        concepts,
        previewEngine: capabilities.conceptPreviews,
        billing: { jobId, creditsCharged: charged, mode }
      });
    } catch (error) {
      if (!bypass) store.releaseReservation(reservation.id);
      if (jobId) store.completeAIJob(jobId, { status: 'failed', errorCode: error.message });
      throw error;
    }
  }));

  router.post('/api/designs/:designId/ai/agent/compile', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const input = req.body || {};
    const concept = input.concept || {};
    if (!concept.previewUrl && !concept.commandBatch) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'The selected concept has no preview or command bundle to compile.' });
    const mode = input.quality === 'high' ? 'best' : 'balanced';
    const capabilities = aiCapabilities();
    const estimate = capabilities.modes.find(item => item.id === mode)?.planningCredits || 18;
    const bypass = BYPASS_BILLING_EMAILS.includes(req.commercialUser.email);
    const reservation = bypass ? { id: 'bypass', amount: 0 } : store.reserveCredits(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, estimate, 'Compile approved AI concept');
    let jobId = null;
    try {
      const exactCopy = [
        ...(input.brief?.exactCopy || []),
        ...(input.brief?.constraints?.preserveExactText ? (input.brief?.existingText || []).map(item => item.text) : [])
      ].filter(Boolean);
      const instruction = `Reconstruct the approved visual concept as an editable Design Commons document.

Original user request: ${input.brief?.goal || input.instruction || ''}
Approved direction: ${concept.title || 'Selected concept'} — ${concept.description || ''}
Exact copy to preserve: ${exactCopy.length ? JSON.stringify(exactCopy) : 'Use only meaningful wording visible in the reference and implied by the user request.'}

The first visual input is the approved Nano Banana concept preview, and it is the authoritative source of truth for the editable reconstruction. Match its composition, hierarchy, palette, typography character, spacing, and imagery as closely as the supported editable command system allows. Use native text, shapes, frames, managed assets, and generated assets rather than flattening the whole page into one image. Keep important text editable and semantic. Do not add random wording. If you cannot match a visual idea perfectly, preserve the closest visible structure and styling instead of inventing a different layout. Respect user-locked elements and current design constraints. Return one valid command bundle only.`;
      const visuals = [
        ...(concept.previewUrl ? [{ dataUrl: concept.previewUrl, label: 'Approved Nano Banana concept preview', kind: 'approved-concept' }] : []),
        ...(input.visuals || []).slice(0, 5)
      ];
      const planned = await planDesign({
        mode,
        context: input.context,
        instruction,
        visuals,
        options: { scope: input.context?.selection?.length ? 'selection' : 'page', useBrand: true, useAssets: true }
      });
      const compiled = buildApprovedConceptHybridBatch(planned.batch, {
        concept,
        width: input.context?.design?.width || input.context?.currentPage?.width || 1080,
        height: input.context?.design?.height || input.context?.currentPage?.height || 1080
      });
      jobId = store.createAIJob({ workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, userId: req.commercialUser.id, jobType: 'agent_compile', mode, provider: planned.route.provider, model: planned.route.model, estimatedCredits: estimate });
      const charged = bypass ? 0 : store.settleReservation(reservation.id, planned.route.credits || estimate, { entryType: 'ai_usage', aiJobId: jobId, description: `Compile approved Nano Banana concept · ${mode}` });
      store.completeAIJob(jobId, { chargedCredits: charged, inputTokens: planned.usage?.prompt_tokens || planned.usage?.promptTokenCount, outputTokens: planned.usage?.completion_tokens || planned.usage?.candidatesTokenCount });
      res.json({ ...compiled, billing: { jobId, creditsCharged: charged, mode } });
    } catch (error) {
      if (!bypass) store.releaseReservation(reservation.id);
      if (jobId) store.completeAIJob(jobId, { status: 'failed', errorCode: error.message });
      throw error;
    }
  }));

  router.post('/api/ai/images/generate', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const input = req.body || {};
    const mode = input.quality === 'draft' ? 'fast' : (input.quality === 'high' ? 'best' : 'balanced');
    const capabilities = aiCapabilities();
    const conceptPreview = input.purpose === 'concept-preview';
    const estimate = conceptPreview
      ? capabilities.conceptPreviews?.credits || 30
      : capabilities.modes.find(item => item.id === mode)?.imageCredits || 30;
    const count = Math.max(1, Math.min(Number(input.count) || 1, 4));
    const totalEstimate = estimate * count;
    const bypass = BYPASS_BILLING_EMAILS.includes(req.commercialUser.email);
    const reservation = bypass ? { id: 'bypass', amount: 0 } : store.reserveCredits(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, totalEstimate, conceptPreview ? 'Nano Banana concept preview' : 'AI image generation');
    let jobId = null;
    try {
      const images = [];
      let route = null;
      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        const generated = await generateAIImage({ ...input, seed: input.seed ? input.seed + i : undefined }, mode);
        route ||= generated.route;
        images.push({
          url: generated.dataUrl,
          previewUrl: generated.dataUrl,
          mimeType: generated.mimeType,
          previewEngine: generated.previewEngine,
          previewLabel: generated.previewLabel,
          provider: generated.previewProvider || generated.route.provider,
          model: generated.previewModel || generated.route.model
        });
        if (i === 0) jobId = store.createAIJob({ workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, userId: req.commercialUser.id, jobType: conceptPreview ? 'concept_preview' : 'image_generation', mode: conceptPreview ? 'concept-preview' : mode, provider: generated.route.provider, model: generated.route.model, estimatedCredits: totalEstimate });
      }
      const actualCredits = (route?.credits || estimate) * count;
      const charged = bypass ? 0 : store.settleReservation(reservation.id, actualCredits, { entryType: 'ai_usage', aiJobId: jobId, description: conceptPreview ? `Nano Banana concept preview${count === 1 ? '' : 's'}` : `AI generate ${count} image${count === 1 ? '' : 's'} · ${mode}` });
      store.completeAIJob(jobId, { chargedCredits: charged, imageCount: count, inputTokens: 0, outputTokens: 0 });
      res.json({ images, previewEngine: conceptPreview ? capabilities.conceptPreviews : undefined, billing: { jobId, creditsCharged: charged, mode: conceptPreview ? 'concept-preview' : mode } });
    } catch (error) {
      if (!bypass) store.releaseReservation(reservation.id);
      if (jobId) store.completeAIJob(jobId, { status: 'failed', errorCode: error.message });
      throw error;
    }
  }));

  router.post('/api/ai/tag-images', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const input = req.body || {};
    const mode = input.mode || 'balanced';
    const dataUrls = Array.isArray(input.dataUrls) ? input.dataUrls : (input.dataUrl ? [input.dataUrl] : []);
