    if (!dataUrls.length) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'At least one dataUrl is required.' });
    const capabilities = aiCapabilities();
    const estimate = capabilities.modes.find(item => item.id === mode)?.planningCredits || 8;
    const imageCount = Math.min(dataUrls.length, 12);
    const totalEstimate = Math.min(estimate, Math.max(2, Math.round(estimate * imageCount * 0.35)));
    const bypass = BYPASS_BILLING_EMAILS.includes(req.commercialUser.email);
    const reservation = bypass ? { id: 'bypass', amount: 0 } : store.reserveCredits(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, totalEstimate, 'AI image tagging');
    let jobId = null;
    try {
      const results = [];
      for (const dataUrl of dataUrls.slice(0, 12)) {
        const tagged = await tagImage({ mode, dataUrl });
        results.push({ tags: tagged.tags, usage: tagged.usage });
      }
      jobId = store.createAIJob({ workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, userId: req.commercialUser.id, jobType: 'tag_images', mode, provider: results[0]?.route?.provider || 'pending', model: results[0]?.route?.model || 'pending', estimatedCredits: totalEstimate });
      const charged = bypass ? 0 : store.settleReservation(reservation.id, totalEstimate, { entryType: 'ai_usage', aiJobId: jobId, description: `AI tag ${imageCount} image${imageCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} · ${mode}` });
      store.completeAIJob(jobId, { chargedCredits: charged, imageCount, inputTokens: results.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.usage?.prompt_tokens || r.usage?.promptTokenCount || 0), 0), outputTokens: results.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.usage?.completion_tokens || r.usage?.candidatesTokenCount || 0), 0) });
      res.json({ results: results.map(r => ({ tags: r.tags })), billing: { jobId, creditsCharged: charged, mode } });
    } catch (error) {
      if (!bypass) store.releaseReservation(reservation.id);
      if (jobId) store.completeAIJob(jobId, { status: 'failed', errorCode: error.message });
      throw error;
    }
  }));

  router.post('/api/ai/assets', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const input = req.body || {}; const mode = input.mode || 'balanced';
    const estimate = aiCapabilities().modes.find(item => item.id === mode)?.imageCredits || 55;
    const bypass = BYPASS_BILLING_EMAILS.includes(req.commercialUser.email);
    const reservation = bypass ? { id: 'bypass', amount: 0 } : store.reserveCredits(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, estimate, 'AI asset generation');
    let jobId = null;
    try {
      const generated = await generateAsset(input);
      jobId = store.createAIJob({ workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, userId: req.commercialUser.id, jobType: input.kind === 'svg' ? 'svg_generation' : 'image_generation', mode, provider: generated.route.provider, model: generated.route.model, estimatedCredits: estimate });
      const charged = bypass ? 0 : store.settleReservation(reservation.id, generated.route.credits, { entryType: 'ai_usage', aiJobId: jobId, description: `AI ${input.kind === 'svg' ? 'SVG' : 'image'} · ${mode}` });
      store.completeAIJob(jobId, { chargedCredits: charged, imageCount: 1, inputTokens: generated.usage?.prompt_tokens || generated.usage?.promptTokenCount, outputTokens: generated.usage?.completion_tokens || generated.usage?.candidatesTokenCount });
      res.json({ jobId, creditsCharged: charged, kind: generated.kind, svg: generated.svg, dataUrl: generated.dataUrl, mimeType: generated.mimeType });
    } catch (error) {
      if (!bypass) store.releaseReservation(reservation.id);
      if (jobId) store.completeAIJob(jobId, { status: 'failed', errorCode: error.message });
      throw error;
    }
  }));

  router.get('/api/template-folders', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(store.listTemplateFolders(req.commercialWorkspaceId))));
  router.post('/api/template-folders', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.status(201).json(store.createTemplateFolder(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, req.body || {}))));
  router.patch('/api/template-folders/:id', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(store.updateTemplateFolder(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.params.id, req.body || {}))));
  router.delete('/api/template-folders/:id', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => { store.deleteTemplateFolder(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.params.id); res.status(204).end(); }));
  router.get('/api/template-folder-items', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(store.listTemplateFolderItems(req.commercialWorkspaceId))));
  router.put('/api/template-folder-items/:templateId', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(store.assignTemplateFolder(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.params.templateId, req.body?.folderId || null))));

  router.get('/api/marketplace/listings', requireUser, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json({ items: store.listListings({ q: req.query.q, type: req.query.type }) })));
  router.get('/api/marketplace/listings/:id', requireUser, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => { const item = store.getListing(req.params.id); if (!item) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Listing not found.' }); res.json(item); }));
  router.post('/api/marketplace/listings', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    store.requireMembership(req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, ['owner','admin','designer','contributor']);
    if (!services.snapshotMarketplaceSource) { const error = new Error('Connect snapshotMarketplaceSource when mounting the commercial router.'); error.status = 501; throw error; }
    const listingType = req.body?.listingType;
    const sourceId = listingType === 'asset' ? req.body?.sourceAssetId : req.body?.sourceTemplateId;
    const snapshot = await services.snapshotMarketplaceSource({ workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, userId: req.commercialUser.id, listingType, sourceId });
    const listing = store.createListing({ ...req.body, workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, userId: req.commercialUser.id, sourceId, snapshot: snapshot.snapshot, dependencies: snapshot.dependencies, previewUrl: snapshot.previewUrl, aiGenerated: snapshot.aiGenerated, checksum: snapshot.checksum, status: options.marketplaceReviewRequired ? 'review' : 'published', moderationStatus: options.marketplaceReviewRequired ? 'pending' : 'approved' });
    res.status(201).json(listing);
  }));
  router.patch('/api/marketplace/listings/:id', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(store.updateListing(req.params.id, req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.body || {}))));
  router.post('/api/marketplace/listings/:id/publish', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(store.publishListing(req.params.id, req.commercialWorkspaceId))));
  router.post('/api/marketplace/listings/:id/purchase', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.status(201).json(store.purchaseListing(req.params.id, req.commercialWorkspaceId, req.commercialUser.id, req.get('idempotency-key') || randomUUID()))));
  router.post('/api/marketplace/listings/:id/install', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => {
    const listing = store.getListing(req.params.id);
    if (!listing) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Listing not found.' });
    let licensed = store.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM marketplace_licenses WHERE listing_id=? AND workspace_id=?').get(listing.id, req.commercialWorkspaceId);
    if (listing.priceType === 'credits' && listing.priceCredits > 0 && !licensed) { const error = new Error('Purchase this marketplace item before installing it.'); error.status = 402; throw error; }
    if (!licensed && listing.priceType === 'free') licensed = store.ensureLicense(listing.id, req.commercialWorkspaceId);
    if (!services.installMarketplaceListing) { const error = new Error('Connect installMarketplaceListing when mounting the commercial router.'); error.status = 501; throw error; }
    const result = await services.installMarketplaceListing({ listing, workspaceId: req.commercialWorkspaceId, userId: req.commercialUser.id });
    store.db.prepare('UPDATE marketplace_licenses SET installed_resource_id=? WHERE listing_id=? AND workspace_id=?').run(result.id || null, listing.id, req.commercialWorkspaceId);
    res.status(201).json(result);
  }));
  router.get('/api/marketplace/purchases', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json({ items: store.purchases(req.commercialWorkspaceId) })));
  router.get('/api/marketplace/earnings', requireUser, requireWorkspace, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => res.json(store.earnings(req.commercialWorkspaceId))));
  router.post('/api/marketplace/listings/:id/report', requireUser, asyncRoute(async (req, res) => { store.db.prepare('INSERT INTO marketplace_reports (id,listing_id,reporter_user_id,reason,status,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(randomUUID(), req.params.id, req.commercialUser.id, String(req.body?.reason || 'Unspecified').slice(0, 2000), 'open', new Date().toISOString()); res.status(201).json({ ok: true }); }));

  router.use((error, req, res, next) => {
    if (res.headersSent) return next(error);
    const status = error.status || 500;
    if (status >= 500) console.error('[commercial]', error);
    res.status(status).json({ error: error.message || 'Commercial platform request failed.' });
  });

  return { router, store };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/commercial/schema.sql (2026-07-04 14:50:59) =====
PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;
PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspaces (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('personal','organization')),
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  slug TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  owner_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  deleted_at TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_members (
  workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (role IN ('owner','admin','billing_manager','designer','contributor','reviewer','viewer')),
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (workspace_id,user_id)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_workspace_members_user ON workspace_members(user_id,status);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_invitations (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  email TEXT NOT NULL,
  role TEXT NOT NULL,
  token_hash TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  invited_by_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  expires_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  accepted_at TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS billing_accounts (
  workspace_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  plan_code TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  stripe_customer_id TEXT,
  stripe_subscription_id TEXT,
  subscription_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  period_start TEXT,
  period_end TEXT,
  cancel_at_period_end INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS credit_grants (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  source_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  original_amount INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (original_amount >= 0),
  remaining_amount INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (remaining_amount >= 0),
  issued_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  expires_at TEXT,
  external_reference TEXT,
  metadata_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_credit_grants_spend ON credit_grants(workspace_id,expires_at,issued_at);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS credit_ledger_entries (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id TEXT,
  amount INTEGER NOT NULL,
  entry_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  grant_id TEXT REFERENCES credit_grants(id),
  ai_job_id TEXT,
  marketplace_order_id TEXT,
  idempotency_key TEXT UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  metadata_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_credit_ledger_workspace ON credit_ledger_entries(workspace_id,created_at DESC);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS credit_reservations (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  amount INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (amount > 0),
  status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('pending','settled','released')),
  purpose TEXT NOT NULL,
  external_id TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  settled_at TEXT
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_credit_reservations_pending ON credit_reservations(workspace_id,status);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_jobs (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  job_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  mode TEXT NOT NULL,
  provider TEXT NOT NULL,
  model TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL,
  estimated_credits INTEGER NOT NULL,
  charged_credits INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  provider_cost_micros INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  input_tokens INTEGER,
  output_tokens INTEGER,
  image_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  error_code TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  completed_at TEXT
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ai_jobs_workspace ON ai_jobs(workspace_id,created_at DESC);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS template_folders (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  parent_id TEXT REFERENCES template_folders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  system_key TEXT,
  created_by_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  visibility TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'workspace',
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE(workspace_id,parent_id,name)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_template_folders_workspace ON template_folders(workspace_id,parent_id,sort_order,name);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS template_folder_items (
  workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  template_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  folder_id TEXT REFERENCES template_folders(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (workspace_id,template_id)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_template_folder_items_folder ON template_folder_items(workspace_id,folder_id);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS marketplace_listings (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  listing_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (listing_type IN ('asset','template')),
  seller_workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id),
  creator_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  category TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'General',
  tags_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  price_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (price_type IN ('free','credits')),
  price_credits INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (price_credits >= 0),
  license_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'standard',
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' CHECK (status IN ('draft','review','published','suspended','archived')),
  moderation_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  ai_generated INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  preview_url TEXT,
  current_version_id TEXT,
  download_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  purchase_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  published_at TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_marketplace_published ON marketplace_listings(status,listing_type,published_at DESC);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS marketplace_listing_versions (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  listing_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES marketplace_listings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  version_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
  snapshot_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  dependency_manifest_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  checksum TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE(listing_id,version_number)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS marketplace_orders (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  listing_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES marketplace_listings(id),
  listing_version_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES marketplace_listing_versions(id),
  buyer_workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id),
  buyer_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  seller_workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id),
  gross_credits INTEGER NOT NULL,
  creator_credits INTEGER NOT NULL,
  platform_credits INTEGER NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL,
  idempotency_key TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  refunded_at TEXT
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_marketplace_orders_buyer ON marketplace_orders(buyer_workspace_id,created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_marketplace_orders_seller ON marketplace_orders(seller_workspace_id,created_at DESC);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS marketplace_licenses (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  order_id TEXT REFERENCES marketplace_orders(id),
  listing_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES marketplace_listings(id),
  listing_version_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES marketplace_listing_versions(id),
  workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id),
  installed_resource_id TEXT,
  license_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE(listing_version_id,workspace_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS marketplace_reports (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  listing_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES marketplace_listings(id),
  reporter_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/commercial/store.js (2026-07-04 14:51:44) =====
import { DatabaseSync } from 'node:sqlite';
import { mkdirSync, readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
import { dirname, join, resolve } from 'node:path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';
import { createHash, randomBytes, randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';

const here = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const now = () => new Date().toISOString();
const parse = (value, fallback) => { try { return JSON.parse(value); } catch { return fallback; } };
const slugify = value => String(value || 'workspace').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '').slice(0, 48) || 'workspace';
const tokenHash = value => createHash('sha256').update(String(value)).digest('hex');

export class CommercialStore {
  constructor(filename = process.env.CANVASFORGE_COMMERCIAL_DB || 'data/canvasforge-commercial.sqlite') {
    const target = resolve(filename);
    mkdirSync(dirname(target), { recursive: true });
    this.db = new DatabaseSync(target);
    this.db.exec(readFileSync(join(here, 'schema.sql'), 'utf8'));
  }

  transaction(callback) {
    this.db.exec('BEGIN IMMEDIATE');
    try { const result = callback(); this.db.exec('COMMIT'); return result; }
    catch (error) { this.db.exec('ROLLBACK'); throw error; }
  }

  ensureDefaultFolders(workspaceId, userId) {
    const defaults = [['my-templates', 'My templates'], ['purchased', 'Purchased'], ['shared-with-me', 'Shared with me'], ['drafts', 'Draft templates'], ['published', 'Published'], ['archived', 'Archived']];
    const statement = this.db.prepare('INSERT OR IGNORE INTO template_folders (id,workspace_id,parent_id,name,system_key,created_by_user_id,visibility,sort_order,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)');
    defaults.forEach(([key, name], index) => statement.run(randomUUID(), workspaceId, null, name, key, userId, 'workspace', index, now(), now()));
  }

  ensurePersonalWorkspace(user) {
    const existing = this.db.prepare(`SELECT w.* FROM workspaces w JOIN workspace_members m ON m.workspace_id=w.id WHERE m.user_id=? AND w.type='personal' AND w.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1`).get(user.id);
    if (existing) return existing;
    return this.transaction(() => {
      const id = randomUUID();
      const createdAt = now();
      const base = slugify(`${user.name || user.email || 'personal'}-personal`);
      const slug = `${base}-${id.slice(0, 8)}`;
      const name = `${user.name || String(user.email || 'My').split('@')[0]}'s workspace`;
      this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO workspaces (id,type,name,slug,owner_user_id,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, 'personal', name, slug, user.id, createdAt, createdAt);
      this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO workspace_members (workspace_id,user_id,role,status,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, user.id, 'owner', 'active', createdAt);
      this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO billing_accounts (workspace_id,plan_code,subscription_status,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, 'free', 'active', createdAt, createdAt);
      this.grantCredits(id, 100, 'signup', { description: 'Welcome credits' });
      this.ensureDefaultFolders(id, user.id);
      return this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM workspaces WHERE id=?').get(id);
    });
  }

  listWorkspaces(userId) {
    return this.db.prepare(`SELECT w.*,m.role,m.status FROM workspaces w JOIN workspace_members m ON m.workspace_id=w.id WHERE m.user_id=? AND m.status='active' AND w.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CASE w.type WHEN 'personal' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,w.name`).all(userId);
  }

  createWorkspace(userId, input = {}) {
    const id = randomUUID(); const createdAt = now();
    const type = input.type === 'personal' ? 'personal' : 'organization';
    const name = String(input.name || (type === 'personal' ? 'Personal workspace' : 'New organization')).trim().slice(0, 120);
    const slug = `${slugify(input.slug || name)}-${id.slice(0, 8)}`;
    return this.transaction(() => {
      this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO workspaces (id,type,name,slug,owner_user_id,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, type, name, slug, userId, createdAt, createdAt);
      this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO workspace_members (workspace_id,user_id,role,status,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, userId, 'owner', 'active', createdAt);
      this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO billing_accounts (workspace_id,plan_code,subscription_status,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, type === 'personal' ? 'free' : 'team_free', 'active', createdAt, createdAt);
      this.ensureDefaultFolders(id, userId);
      return this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM workspaces WHERE id=?').get(id);
    });
  }

  membership(workspaceId, userId) {
    return this.db.prepare(`SELECT m.*,w.type,w.name,w.slug FROM workspace_members m JOIN workspaces w ON w.id=m.workspace_id WHERE m.workspace_id=? AND m.user_id=? AND m.status='active' AND w.deleted_at IS NULL`).get(workspaceId, userId);
  }

  requireMembership(workspaceId, userId, roles = null) {
    const membership = this.membership(workspaceId, userId);
    if (!membership) { const error = new Error('You do not have access to this workspace.'); error.status = 403; throw error; }
    if (roles && !roles.includes(membership.role)) { const error = new Error('Your workspace role does not allow this action.'); error.status = 403; throw error; }
    return membership;
  }

  listMembers(workspaceId) {
    return this.db.prepare('SELECT user_id AS id,role,status,created_at FROM workspace_members WHERE workspace_id=? ORDER BY created_at').all(workspaceId);
  }

  invite(workspaceId, userId, email, role = 'designer') {
    this.requireMembership(workspaceId, userId, ['owner','admin']);
    const token = randomBytes(32).toString('base64url');
    const row = { id: randomUUID(), workspaceId, email: String(email).toLowerCase(), role, token, expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 7 * 86400000).toISOString(), createdAt: now() };
    this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO workspace_invitations (id,workspace_id,email,role,token_hash,invited_by_user_id,expires_at,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(row.id, workspaceId, row.email, role, tokenHash(token), userId, row.expiresAt, row.createdAt);
    return row;
  }

  acceptInvite(token, userId) {
    const invitation = this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM workspace_invitations WHERE token_hash=? AND accepted_at IS NULL').get(tokenHash(token));
    if (!invitation || invitation.expires_at < now()) { const error = new Error('This invitation is invalid or expired.'); error.status = 410; throw error; }
    this.transaction(() => {
      this.db.prepare('INSERT OR REPLACE INTO workspace_members (workspace_id,user_id,role,status,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(invitation.workspace_id, userId, invitation.role, 'active', now());
      this.db.prepare('UPDATE workspace_invitations SET accepted_at=? WHERE id=?').run(now(), invitation.id);
    });
    return invitation.workspace_id;
  }

  updateMember(workspaceId, actorUserId, memberUserId, role) {
    this.requireMembership(workspaceId, actorUserId, ['owner','admin']);
    const target = this.membership(workspaceId, memberUserId);
    if (!target) { const error = new Error('Workspace member not found.'); error.status = 404; throw error; }
    if (target.role === 'owner' && actorUserId !== memberUserId) { const error = new Error('Transfer ownership before changing the owner role.'); error.status = 409; throw error; }
    this.db.prepare('UPDATE workspace_members SET role=? WHERE workspace_id=? AND user_id=?').run(role, workspaceId, memberUserId);
    return this.membership(workspaceId, memberUserId);
  }

  removeMember(workspaceId, actorUserId, memberUserId) {
    this.requireMembership(workspaceId, actorUserId, ['owner','admin']);
    const target = this.membership(workspaceId, memberUserId);
    if (!target) return false;
    if (target.role === 'owner') { const error = new Error('The workspace owner cannot be removed.'); error.status = 409; throw error; }
    this.db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_members WHERE workspace_id=? AND user_id=?').run(workspaceId, memberUserId);
    return true;
  }

  billingAccount(workspaceId) { return this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM billing_accounts WHERE workspace_id=?').get(workspaceId); }

  updateBillingAccount(workspaceId, patch = {}) {
    const current = this.billingAccount(workspaceId) || {};
    this.db.prepare(`INSERT INTO billing_accounts (workspace_id,plan_code,stripe_customer_id,stripe_subscription_id,subscription_status,period_start,period_end,cancel_at_period_end,created_at,updated_at)
      VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
      ON CONFLICT(workspace_id) DO UPDATE SET plan_code=excluded.plan_code,stripe_customer_id=excluded.stripe_customer_id,stripe_subscription_id=excluded.stripe_subscription_id,subscription_status=excluded.subscription_status,period_start=excluded.period_start,period_end=excluded.period_end,cancel_at_period_end=excluded.cancel_at_period_end,updated_at=excluded.updated_at`).run(
      workspaceId,
      patch.planCode ?? current.plan_code ?? 'free',
      patch.stripeCustomerId ?? current.stripe_customer_id ?? null,
      patch.stripeSubscriptionId ?? current.stripe_subscription_id ?? null,
      patch.subscriptionStatus ?? current.subscription_status ?? 'active',
      patch.periodStart ?? current.period_start ?? null,
      patch.periodEnd ?? current.period_end ?? null,
      patch.cancelAtPeriodEnd == null ? Number(current.cancel_at_period_end || 0) : Number(!!patch.cancelAtPeriodEnd),
      current.created_at || now(), now()
    );
    return this.billingAccount(workspaceId);
  }

  billingSummary(workspaceId) {
    const account = this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM billing_accounts WHERE workspace_id=?').get(workspaceId) || { plan_code: 'free', subscription_status: 'active' };
    const available = this.availableCredits(workspaceId);
    const earned = this.db.prepare(`SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS total FROM credit_ledger_entries WHERE workspace_id=? AND entry_type='marketplace_earning'`).get(workspaceId).total;
    const monthlyRemaining = this.db.prepare(`SELECT COALESCE(SUM(remaining_amount),0) AS total FROM credit_grants WHERE workspace_id=? AND source_type='subscription' AND remaining_amount>0 AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at>?)`).get(workspaceId, now()).total;
    const names = { free: 'Free', pro: 'Pro', team: 'Team', team_free: 'Team free' };
    return { plan: { code: account.plan_code, name: names[account.plan_code] || account.plan_code }, subscription: { status: account.subscription_status, periodEnd: account.period_end, cancelAtPeriodEnd: !!account.cancel_at_period_end }, credits: { available, earned, monthlyRemaining } };
  }

  availableCredits(workspaceId) {
    const grants = this.db.prepare('SELECT COALESCE(SUM(remaining_amount),0) AS total FROM credit_grants WHERE workspace_id=? AND remaining_amount>0 AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at>?)').get(workspaceId, now()).total;
    const pending = this.db.prepare(`SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS total FROM credit_reservations WHERE workspace_id=? AND status='pending'`).get(workspaceId).total;
    return Number(grants) - Number(pending);
  }

  grantCredits(workspaceId, amount, sourceType, options = {}) {
    const value = Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(amount) || 0)); if (!value) return null;
    const id = randomUUID(); const createdAt = now();
    this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO credit_grants (id,workspace_id,source_type,original_amount,remaining_amount,issued_at,expires_at,external_reference,metadata_json) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, workspaceId, sourceType, value, value, createdAt, options.expiresAt || null, options.externalReference || null, JSON.stringify(options.metadata || {}));
    this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO credit_ledger_entries (id,workspace_id,user_id,amount,entry_type,grant_id,idempotency_key,description,metadata_json,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(randomUUID(), workspaceId, options.userId || null, value, options.entryType || 'credit_grant', id, options.idempotencyKey || null, options.description || `${sourceType} credit grant`, JSON.stringify(options.metadata || {}), createdAt);
    return id;
  }

  reserveCredits(workspaceId, userId, amount, purpose, externalId = null) {
    const value = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(amount) || 0));
    return this.transaction(() => {
      if (this.availableCredits(workspaceId) < value) { const error = new Error('This workspace does not have enough credits.'); error.status = 402; throw error; }
      const id = randomUUID();
      this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO credit_reservations (id,workspace_id,user_id,amount,status,purpose,external_id,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, workspaceId, userId, value, 'pending', purpose, externalId, now());
      return { id, amount: value };
    });
  }

  settleReservation(reservationId, actualAmount, details = {}) {
    return this.transaction(() => {
      const reservation = this.db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM credit_reservations WHERE id=? AND status='pending'`).get(reservationId);
      if (!reservation) throw new Error('Credit reservation is no longer pending.');
      const charge = Math.max(0, Math.min(reservation.amount, Math.round(Number(actualAmount) || 0)));
      let remaining = charge;
      const grants = this.db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM credit_grants WHERE workspace_id=? AND remaining_amount>0 AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at>?) ORDER BY CASE WHEN expires_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,expires_at,issued_at`).all(reservation.workspace_id, now());
      for (const grant of grants) {
        if (!remaining) break;
        const used = Math.min(remaining, grant.remaining_amount);
        this.db.prepare('UPDATE credit_grants SET remaining_amount=remaining_amount-? WHERE id=?').run(used, grant.id);
        remaining -= used;
      }
      if (remaining) throw new Error('Credit balance changed before settlement.');
      this.db.prepare('UPDATE credit_reservations SET status=?,settled_at=? WHERE id=?').run('settled', now(), reservationId);
      if (charge) this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO credit_ledger_entries (id,workspace_id,user_id,amount,entry_type,ai_job_id,marketplace_order_id,idempotency_key,description,metadata_json,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(randomUUID(), reservation.workspace_id, reservation.user_id, -charge, details.entryType || 'ai_usage', details.aiJobId || null, details.orderId || null, details.idempotencyKey || null, details.description || reservation.purpose, JSON.stringify(details.metadata || {}), now());
      return charge;
    });
  }

  releaseReservation(reservationId) { this.db.prepare(`UPDATE credit_reservations SET status='released',settled_at=? WHERE id=? AND status='pending'`).run(now(), reservationId); }

  ledger(workspaceId, limit = 100) {
    return this.db.prepare('SELECT id,amount,entry_type AS entryType,description,metadata_json AS metadata,created_at AS createdAt FROM credit_ledger_entries WHERE workspace_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ?').all(workspaceId, Math.min(500, Math.max(1, Number(limit) || 100))).map(item => ({ ...item, metadata: parse(item.metadata, {}) }));
  }

  createAIJob(input) {
    const id = randomUUID();
    this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO ai_jobs (id,workspace_id,user_id,job_type,mode,provider,model,status,estimated_credits,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, input.workspaceId, input.userId, input.jobType, input.mode, input.provider, input.model, 'processing', input.estimatedCredits, now());
    return id;
  }

  completeAIJob(id, input = {}) {
    this.db.prepare('UPDATE ai_jobs SET status=?,charged_credits=?,provider_cost_micros=?,input_tokens=?,output_tokens=?,image_count=?,error_code=?,completed_at=? WHERE id=?').run(input.status || 'completed', input.chargedCredits || 0, input.providerCostMicros || 0, input.inputTokens || null, input.outputTokens || null, input.imageCount || 0, input.errorCode || null, now(), id);
  }

  recentAIUsage(workspaceId, limit = 20) {
    return this.db.prepare('SELECT id,job_type AS jobType,mode,provider,model,charged_credits AS credits,status,created_at AS createdAt FROM ai_jobs WHERE workspace_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ?').all(workspaceId, limit);
  }

  listTemplateFolders(workspaceId) { return this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM template_folders WHERE workspace_id=? ORDER BY sort_order,name').all(workspaceId); }
  createTemplateFolder(workspaceId, userId, input = {}) {
    const id = randomUUID(); const createdAt = now();
    this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO template_folders (id,workspace_id,parent_id,name,created_by_user_id,visibility,sort_order,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, workspaceId, input.parentId || null, String(input.name || 'New folder').trim().slice(0, 120), userId, input.visibility || 'workspace', Number(input.sortOrder || 100), createdAt, createdAt);
    return this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM template_folders WHERE id=?').get(id);
  }

  listTemplateFolderItems(workspaceId) {
    return this.db.prepare('SELECT template_id AS templateId,folder_id AS folderId FROM template_folder_items WHERE workspace_id=?').all(workspaceId);
  }

  assignTemplateFolder(workspaceId, templateId, folderId) {
    if (folderId) {
      const folder = this.db.prepare('SELECT id FROM template_folders WHERE id=? AND workspace_id=?').get(folderId, workspaceId);
      if (!folder) { const error = new Error('Template folder not found.'); error.status = 404; throw error; }
    }
    this.db.prepare(`INSERT INTO template_folder_items (workspace_id,template_id,folder_id,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)
      ON CONFLICT(workspace_id,template_id) DO UPDATE SET folder_id=excluded.folder_id,updated_at=excluded.updated_at`).run(workspaceId, templateId, folderId || null, now(), now());
    return { templateId, folderId: folderId || null };
  }

  updateTemplateFolder(workspaceId, id, input = {}) {
    const current = this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM template_folders WHERE id=? AND workspace_id=?').get(id, workspaceId);
    if (!current) { const error = new Error('Template folder not found.'); error.status = 404; throw error; }
    if (current.system_key) { const error = new Error('System template folders cannot be renamed or moved.'); error.status = 409; throw error; }
    this.db.prepare('UPDATE template_folders SET name=?,parent_id=?,sort_order=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND workspace_id=?').run(String(input.name ?? current.name).trim().slice(0, 120), input.parentId === undefined ? current.parent_id : input.parentId, Number(input.sortOrder ?? current.sort_order), now(), id, workspaceId);
    return this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM template_folders WHERE id=?').get(id);
  }

  deleteTemplateFolder(workspaceId, id) {
    const current = this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM template_folders WHERE id=? AND workspace_id=?').get(id, workspaceId);
    if (!current) return false;
    if (current.system_key) { const error = new Error('System template folders cannot be deleted.'); error.status = 409; throw error; }
    this.db.prepare('DELETE FROM template_folders WHERE id=? AND workspace_id=?').run(id, workspaceId);
    return true;
  }

  createListing(input) {
    const id = randomUUID(); const versionId = randomUUID(); const createdAt = now();
    return this.transaction(() => {
      this.db.prepare(`INSERT INTO marketplace_listings (id,listing_type,seller_workspace_id,creator_user_id,source_id,title,description,category,tags_json,price_type,price_credits,license_type,status,moderation_status,ai_generated,preview_url,current_version_id,published_at,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`).run(id, input.listingType, input.workspaceId, input.userId, input.sourceId, input.title, input.description || '', input.category || 'General', JSON.stringify(input.tags || []), input.priceType === 'credits' ? 'credits' : 'free', Math.max(0, Number(input.priceCredits) || 0), input.licenseType || 'standard', input.status || 'published', input.moderationStatus || 'approved', input.aiGenerated ? 1 : 0, input.previewUrl || null, versionId, createdAt, createdAt, createdAt);
      this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO marketplace_listing_versions (id,listing_id,version_number,snapshot_json,dependency_manifest_json,checksum,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(versionId, id, 1, JSON.stringify(input.snapshot || {}), JSON.stringify(input.dependencies || []), input.checksum || null, createdAt);
      return this.getListing(id);
    });
  }

  getListing(id) {
    const row = this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM marketplace_listings WHERE id=?').get(id);
    if (!row) return null;
    return { ...row, listingType: row.listing_type, sellerWorkspaceId: row.seller_workspace_id, creatorUserId: row.creator_user_id, priceType: row.price_type, priceCredits: row.price_credits, previewUrl: row.preview_url, tags: parse(row.tags_json, []) };
  }

  listListings(input = {}) {
    const clauses = [`status='published'`]; const values = [];
    if (input.type) { clauses.push('listing_type=?'); values.push(input.type); }
    if (input.q) { clauses.push('(title LIKE ? OR description LIKE ? OR tags_json LIKE ?)'); const q = `%${input.q}%`; values.push(q, q, q); }
    return this.db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM marketplace_listings WHERE ${clauses.join(' AND ')} ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 200`).all(...values).map(row => ({ ...row, listingType: row.listing_type, priceType: row.price_type, priceCredits: row.price_credits, previewUrl: row.preview_url, tags: parse(row.tags_json, []) }));
  }

  purchaseListing(listingId, buyerWorkspaceId, buyerUserId, idempotencyKey) {
    const listing = this.getListing(listingId);
    if (!listing || listing.status !== 'published') { const error = new Error('Marketplace listing not found.'); error.status = 404; throw error; }
    const existing = this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM marketplace_orders WHERE idempotency_key=?').get(idempotencyKey);
    if (existing) return existing;
    const gross = listing.priceType === 'credits' ? listing.priceCredits : 0;
    const creator = Math.floor(gross * Number(process.env.MARKETPLACE_CREATOR_SHARE || 0.8));
    const platform = gross - creator;
    const orderId = randomUUID(); const createdAt = now();
    let reservation = null; let charged = false;
    if (gross) reservation = this.reserveCredits(buyerWorkspaceId, buyerUserId, gross, `Marketplace purchase: ${listing.title}`, orderId);
    try {
      if (reservation) { this.settleReservation(reservation.id, gross, { entryType: 'marketplace_purchase', orderId, description: `Purchased ${listing.title}` }); charged = true; }
      return this.transaction(() => {
        this.db.prepare('INSERT INTO marketplace_orders (id,listing_id,listing_version_id,buyer_workspace_id,buyer_user_id,seller_workspace_id,gross_credits,creator_credits,platform_credits,status,idempotency_key,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(orderId, listing.id, listing.current_version_id, buyerWorkspaceId, buyerUserId, listing.seller_workspace_id, gross, creator, platform, 'completed', idempotencyKey, createdAt);
        if (creator) this.grantCredits(listing.seller_workspace_id, creator, 'marketplace', { entryType: 'marketplace_earning', orderId, description: `Marketplace sale: ${listing.title}` });
        this.db.prepare('UPDATE marketplace_listings SET purchase_count=purchase_count+1,download_count=download_count+1 WHERE id=?').run(listing.id);
        this.db.prepare('INSERT OR IGNORE INTO marketplace_licenses (id,order_id,listing_id,listing_version_id,workspace_id,license_type,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(randomUUID(), orderId, listing.id, listing.current_version_id, buyerWorkspaceId, listing.license_type, createdAt);
        return this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM marketplace_orders WHERE id=?').get(orderId);
      });
    } catch (error) {
      if (reservation && !charged) this.releaseReservation(reservation.id);
      if (charged && gross) this.grantCredits(buyerWorkspaceId, gross, 'refund', { userId: buyerUserId, entryType: 'refund', description: `Refunded failed purchase: ${listing.title}` });
      throw error;
    }
  }

  ensureLicense(listingId, workspaceId, orderId = null) {
    const listing = this.getListing(listingId);
    if (!listing) { const error = new Error('Marketplace listing not found.'); error.status = 404; throw error; }
    this.db.prepare('INSERT OR IGNORE INTO marketplace_licenses (id,order_id,listing_id,listing_version_id,workspace_id,license_type,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(randomUUID(), orderId, listing.id, listing.current_version_id, workspaceId, listing.license_type, now());
    return this.db.prepare('SELECT * FROM marketplace_licenses WHERE listing_version_id=? AND workspace_id=?').get(listing.current_version_id, workspaceId);
  }

  updateListing(id, workspaceId, input = {}) {
    const listing = this.getListing(id);
    if (!listing || listing.seller_workspace_id !== workspaceId) { const error = new Error('Marketplace listing not found.'); error.status = 404; throw error; }
    this.db.prepare('UPDATE marketplace_listings SET title=?,description=?,category=?,tags_json=?,price_type=?,price_credits=?,license_type=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?').run(input.title ?? listing.title, input.description ?? listing.description, input.category ?? listing.category, JSON.stringify(input.tags ?? listing.tags), input.priceType ?? listing.priceType, Math.max(0, Number(input.priceCredits ?? listing.priceCredits)), input.licenseType ?? listing.license_type, now(), id);
    return this.getListing(id);
  }

  publishListing(id, workspaceId) {
    const listing = this.getListing(id);
    if (!listing || listing.seller_workspace_id !== workspaceId) { const error = new Error('Marketplace listing not found.'); error.status = 404; throw error; }
    this.db.prepare(`UPDATE marketplace_listings SET status='published',moderation_status='approved',published_at=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?`).run(now(), now(), id);
    return this.getListing(id);
  }

  purchases(workspaceId) { return this.db.prepare(`SELECT o.*,l.title,l.listing_type FROM marketplace_orders o JOIN marketplace_listings l ON l.id=o.listing_id WHERE o.buyer_workspace_id=? ORDER BY o.created_at DESC`).all(workspaceId); }
  earnings(workspaceId) { const row = this.db.prepare(`SELECT COALESCE(SUM(creator_credits),0) AS total,COUNT(*) AS sales FROM marketplace_orders WHERE seller_workspace_id=? AND status='completed'`).get(workspaceId); return { credits: row.total, sales: row.sales }; }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/commercial/stripe.js (2026-07-04 14:52:46) =====
import { createHmac, timingSafeEqual } from 'node:crypto';

const stripeRequest = async (path, parameters = {}) => {
  if (!process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY) throw new Error('STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is not configured.');
  const body = new URLSearchParams();
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(parameters)) if (value !== undefined && value !== null) body.set(key, String(value));
  const response = await fetch(`https://api.stripe.com/v1/${path}`, { method: 'POST', headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' }, body });
  const payload = await response.json();
  if (!response.ok) throw new Error(payload?.error?.message || 'Stripe request failed.');
  return payload;
};

const planPrice = plan => ({ pro: process.env.STRIPE_PRICE_PRO, team: process.env.STRIPE_PRICE_TEAM })[plan];
const topupPrice = amount => ({ 500: process.env.STRIPE_PRICE_CREDITS_500, 1000: process.env.STRIPE_PRICE_CREDITS_1000, 2500: process.env.STRIPE_PRICE_CREDITS_2500, 5000: process.env.STRIPE_PRICE_CREDITS_5000 })[Number(amount)];

export function createStripeServices(store, { appUrl = process.env.PUBLIC_APP_URL || 'http://localhost:5173' } = {}) {
  const ensureCustomer = async ({ workspaceId, user }) => {
    const account = store.billingAccount(workspaceId);
    if (account?.stripe_customer_id) return account.stripe_customer_id;
    const customer = await stripeRequest('customers', { email: user.email, name: user.name, 'metadata[workspace_id]': workspaceId });
    store.updateBillingAccount(workspaceId, { stripeCustomerId: customer.id });
    return customer.id;
  };
  return {
    async createCheckout({ workspaceId, user, plan }) {
      const price = planPrice(plan); if (!price) throw new Error(`Stripe price for ${plan} is not configured.`);
      const customer = await ensureCustomer({ workspaceId, user });
      return stripeRequest('checkout/sessions', {
        mode: 'subscription', customer, 'line_items[0][price]': price, 'line_items[0][quantity]': 1,
        success_url: `${appUrl}/?billing=success`, cancel_url: `${appUrl}/?billing=cancelled`,
        'metadata[workspace_id]': workspaceId, 'metadata[kind]': 'subscription', 'metadata[plan]': plan,
        'subscription_data[metadata][workspace_id]': workspaceId, 'subscription_data[metadata][plan]': plan
      });
    },
    async createCreditTopup({ workspaceId, user, amount }) {
      const price = topupPrice(amount); if (!price) throw new Error(`Stripe price for ${amount} credits is not configured.`);
      const customer = await ensureCustomer({ workspaceId, user });
      return stripeRequest('checkout/sessions', {
        mode: 'payment', customer, 'line_items[0][price]': price, 'line_items[0][quantity]': 1,
        success_url: `${appUrl}/?credits=success`, cancel_url: `${appUrl}/?credits=cancelled`,
        'metadata[workspace_id]': workspaceId, 'metadata[kind]': 'credit_topup', 'metadata[credits]': Number(amount)
      });
    },
    async createBillingPortal({ workspaceId, user }) {
      const customer = await ensureCustomer({ workspaceId, user });
      return stripeRequest('billing_portal/sessions', { customer, return_url: appUrl });
    }
  };
}

function verifyStripeSignature(rawBody, signatureHeader, secret) {
  const parts = Object.fromEntries(String(signatureHeader || '').split(',').map(part => part.split('=')));
  const timestamp = parts.t; const supplied = parts.v1;
  if (!timestamp || !supplied) return false;
  if (Math.abs(Date.now() / 1000 - Number(timestamp)) > 300) return false;
  const expected = createHmac('sha256', secret).update(`${timestamp}.${rawBody}`).digest('hex');
  const a = Buffer.from(expected); const b = Buffer.from(supplied);
  return a.length === b.length && timingSafeEqual(a, b);
}

export function createStripeWebhookHandler(store) {
  return async (req, res) => {
    const raw = Buffer.isBuffer(req.body) ? req.body.toString('utf8') : String(req.body || '');
    if (!verifyStripeSignature(raw, req.get('stripe-signature'), process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET || '')) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid Stripe signature.' });
    const event = JSON.parse(raw); const object = event.data?.object || {}; const metadata = object.metadata || {};
    if (event.type === 'checkout.session.completed') {
      if (metadata.kind === 'credit_topup') store.grantCredits(metadata.workspace_id, Number(metadata.credits), 'purchase', { externalReference: object.id, idempotencyKey: `stripe:${event.id}`, description: `Purchased ${metadata.credits} credits` });
      if (metadata.kind === 'subscription') store.updateBillingAccount(metadata.workspace_id, { planCode: metadata.plan, stripeCustomerId: object.customer, stripeSubscriptionId: object.subscription, subscriptionStatus: 'active' });
    }
    if (event.type.startsWith('customer.subscription.')) {
      const workspaceId = metadata.workspace_id; if (workspaceId) store.updateBillingAccount(workspaceId, { planCode: metadata.plan || 'free', stripeCustomerId: object.customer, stripeSubscriptionId: object.id, subscriptionStatus: object.status, periodStart: object.current_period_start ? new Date(object.current_period_start * 1000).toISOString() : null, periodEnd: object.current_period_end ? new Date(object.current_period_end * 1000).toISOString() : null, cancelAtPeriodEnd: object.cancel_at_period_end });
    }
    res.json({ received: true });
  };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/db.js (2026-07-12 16:04:18) =====
import fs from 'node:fs';
import path from 'node:path';
import crypto, { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
import { DatabaseSync } from 'node:sqlite';
import { config } from './config.js';

fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(config.sqlitePath), { recursive: true });
const db = new DatabaseSync(config.sqlitePath);
db.exec(`
  PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;
  PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;
  PRAGMA busy_timeout = 8000;
  PRAGMA synchronous = NORMAL;
  PRAGMA temp_store = MEMORY;
`);

const now = () => new Date().toISOString();
const json = value => JSON.stringify(value ?? null);
const parse = (value, fallback = null) => { try { return value == null ? fallback : JSON.parse(value); } catch { return fallback; } };
const hashToken = token => crypto.createHash('sha256').update(String(token)).digest('hex');
export function hashPassword(password, salt = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex')) {
  const hash = crypto.scryptSync(String(password), salt, 64).toString('hex');
  return `${salt}:${hash}`;
}
export function verifyPassword(password, encoded) {
  const [salt, expected] = String(encoded || '').split(':');
  if (!salt || !expected) return false;
  const actual = crypto.scryptSync(String(password), salt, 64);
  const target = Buffer.from(expected, 'hex');
  return actual.length === target.length && crypto.timingSafeEqual(actual, target);
}

function hasColumn(table, column) {
  return db.prepare(`PRAGMA table_info(${table})`).all().some(row => row.name === column);
}
function addColumn(table, definition) {
  const name = definition.trim().split(/\s+/)[0];
  if (!hasColumn(table, name)) db.exec(`ALTER TABLE ${table} ADD COLUMN ${definition}`);
}

db.exec(`
