function uniqueSlug(value) {
  const base = String(value || 'organization').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/(^-|-$)/g, '') || 'organization';
  let slug = base; let i = 2;
  while (db.prepare('SELECT 1 FROM organizations WHERE slug=?').get(slug)) slug = `${base}-${i++}`;
  return slug;
}

function ensureBootstrap() {
  let org = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM organizations ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1').get();
  if (!org) {
    const t = now();
    org = { id: randomUUID(), name: config.defaultOrganizationName, slug: uniqueSlug(config.defaultOrganizationName), created_at: t, updated_at: t };
    db.prepare('INSERT INTO organizations (id,name,slug,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(org.id, org.name, org.slug, t, t);
  }
  let user = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1').get();
  if (!user) {
    const t = now();
    user = { id: randomUUID(), email: config.adminEmail.toLowerCase(), name: config.adminName, password_hash: hashPassword(config.adminPassword), created_at: t, updated_at: t };
    db.prepare('INSERT INTO users (id,email,name,password_hash,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(user.id, user.email, user.name, user.password_hash, t, t);
  }
  db.prepare(`INSERT OR IGNORE INTO memberships (user_id,organization_id,role,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?)`).run(user.id, org.id, 'owner', now());
  db.prepare('UPDATE designs SET organization_id=COALESCE(organization_id,?), owner_user_id=COALESCE(owner_user_id,?)').run(org.id, user.id);
  db.prepare('UPDATE assets SET organization_id=COALESCE(organization_id,?), updated_at=COALESCE(updated_at,created_at)').run(org.id);
  db.prepare('UPDATE templates SET organization_id=COALESCE(organization_id,?)').run(org.id);
  db.prepare('UPDATE brand_kits SET organization_id=COALESCE(organization_id,?)').run(org.id);
  return { org, user };
}
const bootstrap = ensureBootstrap();

db.prepare('INSERT OR IGNORE INTO schema_migrations (version,applied_at) VALUES (?,?)').run(4,now());

// Indexes after migration columns exist.
db.exec(`
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_memberships_org ON memberships(organization_id, role);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_hash ON sessions(token_hash);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_designs_org_updated ON designs(organization_id, updated_at DESC);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_design_versions_design ON design_versions(design_id, created_at DESC);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_assets_org_updated ON assets(organization_id, updated_at DESC);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_assets_org_checksum ON assets(organization_id, checksum);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_templates_org_updated ON templates(organization_id, updated_at DESC);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_components_org_updated ON reusable_components(organization_id, updated_at DESC);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_brands_org ON brand_kits(organization_id, title);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_export_jobs_status ON export_jobs(status, created_at);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_share_design ON share_links(design_id, created_at DESC);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user ON notifications(user_id, organization_id, read_at, created_at DESC);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_comments_design ON comments(design_id, created_at);
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_org ON audit_logs(organization_id, created_at DESC);
`);

export function defaultDocument({ width = 1080, height = 1080, title = 'Untitled design' } = {}) {
  return {
    schemaVersion: 3,
    title,
    width,
    height,
    unit: 'px',
    dpi: 96,
    layoutGroups: [],
    pages: [{ id: randomUUID(), name: 'Page 1', background: '#ffffff', guides: { vertical: [], horizontal: [], locked: false }, elements: [] }]
  };
}

function seedProductData() {
  const orgId = bootstrap.org.id;
  const count = db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM templates WHERE organization_id=?').get(orgId).count;
  if (!count) {
    const t = now();
    const doc = defaultDocument({ title: 'Restaurant special', width: 1080, height: 1080 });
    doc.pages[0].background = '#fff8ef';
    doc.pages[0].elements = [
      { id: randomUUID(), type: 'text', name: 'Headline', x: 100, y: 120, width: 880, height: 180, rotation: 0, opacity: 1, locked: false, hidden: false, zIndex: 1, text: 'TODAY’S SPECIAL', fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 84, fontWeight: 700, fontStyle: 'normal', underline: false, linethrough: false, fill: '#231f20', textAlign: 'center', lineHeight: 1.1, charSpacing: 40, styles: {}, links: [], constraints: { horizontal: 'center', vertical: 'top', maintainAspectRatio: true }, effect: { shadow: null, stroke: null, strokeWidth: 0, hollow: false, curve: 0 } },
      { id: randomUUID(), type: 'text', name: 'Price', x: 260, y: 760, width: 560, height: 140, rotation: 0, opacity: 1, locked: false, hidden: false, zIndex: 2, text: '$14.95', fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 96, fontWeight: 700, fontStyle: 'normal', underline: false, linethrough: false, fill: '#d5482f', textAlign: 'center', lineHeight: 1.1, charSpacing: 0, styles: {}, links: [], constraints: { horizontal: 'center', vertical: 'bottom', maintainAspectRatio: true }, effect: { shadow: { color: 'rgba(0,0,0,.18)', blur: 8, offsetX: 0, offsetY: 4 }, stroke: null, strokeWidth: 0, hollow: false, curve: 0 } }
    ];
    db.prepare(`INSERT INTO templates (id,organization_id,title,category,description,tags_json,visibility,document_json,locked_element_ids_json,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`)
      .run(randomUUID(), orgId, 'Restaurant special', 'Restaurant', 'Square promotional post', json(['restaurant','social']), 'organization', json(doc), json([]), t, t);
  }
  const brandCount = db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM brand_kits WHERE organization_id=?').get(orgId).count;
  if (!brandCount) {
    const t = now();
    db.prepare(`INSERT INTO brand_kits (id,organization_id,title,description,colors_json,fonts_json,logos_json,text_styles_json,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`)
      .run(randomUUID(), orgId, 'Starter brand', 'Default CanvasForge palette', json(['#231f20','#d5482f','#f5c451','#fff8ef']), json(['Arial','Georgia','Verdana']), json([]), json([{ name:'Heading', fontFamily:'Arial', fontSize:72, fontWeight:700 },{ name:'Body', fontFamily:'Arial', fontSize:32, fontWeight:400 }]), t, t);
  }
}
seedProductData();

function audit(organizationId, userId, action, entityType, entityId, metadata = {}) {
  if (!organizationId) return;
  db.prepare('INSERT INTO audit_logs (id,organization_id,user_id,action,entity_type,entity_id,metadata_json,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)')
    .run(randomUUID(), organizationId, userId || null, action, entityType, entityId || null, json(metadata), now());
}

function mapDesign(row) { return row ? { ...row, document: parse(row.document_json, defaultDocument()), status: row.status || 'draft' } : null; }
function mapAsset(row) { return row ? { ...row, tags: parse(row.tags_json, []), favorite: !!row.favorite } : null; }
function mapTemplate(row) { return row ? { ...row, document: parse(row.document_json), tags: parse(row.tags_json, []), lockedElementIds: parse(row.locked_element_ids_json, []) } : null; }
function mapBrand(row) { return row ? { ...row, colors: parse(row.colors_json, []), fonts: parse(row.fonts_json, []), logos: parse(row.logos_json, []), textStyles: parse(row.text_styles_json, []) } : null; }
function mapComponent(row) { return row ? { ...row, tags: parse(row.tags_json, []), elements: parse(row.elements_json, []), linked: !!row.linked } : null; }

export const repositories = {
  bootstrap,
  auth: {
    findUserByEmail(email) { return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM users WHERE email=? COLLATE NOCASE').get(String(email).trim().toLowerCase()) || null; },
    getUser(id) { const u = db.prepare('SELECT id,email,name,created_at,updated_at FROM users WHERE id=?').get(id); return u || null; },
    memberships(userId) { return db.prepare(`SELECT m.organization_id,m.role,o.name,o.slug FROM memberships m JOIN organizations o ON o.id=m.organization_id WHERE m.user_id=? ORDER BY o.name`).all(userId); },
    createSession(userId) {
      const token = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('base64url'); const t = now();
      const expires = new Date(Date.now() + config.sessionDays * 86400000).toISOString();
      db.prepare('INSERT INTO sessions (id,user_id,token_hash,expires_at,created_at,last_seen_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(randomUUID(), userId, hashToken(token), expires, t, t);
      return { token, expiresAt: expires };
    },
    session(token) {
      if (!token) return null;
      const row = db.prepare(`SELECT s.*,u.email,u.name FROM sessions s JOIN users u ON u.id=s.user_id WHERE s.token_hash=? AND s.expires_at>?`).get(hashToken(token), now());
      if (row) db.prepare('UPDATE sessions SET last_seen_at=? WHERE id=?').run(now(), row.id);
      return row || null;
    },
    revokeSession(token) { db.prepare('DELETE FROM sessions WHERE token_hash=?').run(hashToken(token)); },
    updatePassword(userId,currentPassword,newPassword) { const user=db.prepare('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=?').get(userId); if(!user||!verifyPassword(currentPassword,user.password_hash))return false; db.prepare('UPDATE users SET password_hash=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?').run(hashPassword(newPassword),now(),userId); db.prepare('DELETE FROM sessions WHERE user_id=?').run(userId); return true; },
    ownerFromBootstrapToken(token) {
      if (!token || token !== config.ownerToken) return null;
      const user = db.prepare(`SELECT u.* FROM users u JOIN memberships m ON m.user_id=u.id WHERE m.role='owner' ORDER BY u.created_at LIMIT 1`).get();
      return user || null;
    },
    createUser({ email, name, password }) {
      const id = randomUUID(), t = now();
      const normalizedEmail = String(email).trim().toLowerCase();
      if (this.findUserByEmail(normalizedEmail)) {
        const err = new Error('An account with this email already exists.');
        err.status = 409;
        throw err;
      }
      db.prepare('INSERT INTO users (id,email,name,password_hash,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, normalizedEmail, String(name || email).trim(), hashPassword(password), t, t);
      return this.getUser(id);
    },
    invite({ organizationId, email, role, userId }) {
      const token = crypto.randomBytes(30).toString('base64url'), id = randomUUID(), t = now();
      const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 7 * 86400000).toISOString();
      db.prepare('INSERT INTO invitations (id,organization_id,email,role,token_hash,expires_at,created_by,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id, organizationId, String(email).trim().toLowerCase(), role, hashToken(token), expiresAt, userId, t);
      audit(organizationId,userId,'invite.create','invitation',id,{email,role});
      return { id, token, email, role, expiresAt };
    },
    acceptInvite({ token, name, password }) {
      const invitation = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invitations WHERE token_hash=? AND accepted_at IS NULL AND expires_at>?').get(hashToken(token), now());
      if (!invitation) return null;
      let user = this.findUserByEmail(invitation.email);
      if (!user) user = this.createUser({ email: invitation.email, name, password });
      db.prepare('INSERT OR REPLACE INTO memberships (user_id,organization_id,role,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?)').run(user.id, invitation.organization_id, invitation.role, now());
      db.prepare('UPDATE invitations SET accepted_at=? WHERE id=?').run(now(), invitation.id);
      return user;
    }
  },
  organizations: {
    create(name,userId) { const id=randomUUID(),t=now(),slug=uniqueSlug(name); db.prepare('INSERT INTO organizations (id,name,slug,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,name,slug,t,t); db.prepare('INSERT INTO memberships (user_id,organization_id,role,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?)').run(userId,id,'owner',t); audit(id,userId,'organization.create','organization',id,{name}); return this.get(id); },
    get(id) { return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM organizations WHERE id=?').get(id) || null; },
    members(orgId) { return db.prepare(`SELECT u.id,u.email,u.name,m.role,m.created_at FROM memberships m JOIN users u ON u.id=m.user_id WHERE m.organization_id=? ORDER BY u.name`).all(orgId); },
    updateMember(orgId, userId, role, actorId) { db.prepare('UPDATE memberships SET role=? WHERE organization_id=? AND user_id=?').run(role,orgId,userId); audit(orgId,actorId,'member.update','user',userId,{role}); },
    removeMember(orgId, userId, actorId) { db.prepare('DELETE FROM memberships WHERE organization_id=? AND user_id=?').run(orgId,userId); audit(orgId,actorId,'member.remove','user',userId); }
  },
  designs: {
    list(orgId, { status, includeDeleted = false } = {}) {
      let sql = 'SELECT id,title,width,height,thumbnail_url,status,created_at,updated_at FROM designs WHERE organization_id=?'; const args=[orgId];
      if (!includeDeleted) sql += ' AND deleted_at IS NULL';
      if (status) { sql += ' AND status=?'; args.push(status); }
      sql += ' ORDER BY updated_at DESC';
      return db.prepare(sql).all(...args);
    },
    get(id, orgId = null) { const row = orgId ? db.prepare('SELECT * FROM designs WHERE id=? AND organization_id=? AND deleted_at IS NULL').get(id,orgId) : db.prepare('SELECT * FROM designs WHERE id=?').get(id); return mapDesign(row); },
    create(input = {}, orgId = bootstrap.org.id, userId = bootstrap.user.id) {
      const id=randomUUID(), t=now(); const document=input.document||defaultDocument(input);
      db.prepare('INSERT INTO designs (id,organization_id,owner_user_id,title,width,height,document_json,status,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,orgId,userId,input.title||document.title||'Untitled design',document.width,document.height,json(document),'draft',t,t);
      audit(orgId,userId,'design.create','design',id,{title:input.title}); return this.get(id,orgId);
    },
    update(id,input,orgId=null,userId=null) {
      const existing=this.get(id,orgId); if(!existing)return null; const document=input.document||existing.document; const t=now();
      db.prepare('UPDATE designs SET title=?,width=?,height=?,document_json=?,thumbnail_url=COALESCE(?,thumbnail_url),status=COALESCE(?,status),updated_at=? WHERE id=?').run(input.title||document.title||existing.title,document.width,document.height,json(document),input.thumbnailUrl||null,input.status||null,t,id);
      audit(existing.organization_id,userId,'design.update','design',id,{status:input.status}); return this.get(id,existing.organization_id);
    },
    setStatus(id,status,orgId,userId,approvedVersionId=null) { db.prepare('UPDATE designs SET status=?,approved_version_id=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(status,approvedVersionId,now(),id,orgId); audit(orgId,userId,'design.status','design',id,{status,approvedVersionId}); return this.get(id,orgId); },
    delete(id,orgId,userId) { db.prepare('UPDATE designs SET deleted_at=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(now(),now(),id,orgId); audit(orgId,userId,'design.delete','design',id); }
  },
  versions: {
    list(designId) { return db.prepare('SELECT id,label,created_by,created_at FROM design_versions WHERE design_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100').all(designId); },
    create(designId,document,label=null,userId=null) { const id=randomUUID(); db.prepare('INSERT INTO design_versions (id,design_id,label,document_json,created_by,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,designId,label,json(document),userId,now()); return id; },
    get(id) { const row=db.prepare('SELECT * FROM design_versions WHERE id=?').get(id); return row?{...row,document:parse(row.document_json)}:null; }
  },
  assets: {
    list(orgId,{query='',folderId=null,favorite=false,tags=[]}={}) {
      let sql='SELECT * FROM assets WHERE organization_id=?'; const args=[orgId];
      if(query){sql+=' AND (original_name LIKE ? OR tags_json LIKE ?)';args.push(`%${query}%`,`%${query}%`);} if(folderId){sql+=' AND folder_id=?';args.push(folderId);} if(favorite){sql+=' AND favorite=1';}
      for(const tag of tags){sql+=' AND tags_json LIKE ?';args.push(`%"${tag}"%`);} sql+=' ORDER BY favorite DESC,updated_at DESC';
      return db.prepare(sql).all(...args).map(mapAsset);
    },
    get(id,orgId=null){const row=orgId?db.prepare('SELECT * FROM assets WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').get(id,orgId):db.prepare('SELECT * FROM assets WHERE id=?').get(id);return mapAsset(row);},
    byChecksum(checksum,orgId){return mapAsset(db.prepare('SELECT * FROM assets WHERE organization_id=? AND checksum=?').get(orgId,checksum));},
    create(input,orgId=bootstrap.org.id){if(input.checksum){const existing=db.prepare('SELECT * FROM assets WHERE organization_id=? AND checksum=?').get(orgId,input.checksum);if(existing)return mapAsset(existing);}const id=randomUUID(),t=now();db.prepare('INSERT INTO assets (id,organization_id,folder_id,filename,original_name,mime_type,width,height,url,thumbnail_url,preview_url,size_bytes,tags_json,favorite,checksum,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,orgId,input.folderId||null,input.filename,input.originalName,input.mimeType,input.width||null,input.height||null,input.url,input.thumbnailUrl||null,input.previewUrl||input.url,input.sizeBytes||null,json(input.tags||[]),input.favorite?1:0,input.checksum||null,t,t);return this.get(id,orgId);},
    update(id,input,orgId,userId){const asset=this.get(id,orgId);if(!asset)return null;db.prepare('UPDATE assets SET original_name=COALESCE(?,original_name),folder_id=?,tags_json=COALESCE(?,tags_json),favorite=COALESCE(?,favorite),updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(input.originalName??null,input.folderId===undefined?asset.folder_id:input.folderId,input.tags?json(input.tags):null,input.favorite===undefined?null:(input.favorite?1:0),now(),id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'asset.update','asset',id);return this.get(id,orgId);},
    usage(id,orgId){const designs=db.prepare('SELECT id,title,document_json FROM designs WHERE organization_id=? AND deleted_at IS NULL').all(orgId);return designs.filter(d=>String(d.document_json).includes(`"assetId":"${id}"`)).map(d=>({id:d.id,title:d.title}));},
    delete(id,orgId,userId){db.prepare('DELETE FROM assets WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'asset.delete','asset',id);},
    folders(orgId){return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM asset_folders WHERE organization_id=? ORDER BY name').all(orgId);},
    createFolder(orgId,name,parentId=null){const id=randomUUID();db.prepare('INSERT INTO asset_folders (id,organization_id,name,parent_id,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,orgId,name,parentId,now());return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM asset_folders WHERE id=?').get(id);}
  },
  templates: {
    list(orgId,{query='',category=''}={}){let sql="SELECT id,title,category,description,tags_json,visibility,thumbnail_url,created_at,updated_at FROM templates WHERE (organization_id=? OR visibility='public')";const args=[orgId];if(query){sql+=' AND (title LIKE ? OR tags_json LIKE ?)';args.push(`%${query}%`,`%${query}%`);}if(category){sql+=' AND category=?';args.push(category);}sql+=' ORDER BY updated_at DESC';return db.prepare(sql).all(...args).map(r=>({...r,tags:parse(r.tags_json,[])}));},
    get(id,orgId=null){const row=orgId?db.prepare("SELECT * FROM templates WHERE id=? AND (organization_id=? OR visibility='public')").get(id,orgId):db.prepare('SELECT * FROM templates WHERE id=?').get(id);return mapTemplate(row);},
    create(input,orgId=bootstrap.org.id,userId=null){const id=randomUUID(),t=now();db.prepare('INSERT INTO templates (id,organization_id,title,category,description,tags_json,visibility,thumbnail_url,source_design_id,document_json,locked_element_ids_json,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,orgId,input.title,input.category||'Custom',input.description||'',json(input.tags||[]),input.visibility||'organization',input.thumbnailUrl||null,input.sourceDesignId||null,json(input.document),json(input.lockedElementIds||[]),t,t);audit(orgId,userId,'template.create','template',id);return this.get(id,orgId);},
    update(id,input,orgId,userId){const item=this.get(id,orgId);if(!item)return null;db.prepare('UPDATE templates SET title=?,category=?,description=?,tags_json=?,visibility=?,thumbnail_url=?,document_json=?,locked_element_ids_json=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(input.title??item.title,input.category??item.category,input.description??item.description,json(input.tags??item.tags),input.visibility??item.visibility,input.thumbnailUrl??item.thumbnail_url,json(input.document??item.document),json(input.lockedElementIds??item.lockedElementIds),now(),id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'template.update','template',id);return this.get(id,orgId);},
    delete(id,orgId,userId){db.prepare('DELETE FROM templates WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'template.delete','template',id);}
  },
  components: {
    list(orgId,{query=''}={}){let sql='SELECT * FROM reusable_components WHERE organization_id=?';const args=[orgId];if(query){sql+=' AND (title LIKE ? OR tags_json LIKE ?)';args.push(`%${query}%`,`%${query}%`);}sql+=' ORDER BY updated_at DESC';return db.prepare(sql).all(...args).map(mapComponent);},
    get(id,orgId){return mapComponent(db.prepare('SELECT * FROM reusable_components WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').get(id,orgId));},
    create(input,orgId,userId){const id=randomUUID(),t=now();db.prepare('INSERT INTO reusable_components (id,organization_id,title,category,tags_json,elements_json,width,height,linked,created_by,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,orgId,input.title,input.category||'Custom',json(input.tags||[]),json(input.elements||[]),input.width||1,input.height||1,input.linked?1:0,userId,t,t);audit(orgId,userId,'component.create','component',id);return this.get(id,orgId);},
    update(id,input,orgId,userId){const item=this.get(id,orgId);if(!item)return null;db.prepare('UPDATE reusable_components SET title=?,category=?,tags_json=?,elements_json=?,width=?,height=?,linked=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(input.title??item.title,input.category??item.category,json(input.tags??item.tags),json(input.elements??item.elements),input.width??item.width,input.height??item.height,(input.linked??item.linked)?1:0,now(),id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'component.update','component',id);return this.get(id,orgId);},
    syncLinked(id,orgId,userId){const component=this.get(id,orgId);if(!component)return 0;let changed=0;for(const summary of repositories.designs.list(orgId)){const design=repositories.designs.get(summary.id,orgId);let touched=false;for(const page of design.document.pages||[]){const instances=new Map();for(const element of page.elements||[])if(element.componentId===id&&element.componentLinked&&element.componentInstanceId){if(!instances.has(element.componentInstanceId))instances.set(element.componentInstanceId,[]);instances.get(element.componentInstanceId).push(element);}for(const [instanceId,old] of instances){const left=Math.min(...old.map(e=>e.x)),top=Math.min(...old.map(e=>e.y)),z=Math.min(...old.map(e=>e.zIndex||0));const oldIds=new Set(old.map(e=>e.id));page.elements=page.elements.filter(e=>!oldIds.has(e.id));const replacements=component.elements.map((source,index)=>({...structuredClone(source),id:randomUUID(),x:left+source.x,y:top+source.y,zIndex:z+index,componentId:id,componentInstanceId:instanceId,componentLinked:true}));page.elements.push(...replacements);page.elements.sort((a,b)=>(a.zIndex||0)-(b.zIndex||0)).forEach((e,i)=>e.zIndex=i);touched=true;}}if(touched){repositories.versions.create(design.id,design.document,'Before linked component update',userId);repositories.designs.update(design.id,{document:design.document},orgId,userId);changed++;}}return changed;},
    delete(id,orgId,userId){db.prepare('DELETE FROM reusable_components WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'component.delete','component',id);}
  },
  brands: {
    list(orgId){return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM brand_kits WHERE organization_id=? ORDER BY title').all(orgId).map(mapBrand);},
    get(id,orgId){return mapBrand(db.prepare('SELECT * FROM brand_kits WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').get(id,orgId));},
    create(input,orgId,userId){const id=randomUUID(),t=now();db.prepare('INSERT INTO brand_kits (id,organization_id,title,description,colors_json,fonts_json,logos_json,text_styles_json,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,orgId,input.title,input.description||'',json(input.colors||[]),json(input.fonts||[]),json(input.logos||[]),json(input.textStyles||[]),t,t);audit(orgId,userId,'brand.create','brand',id);return this.get(id,orgId);},
    update(id,input,orgId,userId){const item=this.get(id,orgId);if(!item)return null;db.prepare('UPDATE brand_kits SET title=?,description=?,colors_json=?,fonts_json=?,logos_json=?,text_styles_json=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(input.title??item.title,input.description??item.description,json(input.colors??item.colors),json(input.fonts??item.fonts),json(input.logos??item.logos),json(input.textStyles??item.textStyles),now(),id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'brand.update','brand',id);return this.get(id,orgId);},
    delete(id,orgId,userId){db.prepare('DELETE FROM brand_kits WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'brand.delete','brand',id);}
  },
  exports: {
    create(designId,format,options={},userId=null){const id=randomUUID(),t=now();db.prepare('INSERT INTO export_jobs (id,design_id,user_id,format,status,progress,options_json,created_at,updated_at,max_attempts) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,designId,userId,format,'queued',0,json(options),t,t,Math.max(1,Number(options.maxAttempts||3)));return this.get(id);},
    get(id){const r=db.prepare('SELECT * FROM export_jobs WHERE id=?').get(id);return r?{...r,options:parse(r.options_json,{})}:null;},
    list(designId){return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM export_jobs WHERE design_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50').all(designId).map(r=>({...r,options:parse(r.options_json,{})}));},
    claim(){db.exec('BEGIN IMMEDIATE');try{const stale=new Date(Date.now()-10*60000).toISOString();db.prepare("UPDATE export_jobs SET status='queued',error='Recovered stalled job',updated_at=? WHERE status='processing' AND heartbeat_at<? AND attempts<max_attempts").run(now(),stale);const row=db.prepare("SELECT * FROM export_jobs WHERE status='queued' AND cancel_requested=0 AND attempts<max_attempts ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1").get();if(!row){db.exec('COMMIT');return null;}db.prepare("UPDATE export_jobs SET status='processing',progress=1,attempts=attempts+1,started_at=COALESCE(started_at,?),heartbeat_at=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?").run(now(),now(),now(),row.id);db.exec('COMMIT');return this.get(row.id);}catch(error){db.exec('ROLLBACK');throw error;}},
    progress(id,value){db.prepare('UPDATE export_jobs SET progress=?,heartbeat_at=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?').run(Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(value))),now(),now(),id);},
    isCancelled(id){return !!db.prepare('SELECT cancel_requested FROM export_jobs WHERE id=?').get(id)?.cancel_requested;},
    cancel(id){db.prepare("UPDATE export_jobs SET cancel_requested=1,status=CASE WHEN status='queued' THEN 'cancelled' ELSE status END,updated_at=? WHERE id=?").run(now(),id);return this.get(id);},
    retry(id){db.prepare("UPDATE export_jobs SET status='queued',cancel_requested=0,error=NULL,progress=0,updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND status IN ('failed','cancelled')").run(now(),id);return this.get(id);},
    complete(id,url){db.prepare("UPDATE export_jobs SET status='completed',progress=100,output_url=?,error=NULL,completed_at=?,heartbeat_at=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?").run(url,now(),now(),now(),id);},
    fail(id,error){const job=this.get(id);const retry=job&&job.attempts<job.max_attempts&&!job.cancel_requested;db.prepare('UPDATE export_jobs SET status=?,error=?,heartbeat_at=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?').run(retry?'queued':'failed',String(error).slice(0,4000),now(),now(),id);}
  },
  shares: {
    list(designId,orgId){return db.prepare('SELECT id,token_hint,allow_download,allow_copy,expires_at,revoked_at,created_at FROM share_links WHERE design_id=? AND organization_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC').all(designId,orgId).map(r=>({...r,allow_download:!!r.allow_download,allow_copy:!!r.allow_copy}));},
    create(input,orgId,userId){const token=crypto.randomBytes(30).toString('base64url'),id=randomUUID();db.prepare('INSERT INTO share_links (id,organization_id,design_id,token_hash,token_hint,password_hash,allow_download,allow_copy,expires_at,created_by,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,orgId,input.designId,hashToken(token),token.slice(0,8),input.password?hashPassword(input.password):null,input.allowDownload?1:0,input.allowCopy?1:0,input.expiresAt||null,userId,now());audit(orgId,userId,'share.create','share',id,{designId:input.designId});return {id,token,allowDownload:!!input.allowDownload,allowCopy:!!input.allowCopy,expiresAt:input.expiresAt||null};},
    resolve(token,password=''){const row=db.prepare('SELECT * FROM share_links WHERE token_hash=? AND revoked_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at>?)').get(hashToken(token),now());if(!row)return null;if(row.password_hash&&!verifyPassword(password,row.password_hash))return {passwordRequired:true};const design=repositories.designs.get(row.design_id,row.organization_id);return design?{share:{id:row.id,allowDownload:!!row.allow_download,allowCopy:!!row.allow_copy},design}:null;},
    revoke(id,orgId,userId){db.prepare('UPDATE share_links SET revoked_at=? WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(now(),id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'share.revoke','share',id);}
  },
  comments: {
    list(designId,orgId){return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM comments WHERE design_id=? AND organization_id=? ORDER BY created_at').all(designId,orgId);},
    create(input,orgId,user){const id=randomUUID(),t=now();db.prepare('INSERT INTO comments (id,organization_id,design_id,user_id,author_name,page_id,element_id,body,parent_id,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,orgId,input.designId,user?.id||null,user?.name||input.authorName||'Guest',input.pageId||null,input.elementId||null,input.body,input.parentId||null,t,t);audit(orgId,user?.id,'comment.create','comment',id,{designId:input.designId});return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM comments WHERE id=?').get(id);},
    resolve(id,orgId,userId,resolved=true){db.prepare('UPDATE comments SET resolved_at=?,resolved_by=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(resolved?now():null,resolved?userId:null,now(),id,orgId);return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM comments WHERE id=?').get(id);},
    delete(id,orgId,userId){db.prepare('DELETE FROM comments WHERE id=? AND organization_id=?').run(id,orgId);audit(orgId,userId,'comment.delete','comment',id);}
  },
  notifications: {
    list(orgId,userId,limit=100){return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE organization_id=? AND user_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ?').all(orgId,userId,Math.min(250,limit));},
    create(orgId,userId,input={}){if(!userId)return null;const id=randomUUID();db.prepare('INSERT INTO notifications (id,organization_id,user_id,type,title,body,entity_type,entity_id,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)').run(id,orgId,userId,input.type||'general',input.title||'CanvasForge notification',input.body||'',input.entityType||null,input.entityId||null,now());return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE id=?').get(id);},
    markRead(id,orgId,userId,read=true){db.prepare('UPDATE notifications SET read_at=? WHERE id=? AND organization_id=? AND user_id=?').run(read?now():null,id,orgId,userId);return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE id=? AND user_id=?').get(id,userId);},
    markAllRead(orgId,userId){db.prepare('UPDATE notifications SET read_at=? WHERE organization_id=? AND user_id=? AND read_at IS NULL').run(now(),orgId,userId);return this.list(orgId,userId);}
  },
  audit: { list(orgId,limit=100){return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM audit_logs WHERE organization_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ?').all(orgId,Math.min(500,limit)).map(r=>({...r,metadata:parse(r.metadata_json,{})}));} },
  worker: { heartbeat(workerId,metadata={}){db.prepare('INSERT INTO worker_state (worker_id,heartbeat_at,metadata_json) VALUES (?,?,?) ON CONFLICT(worker_id) DO UPDATE SET heartbeat_at=excluded.heartbeat_at,metadata_json=excluded.metadata_json').run(workerId,now(),json(metadata));}, list(){return db.prepare('SELECT * FROM worker_state').all().map(r=>({...r,metadata:parse(r.metadata_json,{})}));} }
};

export function runIntegrityCheck(){return db.prepare('PRAGMA integrity_check').all();}
export function checkpoint(){db.exec('PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE)');}
export function closeDb(){try{checkpoint();}finally{db.close();}}
export { db };

import fs from 'node:fs';
import path from 'node:path';
import express from 'express';
import cors from 'cors';
import multer from 'multer';
import sharp from 'sharp';
import mime from 'mime-types';
import { randomUUID, createHash } from 'node:crypto';
import { config } from './config.js';
import { repositories, verifyPassword, closeDb } from './db.js';
import { importPowerPoint } from './powerpoint.js';

for (const dir of ['assets','previews','thumbs','exports','temporary']) fs.mkdirSync(path.join(config.storageDir, dir), { recursive: true });

const app = express();
app.disable('x-powered-by');
app.use((_req,res,next)=>{res.setHeader('X-Content-Type-Options','nosniff');res.setHeader('X-Frame-Options','SAMEORIGIN');res.setHeader('Referrer-Policy','same-origin');res.setHeader('Permissions-Policy','camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()');next();});
app.use(cors({ origin: config.webOrigin.split(',').map(v=>v.trim()), credentials: false }));
app.use(express.json({ limit: '25mb' }));
app.use('/storage', express.static(config.storageDir, { fallthrough: false, maxAge: '1h', dotfiles: 'deny', immutable: false }));

import { createCommercialRouter } from './commercial/index.js';

const { router: commercialRouter } = createCommercialRouter({
  authenticate: async (req) => {
    const bearer = (req.get('authorization') || '').match(/^Bearer\s+(.+)$/i)?.[1];
    const session = bearer ? repositories.auth.session(bearer) : null;
    if (session) req.user = { id: session.user_id, email: session.email, name: session.name };
  },
  services: {
    createUser: input => repositories.auth.createUser(input),
    issueSession: user => repositories.auth.createSession(user.id),
    resolveUsers: members => members.map(m => { const u = repositories.auth.getUser(m.id); return u ? { ...m, name: u.name, email: u.email } : m; })
  }
});
app.use(commercialRouter);

const rateBuckets = new Map();
function rateLimit({ windowMs=60000, max=120 }={}) {
  return (req,res,next)=>{
    const key=`${req.ip}:${req.path.split('/').slice(0,4).join('/')}`;const t=Date.now();let bucket=rateBuckets.get(key);
    if(!bucket||bucket.reset<t){bucket={count:0,reset:t+windowMs};rateBuckets.set(key,bucket);}bucket.count++;
    res.setHeader('X-RateLimit-Limit',String(max));res.setHeader('X-RateLimit-Remaining',String(Math.max(0,max-bucket.count)));
    if(bucket.count>max)return res.status(429).json({error:'Too many requests. Try again shortly.'});next();
  };
}
app.use('/api', rateLimit());

function authPayload(user) {
  const organizations = repositories.auth.memberships(user.id);
  return { user: { id:user.id,email:user.email,name:user.name }, organizations, currentOrganizationId: organizations[0]?.organization_id || null };
}
app.post('/api/auth/login', rateLimit({windowMs:15*60000,max:20}), (req,res)=>{
  const user=repositories.auth.findUserByEmail(req.body?.email||'');
  if(!user||!verifyPassword(req.body?.password||'',user.password_hash))return res.status(401).json({error:'Invalid email or password.'});
  const session=repositories.auth.createSession(user.id);res.json({...session,...authPayload(user)});
});
app.post('/api/auth/token-login', rateLimit({windowMs:15*60000,max:20}), (req,res)=>{
  const user=repositories.auth.ownerFromBootstrapToken(req.body?.token||'');
  if(!user)return res.status(401).json({error:'Invalid owner token.'});
  const session=repositories.auth.createSession(user.id);res.json({...session,...authPayload(user)});
});
app.post('/api/auth/invitations/accept', rateLimit({windowMs:15*60000,max:20}), (req,res)=>{
  const {token,name,password}=req.body||{};if(!token||!password||String(password).length<10)return res.status(400).json({error:'Invitation token and a password of at least 10 characters are required.'});
  const user=repositories.auth.acceptInvite({token,name,password});if(!user)return res.status(404).json({error:'Invitation is invalid or expired.'});
  const session=repositories.auth.createSession(user.id);res.json({...session,...authPayload(user)});
});

app.get('/api/healthz',(_req,res)=>res.json({ok:true,now:new Date().toISOString()}));
app.get('/api/public/share/:token', rateLimit({windowMs:60000,max:60}), (req,res)=>{
  const result=repositories.shares.resolve(req.params.token,req.query.password||req.get('x-share-password')||'');
  if(!result)return res.status(404).json({error:'Share link not found or expired.'});
  if(result.passwordRequired)return res.status(401).json({error:'Password required.',passwordRequired:true});
  res.json(result);
});

function authenticate(req,res,next) {
  const bearer=(req.get('authorization')||'').match(/^Bearer\s+(.+)$/i)?.[1];
  const legacy=req.get('x-owner-token')||req.query.token;
  let session=bearer?repositories.auth.session(bearer):null;
  let user=session?repositories.auth.getUser(session.user_id):repositories.auth.ownerFromBootstrapToken(legacy);
  if(!user)return res.status(401).json({error:'Authentication required.'});
  const memberships=repositories.auth.memberships(user.id);
  const requested=req.get('x-organization-id')||req.query.organizationId;
  const membership=memberships.find(m=>m.organization_id===requested)||memberships[0];
  if(!membership)return res.status(403).json({error:'No organization membership.'});
  req.authToken=bearer||null;req.user=user;req.memberships=memberships;req.organization={id:membership.organization_id,name:membership.name,slug:membership.slug,role:membership.role};next();
}
const roleRank={viewer:1,reviewer:2,designer:3,admin:4,owner:5};
const requireRole=minimum=>(req,res,next)=>roleRank[req.organization.role]>=roleRank[minimum]?next():res.status(403).json({error:`${minimum} access required.`});
app.use('/api', authenticate);

app.get('/api/health', (req,res)=>res.json({ok:true,database:'sqlite',now:new Date().toISOString(),user:{id:req.user.id,name:req.user.name},organization:req.organization,workers:repositories.worker.list()}));

function sanitizeSvg(raw) {
  const source=String(raw).replace(/\0/g,'');
  if(!/<svg[\s>]/i.test(source))throw new Error('Invalid SVG file.');
  return source.replace(/<script[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi,'').replace(/<foreignObject[\s\S]*?<\/foreignObject>/gi,'').replace(/\son\w+\s*=\s*("[^"]*"|'[^']*'|[^\s>]+)/gi,'').replace(/(?:href|xlink:href)\s*=\s*["']\s*(?:javascript:|https?:|file:|data:text\/html)[^"']*["']/gi,'').replace(/<!DOCTYPE[\s\S]*?>/gi,'').replace(/<\?xml[\s\S]*?\?>/gi,'');
}
const upload=multer({storage:multer.memoryStorage(),limits:{fileSize:config.maxUploadBytes,files:20},fileFilter:(_req,file,cb)=>{const allowed=['image/png','image/jpeg','image/webp','image/gif','image/svg+xml'];cb(allowed.includes(file.mimetype)?null:new Error('Unsupported image type.'),allowed.includes(file.mimetype));}});

app.post('/api/assets',requireRole('designer'),upload.array('files',20),async(req,res,next)=>{try{const files=req.files?.length?req.files:(req.file?[req.file]:[]);if(!files.length)return res.status(400).json({error:'At least one image file is required.'});const results=[];for(const file of files){let buffer=file.buffer;const isSvg=file.mimetype==='image/svg+xml';if(isSvg)buffer=Buffer.from(sanitizeSvg(buffer.toString('utf8')));const checksum=createHash('sha256').update(buffer).digest('hex');const duplicate=repositories.assets.byChecksum(checksum,req.organization.id);if(duplicate){results.push(duplicate);continue;}let metadata={};try{metadata=await sharp(buffer,{animated:true}).metadata();if(!metadata.format&&!isSvg)throw new Error('Image signature could not be verified.');}catch(error){if(!isSvg)throw new Error(`Invalid image file: ${file.originalname}`);}const ext=isSvg?'.svg':`.${mime.extension(file.mimetype)||metadata.format||'bin'}`;const stem=randomUUID(),filename=`${stem}${ext}`;const output=path.join(config.storageDir,'assets',filename);fs.writeFileSync(output,buffer);const thumbName=`${stem}.webp`,previewName=`${stem}.webp`;const thumbPath=path.join(config.storageDir,'thumbs',thumbName),previewPath=path.join(config.storageDir,'previews',previewName);try{await sharp(buffer,{animated:false}).rotate().resize({width:360,height:360,fit:'inside',withoutEnlargement:true}).webp({quality:80}).toFile(thumbPath);await sharp(buffer,{animated:false}).rotate().resize({width:1800,height:1800,fit:'inside',withoutEnlargement:true}).webp({quality:88}).toFile(previewPath);}catch{fs.copyFileSync(output,thumbPath);fs.copyFileSync(output,previewPath);}results.push(repositories.assets.create({folderId:req.body?.folderId||null,filename,originalName:file.originalname,mimeType:file.mimetype,width:metadata.width,height:metadata.height,sizeBytes:buffer.length,url:`/storage/assets/${filename}`,thumbnailUrl:`/storage/thumbs/${thumbName}`,previewUrl:`/storage/previews/${previewName}`,tags:req.body?.tags?String(req.body.tags).split(',').map(v=>v.trim()).filter(Boolean):[],checksum},req.organization.id));}res.status(201).json(results.length===1?results[0]:results);}catch(error){next(error);}});
app.patch('/api/assets/:id',requireRole('designer'),(req,res)=>{const item=repositories.assets.update(req.params.id,req.body,req.organization.id,req.user.id);if(!item)return res.status(404).json({error:'Asset not found.'});res.json(item);});
app.get('/api/assets/:id/usage',(req,res)=>res.json(repositories.assets.usage(req.params.id,req.organization.id)));
app.delete('/api/assets/:id',requireRole('designer'),(req,res)=>{const asset=repositories.assets.get(req.params.id,req.organization.id);if(!asset)return res.status(404).json({error:'Asset not found.'});const usage=repositories.assets.usage(asset.id,req.organization.id);if(usage.length)return res.status(409).json({error:'Asset is still used by designs.',usage});for(const url of [asset.url,asset.thumbnail_url,asset.preview_url]){if(!url?.startsWith('/storage/'))continue;const full=path.resolve(config.storageDir,url.slice('/storage/'.length));if(full.startsWith(`${config.storageDir}${path.sep}`))fs.rmSync(full,{force:true});}repositories.assets.delete(asset.id,req.organization.id,req.user.id);res.status(204).end();});
app.post('/api/assets/:id/replace-everywhere',requireRole('designer'),(req,res)=>{const source=repositories.assets.get(req.params.id,req.organization.id),target=repositories.assets.get(req.body?.replacementAssetId,req.organization.id);if(!source||!target)return res.status(404).json({error:'Source or replacement asset not found.'});let changed=0;for(const design of repositories.designs.list(req.organization.id)){const full=repositories.designs.get(design.id,req.organization.id);let touched=false;for(const page of full.document.pages||[])for(const element of page.elements||[])if(element.assetId===source.id){element.assetId=target.id;element.src=target.preview_url||target.url;element.nativeWidth=target.width||element.nativeWidth;element.nativeHeight=target.height||element.nativeHeight;touched=true;}if(touched){repositories.versions.create(full.id,full.document,'Before global asset replacement',req.user.id);repositories.designs.update(full.id,{document:full.document},req.organization.id,req.user.id);changed++;}}res.json({changedDesigns:changed});});

app.get('/api/designs/:id/comments',(req,res)=>{const design=repositories.designs.get(req.params.id,req.organization.id);if(!design)return res.status(404).json({error:'Design not found.'});res.json(repositories.comments.list(design.id,req.organization.id));});
app.post('/api/designs/:id/comments',requireRole('reviewer'),(req,res)=>{const design=repositories.designs.get(req.params.id,req.organization.id);if(!design)return res.status(404).json({error:'Design not found.'});const body=String(req.body?.body||'').trim();if(!body)return res.status(400).json({error:'Comment is required.'});const comment=repositories.comments.create({...req.body,body,designId:design.id},req.organization.id,req.user);const recipients=new Set();if(design.owner_user_id&&design.owner_user_id!==req.user.id)recipients.add(design.owner_user_id);for(const member of repositories.organizations.members(req.organization.id)){const aliases=[member.email,member.name,String(member.name||'').replace(/\s+/g,'')].filter(Boolean).map(v=>`@${v}`.toLowerCase());if(member.id!==req.user.id&&aliases.some(alias=>body.toLowerCase().includes(alias)))recipients.add(member.id);}if(req.body?.parentId){const parent=repositories.comments.list(design.id,req.organization.id).find(item=>item.id===req.body.parentId);if(parent?.user_id&&parent.user_id!==req.user.id)recipients.add(parent.user_id);}for(const userId of recipients)repositories.notifications.create(req.organization.id,userId,{type:'comment',title:`New comment on ${design.title}`,body:`${req.user.name}: ${body.slice(0,180)}`,entityType:'design',entityId:design.id});res.status(201).json(comment);});
