app.delete('/api/comments/:id',requireRole('reviewer'),(req,res)=>{repositories.comments.delete(req.params.id,req.organization.id,req.user.id);res.status(204).end();});

app.get('/api/designs/:id/shares',(req,res)=>res.json(repositories.shares.list(req.params.id,req.organization.id)));
app.post('/api/designs/:id/shares',requireRole('reviewer'),(req,res)=>{const design=repositories.designs.get(req.params.id,req.organization.id);if(!design)return res.status(404).json({error:'Design not found.'});res.status(201).json(repositories.shares.create({...req.body,designId:design.id},req.organization.id,req.user.id));});
app.delete('/api/shares/:id',requireRole('reviewer'),(req,res)=>{repositories.shares.revoke(req.params.id,req.organization.id,req.user.id);res.status(204).end();});

app.post('/api/designs/:id/exports',requireRole('reviewer'),(req,res)=>{const design=repositories.designs.get(req.params.id,req.organization.id);if(!design)return res.status(404).json({error:'Design not found.'});const format=String(req.body?.format||'png').toLowerCase();if(!['png','jpeg','svg','pdf','pptx'].includes(format))return res.status(400).json({error:'Unsupported export format.'});res.status(202).json(repositories.exports.create(design.id,format,req.body?.options||{},req.user.id));});
app.get('/api/designs/:id/exports',(req,res)=>res.json(repositories.exports.list(req.params.id)));
app.get('/api/exports/:id',(req,res)=>{const job=repositories.exports.get(req.params.id);if(!job)return res.status(404).json({error:'Export not found.'});const design=repositories.designs.get(job.design_id,req.organization.id);if(!design)return res.status(404).json({error:'Export not found.'});res.json(job);});
app.post('/api/exports/:id/cancel',requireRole('reviewer'),(req,res)=>res.json(repositories.exports.cancel(req.params.id)));
app.post('/api/exports/:id/retry',requireRole('reviewer'),(req,res)=>res.json(repositories.exports.retry(req.params.id)));
app.get('/api/audit',requireRole('admin'),(req,res)=>res.json(repositories.audit.list(req.organization.id,Number(req.query.limit||100))));

const powerpointUpload=multer({
  storage:multer.memoryStorage(),
  limits:{fileSize:Math.max(config.maxUploadBytes,50*1024*1024),files:1},
  fileFilter:(_req,file,cb)=>{const valid=/\.pptx$/i.test(file.originalname)&&['application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation','application/octet-stream','application/zip',''].includes(file.mimetype||'');if(valid)return cb(null,true);const error=new Error('Choose a valid .pptx PowerPoint file.');error.status=400;cb(error,false);}
});
async function persistPowerPointAsset(organizationId,{buffer,mimeType,originalName,checksum}){
  const duplicate=repositories.assets.byChecksum(checksum,organizationId);
  if(duplicate)return duplicate;
  let content=buffer;let type=mimeType;let extension=mime.extension(type)||path.extname(originalName).slice(1)||'png';let metadata={};
  if(type==='image/svg+xml')content=Buffer.from(sanitizeSvg(content.toString('utf8')));
  try{
    metadata=await sharp(content,{animated:false}).metadata();
    if(!['image/png','image/jpeg','image/webp','image/gif','image/svg+xml'].includes(type)){
      content=await sharp(content,{animated:false}).png().toBuffer();type='image/png';extension='png';metadata=await sharp(content).metadata();
    }
  }catch{
    const label=String(originalName||'Unsupported PowerPoint image').replace(/[<>&]/g,'').slice(0,80);
    const placeholder=`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="800" height="500" viewBox="0 0 800 500"><rect width="800" height="500" fill="#f3f4f6"/><rect x="12" y="12" width="776" height="476" rx="24" fill="none" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="8" stroke-dasharray="18 14"/><text x="400" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="32" fill="#334155">Unsupported PowerPoint image</text><text x="400" y="285" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="22" fill="#64748b">${label}</text></svg>`;
    const dataUrl=`data:image/svg+xml;base64,${Buffer.from(placeholder).toString('base64')}`;
    return {id:null,original_name:originalName,url:dataUrl,preview_url:dataUrl,width:800,height:500,unsupported:true};
  }
  const safeChecksum=createHash('sha256').update(content).digest('hex');
  const safeDuplicate=repositories.assets.byChecksum(safeChecksum,organizationId);if(safeDuplicate)return safeDuplicate;
  const stem=randomUUID(),filename=`${stem}.${extension}`,thumbName=`${stem}.webp`,previewName=`${stem}.webp`;
  fs.writeFileSync(path.join(config.storageDir,'assets',filename),content);
  await sharp(content,{animated:false}).rotate().resize({width:360,height:360,fit:'inside',withoutEnlargement:true}).webp({quality:80}).toFile(path.join(config.storageDir,'thumbs',thumbName));
  await sharp(content,{animated:false}).rotate().resize({width:1800,height:1800,fit:'inside',withoutEnlargement:true}).webp({quality:88}).toFile(path.join(config.storageDir,'previews',previewName));
  return repositories.assets.create({filename,originalName,mimeType:type,width:metadata.width,height:metadata.height,sizeBytes:content.length,url:`/storage/assets/${filename}`,thumbnailUrl:`/storage/thumbs/${thumbName}`,previewUrl:`/storage/previews/${previewName}`,tags:['powerpoint-import'],checksum:safeChecksum},organizationId);
}
app.post('/api/imports/powerpoint',requireRole('designer'),powerpointUpload.single('file'),async(req,res,next)=>{try{
  if(!req.file)return res.status(400).json({error:'Choose a PowerPoint .pptx file to import.'});
  const title=String(req.body?.title||req.file.originalname.replace(/\.pptx$/i,'')||'Imported PowerPoint').slice(0,200);
  const result=await importPowerPoint(req.file.buffer,{title,dpi:Number(req.body?.dpi||96),saveAsset:data=>persistPowerPointAsset(req.organization.id,data)});
  res.json(result);
}catch(error){error.status||=400;next(error);}});

app.use((error,_req,res,next)=>{
  if(res.headersSent)return next(error);
  const status=error instanceof multer.MulterError?400:Number(error?.status||error?.statusCode||500);
  if(status>=500)console.error('[api]',error);
  res.status(status>=400&&status<600?status:500).json({error:error?.message||'Request failed.'});
});

const apiServer=app.listen(config.port,()=>console.log(`CanvasForge API listening on ${config.port}`));
function shutdown(){apiServer.close(()=>{closeDb();process.exit(0)});setTimeout(()=>process.exit(1),5000).unref();}
process.on('SIGINT',shutdown);process.on('SIGTERM',shutdown);

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/powerpoint.js (2026-07-15 01:21:27) =====
import path from 'node:path';
import { createHash, randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
import JSZip from 'jszip';
import { XMLParser } from 'fast-xml-parser';
import PptxGenJS from 'pptxgenjs';
import QRCode from 'qrcode';
import {
  baseElement, chartElement, defaultDocument, ellipseElement, imageElement,
  normalizeDocument, rectElement, shapeElement, tableElement, textElement
} from '../src/lib/document.js';
import { paintPrimaryColor } from '../src/lib/appearance.js';

const EMU_PER_INCH = 914400;
const DEFAULT_DPI = 96;
const MAX_ZIP_ENTRIES = 4000;
const MAX_UNCOMPRESSED_BYTES = 250 * 1024 * 1024;
const parser = new XMLParser({
  ignoreAttributes: false,
  attributeNamePrefix: '@_',
  removeNSPrefix: true,
  parseTagValue: false,
  trimValues: false,
  isArray: name => ['sp', 'pic', 'graphicFrame', 'cxnSp', 'grpSp', 'p', 'r', 'br', 'tr', 'tc', 'ser', 'pt'].includes(name)
});

const list = value => value == null ? [] : Array.isArray(value) ? value : [value];
const num = (value, fallback = 0) => Number.isFinite(Number(value)) ? Number(value) : fallback;
const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.max(min, Math.min(max, Number(value)));
const stripHash = value => String(value || '').replace(/^#/, '').toUpperCase();
const safeHex = (value, fallback = '000000') => /^[0-9A-F]{6}$/i.test(stripHash(value)) ? stripHash(value) : fallback;
const rgbaOpacity = value => {
  const match = String(value || '').match(/^rgba?\([^,]+,[^,]+,[^,]+(?:,\s*([\d.]+))?\)$/i);
  return match?.[1] == null ? 1 : clamp(match[1], 0, 1);
};
const colorOf = (element, fallback = '#000000') => {
  const raw = typeof element?.fill === 'string' ? element.fill : paintPrimaryColor(element?.appearance?.fill, fallback);
  return safeHex(raw, safeHex(fallback));
};
const lineColorOf = (element, fallback = '000000') => safeHex(element?.stroke && element.stroke !== 'transparent' ? element.stroke : fallback, fallback);
const pxToInches = (value, dpi = DEFAULT_DPI) => num(value) / Math.max(1, num(dpi, DEFAULT_DPI));
const inchesToPx = (value, dpi = DEFAULT_DPI) => Math.round(num(value) * Math.max(1, num(dpi, DEFAULT_DPI)));
const pointsFromPx = (value, dpi = DEFAULT_DPI) => num(value) * 72 / Math.max(1, num(dpi, DEFAULT_DPI));
const emuToPx = (value, dpi = DEFAULT_DPI) => num(value) / EMU_PER_INCH * dpi;
const relTarget = (base, target) => { const value = String(target || ''); return value.startsWith('/') ? path.posix.normalize(value).replace(/^\/+/, '') : path.posix.normalize(path.posix.join(path.posix.dirname(base), value)).replace(/^\/+/, ''); };
const textValue = value => value == null ? '' : typeof value === 'object' ? String(value['#text'] ?? '') : String(value);

function zipSize(zip) {
  const entries = Object.values(zip.files);
  if (entries.length > MAX_ZIP_ENTRIES) throw new Error('The PowerPoint file contains too many package entries.');
  const total = entries.reduce((sum, entry) => sum + num(entry?._data?.uncompressedSize, 0), 0);
  if (total > MAX_UNCOMPRESSED_BYTES) throw new Error('The PowerPoint file expands beyond the safe import limit.');
}

async function xmlFromZip(zip, name, required = false) {
  const entry = zip.file(name);
  if (!entry) {
    if (required) throw new Error(`PowerPoint package is missing ${name}.`);
    return null;
  }
  return parser.parse(await entry.async('string'));
}

async function textFromZip(zip, name, required = false) {
  const entry = zip.file(name);
  if (!entry) {
    if (required) throw new Error(`PowerPoint package is missing ${name}.`);
    return '';
  }
  return entry.async('string');
}

function relationships(document) {
  const output = new Map();
  for (const relationship of list(document?.Relationships?.Relationship)) {
    const id = relationship?.['@_Id'];
    if (id) output.set(id, relationship);
  }
  return output;
}

function xfrmOf(node = {}, inherited = null) {
  const xfrm = node?.xfrm || node;
  const off = xfrm?.off || {};
  const ext = xfrm?.ext || {};
  let x = num(off['@_x']);
  let y = num(off['@_y']);
  let width = Math.max(1, num(ext['@_cx'], 1));
  let height = Math.max(1, num(ext['@_cy'], 1));
  if (inherited) {
    x = inherited.x + (x - inherited.chX) * inherited.scaleX;
    y = inherited.y + (y - inherited.chY) * inherited.scaleY;
    width *= inherited.scaleX;
    height *= inherited.scaleY;
  }
  return {
    x, y, width, height,
    rotation: num(xfrm?.['@_rot']) / 60000,
    flipX: String(xfrm?.['@_flipH']) === '1',
    flipY: String(xfrm?.['@_flipV']) === '1'
  };
}

function groupTransform(group = {}, inherited = null) {
  const xfrm = group?.grpSpPr?.xfrm || {};
  const base = xfrmOf(xfrm, inherited);
  const chOff = xfrm.chOff || {};
  const chExt = xfrm.chExt || {};
  return {
    x: base.x,
    y: base.y,
    chX: num(chOff['@_x']),
    chY: num(chOff['@_y']),
    scaleX: base.width / Math.max(1, num(chExt['@_cx'], base.width)),
    scaleY: base.height / Math.max(1, num(chExt['@_cy'], base.height))
  };
}

function directColor(node, fallback = '000000') {
  const solid = node?.solidFill || node;
  const srgb = solid?.srgbClr?.['@_val'];
  const system = solid?.sysClr?.['@_lastClr'] || solid?.sysClr?.['@_val'];
  const preset = solid?.prstClr?.['@_val'];
  const scheme = solid?.schemeClr?.['@_val'];
  const schemes = { dk1: '000000', lt1: 'FFFFFF', dk2: '1F1F1F', lt2: 'F2F2F2', accent1: '4472C4', accent2: 'ED7D31', accent3: 'A5A5A5', accent4: 'FFC000', accent5: '5B9BD5', accent6: '70AD47', hlink: '0563C1', folHlink: '954F72', tx1: '000000', bg1: 'FFFFFF', tx2: '1F1F1F', bg2: 'F2F2F2' };
  if (srgb) return safeHex(srgb, fallback);
  if (system) return safeHex(system, fallback);
  if (scheme) return schemes[scheme] || fallback;
  if (preset) {
    const presets = { white: 'FFFFFF', black: '000000', red: 'FF0000', blue: '0000FF', green: '008000', yellow: 'FFFF00', gray: '808080', orange: 'FFA500', purple: '800080' };
    return presets[preset] || fallback;
  }
  return fallback;
}

function fillOf(spPr, fallback = 'FFFFFF') {
  if (!spPr || spPr.noFill != null) return { color: fallback, transparent: true };
  const color = directColor(spPr, fallback);
  const alpha = spPr?.solidFill?.srgbClr?.alpha?.['@_val'] || spPr?.solidFill?.schemeClr?.alpha?.['@_val'];
  return { color, transparent: false, opacity: alpha == null ? 1 : clamp(num(alpha) / 100000, 0, 1) };
}

function lineOf(spPr) {
  const ln = spPr?.ln;
  if (!ln || ln.noFill != null) return { color: '000000', width: 0, transparent: true };
  return {
    color: directColor(ln, '000000'),
    width: Math.max(0, num(ln['@_w']) / 12700),
    transparent: false,
    dash: ln.prstDash?.['@_val'] || 'solid'
  };
}

function readRuns(txBody = {}) {
  const paragraphs = list(txBody.p);
  const lines = [];
  let firstStyle = null;
  for (const paragraph of paragraphs) {
    const parts = [];
    for (const run of list(paragraph?.r)) {
      firstStyle ||= run?.rPr || null;
      parts.push(textValue(run?.t));
    }
    if (paragraph?.fld) for (const field of list(paragraph.fld)) parts.push(textValue(field?.t));
    if (list(paragraph?.br).length) parts.push('\n'.repeat(list(paragraph.br).length));
    lines.push(parts.join(''));
  }
  const paragraphProps = paragraphs[0]?.pPr || {};
  const bodyProps = txBody?.bodyPr || {};
  const style = firstStyle || paragraphs[0]?.endParaRPr || {};
  return {
    text: lines.join('\n'),
    fontFamily: style?.latin?.['@_typeface'] || style?.ea?.['@_typeface'] || style?.cs?.['@_typeface'] || 'Arial',
    fontSize: num(style?.['@_sz'], 1800) / 100,
    bold: String(style?.['@_b']) === '1',
    italic: String(style?.['@_i']) === '1',
    underline: style?.['@_u'] && style['@_u'] !== 'none',
    color: directColor(style, '000000'),
    align: ({ ctr: 'center', r: 'right', just: 'justify' })[paragraphProps?.['@_algn']] || 'left',
    verticalAlign: ({ ctr: 'middle', b: 'bottom' })[bodyProps?.['@_anchor']] || 'top',
    marginLeft: num(bodyProps?.['@_lIns']) / EMU_PER_INCH * DEFAULT_DPI,
    marginRight: num(bodyProps?.['@_rIns']) / EMU_PER_INCH * DEFAULT_DPI,
    marginTop: num(bodyProps?.['@_tIns']) / EMU_PER_INCH * DEFAULT_DPI,
    marginBottom: num(bodyProps?.['@_bIns']) / EMU_PER_INCH * DEFAULT_DPI
  };
}

function geometryKind(spPr = {}) {
  return spPr?.prstGeom?.['@_prst'] || '';
}

function transformToElement(transform, dpi = DEFAULT_DPI) {
  return {
    x: emuToPx(transform.x, dpi), y: emuToPx(transform.y, dpi),
    width: Math.max(1, emuToPx(transform.width, dpi)), height: Math.max(1, emuToPx(transform.height, dpi)),
    rotation: transform.rotation, flipX: transform.flipX, flipY: transform.flipY
  };
}

function shapeElements(shape, inherited, dpi, zIndex) {
  const transform = xfrmOf(shape?.spPr || {}, inherited);
  const box = transformToElement(transform, dpi);
  const name = shape?.nvSpPr?.cNvPr?.['@_name'] || 'PowerPoint shape';
  const fill = fillOf(shape?.spPr, 'FFFFFF');
  const line = lineOf(shape?.spPr);
  const preset = geometryKind(shape?.spPr);
  const tx = readRuns(shape?.txBody || {});
  const result = [];
  const hasVisibleShape = !fill.transparent || (!line.transparent && line.width > 0);
  const common = { ...box, name, zIndex, opacity: fill.opacity ?? 1, fill: `#${fill.color}`, stroke: line.transparent ? 'transparent' : `#${line.color}`, strokeWidth: line.width };
  if (preset === 'line') {
    result.push(baseElement('line', { ...common, fill: 'transparent', stroke: `#${line.color}`, strokeWidth: Math.max(1, line.width) }));
  } else if (hasVisibleShape) {
    if (preset === 'ellipse') result.push(ellipseElement(common));
    else if (['triangle', 'rtTriangle', 'diamond', 'pentagon', 'hexagon', 'star5', 'star6', 'heart', 'rightArrow', 'chevron', 'wedgeRoundRectCallout'].includes(preset)) {
      const mapped = ({ triangle: 'triangle', rtTriangle: 'triangle', diamond: 'diamond', pentagon: 'pentagon', hexagon: 'hexagon', star5: 'star', star6: 'star', heart: 'heart', rightArrow: 'arrow', chevron: 'chevron', wedgeRoundRectCallout: 'speech' })[preset] || 'triangle';
      result.push(shapeElement(mapped, common));
    } else result.push(rectElement({ ...common, radius: ['roundRect', 'round1Rect', 'round2SameRect', 'round2DiagRect'].includes(preset) ? Math.min(box.width, box.height) * .08 : 0 }));
  }
  if (tx.text) {
    const textZ = zIndex + (result.length ? .1 : 0);
    result.push(textElement({
      ...box, id: randomUUID(), name: `${name} text`, zIndex: textZ, text: tx.text,
      fontFamily: tx.fontFamily, fontSize: tx.fontSize * dpi / 72, fontWeight: tx.bold ? 700 : 400,
      fontStyle: tx.italic ? 'italic' : 'normal', underline: tx.underline, fill: `#${tx.color}`,
      textAlign: tx.align, verticalAlign: tx.verticalAlign, autoFit: true, overflowBehavior: 'clip'
    }));
  }
  return result;
}

async function pictureElement(zip, slidePath, slideRels, pic, inherited, dpi, zIndex, saveAsset, warnings) {
  const transform = xfrmOf(pic?.spPr || {}, inherited);
  const box = transformToElement(transform, dpi);
  const relId = pic?.blipFill?.blip?.['@_embed'];
  const relationship = slideRels.get(relId);
  if (!relationship?.['@_Target']) {
    warnings.push(`Skipped picture without a valid relationship on ${slidePath}.`);
    return null;
  }
  const mediaPath = relTarget(slidePath, relationship['@_Target']);
  const media = zip.file(mediaPath);
  if (!media) {
    warnings.push(`Skipped missing PowerPoint media ${mediaPath}.`);
    return null;
  }
  const buffer = await media.async('nodebuffer');
  const extension = path.extname(mediaPath).toLowerCase().replace('.', '') || 'png';
  const mimeType = ({ png: 'image/png', jpg: 'image/jpeg', jpeg: 'image/jpeg', gif: 'image/gif', svg: 'image/svg+xml', webp: 'image/webp', emf: 'image/x-emf', wmf: 'image/wmf' })[extension] || 'application/octet-stream';
  const originalName = pic?.nvPicPr?.cNvPr?.['@_name'] || path.posix.basename(mediaPath);
  const asset = saveAsset
    ? await saveAsset({ buffer, mimeType, originalName, checksum: createHash('sha256').update(buffer).digest('hex') })
    : { id: null, original_name: originalName, url: `data:${mimeType};base64,${buffer.toString('base64')}`, preview_url: `data:${mimeType};base64,${buffer.toString('base64')}` };
  if (asset?.unsupported) warnings.push(`${originalName} uses an image format that the browser cannot render and was replaced with a placeholder.`);
  return imageElement(asset, { ...box, name: originalName, zIndex, radius: 0, mask: 'rect' });
}

function tableFromGraphic(frame, inherited, dpi, zIndex) {
  const table = frame?.graphic?.graphicData?.tbl;
  if (!table) return null;
  const transform = xfrmOf(frame?.xfrm || {}, inherited);
  const box = transformToElement(transform, dpi);
  const cells = list(table.tr).map(row => list(row?.tc).map(cell => {
    const paragraphs = list(cell?.txBody?.p);
    return paragraphs.map(p => list(p?.r).map(run => textValue(run?.t)).join('')).join('\n');
  }));
  const headerCell = table?.tr?.[0]?.tc?.[0];
  const headerFill = directColor(headerCell?.tcPr, 'E5E7EB');
  return tableElement({
    ...box, name: frame?.nvGraphicFramePr?.cNvPr?.['@_name'] || 'PowerPoint table', zIndex,
    rows: cells.length, columns: Math.max(1, ...cells.map(row => row.length)), cells,
    options: { headerRows: cells.length > 1 ? 1 : 0, headerFill: `#${headerFill}`, headerText: '#111111', cellFill: '#FFFFFF', alternateFill: '#F8FAFC', textColor: '#111111', borderColor: '#D1D5DB', borderWidth: 1, fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 18, padding: 8 }
  });
}

function chartCache(series, key) {
  const source = series?.[key] || {};
  const ref = source.strRef || source.numRef || source.multiLvlStrRef;
  const cache = ref?.strCache || ref?.numCache || ref?.multiLvlStrCache;
  const points = cache?.lvl ? list(cache.lvl).flatMap(level => list(level?.pt)) : list(cache?.pt);
  return points.sort((a, b) => num(a?.['@_idx']) - num(b?.['@_idx'])).map(point => textValue(point?.v));
}

async function chartFromGraphic(zip, slidePath, slideRels, frame, inherited, dpi, zIndex, warnings) {
  const chartNode = frame?.graphic?.graphicData?.chart;
  const relId = chartNode?.['@_id'];
  if (!relId) return null;
  const relationship = slideRels.get(relId);
  const chartPath = relationship?.['@_Target'] ? relTarget(slidePath, relationship['@_Target']) : '';
  const chartXml = chartPath ? await xmlFromZip(zip, chartPath) : null;
  const plot = chartXml?.chartSpace?.chart?.plotArea;
  if (!plot) return null;
  const chartKey = ['barChart', 'lineChart', 'pieChart', 'doughnutChart', 'areaChart', 'scatterChart'].find(key => plot[key]);
  if (!chartKey) {
    warnings.push(`Skipped unsupported PowerPoint chart in ${chartPath || slidePath}.`);
    return null;
  }
  const chartNodeData = plot[chartKey];
  const series = list(chartNodeData?.ser).map((item, index) => ({
    name: textValue(item?.tx?.strRef?.strCache?.pt?.[0]?.v) || textValue(item?.tx?.v) || `Series ${index + 1}`,
    values: chartCache(item, 'val').map(value => num(value))
  }));
  const labels = chartCache(list(chartNodeData?.ser)[0], 'cat');
  const transform = xfrmOf(frame?.xfrm || {}, inherited);
  const box = transformToElement(transform, dpi);
  return chartElement({
    ...box, name: frame?.nvGraphicFramePr?.cNvPr?.['@_name'] || 'PowerPoint chart', zIndex,
    chartType: ({ barChart: 'bar', lineChart: 'line', pieChart: 'pie', doughnutChart: 'doughnut', areaChart: 'area', scatterChart: 'scatter' })[chartKey],
    data: { labels, series }, options: { showLegend: true, showLabels: false, grid: chartKey !== 'pieChart' && chartKey !== 'doughnutChart', colors: ['#4472C4', '#ED7D31', '#A5A5A5', '#FFC000'], background: 'transparent', fontFamily: 'Arial' }
  });
}

async function importTree({ zip, slidePath, slideRels, tree, inherited = null, dpi, saveAsset, warnings, output }) {
  const ordered = [];
  const objectId = (key, item) => num((key === 'pic' ? item?.nvPicPr : key === 'graphicFrame' ? item?.nvGraphicFramePr : key === 'grpSp' ? item?.nvGrpSpPr : item?.nvSpPr)?.cNvPr?.['@_id'], Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER);
  for (const key of ['sp', 'pic', 'graphicFrame', 'cxnSp', 'grpSp']) for (const item of list(tree?.[key])) ordered.push({ key, item, objectId: objectId(key, item) });
  ordered.sort((a, b) => a.objectId - b.objectId);
  for (const entry of ordered) {
    const zIndex = output.length;
    if (entry.key === 'sp' || entry.key === 'cxnSp') output.push(...shapeElements(entry.item, inherited, dpi, zIndex));
    if (entry.key === 'pic') {
      const imported = await pictureElement(zip, slidePath, slideRels, entry.item, inherited, dpi, zIndex, saveAsset, warnings);
      if (imported) output.push(imported);
    }
    if (entry.key === 'graphicFrame') {
      const table = tableFromGraphic(entry.item, inherited, dpi, zIndex);
      if (table) output.push(table);
      else {
        const chart = await chartFromGraphic(zip, slidePath, slideRels, entry.item, inherited, dpi, zIndex, warnings);
        if (chart) output.push(chart);
        else warnings.push(`Skipped unsupported PowerPoint graphic frame on ${slidePath}.`);
      }
    }
    if (entry.key === 'grpSp') await importTree({ zip, slidePath, slideRels, tree: entry.item, inherited: groupTransform(entry.item, inherited), dpi, saveAsset, warnings, output });
  }
}

function slidePaths(presentationXml, rels, zip) {
  const relationshipIds = [...String(presentationXml || '').matchAll(/<[^:>]*:?sldId\b[^>]*\br:id=["']([^"']+)["'][^>]*\/?\s*>/gi)].map(match => match[1]);
  const paths = relationshipIds.map(id => rels.get(id)?.['@_Target']).filter(Boolean).map(target => relTarget('ppt/presentation.xml', target));
  if (paths.length) return paths;
  return Object.keys(zip.files).filter(name => /^ppt\/slides\/slide\d+\.xml$/i.test(name)).sort((a, b) => num(a.match(/slide(\d+)\.xml/i)?.[1]) - num(b.match(/slide(\d+)\.xml/i)?.[1]));
}

export async function importPowerPoint(buffer, { title = 'Imported PowerPoint', dpi = DEFAULT_DPI, saveAsset } = {}) {
  const zip = await JSZip.loadAsync(buffer, { checkCRC32: true });
  zipSize(zip);
  const presentationXml = await textFromZip(zip, 'ppt/presentation.xml', true);
  const presentation = parser.parse(presentationXml);
  const presentationRels = relationships(await xmlFromZip(zip, 'ppt/_rels/presentation.xml.rels', true));
  const size = presentation?.presentation?.sldSz || {};
  const width = Math.max(1, inchesToPx(num(size['@_cx'], 12192000) / EMU_PER_INCH, dpi));
  const height = Math.max(1, inchesToPx(num(size['@_cy'], 6858000) / EMU_PER_INCH, dpi));
  const document = defaultDocument(width, height);
  document.title = title;
  document.dpi = dpi;
  document.pages = [];
  document.provenance = { ...document.provenance, importedFrom: 'powerpoint', importedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
  const warnings = [];
  const paths = slidePaths(presentationXml, presentationRels, zip);
  if (!paths.length) throw new Error('The PowerPoint file contains no slides.');
  for (let index = 0; index < paths.length; index++) {
    const slidePath = paths[index];
    const slideXml = await xmlFromZip(zip, slidePath, true);
    const relsPath = `${path.posix.dirname(slidePath)}/_rels/${path.posix.basename(slidePath)}.rels`;
    const slideRels = relationships(await xmlFromZip(zip, relsPath));
    const output = [];
    await importTree({ zip, slidePath, slideRels, tree: slideXml?.sld?.cSld?.spTree || {}, dpi, saveAsset, warnings, output });
    const backgroundNode = slideXml?.sld?.cSld?.bg?.bgPr || slideXml?.sld?.cSld?.bg?.bgRef;
    const background = `#${directColor(backgroundNode, 'FFFFFF')}`;
    document.pages.push({
      id: randomUUID(), name: slideXml?.sld?.cSld?.['@_name'] || `Slide ${index + 1}`, background, backgroundPaint: { type: 'solid', color: background }, transparentBackground: false,
      guides: { vertical: [], horizontal: [], locked: false }, grid: { enabled: false, size: 20, subdivisions: 1 }, margins: { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0 }, elements: output.map((element, elementIndex) => ({ ...element, zIndex: elementIndex }))
    });
  }
  return { document: normalizeDocument(document), warnings, summary: { slides: document.pages.length, elements: document.pages.reduce((sum, page) => sum + page.elements.length, 0), width, height } };
}

function shapeType(pptx, name) {
  return pptx.ShapeType?.[name] || name;
}

function pptxBox(element, dpi) {
  return {
    x: pxToInches(element.x, dpi), y: pxToInches(element.y, dpi),
    w: Math.max(.001, pxToInches(element.width, dpi)), h: Math.max(.001, pxToInches(element.height, dpi)),
    rotate: num(element.rotation), flipH: !!element.flipX, flipV: !!element.flipY
  };
}

function commonShapeOptions(element, dpi) {
  const opacity = clamp(num(element.opacity, 1), 0, 1) * rgbaOpacity(element.fill);
  const fillColor = colorOf(element, '#000000');
  const lineColor = lineColorOf(element, fillColor);
  return {
    ...pptxBox(element, dpi),
    fill: element.fill === 'transparent' ? { color: fillColor, transparency: 100 } : { color: fillColor, transparency: Math.round((1 - opacity) * 100) },
    line: !element.stroke || element.stroke === 'transparent' || num(element.strokeWidth) <= 0
      ? { color: lineColor, transparency: 100 }
      : { color: lineColor, width: Math.max(.1, pointsFromPx(element.strokeWidth, dpi)), transparency: Math.round((1 - clamp(num(element.opacity, 1), 0, 1)) * 100) }
  };
}

function svgData(svg) {
  return `data:image/svg+xml;base64,${Buffer.from(String(svg || '')).toString('base64')}`;
}

function pathSvg(element) {
  const points = list(element.pathData).map(point => Array.isArray(point) ? point : [point?.x, point?.y]);
  const d = points.map((point, index) => `${index ? 'L' : 'M'}${num(point[0])} ${num(point[1])}`).join(' ');
  return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="${Math.max(1, num(element.width, 1))}" height="${Math.max(1, num(element.height, 1))}" viewBox="0 0 ${Math.max(1, num(element.width, 1))} ${Math.max(1, num(element.height, 1))}"><path d="${d}" fill="${element.fill || 'none'}" stroke="${element.stroke || '#111827'}" stroke-width="${Math.max(1, num(element.strokeWidth, 1))}" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>`;
}

function chartType(pptx, type) {
  const names = { bar: 'bar', column: 'bar', line: 'line', pie: 'pie', doughnut: 'doughnut', area: 'area', scatter: 'scatter' };
  return pptx.ChartType?.[names[type] || 'bar'] || names[type] || 'bar';
}

async function addElementToSlide({ pptx, slide, element, dpi, warnings }) {
  if (element.hidden) return;
  const box = pptxBox(element, dpi);
  if (element.type === 'text') {
    slide.addText(String(element.text || ''), {
      ...box, fontFace: element.fontFamily || 'Arial', fontSize: Math.max(1, pointsFromPx(element.fontSize || 16, dpi)),
      color: colorOf(element, '#111827'), bold: num(element.fontWeight, 400) >= 600, italic: element.fontStyle === 'italic', underline: !!element.underline,
      strike: element.linethrough ? 'sngStrike' : undefined, align: element.textAlign === 'center' ? 'center' : element.textAlign === 'right' ? 'right' : element.textAlign === 'justify' ? 'justify' : 'left',
      valign: element.verticalAlign === 'middle' ? 'middle' : element.verticalAlign === 'bottom' ? 'bottom' : 'top', margin: 0, isTextBox: true,
      breakLine: false, fit: element.autoFit ? 'shrink' : undefined, transparency: Math.round((1 - clamp(num(element.opacity, 1), 0, 1)) * 100),
      charSpacing: num(element.charSpacing) / 1000, lineSpacingMultiple: Math.max(.5, num(element.lineHeight, 1.16))
    });
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'rect' || element.type === 'frame') {
    slide.addShape(shapeType(pptx, num(element.radius) > 0 ? 'roundRect' : 'rect'), commonShapeOptions(element, dpi));
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'ellipse') {
    slide.addShape(shapeType(pptx, 'ellipse'), commonShapeOptions(element, dpi));
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'shape') {
    const mapped = { triangle: 'triangle', diamond: 'diamond', pentagon: 'pentagon', hexagon: 'hexagon', star: 'star5', burst: 'star12', heart: 'heart', arrow: 'rightArrow', chevron: 'chevron', speech: 'wedgeRoundRectCallout' };
    slide.addShape(shapeType(pptx, mapped[element.shapeKind] || 'rect'), commonShapeOptions(element, dpi));
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'line') {
    slide.addShape(shapeType(pptx, 'line'), { ...box, line: { color: lineColorOf(element), width: Math.max(.1, pointsFromPx(element.strokeWidth || 1, dpi)), beginArrowType: element.startArrow || 'none', endArrowType: element.endArrow || 'none' } });
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'image' && element.src) {
    slide.addImage({ data: element.src, ...box, transparency: Math.round((1 - clamp(num(element.opacity, 1), 0, 1)) * 100) });
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'svg' && element.svg) {
    slide.addImage({ data: svgData(element.svg), ...box });
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'path') {
    slide.addImage({ data: svgData(pathSvg(element)), ...box });
    warnings.push(`${element.name || 'Drawing'} was exported as an SVG object because PowerPoint cannot represent the freehand path as a native shape.`);
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'table') {
    const rows = list(element.cells).map(row => list(row).map(value => String(value ?? '')));
    slide.addTable(rows, {
      ...box, border: { type: 'solid', color: safeHex(element.options?.borderColor, 'D1D5DB'), pt: Math.max(.25, pointsFromPx(element.options?.borderWidth || 1, dpi)) },
      fill: safeHex(element.options?.cellFill, 'FFFFFF'), color: safeHex(element.options?.textColor, '111827'),
      fontFace: element.options?.fontFamily || 'Arial', fontSize: Math.max(1, pointsFromPx(element.options?.fontSize || 18, dpi)), margin: pointsFromPx(element.options?.padding || 6, dpi),
      bold: false, autoFit: false, rowH: box.h / Math.max(1, rows.length)
    });
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'chart') {
    const data = list(element.data?.series).map((series, index) => ({ name: series.name || `Series ${index + 1}`, labels: list(element.data?.labels).map(String), values: list(series.values).map(value => num(value)) }));
    if (data.length) slide.addChart(chartType(pptx, element.chartType), data, { ...box, barDir: element.chartType === 'bar' ? 'col' : undefined, showLegend: element.options?.showLegend !== false, showTitle: false, showValue: !!element.options?.showLabels, showCategoryName: false, catAxisLabelFontFace: element.options?.fontFamily || 'Arial', valAxisLabelFontFace: element.options?.fontFamily || 'Arial', chartColors: list(element.options?.colors).map(color => safeHex(color)).filter(Boolean) });
    return;
  }
  if (element.type === 'qrcode') {
    const data = await QRCode.toDataURL(String(element.value || ''), { errorCorrectionLevel: element.errorCorrection || 'M', margin: num(element.margin, 2), color: { dark: safeHex(element.foreground, '111827'), light: safeHex(element.background, 'FFFFFF') } });
    slide.addImage({ data, ...box });
    return;
  }
  warnings.push(`Skipped unsupported element type "${element.type}" (${element.name || element.id}).`);
}

export async function exportPowerPoint(source, { hydrateImage, progress } = {}) {
  const document = normalizeDocument(source);
  const dpi = Math.max(1, num(document.dpi, DEFAULT_DPI));
  const hydrated = structuredClone(document);
  if (hydrateImage) {
    for (const page of hydrated.pages) for (const element of page.elements || []) if (element.type === 'image' && element.src) element.src = await hydrateImage(element.src);
  }
  const pptx = new PptxGenJS();
  const layoutName = `DESIGN_COMMONS_${Math.round(hydrated.width)}x${Math.round(hydrated.height)}`;
  pptx.defineLayout({ name: layoutName, width: pxToInches(hydrated.width, dpi), height: pxToInches(hydrated.height, dpi) });
  pptx.layout = layoutName;
  pptx.author = 'Design Commons';
  pptx.company = 'Design Commons';
  pptx.subject = 'Editable Design Commons export';
  pptx.title = hydrated.title || 'Design Commons presentation';
  pptx.lang = hydrated.accessibility?.language || 'en-CA';
  pptx.theme = {
    headFontFace: hydrated.designSystem?.textStyles?.find(style => /head/i.test(style.name || ''))?.fontFamily || 'Arial',
    bodyFontFace: hydrated.designSystem?.textStyles?.find(style => /body/i.test(style.name || ''))?.fontFamily || 'Arial',
    lang: hydrated.accessibility?.language || 'en-CA'
  };
  const warnings = [];
  for (let pageIndex = 0; pageIndex < hydrated.pages.length; pageIndex++) {
    const page = hydrated.pages[pageIndex];
    const slide = pptx.addSlide();
    slide.background = { color: safeHex(page.background || paintPrimaryColor(page.backgroundPaint, '#FFFFFF'), 'FFFFFF') };
    const elements = [...(page.elements || [])].sort((a, b) => num(a.zIndex) - num(b.zIndex));
    for (let index = 0; index < elements.length; index++) {
      await addElementToSlide({ pptx, slide, element: elements[index], dpi, warnings });
      progress?.(Math.round(5 + ((pageIndex + (index + 1) / Math.max(1, elements.length)) / Math.max(1, hydrated.pages.length)) * 88));
    }
  }
  const output = await pptx.write({ outputType: 'nodebuffer', compression: true });
  return { buffer: Buffer.isBuffer(output) ? output : Buffer.from(output), warnings };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/web.js (2026-07-03 14:15:16) =====
import path from 'node:path';
import express from 'express';
import { createProxyMiddleware } from 'http-proxy-middleware';
import { config } from './config.js';
const app=express();const webPort=Number(process.env.WEB_PORT||4173);const apiTarget=process.env.API_TARGET||`http://127.0.0.1:${config.port}`;
app.use(createProxyMiddleware({pathFilter:'/api/**',target:apiTarget,changeOrigin:true}));
app.use(createProxyMiddleware({pathFilter:'/storage/**',target:apiTarget,changeOrigin:true}));
app.use(express.static(path.join(config.root,'dist'),{maxAge:'1h',index:'index.html'}));app.use((_req,res)=>res.sendFile(path.join(config.root,'dist','index.html')));
const server=app.listen(webPort,()=>console.log(`CanvasForge web listening on ${webPort}`));const shutdown=()=>server.close(()=>process.exit(0));process.on('SIGINT',shutdown);process.on('SIGTERM',shutdown);

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/server/worker.js (2026-07-16 03:43:03) =====
import fs from 'node:fs';
import path from 'node:path';
import mime from 'mime-types';
import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
import { chromium } from 'playwright-core';
import { PDFDocument, rgb } from 'pdf-lib';
import sharp from 'sharp';
import { config } from './config.js';
import { repositories, closeDb } from './db.js';
import { exportPowerPoint } from './powerpoint.js';
import { buildImpositionPlan } from '../src/lib/printLayout.js';

fs.mkdirSync(path.join(config.storageDir,'exports'),{recursive:true});
fs.mkdirSync(path.join(config.storageDir,'temporary'),{recursive:true});
const rendererBundle=path.join(config.root,'dist','export-renderer.js');
const workerId=`worker-${randomUUID().slice(0,8)}`;
let stopped=false;
const sleep=ms=>new Promise(resolve=>setTimeout(resolve,ms));
const timeout=(promise,ms)=>Promise.race([promise,new Promise((_,reject)=>setTimeout(()=>reject(new Error(`Export timed out after ${Math.round(ms/1000)} seconds.`)),ms))]);
const exportFontHosts=new Set(['fonts.googleapis.com','fonts.gstatic.com']);

function isAllowedExportRequest(rawUrl){
  if(rawUrl.startsWith('data:')||rawUrl.startsWith('about:'))return true;
  try{return exportFontHosts.has(new URL(rawUrl).hostname);}
  catch{return false;}
}

function localAssetDataUrl(src){
  if(!src||src.startsWith('data:'))return src;
  if(!src.startsWith('/storage/'))throw new Error(`Remote export assets are blocked: ${src}`);
  const relative=src.slice('/storage/'.length);const filePath=path.resolve(config.storageDir,relative);
  if(!filePath.startsWith(`${config.storageDir}${path.sep}`)||!fs.existsSync(filePath))throw new Error(`Export asset is missing: ${src}`);
  const contentType=mime.lookup(filePath)||'application/octet-stream';
  return `data:${contentType};base64,${fs.readFileSync(filePath).toString('base64')}`;
}
function hydrateDocument(document){const hydrated=structuredClone(document);for(const page of hydrated.pages||[])for(const element of page.elements||[])if(element.type==='image')element.src=localAssetDataUrl(element.src);return hydrated;}
async function createRendererPage(context,document,pageIndex){
  if(!fs.existsSync(rendererBundle))throw new Error('Export renderer bundle is missing. Run npm run build first.');
  const page=await context.newPage();
  await page.setViewportSize({width:Math.max(800,Math.ceil(document.width)),height:Math.max(600,Math.ceil(document.height))});
  await page.setContent('<!doctype html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><style>html,body{margin:0;background:transparent;overflow:hidden}canvas{display:block}</style></head><body><canvas id="export-canvas"></canvas></body></html>');
  await page.addScriptTag({path:rendererBundle});
  await page.evaluate(async payload=>globalThis.DesignCommonsRenderer.render(payload.document,payload.pageIndex),{document,pageIndex});
  return page;
}
const inchToPoint=value=>Number(value||0)*72;
function pdfPageSize(document){
  const dpi=Math.min(2400,Math.max(36,Number(document.dpi||96)));
  return {width:document.width/dpi*72,height:document.height/dpi*72,dpi};
}
function drawCropMarks(page,placement,sheetHeight){
  const x=inchToPoint(placement.xIn),width=inchToPoint(placement.widthIn);
  const y=inchToPoint(sheetHeight-placement.yIn-placement.heightIn),height=inchToPoint(placement.heightIn);
  const left=x,right=x+width,bottom=y,top=y+height,gap=2.5,length=8;
  const color=rgb(.2,.23,.28),options={thickness:.35,color,opacity:.8};
  for(const edgeY of [bottom,top]){
    page.drawLine({start:{x:left-length-gap,y:edgeY},end:{x:left-gap,y:edgeY},...options});
    page.drawLine({start:{x:right+gap,y:edgeY},end:{x:right+gap+length,y:edgeY},...options});
  }
  for(const edgeX of [left,right]){
    page.drawLine({start:{x:edgeX,y:bottom-length-gap},end:{x:edgeX,y:bottom-gap},...options});
    page.drawLine({start:{x:edgeX,y:top+gap},end:{x:edgeX,y:top+gap+length},...options});
  }
}
function fittedImageBox(image,x,y,width,height,preserveAspectRatio){
  if(!preserveAspectRatio||!image?.width||!image?.height)return {x,y,width,height};
  const scale=Math.min(width/image.width,height/image.height);
  const fittedWidth=image.width*scale,fittedHeight=image.height*scale;
  return {x:x+(width-fittedWidth)/2,y:y+(height-fittedHeight)/2,width:fittedWidth,height:fittedHeight};
}
async function renderImposedPdf({context,document,job}){
  const plan=buildImpositionPlan(document,job.options?.imposition||{},job.options?.pageIndex||0);
  if(!plan.perSheet||plan.warnings.length)throw new Error(plan.warnings[0]||'No items fit on the print sheet.');
  const sourceDpi=Math.min(2400,Math.max(36,Number(document.dpi||96)));
  const multiplier=Math.min(4,Math.max(.25,Number(plan.config.outputDpi||300)/sourceDpi));
  if(document.width*multiplier>12000||document.height*multiplier>12000)throw new Error('Print sheet artwork exceeds the 12000px render limit. Reduce output DPI.');
  const pdf=await PDFDocument.create();
  pdf.setTitle(`${document.title||'Design'} print sheet`);
  pdf.setCreator('Design Commons');
  const images=new Map();
  const uniquePages=[...new Set(plan.sides.flatMap(side=>side.placements.map(item=>item.pageIndex)))];
  for(let index=0;index<uniquePages.length;index++){
    if(repositories.exports.isCancelled(job.id))throw new Error('Export cancelled.');
    const pageIndex=uniquePages[index];
    const renderer=await createRendererPage(context,document,pageIndex);
    const dataUrl=await renderer.evaluate(([m,q])=>globalThis.DesignCommonsRenderer.dataUrl('png',m,q),[multiplier,.96]);
    await renderer.close();
    const sourcePng=Buffer.from(dataUrl.split(',')[1],'base64');
    let artworkPng=sourcePng;
    if(plan.config.trimWhitespace){
      try{artworkPng=await sharp(sourcePng).trim({threshold:15}).png().toBuffer();}
      catch(error){console.warn(`Could not trim whitespace from design page ${pageIndex+1}:`,error?.message||error);}
    }
    images.set(pageIndex,await pdf.embedPng(artworkPng));
    repositories.exports.progress(job.id,Math.round(5+index/Math.max(1,uniquePages.length)*35));
  }
  const sheetWidth=inchToPoint(plan.config.sheetWidthIn),sheetHeight=inchToPoint(plan.config.sheetHeightIn);
  for(let sideIndex=0;sideIndex<plan.sides.length;sideIndex++){
    if(repositories.exports.isCancelled(job.id))throw new Error('Export cancelled.');
    const side=plan.sides[sideIndex],page=pdf.addPage([sheetWidth,sheetHeight]);
    for(const placement of side.placements){
      const x=inchToPoint(placement.xIn),width=inchToPoint(placement.widthIn),height=inchToPoint(placement.heightIn);
      const y=sheetHeight-inchToPoint(placement.yIn)-height;
      const image=images.get(placement.pageIndex);
      page.drawImage(image,fittedImageBox(image,x,y,width,height,plan.config.preserveAspectRatio));
      if(plan.config.marks.outlines)page.drawRectangle({x,y,width,height,borderWidth:.35,borderColor:rgb(.65,.68,.72),borderOpacity:.9});
      if(plan.config.marks.crop)drawCropMarks(page,placement,plan.config.sheetHeightIn);
    }
    repositories.exports.progress(job.id,Math.round(42+(sideIndex+1)/plan.sides.length*50));
  }
  return pdf.save();
}
async function renderJob(job){
  const design=repositories.designs.get(job.design_id);if(!design)throw new Error('Design no longer exists.');
  const document=hydrateDocument(design.document);if(!document.pages?.length)throw new Error('Design has no pages.');
  if(job.format==='pptx'){
    repositories.exports.progress(job.id,5);
    const result=await exportPowerPoint(document,{hydrateImage:localAssetDataUrl,progress:value=>repositories.exports.progress(job.id,value)});
    if(repositories.exports.isCancelled(job.id))throw new Error('Export cancelled.');
    repositories.exports.progress(job.id,96);
    const filename=`${job.id}.pptx`;fs.writeFileSync(path.join(config.storageDir,'exports',filename),result.buffer);
    return `/storage/exports/${filename}`;
  }
  const pixelLimit=12000;const multiplier=Math.min(4,Math.max(.25,Number(job.options?.multiplier||1)));
  if(document.width*multiplier>pixelLimit||document.height*multiplier>pixelLimit)throw new Error(`Export exceeds ${pixelLimit}px maximum dimension.`);
  const browser=await chromium.launch({executablePath:config.chromiumPath,headless:true,args:['--no-sandbox','--disable-dev-shm-usage','--disable-gpu','--disable-background-networking','--disable-extensions']});
  const context=await browser.newContext({serviceWorkers:'block'});
  await context.route('**/*',route=>isAllowedExportRequest(route.request().url())?route.continue():route.abort());
  try{
    const pageIndexes=job.options?.pageIndex===undefined?document.pages.map((_p,i)=>i):[Math.max(0,Math.min(document.pages.length-1,Number(job.options.pageIndex)))];
    if(job.format==='pdf'&&job.options?.imposition?.enabled){
      const content=await renderImposedPdf({context,document,job});
      repositories.exports.progress(job.id,94);const filename=`${job.id}.pdf`;fs.writeFileSync(path.join(config.storageDir,'exports',filename),content);return `/storage/exports/${filename}`;
    }
    if(job.format==='pdf'){
      const pdf=await PDFDocument.create();
      const physical=pdfPageSize(document);
      for(let i=0;i<pageIndexes.length;i++){
        if(repositories.exports.isCancelled(job.id))throw new Error('Export cancelled.');
        repositories.exports.progress(job.id,Math.round(5+(i/pageIndexes.length)*85));
        const renderer=await createRendererPage(context,document,pageIndexes[i]);
        const dataUrl=await renderer.evaluate(([m,q])=>globalThis.DesignCommonsRenderer.dataUrl('png',m,q),[multiplier,job.options?.quality||.92]);await renderer.close();
        const png=await pdf.embedPng(Buffer.from(dataUrl.split(',')[1],'base64'));const pdfPage=pdf.addPage([physical.width,physical.height]);pdfPage.drawImage(png,{x:0,y:0,width:physical.width,height:physical.height});
      }
      repositories.exports.progress(job.id,94);const filename=`${job.id}.pdf`;fs.writeFileSync(path.join(config.storageDir,'exports',filename),await pdf.save());return `/storage/exports/${filename}`;
    }
    repositories.exports.progress(job.id,20);const renderer=await createRendererPage(context,document,pageIndexes[0]);let content;let extension=job.format;
    if(job.format==='svg')content=await renderer.evaluate(()=>globalThis.DesignCommonsRenderer.svg());
    else{const dataUrl=await renderer.evaluate(([format,m,q])=>globalThis.DesignCommonsRenderer.dataUrl(format,m,q),[job.format,multiplier,job.options?.quality||.92]);content=Buffer.from(dataUrl.split(',')[1],'base64');if(job.format==='jpeg')extension='jpg';}
    await renderer.close();if(repositories.exports.isCancelled(job.id))throw new Error('Export cancelled.');repositories.exports.progress(job.id,92);
    const filename=`${job.id}.${extension}`;fs.writeFileSync(path.join(config.storageDir,'exports',filename),content);return `/storage/exports/${filename}`;
  }finally{await context.close().catch(()=>{});await browser.close().catch(()=>{});}
}
async function loop(){
  console.log(`CanvasForge export worker ${workerId} started.`);let lastCleanup=0;
  while(!stopped){
    repositories.worker.heartbeat(workerId,{pid:process.pid,status:'idle'});
    if(Date.now()-lastCleanup>3600000){lastCleanup=Date.now();const cutoff=Date.now()-24*3600000;for(const name of fs.readdirSync(path.join(config.storageDir,'temporary'))){const file=path.join(config.storageDir,'temporary',name);try{if(fs.statSync(file).mtimeMs<cutoff)fs.rmSync(file,{recursive:true,force:true});}catch{}}}
    const job=repositories.exports.claim();if(!job){await sleep(800);continue;}
    repositories.worker.heartbeat(workerId,{pid:process.pid,status:'processing',jobId:job.id});
    try{const url=await timeout(renderJob(job),config.exportTimeoutMs);if(repositories.exports.isCancelled(job.id)){repositories.exports.cancel(job.id);console.log(`Export ${job.id} cancelled.`);}else{repositories.exports.complete(job.id,url);console.log(`Export ${job.id} completed.`);}}
    catch(error){console.error(`Export ${job.id} failed:`,error);repositories.exports.fail(job.id,error?.stack||error?.message||error);}
  }
  closeDb();
}
process.on('SIGINT',()=>{stopped=true;});process.on('SIGTERM',()=>{stopped=true;});loop();

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/ai/agent.js (2026-07-13 01:13:48) =====
import { solidPaint } from '../lib/appearance.js';
import { compileDesignSpec, createDesignSpecDirections, inferStructuredRequest } from './designSpec.js';

export const AGENT_STATES = Object.freeze({
  IDLE: 'idle',
  UNDERSTANDING: 'understanding',
  AWAITING_CLARIFICATION: 'awaiting_clarification',
  PLANNING: 'planning',
  GENERATING_CONCEPTS: 'generating_concepts',
  AWAITING_CONCEPT_SELECTION: 'awaiting_concept_selection',
  REFINING_CONCEPT: 'refining_concept',
  AWAITING_CONCEPT_APPROVAL: 'awaiting_concept_approval',
  COMPILING_DESIGN: 'compiling_design',
  RESOLVING_ASSETS: 'resolving_assets',
  GENERATING_ASSETS: 'generating_assets',
  ASSEMBLING_DESIGN: 'assembling_design',
  RENDERING: 'rendering',
  CRITIQUING: 'critiquing',
  CORRECTING: 'correcting',
  AWAITING_FINAL_APPROVAL: 'awaiting_final_approval',
  COMPLETED: 'completed',
  PAUSED: 'paused',
  CANCELLED: 'cancelled',
  FAILED: 'failed'
});

export const AGENT_TASK_TYPES = Object.freeze({
  NEW_DESIGN: 'new_design',
  REVISE_DESIGN: 'revise_design',
  CREATE_ASSET: 'create_asset',
  REVISE_ASSET: 'revise_asset',
  RESIZE_OR_ADAPT: 'resize_or_adapt',
  CREATE_TEMPLATE: 'create_template',
  HYBRID: 'hybrid'
});

const id = prefix => `${prefix}-${globalThis.crypto?.randomUUID?.() || `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`}`;
const lower = value => String(value || '').toLowerCase();
const has = (text, pattern) => pattern.test(lower(text));
const quoteMatches = text => [...String(text || '').matchAll(/[“"]([^”"]+)[”"]/g)].map(match => match[1].trim()).filter(Boolean);
const describeAsset = asset => asset ? ({
  id: asset.id,
  name: asset.original_name || asset.name || asset.id,
  type: asset.type || 'image',
  description: asset.description || asset.alt || '',
  url: asset.thumbnail_url || asset.preview_url || asset.url || asset.thumbnailUrl || asset.previewUrl || null
}) : null;

export function createAgentTask(title, type, status = 'pending', details = '') {
  return { id: id('task'), title, type, status, details, progress: status === 'completed' ? 100 : 0, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() };
}

export function classifyAgentRequest(instruction, context = {}) {
  const text = lower(instruction);
  const selected = context.selection?.length || 0;
  const hasCurrentDesign = !!context.design?.id;
  const asksAsset = /(asset|illustration|icon|logo|sticker|background removal|cutout|texture|pattern|photo|image)/.test(text);
  const asksDesign = /(design|flyer|menu|poster|card|presentation|social post|page|layout|brochure|invitation|sign)/.test(text);
  const asksRevision = /(revise|revision|change|edit|improve|fix|update|replace|make this|current|selected|existing|keep|preserve)/.test(text) || selected > 0;
  const asksResize = /(resize|adapt|convert|reformat|different size|aspect ratio|letter size|a4|story size)/.test(text);
  const asksTemplate = /(template|reusable design)/.test(text);

  let intent = AGENT_TASK_TYPES.NEW_DESIGN;
  if (asksResize) intent = AGENT_TASK_TYPES.RESIZE_OR_ADAPT;
  else if (asksTemplate) intent = AGENT_TASK_TYPES.CREATE_TEMPLATE;
  else if (asksAsset && asksDesign) intent = AGENT_TASK_TYPES.HYBRID;
  else if (asksAsset && asksRevision) intent = AGENT_TASK_TYPES.REVISE_ASSET;
  else if (asksAsset && !asksDesign) intent = AGENT_TASK_TYPES.CREATE_ASSET;
  else if (asksRevision && hasCurrentDesign) intent = AGENT_TASK_TYPES.REVISE_DESIGN;

  const scope = selected ? 'selection' : intent === AGENT_TASK_TYPES.NEW_DESIGN || intent === AGENT_TASK_TYPES.CREATE_TEMPLATE ? 'document' : 'page';
  const confidence = text.length > 80 ? .94 : text.length > 30 ? .86 : text.length > 12 ? .72 : .55;
  const preserve = [];
  if (/(keep|preserve|do not change|same)/.test(text)) preserve.push('existing content explicitly protected by the user');
  if (intent === AGENT_TASK_TYPES.REVISE_DESIGN) preserve.push('existing copy and user-locked objects unless explicitly replaced');
  const missingInformation = [];
  if (text.length < 14) missingInformation.push('What should the finished design communicate, and who is it for?');
  if ((intent === AGENT_TASK_TYPES.CREATE_ASSET || intent === AGENT_TASK_TYPES.REVISE_ASSET) && !/(photo|3d|flat|vector|watercolor|painted|realistic|illustration|minimal|retro|vintage|modern)/.test(text)) missingInformation.push('What visual style should the asset use?');
  if (!context.brands?.length && /(brand|branded|on-brand)/.test(text)) missingInformation.push('Which colours, fonts, or logo should define the brand direction?');
  const structured = inferStructuredRequest(instruction, context, { intent, scope });

  return {
    intent,
    confidence,
    scope,
    goal: String(instruction || '').trim(),
    preserve,
    structured,
    missingInformation: [...missingInformation, ...(structured.ambiguity || [])].slice(0, 3),
    recommendedNextStep: missingInformation.length ? 'clarify' : 'generate_concepts'
  };
}

export function createAgentBrief(instruction, context, classification, options = {}) {
  const quoted = quoteMatches(instruction);
  const requiredAssets = [...new Set(options.assetIds || [])];
  const optionalAssets = [...new Set(options.optionalAssetIds || [])];
  const existingText = (context.currentPage?.elements || [])
    .filter(element => element.type === 'text' && element.text)
    .map(element => ({ id: element.id, role: element.role || '', text: element.text }))
    .slice(0, 80);
  const mustUseAssets = requiredAssets
    .map(assetId => describeAsset(context.assets?.find(asset => asset.id === assetId)))
    .filter(Boolean);
  const optionalAssetDetails = optionalAssets
    .map(assetId => describeAsset(context.assets?.find(asset => asset.id === assetId)))
    .filter(Boolean);
  return {
    id: id('brief'),
    taskType: classification.intent,
    deliverable: classification.intent.replaceAll('_', ' '),
    goal: String(instruction || '').trim(),
    audience: options.audience || '',
    style: options.style ? [options.style] : [],
    exactCopy: quoted,
    existingText,
    contentPriority: existingText.slice(0, 6).map(item => item.role || item.text.slice(0, 40)),
    mustUseAssetIds: requiredAssets,
    optionalAssetIds: optionalAssets,
    mustUseAssets,
    optionalAssets: optionalAssetDetails,
    brandKitId: options.brandId || context.brands?.[0]?.id || null,
    constraints: {
      width: context.design?.width,
      height: context.design?.height,
      preserveExactText: classification.intent === AGENT_TASK_TYPES.REVISE_DESIGN,
      preserveExisting: classification.intent !== AGENT_TASK_TYPES.NEW_DESIGN,
      useAssets: options.useAssets !== false,
      useBrand: options.useBrand !== false,
      draftQuality: 'low'
    },
    assumptions: [],
    answers: [],
    createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
  };
}

export function appendBriefAnswer(brief, answer) {
  return {
    ...brief,
    answers: [...(brief.answers || []), String(answer || '').trim()].filter(Boolean),
    assumptions: [...(brief.assumptions || []), String(answer || '').trim()].filter(Boolean)
  };
}

const conceptStyles = [
  {
    key: 'editorial',
    title: 'Editorial Clarity',
    description: 'Structured typography, generous spacing, and a restrained professional palette.',
    palette: ['#fffaf0', '#172033', '#d97706', '#ffffff'],
    prompt: 'Editorial graphic design, refined typography, clear information hierarchy, generous negative space, premium print layout, subtle warm accent'
  },
  {
    key: 'campaign',
    title: 'Bold Campaign',
    description: 'High contrast, oversized type, and energetic colour blocking for immediate impact.',
    palette: ['#111827', '#ffffff', '#f97316', '#facc15'],
    prompt: 'Bold contemporary campaign design, oversized typography, high contrast color blocks, energetic composition, punchy modern advertising'
  },
  {
    key: 'commons',
    title: 'Illustrated Commons',
    description: 'Friendly organic shapes, layered imagery, and a collaborative handmade character.',
    palette: ['#eef6ee', '#173f35', '#e76f51', '#f4c95d'],
    prompt: 'Warm illustrated design system, organic shapes, friendly handmade details, layered collage, community-oriented visual identity, polished composition'
  }
];

function preferredAsset(context, brief) {
  const ids = [...(brief.mustUseAssetIds || []), ...(brief.optionalAssetIds || [])];
  return context.assets?.find(asset => ids.includes(asset.id)) || (brief.constraints?.useAssets ? context.assets?.[0] : null) || null;
}

function sourceCopy(context, brief) {
  const text = brief.exactCopy?.length ? brief.exactCopy : (brief.existingText || []).map(item => item.text);
  const headline = text[0] || brief.goal.split(/[.!?\n]/)[0].slice(0, 90) || 'Design Commons';
  const supporting = text.slice(1).join('\n').slice(0, 2400) || brief.goal.slice(0, 600);
  return { headline, supporting };
}

function conceptBatch(style, context, brief, index = 0, refinement = '') {
  const width = Number(context.design?.width || 1080);
  const height = Number(context.design?.height || 1080);
  const portrait = height >= width;
  const margin = Math.round(Math.min(width, height) * .075);
  const asset = preferredAsset(context, brief);
  const { headline, supporting } = sourceCopy(context, brief);
  const pageRef = `agent-concept-${style.key}-${index + 1}`;
  const commands = [
    { op: 'create_page', ref: pageRef, page: { name: `${style.title} concept` } },
    { op: 'set_page_background', pageRef, paint: solidPaint(style.palette[0]) }
  ];

  if (style.key === 'editorial') {
    commands.push(
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'rect', name: 'Editorial accent', role: 'decoration', x: margin, y: margin, width: Math.max(12, width * .018), height: height - margin * 2, fill: style.palette[2], radius: 8 } },
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'text', name: 'Concept headline', role: 'headline', text: headline, x: margin * 1.55, y: margin, width: width - margin * 2.55, height: height * .22, fontFamily: 'Montserrat', fontSize: Math.max(38, Math.min(104, width * .085)), fontWeight: 700, fill: style.palette[1], lineHeight: 1.02, autoFit: true, minFontSize: 30, maxLines: 3, overflowBehavior: 'ellipsis' } },
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'text', name: 'Concept supporting copy', role: 'body', text: supporting, x: margin * 1.55, y: height * .66, width: width - margin * 2.55, height: height * .23, fontFamily: 'Inter', fontSize: Math.max(16, width * .025), fill: style.palette[1], lineHeight: 1.3, autoFit: true, minFontSize: 12, maxLines: 12, overflowBehavior: 'ellipsis' } }
    );
    if (asset) commands.push({ op: 'create_image_frame', pageRef, assetId: asset.id, element: { name: 'Concept hero image', role: 'hero-image', x: margin * 1.55, y: height * .29, width: width - margin * 2.55, height: height * .31, radius: Math.round(width * .018) } });
    else commands.push({ op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'rect', name: 'Concept image area', role: 'hero-image', x: margin * 1.55, y: height * .29, width: width - margin * 2.55, height: height * .31, fill: '#eadfcf', radius: Math.round(width * .018) } });
  } else if (style.key === 'campaign') {
    commands.push(
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'rect', name: 'Campaign block', role: 'decoration', x: 0, y: height * .58, width, height: height * .42, fill: style.palette[2] } },
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'ellipse', name: 'Campaign badge', role: 'decoration', x: width * .68, y: margin * .55, width: width * .24, height: width * .24, fill: style.palette[3], rotation: 8 } },
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'text', name: 'Concept headline', role: 'headline', text: headline.toUpperCase(), x: margin, y: margin, width: width - margin * 2, height: height * .39, fontFamily: 'Montserrat', fontSize: Math.max(44, Math.min(130, width * .105)), fontWeight: 800, fill: style.palette[1], lineHeight: .94, autoFit: true, minFontSize: 34, maxLines: 4, overflowBehavior: 'ellipsis' } },
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'text', name: 'Concept supporting copy', role: 'body', text: supporting, x: margin, y: height * .68, width: width - margin * 2, height: height * .23, fontFamily: 'Inter', fontSize: Math.max(16, width * .026), fontWeight: 600, fill: style.palette[1], lineHeight: 1.25, autoFit: true, minFontSize: 12, maxLines: 10, overflowBehavior: 'ellipsis' } }
    );
    if (asset) commands.push({ op: 'create_image_frame', pageRef, assetId: asset.id, element: { name: 'Concept image', role: 'hero-image', x: width * .48, y: height * .35, width: width * .44, height: height * .29, radius: Math.round(width * .04), rotation: -4 } });
  } else {
    const heroWidth = portrait ? width * .72 : width * .45;
    commands.push(
      { op: 'create_svg', pageRef, svg: '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 240 240"><path fill="#e76f51" d="M34 127C17 88 45 39 90 32c43-7 87 18 107 57 18 35 4 83-26 108-31 26-83 25-112-4-17-17-18-43-25-66Z"/><path fill="#f4c95d" d="M151 48c25 12 45 39 42 67-4 35-39 63-73 56-31-7-50-41-41-71 9-32 42-67 72-52Z"/></svg>', element: { name: 'Organic motif', role: 'decoration', x: width * .59, y: margin * .35, width: width * .36, height: width * .36, opacity: .95 } },
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'text', name: 'Concept headline', role: 'headline', text: headline, x: margin, y: margin, width: width * .67, height: height * .24, fontFamily: 'Playfair Display', fontSize: Math.max(42, Math.min(112, width * .09)), fontWeight: 700, fill: style.palette[1], lineHeight: 1.02, autoFit: true, minFontSize: 30, maxLines: 3, overflowBehavior: 'ellipsis' } },
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'rect', name: 'Copy card', role: 'container', x: margin, y: height * .62, width: width - margin * 2, height: height * .27, fill: '#ffffff', radius: Math.round(width * .028), opacity: .94 } },
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef, element: { type: 'text', name: 'Concept supporting copy', role: 'body', text: supporting, x: margin * 1.45, y: height * .665, width: width - margin * 2.9, height: height * .18, fontFamily: 'Inter', fontSize: Math.max(16, width * .025), fill: style.palette[1], lineHeight: 1.3, autoFit: true, minFontSize: 12, maxLines: 10, overflowBehavior: 'ellipsis' } }
    );
    if (asset) commands.push({ op: 'create_image_frame', pageRef, assetId: asset.id, element: { name: 'Concept hero image', role: 'hero-image', x: margin, y: height * .28, width: heroWidth, height: height * .29, radius: Math.round(width * .14), mask: 'rounded' } });
  }

  return {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    baseRevision: context.design?.revision || 0,
    instruction: `${style.title} low-quality concept for: ${brief.goal}${refinement ? `. Refinement: ${refinement}` : ''}`,
    commands,
    source: 'agent-local-concept'
  };
}

export function createLocalConceptVariants(context, brief, { refinement = '', parentConceptId = null, classification = null, randomize = false, variationNonce = '' } = {}) {
  const specs = createDesignSpecDirections(context, brief, classification || {}, refinement);
  const orderedSpecs = randomize && specs.length > 1
    ? [...specs.slice(Math.abs(hash(variationNonce || Date.now())) % specs.length), ...specs.slice(0, Math.abs(hash(variationNonce || Date.now())) % specs.length)]
    : specs;
  return orderedSpecs.map((spec, index) => ({
    id: id('concept'),
    parentConceptId,
    title: spec.title,
    description: spec.description,
    prompt: `${spec.description}. ${spec.theme.visualStyle} visual direction. User request: ${brief.goal}${refinement ? `. Requested refinement: ${refinement}` : ''}${randomize ? '. Create a materially fresh direction rather than a recolor of the previous set.' : ''}. Render one complete flat front-facing finished design canvas, not an editor screenshot or product mockup. Generate a low-resolution concept preview only; preserve exact supplied wording and never invent gibberish text.`,
    negativePrompt: 'illegible text, overlapping typography, distorted logo, watermark, clipped content, random words',
    seed: Math.abs(hash(`${brief.goal}:${spec.id}:${refinement}:${variationNonce}`)) % 2147483647,
    previewQuality: 'low',
    previewMode: 'structured-fallback',
    previewEngine: null,
    previewLabel: 'Structured editable fallback',
    palette: spec.theme.palette,
    designSpec: spec,
    conceptSpec: {
      styleKey: spec.theme.visualStyle,
      palette: spec.theme.palette,
      hierarchy: spec.content.hierarchy,
      assetManifest: createAssetManifest(context, brief),
      reconstruction: 'design-spec-command-bundle'
    },
    commandBatch: compileDesignSpec(spec, context, { baseRevision: context.design?.revision || 0 }),
    createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
  }));
}

export function createAssetManifest(context, brief) {
  const selected = (brief.mustUseAssetIds || []).map(assetId => context.assets?.find(asset => asset.id === assetId)).filter(Boolean);
  const result = selected.map(asset => ({ key: `user-${asset.id}`, type: asset.type || 'image', assetId: asset.id, description: asset.description || asset.name, sourcePreference: 'user-asset', required: true }));
  if (!result.length && brief.constraints?.useAssets) result.push({ key: 'hero-visual', type: 'image', description: 'A hero visual that supports the user request', sourcePreference: 'asset-library-first', required: false });
  if ([AGENT_TASK_TYPES.CREATE_ASSET, AGENT_TASK_TYPES.REVISE_ASSET, AGENT_TASK_TYPES.HYBRID].includes(brief.taskType)) result.push({ key: 'generated-primary-asset', type: 'image', description: brief.goal, sourcePreference: 'generate-draft-then-confirm', required: true });
  return result;
}

export function normalizeAgentConcepts(payload, context, brief) {
  const raw = Array.isArray(payload) ? payload : payload?.concepts;
  if (!Array.isArray(raw) || !raw.length) return [];
  return raw.slice(0, 3).map((concept, index) => ({
    id: concept.id || id('concept'),
    parentConceptId: concept.parentConceptId || null,
    title: concept.title || `Concept ${index + 1}`,
    description: concept.description || '',
    prompt: concept.prompt || '',
    negativePrompt: concept.negativePrompt || '',
    seed: concept.seed ?? Math.abs(hash(`${brief.goal}:${index}`)) % 2147483647,
    previewQuality: concept.previewQuality || 'low',
    previewMode: concept.previewMode || concept.preview_mode || ((concept.previewUrl || concept.preview_url) ? 'nano-banana' : 'structured-fallback'),
    previewUrl: concept.previewUrl || concept.preview_url || null,
    previewEngine: concept.previewEngine || concept.preview_engine || null,
    previewLabel: concept.previewLabel || concept.preview_label || null,
    previewProvider: concept.previewProvider || concept.preview_provider || null,
    previewModel: concept.previewModel || concept.preview_model || null,
    previewError: concept.previewError || concept.preview_error || null,
    palette: concept.palette || [],
    layout: concept.layout || '',
    typography: concept.typography || '',
    designSpec: concept.designSpec || concept.design_spec || null,
    conceptSpec: concept.conceptSpec || concept.spec || { assetManifest: createAssetManifest(context, brief) },
    commandBatch: concept.commandBatch || concept.batch || null,
    createdAt: concept.createdAt || new Date().toISOString()
  }));
}

export function createAgentSession(instruction, context, options = {}) {
  const classification = classifyAgentRequest(instruction, context);
  const brief = createAgentBrief(instruction, context, classification, options);
  return {
    id: id('agent'),
    status: AGENT_STATES.UNDERSTANDING,
    previousStatus: null,
    instruction: String(instruction || '').trim(),
    classification,
    brief,
    questions: classification.missingInformation,
    messages: [{ id: id('message'), role: 'user', content: String(instruction || '').trim(), createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }],
    tasks: [
      createAgentTask('Understand the request', 'understand', 'completed', classification.structured?.objective || ''),
      createAgentTask('Audit content and constraints', 'inspect', 'completed', `${classification.scope} scope`),
      createAgentTask('Establish a design system', 'design_system', 'pending'),
      createAgentTask('Plan layout with a DesignSpec', 'layout_spec', 'pending'),
      createAgentTask('Resolve or generate assets', 'assets', 'pending'),
      createAgentTask('Generate three Nano Banana previews', 'concepts', 'pending'),
      createAgentTask('Wait for concept selection', 'selection', 'pending'),
      createAgentTask('Compile an editable design', 'compile', 'pending'),
      createAgentTask('Render and reconcile concept fidelity', 'quality', 'pending'),
      createAgentTask('Wait for final approval', 'approval', 'pending')
    ],
    concepts: [],
    selectedConceptId: null,
    history: [{
      id: id('history'),
      type: 'understanding',
      title: 'Request understood',
      summary: classification.structured?.objective || brief.goal,
      understanding: {
        action: classification.intent,
        deliverable: brief.deliverable,
        audience: brief.audience || '',
        requiredCopy: brief.exactCopy || [],
        mustUseAssets: brief.mustUseAssets || []
      },
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }],
    understanding: {
      action: classification.intent,
      deliverable: brief.deliverable,
      summary: classification.structured?.objective || brief.goal,
      audience: brief.audience || '',
      requiredCopy: brief.exactCopy || [],
      preserve: classification.preserve || [],
      constraints: classification.structured?.constraints || []
    },
    generationRound: 0,
    steering: [],
    baseRevision: context.design?.revision || 0,
    options: { provider: options.provider || 'auto', useBrand: options.useBrand !== false, useAssets: options.useAssets !== false, brandId: options.brandId || null, assetIds: options.assetIds || [] },
    maxCorrectionLoops: Number(options.maxCorrectionLoops || 3),
    correctionLoop: 0,
    paused: false,
    createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
  };
}

export function updateAgentTask(tasks, type, patch) {
  return (tasks || []).map(task => task.type === type ? { ...task, ...patch } : task);
}

function hash(value) {
  let result = 2166136261;
  for (const char of String(value || '')) {
    result ^= char.charCodeAt(0);
    result = Math.imul(result, 16777619);
  }
  return result | 0;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/ai/assetPlanning.js (2026-07-05 21:26:52) =====
const clean = (value, max = 2000) => String(value ?? '').trim().slice(0, max);
const splitWords = value => clean(value, 2000).toLowerCase().split(/[^a-z0-9]+/).filter(word => word.length > 2);

export const AI_ASSET_KINDS = ['raster', 'svg'];
export const AI_ASSET_ASPECT_RATIOS = ['1:1', '4:3', '3:4', '16:9', '9:16', '2:1', '1:2'];

export function normalizeAITheme(input = {}) {
  return {
    name: clean(input.name || input.title || 'Page theme', 160),
    summary: clean(input.summary || input.description, 1000),
    keywords: Array.isArray(input.keywords) ? input.keywords.map(item => clean(item, 80)).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 24) : [],
    palette: Array.isArray(input.palette) ? input.palette.filter(value => /^#[0-9a-f]{6}$/i.test(String(value))).slice(0, 12) : [],
    visualStyle: clean(input.visualStyle || input.style, 300),
    illustrationStyle: clean(input.illustrationStyle, 300),
    photographyStyle: clean(input.photographyStyle, 300),
    consistencyKey: clean(input.consistencyKey || input.seedDescription, 300)
  };
}

export function normalizeAIAssetRequest(input = {}, index = 0) {
  const kind = AI_ASSET_KINDS.includes(input.kind) ? input.kind : 'raster';
  const aspectRatio = AI_ASSET_ASPECT_RATIOS.includes(input.aspectRatio) ? input.aspectRatio : '1:1';
  return {
    key: clean(input.key || `asset-${index + 1}`, 120),
    name: clean(input.name || input.title || `Asset ${index + 1}`, 180),
    purpose: clean(input.purpose || input.role, 500),
    role: clean(input.role || 'illustration', 100),
    prompt: clean(input.prompt, 6000),
    negativePrompt: clean(input.negativePrompt, 2000),
    kind,
    aspectRatio,
    transparent: kind === 'svg' ? true : input.transparent === true,
    reuseAssetId: clean(input.reuseAssetId, 160),
    reuseQuery: clean(input.reuseQuery || input.query, 500),
    placementHint: clean(input.placementHint, 500),
    required: input.required !== false,
    tags: Array.isArray(input.tags) ? input.tags.map(tag => clean(tag, 80)).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 30) : []
  };
}

export function normalizeAIAssetRequests(list = []) {
  return (Array.isArray(list) ? list : []).slice(0, 16).map(normalizeAIAssetRequest).filter(item => item.prompt || item.reuseAssetId || item.reuseQuery);
}

export function buildThemedAssetPrompt(requestInput, themeInput = {}) {
  const request = normalizeAIAssetRequest(requestInput);
  const theme = normalizeAITheme(themeInput);
  const sections = [request.prompt || `${request.name}. ${request.purpose}`];
  if (theme.summary) sections.push(`Page theme: ${theme.summary}`);
  if (theme.visualStyle) sections.push(`Visual style: ${theme.visualStyle}`);
  if (request.kind === 'svg' && theme.illustrationStyle) sections.push(`Illustration direction: ${theme.illustrationStyle}`);
  if (request.kind === 'raster' && theme.photographyStyle) sections.push(`Image direction: ${theme.photographyStyle}`);
  if (theme.palette.length) sections.push(`Use this palette where appropriate: ${theme.palette.join(', ')}.`);
  if (theme.consistencyKey) sections.push(`Keep all generated assets visually consistent with: ${theme.consistencyKey}.`);
  if (request.transparent) sections.push('Isolated subject on a transparent background. No border, frame, mockup, label, or text.');
  if (request.negativePrompt) sections.push(`Avoid: ${request.negativePrompt}.`);
  return sections.filter(Boolean).join('\n');
}

export function scoreAssetForRequest(asset = {}, requestInput = {}) {
  const request = normalizeAIAssetRequest(requestInput);
  if (request.reuseAssetId && asset.id === request.reuseAssetId) return 10000;
  const haystack = `${asset.original_name || asset.name || ''} ${asset.description || ''} ${(asset.tags || []).join(' ')}`.toLowerCase();
  const words = new Set(splitWords(`${request.name} ${request.purpose} ${request.reuseQuery} ${request.prompt} ${request.tags.join(' ')}`));
  let score = 0;
  for (const word of words) if (haystack.includes(word)) score += word.length >= 7 ? 4 : 2;
  if (request.kind === 'svg' && /svg|vector/.test(String(asset.asset_type || asset.type || '').toLowerCase())) score += 5;
  if (request.transparent && (asset.tags || []).some(tag => /transparent|cutout|isolated/i.test(String(tag)))) score += 3;
  return score;
}

export function findReusableAsset(assets = [], requestInput = {}, minimumScore = 6) {
  const ranked = (assets || []).map(asset => ({ asset, score: scoreAssetForRequest(asset, requestInput) })).sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);
  return ranked[0]?.score >= minimumScore ? ranked[0] : null;
}

export function assetRequestPromptList(requests = [], theme = {}) {
  return normalizeAIAssetRequests(requests).map((request, index) => ({
    index: index + 1,
    key: request.key,
    name: request.name,
    kind: request.kind,
    aspectRatio: request.aspectRatio,
    transparent: request.transparent,
    prompt: buildThemedAssetPrompt(request, theme)
  }));
}
