          <div className="template-card-actions">{canEdit && <button className="mini" onClick={async () => { const rawPrice = prompt('Credit price (0 for free)', '0'); if (rawPrice == null) return; const priceCredits = Math.max(0, Number(rawPrice) || 0); try { await publishTemplate(template.id, { title: template.title, description: template.description || '', priceType: priceCredits ? 'credits' : 'free', priceCredits, tags: template.tags || [] }); notify('Template marketplace listing created.', 'success'); } catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); } }}>Publish</button>}{canEdit && template.visibility !== 'public' && <button className="danger mini" onClick={async () => { await api.deleteTemplate(template.id); await refresh(); }}>Delete</button>}</div>
        </div>)}</div>
      </>}

      {tab === 'components' && <>
        <div className="panel-heading"><h3>Reusable components</h3><button disabled={!canEdit || !selection.length} onClick={async () => { const title = prompt('Component name', 'New component'); if (title) await saveComponent({ title, category: 'Custom', linked: confirm('Create as linked component?') }); }}><Plus size={16}/></button></div>
        <p className="help">Linked components can synchronize changes to every saved design that uses them.</p>
        <div className="component-list">{components.map(component => <div key={component.id}>
          <button disabled={!canEdit} onClick={() => insertComponent(component)}><Box size={18}/><span><strong>{component.title}</strong><small>{component.linked ? 'Linked' : 'Detached'} · {component.elements.length} elements</small></span></button>
          {canEdit && component.linked && <button className="mini" disabled={!selection.length} title="Replace master from selection and sync linked instances" onClick={async () => { if (confirm('Replace this master component from the current selection and synchronize linked instances?')) { const item = await updateComponent(component); notify(`Updated component and synchronized ${item.changedDesigns || 0} design${item.changedDesigns === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`, 'success'); } }}>Update</button>}
          {canEdit && <button className="danger mini" onClick={async () => { await api.deleteComponent(component.id); await refresh(); }}>×</button>}
        </div>)}</div>
      </>}

      {tab === 'brand' && <>
        <div className="panel-heading"><h3>Brand kits</h3>{canAdmin && <button onClick={async () => { const title = prompt('Brand kit name'); if (title) await createBrand({ title, colors: ['#111827', '#4f46e5', '#f59e0b', '#ffffff'], fonts: ['Arial', 'Georgia'], logos: [], textStyles: [] }); }}><Plus size={16}/></button>}</div>
        {brands.map(brand => <article className="brand-card" key={brand.id}>
          <strong>{brand.title}</strong>
          <div className="swatches">{brand.colors.map(color => <span key={color} style={{ background: color }} title={color}/>)}</div>
          <small>{brand.fonts.join(' · ')}</small>
          {!!brand.logos?.length && <small>{brand.logos.length} logo{brand.logos.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} · {brand.textStyles?.length || 0} text style{brand.textStyles?.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}</small>}
          <div className="button-row"><button disabled={!canEdit} onClick={() => applyBrand(brand, { colors: true, fonts: true })}>Apply all</button><button disabled={!canEdit} onClick={() => applyBrand(brand, { colors: true, fonts: false })}>Colours</button><button disabled={!canEdit} onClick={() => applyBrand(brand, { colors: false, fonts: true })}>Fonts</button></div>
          {selection.length > 0 && <div className="swatches editable">{brand.colors.map(color => <button disabled={!canEdit} key={color} style={{ background: color }} onClick={() => updateElements(selection, item => { const appearance = normalizeAppearance(item); const fills = appearance.fills.map((layer, index) => index === 0 ? { ...layer, enabled: true, paint: solidPaint(color) } : layer); return { fill: color, appearance: { ...appearance, fills, fill: fills[0].paint } }; })}/>)}</div>}
          {canAdmin && <div className="stack-buttons compact"><button onClick={() => editBrand(brand)}>Edit kit</button><button onClick={() => addLogoToBrand(brand)} disabled={!selectedAsset}>Add selected asset as logo</button><button onClick={() => addTextStyleToBrand(brand)} disabled={selectedElement?.type !== 'text'}>Save selected text style</button><button className="danger" onClick={async () => { if (confirm(`Delete brand kit "${brand.title}"?`)) { await api.deleteBrandKit(brand.id); await refresh(); } }}>Delete kit</button></div>}
        </article>)}
      </>}
    </div>
    {commonsAsset && <CommonsPublishDialog onClose={() => setCommonsAsset(null)} editorRef={editorRef} sourceAsset={commonsAsset} selectedElements={[]}/>}
  </aside>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/LLMCommandDialog.jsx (2026-07-05 23:09:06) =====
import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { Brush, Clipboard, Code2, ExternalLink, Eye, FileText, Image, Play, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react';
import Modal from './Modal.jsx';
import AIPreviewDialog from './AIPreviewDialog.jsx';
import AIScreenshotAnnotator from './AIScreenshotAnnotator.jsx';
import { copyImageToClipboard } from '../ai/visuals.js';
import { useEditorStore } from '../store.js';

const copyText = async value => {
  const text = typeof value === 'string' ? value : JSON.stringify(value, null, 2);
  try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text); } catch {
    const textarea = document.createElement('textarea');
    textarea.value = text;
    textarea.style.position = 'fixed';
    textarea.style.opacity = '0';
    document.body.appendChild(textarea);
    textarea.select();
    document.execCommand('copy');
    textarea.remove();
  }
};

export default function LLMCommandDialog({ onClose }) {
  const design = useEditorStore(state => state.design);
  const selection = useEditorStore(state => state.selection);
  const preview = useEditorStore(state => state.aiPreview);
  const plan = useEditorStore(state => state.aiPlan);
  const renders = useEditorStore(state => state.aiRenders);
  const render = useEditorStore(state => state.aiRender);
  const annotation = useEditorStore(state => state.aiAnnotation);
  const documentRevision = useEditorStore(state => state.documentRevision);
  const getPackage = useEditorStore(state => state.getAIHandoffPackage);
  const previewText = useEditorStore(state => state.previewLLMText);
  const renderImages = useEditorStore(state => state.renderAIImages);
  const setAnnotation = useEditorStore(state => state.setAIAnnotation);
  const notify = useEditorStore(state => state.notify);
  const [tab, setTab] = useState('prompt');
  const [request, setRequest] = useState('');
  const [scope, setScope] = useState('page');
  const [responseText, setResponseText] = useState('');
  const [showPrompt, setShowPrompt] = useState(false);
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const [visualPreviewOpen, setVisualPreviewOpen] = useState(false);
  const [annotatorOpen, setAnnotatorOpen] = useState(false);
  const [selectedRenderIndex, setSelectedRenderIndex] = useState(0);

  const handoff = useMemo(() => {
    try { return getPackage(request, { scope }); } catch { return null; }
  }, [getPackage, request, scope, renders.length, annotation?.dataUrl, selection, design?.id]);
  const skillsUrl = handoff?.skillsUrl || new URL('skills.md', document.baseURI).href;
  const currentRender = renders[selectedRenderIndex] || render || null;
  const displayedImage = annotation?.revision === documentRevision && annotation?.dataUrl ? annotation.dataUrl : currentRender?.url;

  const copy = async (value, message) => { await copyText(value); notify(message, 'success'); };
  const parsePreview = () => {
    try {
      previewText(responseText, { instruction: request });
      setTab('paste');
      setVisualPreviewOpen(true);
      notify('LLM command response parsed and validated. Review the visual preview before applying.', 'success');
    } catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); }
  };
  const refreshRender = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    try {
      const result = await renderImages({ multiplier: 1, scope });
      setSelectedRenderIndex(0);
      notify(`${result.length} fresh screenshot${result.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} ready for the manual handoff.`, 'success');
    } catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); }
    finally { setBusy(false); }
  };
  const copyImage = async () => {
    try { await copyImageToClipboard(displayedImage); notify('Screenshot copied. Paste it into the external chat after the prompt.', 'success'); }
    catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); }
  };

  return <Modal title="Manual AI handoff" onClose={onClose} wide>
      <div className="llm-dialog-intro"><Sparkles size={18}/><div><strong>Copy the complete prompt and visual context out, paste safe commands back</strong><p>The direct agent/API tab is hidden. This workflow keeps the external chat manual and requires Design Commons preview approval before changes are applied.</p></div></div>
    <div className="llm-dialog-tabs" role="tablist">
      {[['prompt', '1. Prompt and screenshot'], ['paste', '2. Paste commands']].map(([id, label]) => <button key={id} className={tab === id ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => setTab(id)}>{label}</button>)}
    </div>

    {tab === 'prompt' && handoff && <div className="llm-dialog-section">
      <div className="llm-field-grid">
        <label className="field"><span>Request for the LLM</span><textarea rows="5" value={request} onChange={event => setRequest(event.target.value)} placeholder="Improve this design, preserve the current content, follow my screenshot markings, and return Design Commons commands only."/></label>
        <label className="field"><span>Scope</span><select value={scope} onChange={event => setScope(event.target.value)}><option value="page">Current page</option><option value="selection" disabled={!selection.length}>Current selection ({selection.length})</option><option value="document">Whole design</option></select><small>The full prompt includes the matching page/object context.</small></label>
      </div>

      <div className="llm-manual-visual">
        <div className="llm-render-row"><div><Image size={16}/><span>{displayedImage ? 'Copy this image separately and paste it into the chat with the full prompt.' : 'Render the design so the external chat can see it.'}</span></div><div className="button-row wrap"><button disabled={busy} onClick={refreshRender}><Image size={14}/>{busy ? 'Rendering…' : scope === 'document' ? 'Render all pages' : 'Render page'}</button><button disabled={!currentRender?.url} onClick={() => setAnnotatorOpen(true)}><Brush size={14}/>Draw on screenshot</button><button disabled={!displayedImage} onClick={copyImage}><Clipboard size={14}/>Copy screenshot</button></div></div>
        {displayedImage && <img className="llm-manual-screenshot" src={displayedImage} alt="Screenshot for external AI"/>}
        {renders.length > 1 && <div className="ai-render-thumbnails">{renders.map((item, index) => <button key={item.jobId || item.url} className={selectedRenderIndex === index ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => setSelectedRenderIndex(index)}><img src={item.url}/><span>Page {item.pageIndex + 1}</span></button>)}</div>}
      </div>

      <div className="llm-copy-grid">
        <button className="primary" onClick={() => copy(handoff.prompt, 'Full LLM prompt copied.')}><Clipboard size={15}/>Copy full prompt</button>
        <button onClick={() => copy(handoff.instructions, 'Design Commons instructions copied.')}><FileText size={15}/>Instructions</button>
        <button onClick={() => copy(handoff.context, 'Current design context copied.')}><Code2 size={15}/>Design context</button>
        <button onClick={() => copy({ capabilities: handoff.capabilities, examples: handoff.examples }, 'Command reference copied.')}><Code2 size={15}/>Commands and examples</button>
      </div>
      <div className="llm-resource-row"><span><b>Agent skill:</b> <code>{skillsUrl}</code></span><button onClick={() => copy(skillsUrl, 'SKILLS.md URL copied.')}><Clipboard size={14}/>Copy URL</button><button onClick={() => window.open(skillsUrl, '_blank', 'noopener')}><ExternalLink size={14}/>Open</button></div>
      <button className="llm-prompt-toggle" onClick={() => setShowPrompt(value => !value)}>{showPrompt ? 'Hide generated prompt' : 'Review generated prompt'}</button>
      {showPrompt && <textarea className="llm-generated-prompt" readOnly rows="18" value={handoff.prompt}/>}
      <div className="modal-actions"><button className="primary" onClick={() => setTab('paste')}>Continue to paste response</button></div>
    </div>}

    {tab === 'paste' && <div className="llm-dialog-section">
      <div className="llm-paste-help"><Code2 size={17}/><p>Paste the LLM response below. Design Commons extracts the command JSON, validates every operation, renders a visual preview, and waits for your explicit approval.</p></div>
      <label className="field"><span>LLM command response</span><textarea className="llm-response-text" rows="16" value={responseText} onChange={event => setResponseText(event.target.value)} placeholder={'Paste a response containing:\n{\n  "schemaVersion": 1,\n  "baseRevision": 0,\n  "commands": [...]\n}'}/></label>
      <div className="button-row wrap"><button className="primary" disabled={!responseText.trim()} onClick={parsePreview}><Play size={15}/>Parse, validate, and preview</button><button onClick={() => copy(handoff?.prompt || '', 'Full LLM prompt copied again.')}><Clipboard size={14}/>Copy prompt again</button></div>
      {plan && preview && <div className="llm-preview-summary">
        <div><b>{plan.commands.length}</b><span>commands</span></div><div><b>{preview.diff.added.length}</b><span>added</span></div><div><b>{preview.diff.changed.length}</b><span>changed</span></div><div><b>{preview.diff.removed.length}</b><span>removed</span></div>
        <p>{preview.lint.issues.length} design-check finding{preview.lint.issues.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} · {(preview.warnings || []).length} execution warning{(preview.warnings || []).length === 1 ? '' : 's'}</p>
        <div className="modal-actions"><button onClick={() => copy(plan, 'Validated command bundle copied.')}><Clipboard size={14}/>Copy validated JSON</button><button className="primary" onClick={() => setVisualPreviewOpen(true)}><Eye size={15}/>Preview and approve</button></div>
      </div>}
    </div>}
    {visualPreviewOpen && plan && preview && <AIPreviewDialog onClose={() => setVisualPreviewOpen(false)} onApplied={onClose}/>}
    {annotatorOpen && currentRender?.url && <AIScreenshotAnnotator source={currentRender.url} initialActions={annotation?.sourceUrl === currentRender.url ? annotation.actions : []} onClose={() => setAnnotatorOpen(false)} onSave={result => { setAnnotation({ ...result, sourceUrl: currentRender.url, pageIndex: currentRender.pageIndex, revision: documentRevision }); setAnnotatorOpen(false); notify('Annotated screenshot is ready to copy and is described in the full prompt.', 'success'); }}/>}
  </Modal>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/MarketplaceDialog.jsx (2026-07-05 21:28:44) =====
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { Box, Coins, Download, Image, Search, ShoppingBag, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react';
import Modal from './Modal.jsx';
import { useEditorStore } from '../store.js';

export default function MarketplaceDialog({ onClose }) {
  const listings = useEditorStore(state => state.marketplaceListings);
  const load = useEditorStore(state => state.loadMarketplace);
  const acquire = useEditorStore(state => state.acquireMarketplaceListing);
  const summary = useEditorStore(state => state.billingSummary);
  const busy = useEditorStore(state => state.commercialBusy);
  const notify = useEditorStore(state => state.notify);
  const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
  const [type, setType] = useState('');
  useEffect(() => { load().catch(error => notify(error.message, 'error')); }, []);
  const filtered = useMemo(() => listings.filter(item => (!type || item.listingType === type || item.listing_type === type) && (!query || `${item.title} ${item.description || ''} ${(item.tags || []).join(' ')}`.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()))), [listings, query, type]);
  const install = async listing => {
    try {
      await acquire(listing.id);
      notify(`${listing.title} was added to this workspace.`, 'success');
    } catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); }
  };
  return <Modal title="CanvasForge Design Commons" onClose={onClose} wide className="marketplace-modal">
    <div className="marketplace-hero"><div><span><Sparkles size={17}/>Design Commons</span><h2>Reusable assets and templates from CanvasForge creators</h2><p>Install free items or spend credits. Asset publishers must submit a rights declaration.</p></div><div><Coins size={18}/><b>{Number(summary?.credits?.available || 0).toLocaleString()}</b><span>credits available</span></div></div>
    <div className="marketplace-tools"><label><Search size={15}/><input value={query} onChange={event => setQuery(event.target.value)} placeholder="Search assets and templates"/></label><select value={type} onChange={event => setType(event.target.value)}><option value="">Everything</option><option value="asset">Assets</option><option value="template">Templates</option></select><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => load({ q: query, type })}>{busy ? 'Loading…' : 'Refresh'}</button></div>
    {filtered.length ? <div className="marketplace-grid">{filtered.map(item => {
      const listingType = item.listingType || item.listing_type;
      const priceType = item.priceType || item.price_type || 'free';
      const credits = Number(item.priceCredits ?? item.price_credits ?? 0);
      return <article key={item.id}><div className="marketplace-preview">{item.previewUrl || item.preview_url ? <img src={item.previewUrl || item.preview_url}/> : listingType === 'template' ? <Box size={32}/> : <Image size={32}/>}</div><div className="marketplace-copy"><span className="ui-badge tone-neutral">{listingType}</span><h3>{item.title}</h3><p>{item.description || 'Shared by a CanvasForge creator.'}</p><small>{item.creatorName || item.creator_name || 'Community creator'}{item.licenceId || item.licence_id ? ` · ${item.licenceId || item.licence_id}` : ''}</small>{listingType === 'asset' && <span className="commons-rights-badge">Rights attested</span>}</div><button className="primary" onClick={() => install(item)}><Download size={15}/>{priceType === 'free' || !credits ? 'Install free' : `${credits.toLocaleString()} credits`}</button></article>;
    })}</div> : <div className="dashboard-empty"><ShoppingBag size={24}/><strong>No marketplace items found</strong><p>Try a different search or publish the first item in this category.</p></div>}
  </Modal>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/MobileWorkspaceControls.jsx (2026-07-10 01:53:42) =====
import React from 'react';
import { Layers, PanelLeft, PanelRight, Scan, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react';
import { useEditorStore } from '../store.js';

export default function MobileWorkspaceControls({ editorRef }) {
  const leftOpen = useEditorStore(state => state.leftPanelOpen);
  const rightOpen = useEditorStore(state => state.rightPanelOpen);
  const aiOpen = useEditorStore(state => state.aiPanelOpen);
  const setPreference = useEditorStore(state => state.setWorkspacePreference);
  const toggleAI = useEditorStore(state => state.toggleAIPanel);
  const setMobilePanel = useEditorStore(state => state.setMobilePanel);
  const mobilePanel = useEditorStore(state => state.mobilePanel);
  const open = target => {
    const closing = mobilePanel === target && (target === 'left' ? leftOpen : rightOpen);
    setMobilePanel(closing ? '' : target);
    if (target === 'left') { setPreference('leftPanelOpen', !closing); setPreference('rightPanelOpen', false); }
    if (target === 'right') { setPreference('rightPanelOpen', !closing); setPreference('leftPanelOpen', false); }
  };
  return <nav className="mobile-workspace-controls" aria-label="Mobile editor controls">
    <button className={leftOpen && mobilePanel === 'left' ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => open('left')}><PanelLeft size={18}/><span>Add</span></button>
    <button onClick={() => { open('left'); globalThis.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('design-commons:left-tab', { detail: 'layers' })); }}><Layers size={18}/><span>Layers</span></button>
    <button className={aiOpen ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => toggleAI()}><Sparkles size={18}/><span>AI</span></button>
    <button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.fit()}><Scan size={18}/><span>Fit</span></button>
    <button className={rightOpen && mobilePanel === 'right' ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => open('right')}><PanelRight size={18}/><span>Inspect</span></button>
  </nav>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/Modal.jsx (2026-07-04 12:47:17) =====
import React, { useEffect, useId, useRef } from 'react';
import { X } from 'lucide-react';

export default function Modal({ title, children, onClose, wide = false, className = '' }) {
  const titleId = useId();
  const modalRef = useRef(null);
  useEffect(() => {
    const previous = document.activeElement;
    const onKeyDown = event => {
      if (event.key === 'Escape') onClose?.();
      if (event.key !== 'Tab') return;
      const focusable = [...(modalRef.current?.querySelectorAll('button:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])') || [])];
      if (!focusable.length) return;
      const first = focusable[0];
      const last = focusable.at(-1);
      if (event.shiftKey && document.activeElement === first) { event.preventDefault(); last.focus(); }
      else if (!event.shiftKey && document.activeElement === last) { event.preventDefault(); first.focus(); }
    };
    document.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown);
    requestAnimationFrame(() => modalRef.current?.querySelector('button, input, select, textarea')?.focus());
    return () => { document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown); previous?.focus?.(); };
  }, [onClose]);

  return <div className="modal-backdrop" onMouseDown={event => event.target === event.currentTarget && onClose?.()}>
    <section ref={modalRef} role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby={titleId} className={`modal ${wide ? 'wide' : ''} ${className}`.trim()}>
      <header><div><span className="modal-kicker">CanvasForge</span><h2 id={titleId}>{title}</h2></div><button className="icon-button" title="Close dialog" aria-label="Close dialog" onClick={onClose}><X size={18}/></button></header>
      <div className="modal-body">{children}</div>
    </section>
  </div>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/PageStrip.jsx (2026-07-05 02:45:26) =====
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Copy, GripVertical, Plus, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { useEditorStore } from '../store.js';
import { clone, cloneElementTree, defaultRegions, uuid } from '../lib/document.js';
import { paintToCss, solidPaint } from '../lib/appearance.js';

export default function PageStrip({ readOnly = false }) {
  const document = useEditorStore(state => state.document);
  const pageIndex = useEditorStore(state => state.pageIndex);
  const setPageIndex = useEditorStore(state => state.setPageIndex);
  const commit = useEditorStore(state => state.commitDocument);
  const role = useEditorStore(state => state.role);
  const [renaming, setRenaming] = useState(null);
  const [name, setName] = useState('');
  if (!document) return null;
  const editable = !readOnly && ['owner', 'admin', 'designer'].includes(role);
  const mutate = fn => {
    if (!editable) return;
    const doc = clone(document);
    fn(doc);
    commit(doc);
  };
  const add = () => mutate(doc => {
    doc.pages.push({ id: uuid(), name: `Page ${doc.pages.length + 1}`, background: '#ffffff', backgroundPaint: solidPaint('#ffffff'), transparentBackground: false, grid: { enabled: false, size: 20, subdivisions: 1 }, margins: { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0 }, guides: { vertical: [], horizontal: [], locked: false }, regions: defaultRegions(doc.width, doc.height), elements: [] });
    setTimeout(() => setPageIndex(doc.pages.length - 1), 0);
  });
  const duplicate = () => mutate(doc => {
    const source = doc.pages[pageIndex];
    const copy = clone(source);
    copy.id = uuid();
    copy.name = `${copy.name} copy`;
    const maps = {};
    copy.elements = cloneElementTree(copy.elements, { maps });
    const copiedGroups = (doc.layoutGroups || []).filter(group => group.pageId === source.id).map(group => ({
      ...clone(group),
      id: maps.layoutMap?.get(group.id) || uuid(),
      pageId: copy.id,
      elementIds: group.elementIds.map(elementId => maps.idMap?.get(elementId)).filter(Boolean)
    }));
    doc.layoutGroups = [...(doc.layoutGroups || []), ...copiedGroups];
    doc.pages.splice(pageIndex + 1, 0, copy);
    setTimeout(() => setPageIndex(pageIndex + 1), 0);
  });
  const remove = () => {
    if (document.pages.length === 1) return;
    mutate(doc => {
      const removedId = doc.pages[pageIndex].id;
      doc.pages.splice(pageIndex, 1);
      doc.layoutGroups = (doc.layoutGroups || []).filter(group => group.pageId !== removedId);
      setTimeout(() => setPageIndex(Math.max(0, pageIndex - 1)), 0);
    });
  };
  const reorder = (from, to) => {
    if (!editable || from === to) return;
    mutate(doc => {
      const [item] = doc.pages.splice(from, 1);
      doc.pages.splice(to, 0, item);
      setTimeout(() => setPageIndex(to), 0);
    });
  };
  const finishRename = index => {
    const value = name.trim();
    if (value) mutate(doc => { doc.pages[index].name = value; });
    setRenaming(null);
  };
  return <footer className="page-strip">
    <div className="page-strip-heading"><strong>Pages</strong><span>{document.pages.length}</span></div>
    {editable && <div className="page-actions"><button onClick={add}><Plus size={15}/>Page</button><button onClick={duplicate}><Copy size={15}/>Duplicate</button><button title={document.pages.length === 1 ? 'A design must contain at least one page.' : 'Delete page'} onClick={remove} disabled={document.pages.length === 1}><Trash2 size={15}/>Delete</button></div>}
    <div className="page-tabs page-thumbnails">{document.pages.map((page, index) => <div role="button" tabIndex={0} key={page.id} draggable={editable && renaming !== index} onDragStart={event => event.dataTransfer.setData('text/page-index', String(index))} onDragOver={event => editable && event.preventDefault()} onDrop={event => reorder(Number(event.dataTransfer.getData('text/page-index')), index)} className={`page-tab-card ${index === pageIndex ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setPageIndex(index)} onKeyDown={event => { if (!['Enter', ' '].includes(event.key) || renaming === index) return; event.preventDefault(); setPageIndex(index); }}>
      <GripVertical className="page-drag-handle" size={13}/>
      <span className={`page-preview ${page.transparentBackground ? 'transparent' : ''}`} style={{ background: page.transparentBackground ? undefined : paintToCss(page.backgroundPaint ?? page.background, '#ffffff') }}><b>{index + 1}</b><i>{page.elements?.length || 0}</i></span>
      {renaming === index ? <input autoFocus value={name} onClick={event => event.stopPropagation()} onChange={event => setName(event.target.value)} onBlur={() => finishRename(index)} onKeyDown={event => { if (event.key === 'Enter') event.currentTarget.blur(); if (event.key === 'Escape') setRenaming(null); }}/> : <span className="page-tab-name" onDoubleClick={event => { if (!editable) return; event.stopPropagation(); setRenaming(index); setName(page.name); }}>{page.name}</span>}
    </div>)}</div>
  </footer>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/PaintEditor.jsx (2026-07-15 18:01:20) =====
import React, { useMemo } from 'react';
import { Plus, RotateCw, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
import {
  PATTERN_TYPES, defaultGradientStops, normalizeHex, normalizePaint, paintToCss
} from '../lib/appearance.js';
import { GRADIENT_PRESETS } from '../lib/presets.js';
import ColorPicker from './ColorPicker.jsx';

function ColorAlphaControl({ color, opacity = 1, onChange, label = 'Colour', palette = [] }) {
  const applyColor = next => onChange({ color: normalizeHex(next, color || '#000000'), opacity });
  return <div className="colour-alpha-control">
    <div className="colour-alpha-row">
      <div className="compact-field grow colour-picker-field"><span>{label}</span><ColorPicker value={color} palette={palette} label={label} onChange={applyColor}/></div>
    </div>
    <label className="paint-range"><span>Alpha {Math.round((opacity ?? 1) * 100)}%</span><input type="range" min="0" max="1" step=".01" value={opacity ?? 1} onChange={event => onChange({ color: normalizeHex(color), opacity: Number(event.target.value) })}/></label>
  </div>;
}

function GradientStops({ paint, onChange, palette }) {
  const stops = paint.stops || defaultGradientStops();
  const updateStop = (index, patch) => onChange({ ...paint, stops: stops.map((stop, stopIndex) => stopIndex === index ? { ...stop, ...patch } : stop) });
  const removeStop = index => {
    if (stops.length <= 2) return;
    onChange({ ...paint, stops: stops.filter((_, stopIndex) => stopIndex !== index) });
  };
  const addStop = () => {
    const ordered = [...stops].sort((a, b) => a.offset - b.offset);
    let best = { gap: -1, index: 0 };
    for (let index = 0; index < ordered.length - 1; index++) {
      const gap = ordered[index + 1].offset - ordered[index].offset;
      if (gap > best.gap) best = { gap, index };
    }
    const first = ordered[best.index], second = ordered[best.index + 1];
    onChange({ ...paint, stops: [...stops, { offset: (first.offset + second.offset) / 2, color: first.color, opacity: (first.opacity + second.opacity) / 2 }].sort((a, b) => a.offset - b.offset) });
  };
  const reverse = () => onChange({ ...paint, stops: stops.map(stop => ({ ...stop, offset: 1 - stop.offset })).sort((a, b) => a.offset - b.offset) });
  return <div className="gradient-editor">
    <div className="gradient-track" style={{ background: paintToCss(paint) }}>{stops.map((stop, index) => <button type="button" key={`${index}-${stop.offset}`} style={{ left: `${stop.offset * 100}%`, background: stop.color }} title={`${Math.round(stop.offset * 100)}%`} onClick={() => {}}/>)}</div>
    <div className="paint-inline-actions"><button type="button" onClick={addStop}><Plus size={14}/>Add stop</button><button type="button" onClick={reverse}><RotateCw size={14}/>Reverse</button></div>
    {stops.map((stop, index) => <div className="gradient-stop-card" key={index}>
      <ColorAlphaControl label={`Stop ${index + 1}`} color={stop.color} opacity={stop.opacity} palette={palette} onChange={value => updateStop(index, value)}/>
      <div className="gradient-stop-position"><label><span>Position</span><input type="range" min="0" max="1" step=".01" value={stop.offset} onChange={event => updateStop(index, { offset: Number(event.target.value) })}/></label><b>{Math.round(stop.offset * 100)}%</b><button type="button" title="Remove stop" disabled={stops.length <= 2} onClick={() => removeStop(index)}><Trash2 size={14}/></button></div>
    </div>)}
  </div>;
}

export default function PaintEditor({ label = 'Fill', paint, onChange, allowNone = true, palette = [] }) {
  const value = useMemo(() => normalizePaint(paint), [paint]);
  const changeType = type => {
    if (type === 'none') onChange({ type: 'none' });
    else if (type === 'solid') onChange({ type: 'solid', color: value.type === 'solid' ? value.color : '#4f46e5', opacity: value.type === 'solid' ? value.opacity : 1 });
    else if (type === 'linear') onChange({ type: 'linear', angle: value.angle || 0, stops: value.stops || defaultGradientStops() });
    else if (type === 'radial') onChange({ type: 'radial', centerX: .5, centerY: .5, radius: .7, stops: value.stops || defaultGradientStops() });
    else onChange({ type: 'pattern', pattern: 'stripes', foreground: '#4f46e5', background: '#ffffff', foregroundOpacity: 1, backgroundOpacity: 1, scale: 24, spacing: 12, lineWidth: 4, angle: 45 });
  };
  return <div className="paint-editor">
    <div className="paint-editor-heading"><strong>{label}</strong><span className="paint-preview" style={{ background: paintToCss(value) }}/></div>
    <select value={value.type} onChange={event => changeType(event.target.value)}>
      {allowNone && <option value="none">None / transparent</option>}
      <option value="solid">Solid</option><option value="linear">Linear gradient</option><option value="radial">Radial gradient</option><option value="pattern">Pattern</option>
    </select>
    <details className="gradient-preset-library">
      <summary>Gradient presets ({GRADIENT_PRESETS.length})</summary>
      <div className="filter-presets">{GRADIENT_PRESETS.slice(0, 24).map(preset => <button key={preset.id} onClick={() => onChange(preset.paint)}><span style={{ display:'inline-block', width:16, height:16, borderRadius:4, background: paintToCss(preset.paint), marginRight:4 }}/>{preset.name}</button>)}</div>
    </details>
    {value.type === 'solid' && <ColorAlphaControl color={value.color} opacity={value.opacity} palette={palette} onChange={next => onChange({ ...value, ...next })}/>}
    {['linear', 'radial'].includes(value.type) && <>
      {value.type === 'linear' && <label className="paint-range"><span>Angle {Math.round(value.angle)}°</span><input type="range" min="-180" max="180" step="1" value={value.angle} onChange={event => onChange({ ...value, angle: Number(event.target.value) })}/></label>}
      {value.type === 'radial' && <div className="field-grid"><label className="compact-field"><span>Centre X</span><input type="number" min="0" max="100" value={Math.round(value.centerX * 100)} onChange={event => onChange({ ...value, centerX: Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(event.target.value) / 100)) })}/></label><label className="compact-field"><span>Centre Y</span><input type="number" min="0" max="100" value={Math.round(value.centerY * 100)} onChange={event => onChange({ ...value, centerY: Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(event.target.value) / 100)) })}/></label><label className="compact-field"><span>Radius</span><input type="number" min="5" max="200" value={Math.round(value.radius * 100)} onChange={event => onChange({ ...value, radius: Math.max(.05, Math.min(2, Number(event.target.value) / 100)) })}/></label></div>}
      <GradientStops paint={value} palette={palette} onChange={onChange}/>
    </>}
    {value.type === 'pattern' && <>
      <label className="compact-field"><span>Pattern</span><select value={value.pattern} onChange={event => onChange({ ...value, pattern: event.target.value })}>{PATTERN_TYPES.map(([id, name]) => <option key={id} value={id}>{name}</option>)}</select></label>
      <ColorAlphaControl label="Foreground" color={value.foreground} opacity={value.foregroundOpacity} palette={palette} onChange={next => onChange({ ...value, foreground: next.color, foregroundOpacity: next.opacity })}/>
      <ColorAlphaControl label="Background" color={value.background} opacity={value.backgroundOpacity} palette={palette} onChange={next => onChange({ ...value, background: next.color, backgroundOpacity: next.opacity })}/>
      <label className="paint-range"><span>Scale {Math.round(value.scale)}px</span><input type="range" min="6" max="160" value={value.scale} onChange={event => onChange({ ...value, scale: Number(event.target.value) })}/></label>
      <label className="paint-range"><span>Spacing {Math.round(value.spacing)}px</span><input type="range" min="2" max="100" value={value.spacing} onChange={event => onChange({ ...value, spacing: Number(event.target.value) })}/></label>
      <label className="paint-range"><span>Line / dot size {Math.round(value.lineWidth)}px</span><input type="range" min="1" max="40" value={value.lineWidth} onChange={event => onChange({ ...value, lineWidth: Number(event.target.value) })}/></label>
      {['stripes', 'crosshatch', 'zigzag'].includes(value.pattern) && <label className="paint-range"><span>Angle {Math.round(value.angle)}°</span><input type="range" min="-180" max="180" value={value.angle} onChange={event => onChange({ ...value, angle: Number(event.target.value) })}/></label>}
    </>}
  </div>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/PresetBrowser.jsx (2026-07-05 23:08:57) =====
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { Check, Download, Heart, Plus, Search, Trash2, Upload, X } from 'lucide-react';
import {
  colorWithOpacity, normalizeAppearance, paintToCss
} from '../lib/appearance.js';
import { APP_SLUG, readMigratedStorage, writeStorage } from '../lib/appMeta.js';

const FAVOURITES_KEY = 'presetFavourites';
const RECENTS_KEY = 'presetRecents';

const readIds = key => {
  try {
    const value = JSON.parse(readMigratedStorage(key, '[]') || '[]');
    return Array.isArray(value) ? value.filter(Boolean).slice(0, 30) : [];
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
};

const writeIds = (key, ids) => writeStorage(key, JSON.stringify(ids));

function previewStyle(appearance) {
  const value = normalizeAppearance({ appearance });
  const stroke = value.stroke;
  const shadow = value.shadow;
  return {
    background: paintToCss(value.fill, '#f8fafc'),
    borderColor: stroke.enabled ? colorWithOpacity(stroke.color, stroke.opacity) : 'transparent',
    borderWidth: stroke.enabled ? `${Math.max(1, Math.min(8, stroke.width))}px` : '1px',
    borderStyle: stroke.enabled && stroke.style !== 'solid' ? (stroke.style === 'dotted' ? 'dotted' : 'dashed') : 'solid',
    boxShadow: shadow.enabled
      ? `${Math.max(-16, Math.min(16, shadow.offsetX))}px ${Math.max(-16, Math.min(16, shadow.offsetY))}px ${Math.max(0, Math.min(36, shadow.blur))}px ${colorWithOpacity(shadow.color, shadow.opacity)}`
      : '0 10px 28px rgba(15, 23, 42, .08)',
    mixBlendMode: value.blendMode === 'source-over' ? 'normal' : value.blendMode
  };
}

function PresetCard({ preset, favourite, onFavourite, onApply, onDelete }) {
  return <article className="preset-browser-card">
    <button
      type="button"
      className="preset-browser-card-main"
      onClick={() => onApply(preset)}
      title={`Apply ${preset.name}`}
    >
      <span className="preset-browser-preview-wrap">
        <span className="preset-browser-preview-grid"/>
        <span className="preset-browser-preview" style={previewStyle(preset.appearance)}>
          <span className="preset-browser-preview-title">Aa</span>
          <span className="preset-browser-preview-pill"/>
        </span>
        <span className="preset-browser-apply"><Check size={14}/>Apply</span>
      </span>
      <span className="preset-browser-card-copy">
        <strong>{preset.name}</strong>
        <small>{preset.category || 'Featured'}</small>
      </span>
    </button>
    <button
      type="button"
      className={`preset-browser-favourite ${favourite ? 'active' : ''}`}
      aria-label={favourite ? `Remove ${preset.name} from favourites` : `Add ${preset.name} to favourites`}
      title={favourite ? 'Remove from favourites' : 'Add to favourites'}
      onClick={() => onFavourite(preset.id)}
    ><Heart size={16} fill={favourite ? 'currentColor' : 'none'}/></button>
    {preset.custom && <button
      type="button"
      className="preset-browser-delete"
      aria-label={`Delete ${preset.name}`}
      title="Delete custom preset"
      onClick={() => onDelete(preset.id)}
    ><Trash2 size={15}/></button>}
  </article>;
}

export default function PresetBrowser({ presets, currentAppearance, onApply, onSave, onImport, onDelete, onClose }) {
  const searchRef = useRef(null);
  const importRef = useRef(null);
  const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
  const [category, setCategory] = useState('all');
  const [scope, setScope] = useState('all');
  const [favourites, setFavourites] = useState(() => readIds(FAVOURITES_KEY));
  const [recents, setRecents] = useState(() => readIds(RECENTS_KEY));
  const [saveOpen, setSaveOpen] = useState(false);
  const [saveName, setSaveName] = useState('');
  const [importError, setImportError] = useState('');

  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => searchRef.current?.focus(), 40);
    const onKeyDown = event => event.key === 'Escape' && onClose();
    window.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown);
    return () => {
      clearTimeout(timer);
      window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown);
    };
  }, [onClose]);

  const categories = useMemo(() => [...new Set(presets.map(preset => preset.category || 'Featured'))].sort(), [presets]);
  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    const normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();
    return presets.filter(preset => {
      if (category !== 'all' && (preset.category || 'Featured') !== category) return false;
      if (scope === 'favourites' && !favourites.includes(preset.id)) return false;
      if (scope === 'recent' && !recents.includes(preset.id)) return false;
      if (!normalizedQuery) return true;
      return `${preset.name} ${preset.category || ''}`.toLowerCase().includes(normalizedQuery);
    }).sort((a, b) => {
      if (scope === 'recent') return recents.indexOf(a.id) - recents.indexOf(b.id);
      return Number(!!b.custom) - Number(!!a.custom) || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
    });
  }, [presets, category, scope, favourites, recents, query]);

  const toggleFavourite = id => {
    const next = favourites.includes(id) ? favourites.filter(item => item !== id) : [id, ...favourites];
    setFavourites(next);
    writeIds(FAVOURITES_KEY, next);
  };

  const apply = preset => {
    const next = [preset.id, ...recents.filter(id => id !== preset.id)].slice(0, 20);
    setRecents(next);
    writeIds(RECENTS_KEY, next);
    onApply(preset.appearance);
  };

  const saveCurrent = () => {
    const name = saveName.trim();
    if (!name) return;
    onSave(name, currentAppearance);
    setSaveName('');
    setSaveOpen(false);
  };

  const importFile = async event => {
    const file = event.target.files?.[0];
    event.target.value = '';
    if (!file) return;
    setImportError('');
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(await file.text());
      const source = Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : parsed?.presets;
      if (!Array.isArray(source)) throw new Error('The file does not contain a presets array.');
      const imported = source.filter(item => item && typeof item.name === 'string' && item.appearance && typeof item.appearance === 'object');
      if (!imported.length) throw new Error('No valid appearance presets were found.');
      onImport(imported);
    } catch (error) {
      setImportError(error.message || 'The preset file could not be imported.');
    }
  };

  const customPresets = presets.filter(preset => preset.custom);
  const exportPresets = () => {
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify({ schemaVersion: 1, presets: customPresets.map(({ id, name, category, appearance }) => ({ id, name, category, appearance })) }, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const anchor = document.createElement('a');
    anchor.href = url;
    anchor.download = `${APP_SLUG}-appearance-presets.json`;
    anchor.click();
    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
  };

  return <div className="preset-browser-backdrop" onMouseDown={event => event.target === event.currentTarget && onClose()}>
    <section className="preset-browser" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="preset-browser-title">
      <header className="preset-browser-header">
        <div>
          <h2 id="preset-browser-title">Appearance presets</h2>
          <p>Apply a reusable fill, border, shadow, and blend-mode combination.</p>
        </div>
        <button type="button" className="preset-browser-close" aria-label="Close preset browser" onClick={onClose}><X size={20}/></button>
      </header>

      <div className="preset-browser-controls">
        <label className="preset-browser-search"><Search size={19}/><input ref={searchRef} value={query} onChange={event => setQuery(event.target.value)} placeholder="Search presets"/></label>
        <select value={category} onChange={event => setCategory(event.target.value)} aria-label="Filter by category">
          <option value="all">All categories</option>
          {categories.map(value => <option key={value} value={value}>{value}</option>)}
        </select>
        <div className="preset-browser-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Preset filters">
          {[['all', 'All'], ['favourites', 'Favourites'], ['recent', 'Recent']].map(([id, label]) => <button key={id} type="button" role="tab" aria-selected={scope === id} className={scope === id ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => setScope(id)}>{label}</button>)}
        </div>
        <span className="preset-browser-count">{filtered.length} {filtered.length === 1 ? 'preset' : 'presets'}</span>
      </div>

      <div className="preset-browser-content">
        {filtered.length ? <div className="preset-browser-grid">{filtered.map(preset => <PresetCard
          key={preset.id}
          preset={preset}
          favourite={favourites.includes(preset.id)}
          onFavourite={toggleFavourite}
          onApply={apply}
          onDelete={onDelete}
        />)}</div> : <div className="preset-browser-empty">
          <span><Search size={26}/></span>
          <h3>No matching presets</h3>
          <p>Try another search, category, or preset filter.</p>
          <button type="button" onClick={() => { setQuery(''); setCategory('all'); setScope('all'); }}>Clear filters</button>
        </div>}
      </div>

      <footer className="preset-browser-footer">
        <div className="preset-browser-footer-primary">
          {!saveOpen ? <button type="button" onClick={() => setSaveOpen(true)}><Plus size={17}/>Save current</button> : <div className="preset-browser-save-form">
            <input autoFocus value={saveName} onChange={event => setSaveName(event.target.value)} onKeyDown={event => { if (event.key === 'Enter') saveCurrent(); if (event.key === 'Escape') setSaveOpen(false); }} placeholder="Preset name"/>
            <button type="button" className="primary" disabled={!saveName.trim()} onClick={saveCurrent}>Save</button>
            <button type="button" onClick={() => { setSaveOpen(false); setSaveName(''); }}>Cancel</button>
          </div>}
          {importError && <span className="preset-browser-error">{importError}</span>}
        </div>
        <div className="preset-browser-footer-actions">
          <button type="button" onClick={() => importRef.current?.click()}><Upload size={17}/>Import</button>
          <button type="button" disabled={!customPresets.length} onClick={exportPresets}><Download size={17}/>Export</button>
          <input ref={importRef} hidden type="file" accept="application/json,.json" onChange={importFile}/>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </section>
  </div>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/PreviewCanvas.jsx (2026-07-15 18:01:25) =====
import React, { useEffect, useLayoutEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { StaticCanvas } from 'fabric';
import { elementToObject, paintToFabric } from '../lib/fabricAdapter.js';
import { ensureFontsLoaded } from '../lib/fonts.js';

const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));

export default function PreviewCanvas({ document, pageIndex = 0, showReference = false, referenceMode = null, referenceOpacity = null, referenceSplit = null, compact = false }) {
  const hostRef = useRef(null);
  const canvasRef = useRef(null);
  const [scale, setScale] = useState(.5);
  const page = document?.pages?.[pageIndex] || document?.pages?.[0];

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    const host = hostRef.current;
    if (!host || !document) return;
    const update = () => {
      const rect = host.getBoundingClientRect();
      const inset = compact ? 8 : 28;
      const availableWidth = compact ? Math.max(1, rect.width - inset) : Math.max(180, rect.width - inset);
      const availableHeight = compact ? Math.max(1, rect.height - inset) : Math.max(240, rect.height - inset);
      setScale(clamp(Math.min(availableWidth / document.width, availableHeight / document.height), compact ? .01 : .08, 1));
    };
    update();
    const observer = new ResizeObserver(update);
    observer.observe(host);
    return () => observer.disconnect();
  }, [document?.width, document?.height, compact]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!canvasRef.current || !document || !page) return;
    let cancelled = false;
    const canvas = new StaticCanvas(canvasRef.current, {
      selection: false,
      renderOnAddRemove: false,
      enableRetinaScaling: false
    });
    const render = async () => {
      const fonts = (page.elements || []).flatMap(element => element.type === 'text'
        ? [element.fontFamily]
        : ['chart', 'table'].includes(element.type) ? [element.options?.fontFamily] : []).filter(Boolean);
      await ensureFontsLoaded(fonts);
      if (cancelled) return;
      canvas.setDimensions({
        width: Math.max(1, Math.round(document.width * scale)),
        height: Math.max(1, Math.round(document.height * scale))
      });
      canvas.setZoom(scale);
      canvas.backgroundColor = page.transparentBackground
        ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0)'
        : paintToFabric(page.backgroundPaint ?? page.background, document.width, document.height, '#ffffff');
      for (const element of [...(page.elements || [])].sort((a, b) => (a.zIndex || 0) - (b.zIndex || 0))) {
        if (cancelled || element.hidden) continue;
        try {
          const object = await elementToObject(element);
          object.set({ selectable: false, evented: false, hasControls: false, hasBorders: false });
          canvas.add(object);
        } catch (error) {
          console.error('Failed to render preview element', element, error);
        }
      }
      canvas.requestRenderAll();
    };
    render();
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
      canvas.dispose();
    };
  }, [document, pageIndex, page, scale]);

  if (!document || !page) return <div className="ai-preview-empty">No preview is available.</div>;
  const reference = page.referenceImage;
  const mode = referenceMode || reference?.mode || 'overlay';
  const opacity = referenceOpacity ?? reference?.opacity ?? .45;
  const split = referenceSplit ?? reference?.split ?? .5;
  const referenceStyle = reference ? {
    opacity,
    objectFit: reference.fit === 'stretch' ? 'fill' : (reference.fit || 'contain'),
    mixBlendMode: mode === 'difference' ? 'difference' : 'normal',
    clipPath: mode === 'split' ? `inset(0 ${Math.max(0, 100 - split * 100)}% 0 0)` : 'none'
  } : null;
  return <div ref={hostRef} className={`ai-preview-canvas-host ${compact ? 'compact' : ''} ${page.transparentBackground ? 'transparent' : ''}`}>
    <div className="ai-preview-canvas-frame" style={{ width: document.width * scale, height: document.height * scale }}>
      <canvas ref={canvasRef}/>
      {showReference && reference?.src && <><img className={`ai-preview-reference mode-${mode}`} src={reference.src} alt={reference.name || 'Reference image'} style={referenceStyle}/>{mode === 'split' && <div className="ai-preview-reference-divider" style={{ left: `${split * 100}%` }}/>}</>}
    </div>
  </div>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/PrintPanel.jsx (2026-07-05 19:48:21) =====
import React from 'react';
import { useEditorStore } from '../store.js';

const NumberField = ({ label, value, onChange, min = 0, max = 500 }) => <label className="field"><span>{label}</span><input type="number" min={min} max={max} value={value ?? 0} onChange={event => onChange(Number(event.target.value) || 0)}/></label>;

export default function PrintPanel() {
  const document = useEditorStore(state => state.document);
  const updatePrint = useEditorStore(state => state.updatePrintSettings);
  const print = document.print || {};
  const patchInset = (key, side, value) => updatePrint({ [key]: { ...(print[key] || {}), [side]: value } });
  return <div className="print-panel">
    <div className="field-grid"><label className="field"><span>Colour space</span><select value={print.colorSpace || 'rgb'} onChange={event => updatePrint({ colorSpace: event.target.value })}><option value="rgb">RGB</option><option value="cmyk">CMYK</option><option value="spot">Spot colour</option></select></label><label className="field"><span>PDF preset</span><select value={print.pdfPreset || 'screen'} onChange={event => updatePrint({ pdfPreset: event.target.value })}><option value="screen">Screen</option><option value="print">High-quality print</option><option value="pdf-x-1a">PDF/X-1a</option><option value="pdf-x-3">PDF/X-3</option><option value="pdf-x-4">PDF/X-4</option></select></label></div>
    <label className="field"><span>ICC profile</span><input value={print.iccProfile || ''} onChange={event => updatePrint({ iccProfile: event.target.value })}/></label>
    <h4 className="panel-subheading">Bleed</h4><div className="field-grid four">{['top','right','bottom','left'].map(side => <NumberField key={side} label={side} value={print.bleed?.[side]} onChange={value => patchInset('bleed', side, value)}/>)}</div>
    <h4 className="panel-subheading">Safe area</h4><div className="field-grid four">{['top','right','bottom','left'].map(side => <NumberField key={side} label={side} value={print.safeArea?.[side]} onChange={value => patchInset('safeArea', side, value)}/>)}</div>
    <h4 className="panel-subheading">Slug</h4><div className="field-grid four">{['top','right','bottom','left'].map(side => <NumberField key={side} label={side} value={print.slug?.[side]} onChange={value => patchInset('slug', side, value)}/>)}</div>
    <div className="print-checks"><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!print.marks?.crop} onChange={event => updatePrint({ marks: { ...(print.marks || {}), crop: event.target.checked } })}/>Crop marks</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!print.marks?.registration} onChange={event => updatePrint({ marks: { ...(print.marks || {}), registration: event.target.checked } })}/>Registration marks</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!print.marks?.colorBars} onChange={event => updatePrint({ marks: { ...(print.marks || {}), colorBars: event.target.checked } })}/>Colour bars</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!print.marks?.pageInformation} onChange={event => updatePrint({ marks: { ...(print.marks || {}), pageInformation: event.target.checked } })}/>Page information</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={print.embedFonts !== false} onChange={event => updatePrint({ embedFonts: event.target.checked })}/>Embed fonts</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!print.outlineFonts} onChange={event => updatePrint({ outlineFonts: event.target.checked })}/>Outline fonts</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!print.flattenTransparency} onChange={event => updatePrint({ flattenTransparency: event.target.checked })}/>Flatten transparency</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!print.overprintPreview} onChange={event => updatePrint({ overprintPreview: event.target.checked })}/>Overprint preview</label></div>
    <NumberField label="Minimum effective image DPI" min={36} max={2400} value={print.minimumEffectiveDpi || 150} onChange={minimumEffectiveDpi => updatePrint({ minimumEffectiveDpi })}/>
  </div>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/PrintSheetDialog.jsx (2026-07-16 03:32:23) =====
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { AlertTriangle, Printer } from 'lucide-react';
import Modal from './Modal.jsx';
import { useEditorStore } from '../store.js';
import { pageToSvg } from '../lib/exportFormats.js';
import { buildImpositionPlan, defaultImpositionConfig, documentSizeInches, PRODUCT_PRESETS, SHEET_PRESETS } from '../lib/printLayout.js';

const STORAGE_KEY = 'design-commons-print-sheet-v3';
const Field = ({ label, children }) => <label className="field"><span>{label}</span>{children}</label>;
const NumberField = ({ label, value, onChange, min = 0, max = 100, step = .01 }) => <Field label={label}><input type="number" min={min} max={max} step={step} value={value} onChange={event => onChange(Number(event.target.value))}/></Field>;

function loadInitial(document, pageIndex) {
  const defaults = defaultImpositionConfig(document, pageIndex);
  try { return { ...defaults, ...JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || '{}'), pageIndexes: [pageIndex] }; }
  catch { return defaults; }
}

function trimPreview(source) {
  if (!source || !globalThis.document) return Promise.resolve(source);
  return new Promise(resolve => {
    const image = new Image();
    image.onload = () => {
      const canvas = globalThis.document.createElement('canvas');
      canvas.width = image.naturalWidth; canvas.height = image.naturalHeight;
      const context = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
      context.drawImage(image, 0, 0);
      const { width, height } = canvas;
      const pixels = context.getImageData(0, 0, width, height).data;
      const cornerIndexes = [0, (width - 1) * 4, (height - 1) * width * 4, (width * height - 1) * 4];
      const background = [0, 1, 2, 3].map(channel => cornerIndexes.reduce((sum, index) => sum + pixels[index + channel], 0) / cornerIndexes.length);
      let left = width, top = height, right = -1, bottom = -1;
      for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
        const index = (y * width + x) * 4;
        const difference = Math.abs(pixels[index] - background[0]) + Math.abs(pixels[index + 1] - background[1]) + Math.abs(pixels[index + 2] - background[2]) + Math.abs(pixels[index + 3] - background[3]);
        if (difference > 60) { left = Math.min(left, x); top = Math.min(top, y); right = Math.max(right, x); bottom = Math.max(bottom, y); }
      }
      if (right < left || bottom < top || (right - left > width * .98 && bottom - top > height * .98)) return resolve(source);
      const padding = 2;
      left = Math.max(0, left - padding); top = Math.max(0, top - padding);
      right = Math.min(width - 1, right + padding); bottom = Math.min(height - 1, bottom + padding);
      const output = globalThis.document.createElement('canvas');
      output.width = right - left + 1; output.height = bottom - top + 1;
      output.getContext('2d').drawImage(canvas, left, top, output.width, output.height, 0, 0, output.width, output.height);
      resolve(output.toDataURL('image/png'));
    };
    image.onerror = () => resolve(source);
    image.src = source;
  });
}

export default function PrintSheetDialog({ onClose, onExport, busy = false, currentPreview = '' }) {
  const document = useEditorStore(state => state.document);
  const pageIndex = useEditorStore(state => state.pageIndex);
  const [config, setConfig] = useState(() => loadInitial(document, pageIndex));
  const [preview, setPreview] = useState(currentPreview);
  const plan = useMemo(() => buildImpositionPlan(document, config, pageIndex), [document, config, pageIndex]);
  const sourceSize = documentSizeInches(document);
  const sourceAspectRatio = sourceSize.widthIn / sourceSize.heightIn;
  const patch = values => setConfig(current => ({ ...current, ...values }));
  const patchMargins = values => setConfig(current => ({ ...current, margins: { ...current.margins, ...values } }));
  const patchMarks = values => setConfig(current => ({ ...current, marks: { ...current.marks, ...values } }));
  const patchDuplex = values => setConfig(current => ({ ...current, duplex: { ...current.duplex, ...values } }));
  useEffect(() => {
    let active = true;
    if (!config.trimWhitespace) setPreview(currentPreview);
    else trimPreview(currentPreview).then(result => { if (active) setPreview(result); });
    return () => { active = false; };
  }, [currentPreview, config.trimWhitespace]);
  const pageSvgs = useMemo(() => (document.pages || []).map((_page, index) => index === pageIndex && preview ? `url("${preview}")` : `url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,${encodeURIComponent(pageToSvg(document, index))}")`), [document, pageIndex, preview]);
  const shownSides = plan.sides.slice(0, 2);

  const selectSheet = presetId => {
    const preset = SHEET_PRESETS.find(item => item.id === presetId) || SHEET_PRESETS[0];
    patch({ sheetPreset: preset.id, sheetWidthIn: preset.widthIn, sheetHeightIn: preset.heightIn });
  };
  const selectProduct = presetId => {
    const preset = PRODUCT_PRESETS.find(item => item.id === presetId) || PRODUCT_PRESETS[0];
    const itemWidthIn = preset.widthIn || sourceSize.widthIn;
    patch({ itemPreset: preset.id, itemWidthIn, itemHeightIn: config.preserveAspectRatio !== false ? itemWidthIn / sourceAspectRatio : preset.heightIn || sourceSize.heightIn });
  };
  const setItemWidth = itemWidthIn => patch({ itemPreset: 'custom', itemWidthIn, ...(config.preserveAspectRatio !== false ? { itemHeightIn: itemWidthIn / sourceAspectRatio } : {}) });
  const setItemHeight = itemHeightIn => patch({ itemPreset: 'custom', itemHeightIn, ...(config.preserveAspectRatio !== false ? { itemWidthIn: itemHeightIn * sourceAspectRatio } : {}) });
  const setPreserveAspectRatio = preserveAspectRatio => patch({ preserveAspectRatio, ...(preserveAspectRatio ? { itemHeightIn: config.itemWidthIn / sourceAspectRatio } : {}) });
  const togglePage = index => {
    const selected = new Set(config.pageIndexes || []);
    if (selected.has(index)) selected.delete(index); else selected.add(index);
    patch({ pageIndexes: [...selected].sort((a, b) => a - b) });
  };
  const submit = () => {
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(plan.config));
    onExport(plan.config);
  };

  return <Modal title="Print sheet" onClose={onClose} wide className="print-sheet-modal">
    <div className="print-sheet-workspace">
      <section className="print-sheet-controls">
        <div className="print-sheet-intro"><Printer size={18}/><div><strong>Arrange designs for printing</strong><small>The original design stays editable and unchanged.</small></div></div>

        <h3>Content</h3>
        <Field label="Designs to place"><select value={config.contentMode} disabled={config.duplex?.enabled} onChange={event => patch({ contentMode: event.target.value })}><option value="repeat-current">Repeat current page</option><option value="selected-pages">Selected pages</option><option value="all-pages">All design pages</option></select></Field>
        {config.contentMode === 'selected-pages' && !config.duplex?.enabled && <div className="print-sheet-page-list">{document.pages.map((page, index) => <label key={page.id || index}><input type="checkbox" checked={(config.pageIndexes || []).includes(index)} onChange={() => togglePage(index)}/><span>{page.name || `Page ${index + 1}`}</span></label>)}</div>}
        <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={config.quantityMode !== 'exact'} onChange={event => patch({ quantityMode: event.target.checked ? 'fill-sheet' : 'exact' })}/>Fill every available slot automatically</label>
        {config.quantityMode !== 'exact'
          ? <NumberField label="Number of sheets" min={1} max={1000} step={1} value={config.sheetCount || 1} onChange={sheetCount => patch({ sheetCount })}/>
          : <NumberField label="Quantity" min={1} max={10000} step={1} value={config.quantity} onChange={quantity => patch({ quantity })}/>}

        <h3>Item</h3>
        <Field label="Product size"><select value={config.itemPreset} onChange={event => selectProduct(event.target.value)}>{PRODUCT_PRESETS.map(item => <option key={item.id} value={item.id}>{item.label}</option>)}</select></Field>
        <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Width (in)" min={.05} max={100} value={config.itemWidthIn} onChange={setItemWidth}/><NumberField label="Height (in)" min={.05} max={100} value={config.itemHeightIn} onChange={setItemHeight}/></div>
        <label className="check print-sheet-aspect-lock"><input type="checkbox" checked={config.preserveAspectRatio !== false} onChange={event => setPreserveAspectRatio(event.target.checked)}/>Preserve design aspect ratio</label>
        <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={config.trimWhitespace !== false} onChange={event => patch({ trimWhitespace: event.target.checked })}/>Trim empty canvas space</label>
        <small className="print-sheet-source-size">Design canvas: {sourceSize.widthIn.toFixed(3)} × {sourceSize.heightIn.toFixed(3)} in · {sourceAspectRatio.toFixed(3)}:1 · {sourceSize.dpi} DPI</small>

        <h3>Sheet</h3>
        <div className="field-grid"><Field label="Paper"><select value={config.sheetPreset} onChange={event => selectSheet(event.target.value)}>{SHEET_PRESETS.map(item => <option key={item.id} value={item.id}>{item.label}</option>)}</select></Field><Field label="Orientation"><select value={config.orientation} onChange={event => patch({ orientation: event.target.value })}><option value="portrait">Portrait</option><option value="landscape">Landscape</option></select></Field></div>
        {config.sheetPreset === 'custom' && <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Sheet width (in)" min={.5} value={config.sheetWidthIn} onChange={sheetWidthIn => patch({ sheetWidthIn })}/><NumberField label="Sheet height (in)" min={.5} value={config.sheetHeightIn} onChange={sheetHeightIn => patch({ sheetHeightIn })}/></div>}
        <div className="print-sheet-spacing-heading"><span>Margins and gaps (in)</span><button type="button" className="mini" onClick={() => patch({ margins: { topIn: 0, rightIn: 0, bottomIn: 0, leftIn: 0 }, horizontalGapIn: 0, verticalGapIn: 0, layoutMode: 'auto', alignment: 'start', marks: { crop: false, outlines: true } })}>Minimum spacing</button></div>
        <div className="print-sheet-insets"><NumberField label="Top" value={config.margins?.topIn} onChange={topIn => patchMargins({ topIn })}/><NumberField label="Right" value={config.margins?.rightIn} onChange={rightIn => patchMargins({ rightIn })}/><NumberField label="Bottom" value={config.margins?.bottomIn} onChange={bottomIn => patchMargins({ bottomIn })}/><NumberField label="Left" value={config.margins?.leftIn} onChange={leftIn => patchMargins({ leftIn })}/></div>
        <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Horizontal gap (in)" value={config.horizontalGapIn} onChange={horizontalGapIn => patch({ horizontalGapIn })}/><NumberField label="Vertical gap (in)" value={config.verticalGapIn} onChange={verticalGapIn => patch({ verticalGapIn })}/></div>
        <div className="field-grid"><Field label="Layout"><select value={config.layoutMode} onChange={event => patch({ layoutMode: event.target.value })}><option value="auto">Fit automatically</option><option value="manual">Set rows and columns</option></select></Field><Field label="Alignment"><select value={config.alignment} onChange={event => patch({ alignment: event.target.value })}><option value="start">Top / left</option><option value="center">Centre</option><option value="end">Bottom / right</option></select></Field></div>
        {config.layoutMode === 'manual' && <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Columns" min={1} max={100} step={1} value={config.columns} onChange={columns => patch({ columns })}/><NumberField label="Rows" min={1} max={100} step={1} value={config.rows} onChange={rows => patch({ rows })}/></div>}

        <h3>Production</h3>
        <div className="print-sheet-checks"><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={config.marks?.crop !== false} onChange={event => patchMarks({ crop: event.target.checked })}/>Crop marks</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!config.marks?.outlines} onChange={event => patchMarks({ outlines: event.target.checked })}/>Item outlines</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!config.duplex?.enabled} disabled={document.pages.length < 2} onChange={event => patchDuplex({ enabled: event.target.checked })}/>Double-sided</label></div>
        {config.duplex?.enabled && <><div className="field-grid"><Field label="Front"><select value={config.duplex.frontPageIndex} onChange={event => patchDuplex({ frontPageIndex: Number(event.target.value) })}>{document.pages.map((page, index) => <option key={page.id || index} value={index}>{page.name || `Page ${index + 1}`}</option>)}</select></Field><Field label="Back"><select value={config.duplex.backPageIndex} onChange={event => patchDuplex({ backPageIndex: Number(event.target.value) })}>{document.pages.map((page, index) => <option key={page.id || index} value={index}>{page.name || `Page ${index + 1}`}</option>)}</select></Field></div><Field label="Printer flip"><select value={config.duplex.flip} onChange={event => patchDuplex({ flip: event.target.value })}><option value="long-edge">Long edge</option><option value="short-edge">Short edge</option></select></Field></>}
        <Field label="Output quality"><select value={config.outputDpi} onChange={event => patch({ outputDpi: Number(event.target.value) })}><option value="150">150 DPI · draft</option><option value="300">300 DPI · print</option><option value="600">600 DPI · maximum</option></select></Field>
      </section>

      <section className="print-sheet-preview-panel">
        <header><div><strong>{plan.perSheet || 0} per sheet</strong><small>{plan.physicalSheets} physical sheet{plan.physicalSheets === 1 ? '' : 's'} · {plan.rows} × {plan.columns}</small></div><span>{plan.config.sheetWidthIn.toFixed(2)} × {plan.config.sheetHeightIn.toFixed(2)} in</span></header>
        {plan.warnings.map(warning => <div className="print-sheet-warning" key={warning}><AlertTriangle size={15}/>{warning}</div>)}
        <div className="print-sheet-previews">{shownSides.map(side => <div key={`${side.sheetIndex}-${side.side}`} className="print-sheet-preview-wrap"><small>Sheet {side.sheetIndex + 1} · {side.side}</small><div className="print-sheet-paper" style={{ aspectRatio: `${plan.config.sheetWidthIn}/${plan.config.sheetHeightIn}` }}>{side.placements.map(placement => <div key={`${side.side}-${placement.index}`} className={`print-sheet-slot ${config.marks?.outlines ? 'outlined' : ''}`} title={`Design page ${placement.pageIndex + 1}`} style={{ left: `${placement.xIn / plan.config.sheetWidthIn * 100}%`, top: `${placement.yIn / plan.config.sheetHeightIn * 100}%`, width: `${placement.widthIn / plan.config.sheetWidthIn * 100}%`, height: `${placement.heightIn / plan.config.sheetHeightIn * 100}%`, backgroundImage: pageSvgs[placement.pageIndex], backgroundSize: plan.config.preserveAspectRatio ? 'contain' : '100% 100%' }}><span>{placement.index + 1}</span></div>)}</div></div>)}</div>
        {!shownSides.length && <div className="print-sheet-empty">Increase the sheet size or reduce the item size and margins.</div>}
      </section>
    </div>
    <div className="modal-actions"><button onClick={onClose}>Cancel</button><button className="primary" disabled={busy || !plan.perSheet || !!plan.warnings.length} onClick={submit}>{busy ? 'Exporting…' : `Export ${plan.physicalSheets} sheet${plan.physicalSheets === 1 ? '' : 's'} as PDF`}</button></div>
  </Modal>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/ProductDiagnosticsPanel.jsx (2026-07-10 01:53:45) =====
import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { Activity, Download, RotateCcw } from 'lucide-react';
import { analyticsSummary, clearProductEvents, readProductEvents } from '../lib/analytics.js';
import { downloadText } from '../lib/exportFormats.js';

export default function ProductDiagnosticsPanel() {
  const [version, setVersion] = useState(0);
  const summary = useMemo(() => analyticsSummary(), [version]);
  const topEvents = Object.entries(summary.counts || {}).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]).slice(0, 8);
  return <section className="product-diagnostics-panel">
    <div className="section-heading"><div><h3><Activity size={17}/>Product diagnostics</h3><p>Local, privacy-preserving telemetry for performance, AI reliability, collaboration, and editor usage.</p></div><div className="button-row compact"><button onClick={() => downloadText(JSON.stringify({ generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), summary, events: readProductEvents() }, null, 2), 'design-commons-diagnostics.json', 'application/json')}><Download size={14}/>Export</button><button onClick={() => { clearProductEvents(); setVersion(value => value + 1); }}><RotateCcw size={14}/>Clear</button></div></div>
    <div className="diagnostic-summary"><article><span>Recorded events</span><b>{summary.total || 0}</b></article><article><span>Event types</span><b>{Object.keys(summary.counts || {}).length}</b></article><article><span>Last activity</span><b>{summary.latest ? new Date(summary.latest).toLocaleString() : 'None'}</b></article></div>
    {topEvents.length ? <div className="diagnostic-events">{topEvents.map(([name, count]) => <div key={name}><code>{name}</code><b>{count}</b></div>)}</div> : <p className="empty-panel-state">No local diagnostic events have been recorded yet.</p>}
  </section>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/ProfessionalDocumentPanel.jsx (2026-07-10 01:53:51) =====
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { CopyPlus, FileStack, MonitorSmartphone, Plus, RefreshCw, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { useEditorStore } from '../store.js';

const formats = [
  { name: 'Square post', width: 1080, height: 1080 },
  { name: 'Story', width: 1080, height: 1920 },
  { name: 'Presentation', width: 1920, height: 1080 },
  { name: 'Letter', width: 816, height: 1056 },
  { name: 'A4', width: 794, height: 1123 }
];

export default function ProfessionalDocumentPanel() {
  const document = useEditorStore(state => state.document);
  const pageIndex = useEditorStore(state => state.pageIndex);
  const createMaster = useEditorStore(state => state.createMasterFromCurrentPage);
  const applyMaster = useEditorStore(state => state.applyMasterToCurrentPage);
  const updateMaster = useEditorStore(state => state.updateMasterFromCurrentPage);
  const deleteMaster = useEditorStore(state => state.deleteMasterPage);
  const createVariant = useEditorStore(state => state.createResponsiveVariant);
  const switchVariant = useEditorStore(state => state.switchResponsiveVariant);
  const deleteVariant = useEditorStore(state => state.deleteResponsiveVariant);
  const notify = useEditorStore(state => state.notify);
  const [customName, setCustomName] = useState('Campaign variant');
  const [customWidth, setCustomWidth] = useState(document.width);
  const [customHeight, setCustomHeight] = useState(document.height);
  const page = document.pages[pageIndex];

  const makeMaster = () => {
    const name = prompt('Master page name', `Master ${document.masterPages.length + 1}`);
    if (!name) return;
    const master = createMaster(name);
    applyMaster(master.id);
    notify(`Created and applied "${master.name}".`, 'success');
  };

  return <div className="professional-document-panel">
    <section className="professional-feature-card">
      <div className="panel-heading"><div><h4><FileStack size={16}/>Master pages</h4><small>Share headers, footers, backgrounds, and repeating objects across pages.</small></div><button title="Create master from current page" onClick={makeMaster}><Plus size={15}/></button></div>
      <label className="field"><span>Current page master</span><select value={page?.masterPageId || ''} onChange={event => applyMaster(event.target.value || null)}><option value="">No master</option>{document.masterPages.map(master => <option key={master.id} value={master.id}>{master.name}</option>)}</select></label>
      <div className="master-page-list">{document.masterPages.map(master => <article key={master.id} className={page?.masterPageId === master.id ? 'active' : ''}><button onClick={() => applyMaster(master.id)}><span className="master-page-preview">{master.elements.length}</span><span><b>{master.name}</b><small>{master.elements.length} shared object{master.elements.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}</small></span></button><div><button title="Replace master from current page" onClick={() => { updateMaster(master.id); notify(`Updated "${master.name}" and refreshed linked pages.`, 'success'); }}><RefreshCw size={14}/></button><button title="Delete master" className="danger" onClick={() => confirm(`Delete "${master.name}"?`) && deleteMaster(master.id)}><Trash2 size={14}/></button></div></article>)}</div>
    </section>

    <section className="professional-feature-card">
      <div className="panel-heading"><div><h4><MonitorSmartphone size={16}/>Responsive variants</h4><small>Keep linked format versions in the same design.</small></div></div>
      <div className="variant-tabs"><button className={document.activeVariantId === 'primary' ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => switchVariant('primary')}>Primary · {document.width}×{document.height}</button>{document.variants.map(variant => <div key={variant.id}><button className={document.activeVariantId === variant.id ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => switchVariant(variant.id)}>{variant.name} · {variant.width}×{variant.height}</button><button className="danger" title="Delete variant" onClick={() => confirm(`Delete "${variant.name}"?`) && deleteVariant(variant.id)}><Trash2 size={12}/></button></div>)}</div>
      <div className="variant-presets">{formats.map(format => <button key={format.name} onClick={() => { const variant = createVariant(format); notify(`Created ${variant.name}.`, 'success'); }}><CopyPlus size={14}/>{format.name}<small>{format.width}×{format.height}</small></button>)}</div>
      <div className="field-grid"><label className="field"><span>Name</span><input value={customName} onChange={event => setCustomName(event.target.value)}/></label><label className="field"><span>Width</span><input type="number" min="1" value={customWidth} onChange={event => setCustomWidth(Number(event.target.value) || 1)}/></label><label className="field"><span>Height</span><input type="number" min="1" value={customHeight} onChange={event => setCustomHeight(Number(event.target.value) || 1)}/></label></div>
      <button className="full" onClick={() => createVariant({ name: customName || 'Variant', width: customWidth, height: customHeight })}><Plus size={14}/>Create custom variant</button>
      <p className="help">Switching variants saves the current format before loading the target. Use constraints and auto-layout so content adapts cleanly.</p>
    </section>
  </div>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/RightPanel.jsx (2026-07-15 18:03:18) =====
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import {
  AlignCenter, AlignLeft, AlignRight, Bold, ChevronRight, Crop, EyeOff, FlipHorizontal2,
  FlipVertical2, Italic, Link, List, ListOrdered, Lock, Minus, Plus,
  RotateCcw, Share2, Strikethrough, Subscript, Superscript, Underline
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useEditorStore } from '../store.js';
import PaintEditor from './PaintEditor.jsx';
import AppearancePanel from './AppearancePanel.jsx';
import DesignSystemPanel from './DesignSystemPanel.jsx';
import PrintPanel from './PrintPanel.jsx';
import CommonsPublishDialog from './CommonsPublishDialog.jsx';
import AccessibilityPanel from './AccessibilityPanel.jsx';
import ColorPicker from './ColorPicker.jsx';
import { collectDocumentColors, paintPrimaryColor, paintToCss } from '../lib/appearance.js';
import { IMAGE_PRESETS, TEXT_PRESETS, scaleAppearancePreset, scaleImageFilters } from '../lib/presets.js';
