import { FONT_CATEGORIES, ensureFontLoaded, getFontLoadReport } from '../lib/fonts.js';
import { dataUrlToFile } from '../ai/providers.js';
import { inspectSvgMarkup, sanitizeSvgMarkup } from '../lib/svg.js';

const Field = ({ label, children }) => <label className="field"><span>{label}</span>{children}</label>;


function SvgSourceEditor({ element, onApply, notify }) {
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState(element.svg || '');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const inspection = inspectSvgMarkup(draft);
  useEffect(() => { setDraft(element.svg || ''); setError(''); }, [element.id, element.svg]);
  const apply = () => {
    try {
      const svg = sanitizeSvgMarkup(draft);
      onApply({ svg });
      setDraft(svg);
      setError('');
      notify('Custom SVG updated.', 'success');
    } catch (nextError) {
      setError(nextError.message);
    }
  };
  return <>
    <p className="help">Paste a complete SVG document or a single SVG path beginning with M/m. Scripts, event handlers, embedded HTML, and external resources are removed.</p>
    <textarea className="data-editor" rows="12" value={draft} onChange={event => setDraft(event.target.value)} spellCheck="false"/>
    {error && <p className="error">{error}</p>}
    {!error && inspection.issues.length > 0 && <div className="svg-diagnostics">{inspection.issues.map((issue, index) => <small key={index}>{issue}</small>)}</div>}
    <div className="button-row"><button className="primary" onClick={apply}>Apply SVG</button><button onClick={() => setDraft(element.svg || '')}>Reset</button></div>
    <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={element.preserveAspectRatio !== false} onChange={event => onApply({ preserveAspectRatio: event.target.checked })}/>Preserve aspect ratio</label>
  </>;
}

function NumberField({ label, value, onChange, min, max, step = 1, disabled = false }) {
  const format = input => Number.isFinite(input) ? String(Math.round(input * 100) / 100) : '';
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState(format(value));
  const [invalid, setInvalid] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => setDraft(format(value)), [value]);
  const commit = () => {
    if (draft.trim() === '') { setDraft(format(value)); setInvalid(false); return; }
    let next = Number(draft);
    if (!Number.isFinite(next)) { setInvalid(true); return; }
    if (Number.isFinite(min)) next = Math.max(min, next);
    if (Number.isFinite(max)) next = Math.min(max, next);
    setInvalid(false);
    setDraft(format(next));
    onChange(next);
  };
  return <Field label={label}><input className={invalid ? 'invalid' : ''} disabled={disabled} type="number" value={draft} min={min} max={max} step={step} placeholder={Number.isFinite(value) ? '' : 'Mixed'} onChange={event => { setDraft(event.target.value); setInvalid(false); }} onBlur={commit} onKeyDown={event => {
    if (event.key === 'Enter') event.currentTarget.blur();
    if (event.key === 'Escape') { setDraft(format(value)); setInvalid(false); event.currentTarget.blur(); }
  }}/></Field>;
}


function HexField({ value, onChange, disabled = false }) {
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState(value || '#ffffff');
  const [invalid, setInvalid] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => setDraft(value || '#ffffff'), [value]);
  const commit = () => {
    if (/^#[0-9a-f]{6}$/i.test(draft)) { setInvalid(false); onChange(draft); }
    else { setInvalid(true); setDraft(value || '#ffffff'); }
  };
  return <Field label="Hex"><input disabled={disabled} className={invalid ? 'invalid' : ''} value={draft} onChange={event => { setDraft(event.target.value); setInvalid(false); }} onBlur={commit} onKeyDown={event => { if (event.key === 'Enter') event.currentTarget.blur(); if (event.key === 'Escape') { setDraft(value || '#ffffff'); event.currentTarget.blur(); } }}/></Field>;
}
function RangeField({ label, value, onChange, min, max, step }) {
  const begin = useEditorStore(state => state.beginHistoryTransaction);
  const commit = useEditorStore(state => state.commitHistoryTransaction);
  const display = Number.isFinite(value) ? Math.round(value * 100) / 100 : 'Mixed';
  return <Field label={`${label} ${display}`}><input type="range" value={Number.isFinite(value) ? value : min} min={min} max={max} step={step} onPointerDown={begin} onPointerUp={commit} onPointerCancel={commit} onChange={event => onChange(Number(event.target.value))}/></Field>;
}

const InspectorSection = ({ title, children, open = true }) => <details className="inspector-section" open={open}><summary><span>{title}</span><ChevronRight className="inspector-chevron" size={15}/></summary><div className="inspector-section-body">{children}</div></details>;
const commonValue = (items, key, fallback) => {
  if (!items.length) return fallback;
  const first = items[0]?.[key];
  return items.every(item => Object.is(item?.[key], first)) ? first : undefined;
};

export default function RightPanel({ editorRef }) {
  const replaceRef = useRef();
  const [layoutGap, setLayoutGap] = useState(24);
  const [layoutAlign, setLayoutAlign] = useState('center');
  const [imagePresetIntensity, setImagePresetIntensity] = useState(1);
  const [textPresetIntensity, setTextPresetIntensity] = useState(1);
  const [fontReport, setFontReport] = useState(null);
  const [commonsOpen, setCommonsOpen] = useState(false);
  const document = useEditorStore(state => state.document);
  const documentPalette = useMemo(() => collectDocumentColors(document), [document]);
  const assets = useEditorStore(state => state.assets);
  const pageIndex = useEditorStore(state => state.pageIndex);
  const selection = useEditorStore(state => state.selection);
  const updateElements = useEditorStore(state => state.updateElements);
  const updatePage = useEditorStore(state => state.updatePage);
  const commitDocument = useEditorStore(state => state.commitDocument);
  const upload = useEditorStore(state => state.upload);
  const createAutoLayout = useEditorStore(state => state.createAutoLayout);
  const detachAutoLayout = useEditorStore(state => state.detachAutoLayout);
  const magicResize = useEditorStore(state => state.magicResize);
  const save = useEditorStore(state => state.save);
  const role = useEditorStore(state => state.role);
  const notify = useEditorStore(state => state.notify);
  const simplifyVector = useEditorStore(state => state.simplifyVectorSelection);
  const reverseVector = useEditorStore(state => state.reverseVectorSelection);
  const closeVector = useEditorStore(state => state.closeVectorSelection);
  const combineVector = useEditorStore(state => state.combineVectorSelection);
  const page = document?.pages?.[pageIndex];
  const selected = (page?.elements || []).filter(element => selection.includes(element.id));
  const element = selected[0];
  const canEdit = ['owner', 'admin', 'designer'].includes(role);
  const selectedType = selected.length && selected.every(item => item.type === selected[0].type) ? selected[0].type : null;
  const frameLayout = element?.type === 'frame' ? (element.layout || {}) : {};
  const framePadding = typeof frameLayout.padding === 'number'
    ? { top: frameLayout.padding, right: frameLayout.padding, bottom: frameLayout.padding, left: frameLayout.padding }
    : { top: 32, right: 32, bottom: 32, left: 32, ...(frameLayout.padding || {}) };
  const childSizing = element?.layoutSizing || {};
  const patchFrameLayout = next => patchOne({ layout: { ...frameLayout, ...next } });
  const patchFramePadding = next => patchFrameLayout({ padding: { ...framePadding, ...next } });
  const patch = (values, options) => canEdit && selection.length && updateElements(selection, values, options);
  const patchOne = (values, options) => canEdit && element && updateElements([element.id], values, options);
  useEffect(() => {
    if (element?.type !== 'text' || !element.fontFamily) { setFontReport(null); return; }
    let active = true;
    ensureFontLoaded(element.fontFamily).then(report => { if (active) setFontReport(report); });
    return () => { active = false; };
  }, [element?.id, element?.fontFamily]);
  const applyTextPreset = preset => patch(item => {
    const nextAppearance = scaleAppearancePreset(preset.appearance, textPresetIntensity);
    return {
      ...preset.typography,
      appearance: nextAppearance,
      fill: nextAppearance.fill.type === 'none' ? 'transparent' : paintPrimaryColor(nextAppearance.fill, item.fill || '#111827'),
      stroke: nextAppearance.stroke.enabled ? nextAppearance.stroke.color : 'transparent',
      strokeWidth: nextAppearance.stroke.enabled ? nextAppearance.stroke.width : 0,
      effect: { ...(item.effect || {}), shadow: nextAppearance.shadow.enabled ? { ...nextAppearance.shadow } : null }
    };
  });

  const replaceImage = async event => {
    const file = event.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file || element?.type !== 'image') return;
    try {
      const asset = await upload(file);
      patchOne({ src: asset.preview_url || asset.url, assetId: asset.id, nativeWidth: asset.width || 1000, nativeHeight: asset.height || 1000, cropX: null, cropY: null, cropZoom: 1 });
    } catch (error) {
      notify(`Image replacement failed: ${error.message}`, 'error');
    }
    event.target.value = '';
  };

  if (!element) {
    const updateDocument = values => {
      const next = structuredClone(document);
      Object.assign(next, values);
      commitDocument(next);
    };
    return <aside className="right-panel">
      <InspectorSection title="Page">
        <label className="check"><input disabled={!canEdit} type="checkbox" checked={!!page?.transparentBackground} onChange={event => updatePage(currentPage => { currentPage.transparentBackground = event.target.checked; })}/>Transparent background</label>
        {!page?.transparentBackground ? <PaintEditor label="Page background" paint={page?.backgroundPaint ?? page?.background} palette={collectDocumentColors(document)} allowNone={false} onChange={backgroundPaint => updatePage(currentPage => { currentPage.backgroundPaint = backgroundPaint; currentPage.background = paintPrimaryColor(backgroundPaint, currentPage.background || '#ffffff'); })}/> : <p className="help">The page is transparent. Turn off transparency to edit its colour, gradient, or pattern.</p>}
        <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Width" value={document.width} min={1} disabled/><NumberField label="Height" value={document.height} min={1} disabled/></div>
        <button className="full" disabled={!canEdit} onClick={async () => { try { await save({ createVersion: true, versionLabel: `Before orientation swap to ${document.height}×${document.width}` }); magicResize(document.height, document.width); } catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); } }}>Swap orientation</button>
        <div className="field-grid"><Field label="Unit"><select disabled={!canEdit} value={document.unit || 'px'} onChange={event => updateDocument({ unit: event.target.value })}><option value="px">Pixels</option><option value="in">Inches</option><option value="cm">Centimetres</option><option value="mm">Millimetres</option><option value="pt">Points</option></select></Field><NumberField label="DPI" value={document.dpi || 96} min={36} max={1200} disabled={!canEdit} onChange={dpi => updateDocument({ dpi })}/></div>
      </InspectorSection>
      <InspectorSection title="Grid and margins" open={false}>
        <label className="check"><input disabled={!canEdit} type="checkbox" checked={!!page?.grid?.enabled} onChange={event => updatePage(currentPage => { currentPage.grid = { ...(currentPage.grid || {}), enabled: event.target.checked }; })}/>Show grid</label>
        <NumberField label="Grid size" value={page?.grid?.size || 20} min={4} max={200} disabled={!canEdit} onChange={size => updatePage(currentPage => { currentPage.grid = { ...(currentPage.grid || {}), size }; })}/>
        <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Top" value={page?.margins?.top || 0} min={0} disabled={!canEdit} onChange={top => updatePage(currentPage => { currentPage.margins = { ...(currentPage.margins || {}), top }; })}/><NumberField label="Right" value={page?.margins?.right || 0} min={0} disabled={!canEdit} onChange={right => updatePage(currentPage => { currentPage.margins = { ...(currentPage.margins || {}), right }; })}/><NumberField label="Bottom" value={page?.margins?.bottom || 0} min={0} disabled={!canEdit} onChange={bottom => updatePage(currentPage => { currentPage.margins = { ...(currentPage.margins || {}), bottom }; })}/><NumberField label="Left" value={page?.margins?.left || 0} min={0} disabled={!canEdit} onChange={left => updatePage(currentPage => { currentPage.margins = { ...(currentPage.margins || {}), left }; })}/></div>
      </InspectorSection>
      <InspectorSection title="Design system" open={false}><DesignSystemPanel/></InspectorSection>
      <InspectorSection title="Print production" open={false}><PrintPanel/></InspectorSection>
      <InspectorSection title="Accessibility" open={false}><AccessibilityPanel/></InspectorSection>
      <p className="help inspector-empty-help">Select an object to edit its position, size, appearance, and content. Drag from a ruler to add a guide.</p>
    </aside>;
  }

  const effect = element.effect || {};
  const imageFilters = element.filters || {};
  const constraints = element.constraints || {};
  const transformValues = {
    x: commonValue(selected, 'x'), y: commonValue(selected, 'y'), width: commonValue(selected, 'width'), height: commonValue(selected, 'height'),
    rotation: commonValue(selected, 'rotation'), opacity: commonValue(selected, 'opacity')
  };
  const allLocked = selected.every(item => item.locked);
  const allHidden = selected.every(item => item.hidden);
  const allAspect = selected.every(item => item.constraints?.maintainAspectRatio);
  const selectedSourceAsset = selected.length === 1 && selected[0].type === 'image' && selected[0].assetId ? assets.find(asset => asset.id === selected[0].assetId) || null : null;

  return <aside className="right-panel">
    {selected.length > 1 && <div className="multi-selection-banner"><strong>{selected.length} elements selected</strong><span>Blank fields contain mixed values.</span></div>}
    <button className="commons-quick-publish" disabled={!canEdit || !selected.length} onClick={() => setCommonsOpen(true)}><Share2 size={16}/><span><strong>Share to Design Commons</strong><small>Publish this selected object or group for other creators.</small></span></button>
    <InspectorSection title="Transform">
      <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="X" value={transformValues.x} onChange={x => patch({ x })}/><NumberField label="Y" value={transformValues.y} onChange={y => patch({ y })}/><NumberField label="W" value={transformValues.width} min={1} onChange={width => patch({ width })}/><NumberField label="H" value={transformValues.height} min={1} onChange={height => patch({ height })}/></div>
      <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Rotate" value={transformValues.rotation} onChange={rotation => patch({ rotation })}/><NumberField label="Opacity" value={transformValues.opacity} min={0} max={1} step={.05} onChange={opacity => patch({ opacity: Math.max(0, Math.min(1, opacity)) })}/></div>
      <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={allAspect} onChange={event => patch(elementItem => ({ constraints: { ...(elementItem.constraints || {}), maintainAspectRatio: event.target.checked } }))}/>Lock aspect ratio</label>
      {selectedType === 'image' && selected.every(item => item.nativeWidth > 0 && item.nativeHeight > 0) && <button className="full" onClick={() => patch(item => {
        const ratio = item.nativeWidth / item.nativeHeight;
        const w = item.width || 1, h = item.height || 1;
        return w >= h ? { width: w, height: Math.max(1, Math.round(w / ratio)) } : { width: Math.max(1, Math.round(h * ratio)), height: h };
      })}>Reset aspect ratio</button>}
      <div className="icon-row"><button title="Flip horizontally" onClick={() => patch(item => ({ flipX: !item.flipX }))}><FlipHorizontal2 size={16}/></button><button title="Flip vertically" onClick={() => patch(item => ({ flipY: !item.flipY }))}><FlipVertical2 size={16}/></button><button title="Reset rotation" onClick={() => patch({ rotation: 0 })}><RotateCcw size={16}/></button><button className={allLocked ? 'active' : ''} title={allLocked ? 'Unlock' : 'Lock'} onClick={() => patch({ locked: !allLocked })}><Lock size={16}/></button><button className={allHidden ? 'active' : ''} title={allHidden ? 'Show' : 'Hide'} onClick={() => patch({ hidden: !allHidden })}><EyeOff size={16}/></button></div>
      {selected.length > 1 && <div className="button-row wrap"><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.matchSize('width')}>Match width</button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.matchSize('height')}>Match height</button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.matchSize('both')}>Match size</button></div>}
    </InspectorSection>

    <InspectorSection title="AI semantics" open={false}>
      <Field label="Semantic role"><select value={element.role || ''} onChange={event => patch({ role: event.target.value })}><option value="">Unspecified</option>{['headline','subheadline','body','caption','price','call-to-action','logo','hero-image','background-image','decoration','legal','chart-title','chart-data','container','item-name','item-description','item-price','badge','divider','footer','header','illustration'].map(roleName => <option key={roleName} value={roleName}>{roleName.replaceAll('-', ' ')}</option>)}</select></Field>
      <Field label="Semantic name"><input value={element.semanticName || ''} onChange={event => patch({ semanticName: event.target.value })} placeholder="Primary offer headline"/></Field>
      <Field label="AI tags"><input value={(element.tags || []).join(', ')} onChange={event => patch({ tags: event.target.value.split(',').map(value => value.trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 50) })} placeholder="offer, promotion, primary"/></Field>
      <Field label="Content key"><input value={element.contentKey || ''} onChange={event => patch({ contentKey: event.target.value })} placeholder="campaign.headline"/></Field>
      <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={element.aiEditable !== false} onChange={event => patch({ aiEditable: event.target.checked })}/>AI may edit this element</label>
      <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!element.userLocked} onChange={event => patch({ userLocked: event.target.checked })}/>Protect from AI commands</label>
    </InspectorSection>

    <InspectorSection title="Accessibility metadata" open={false}><AccessibilityPanel selectedElement={element}/></InspectorSection>

    <InspectorSection title="Layout and constraints" open={false}>
      <div className="field-grid"><Field label="Horizontal"><select value={constraints.horizontal || 'scale'} onChange={event => patch({ constraints: { ...constraints, horizontal: event.target.value } })}><option value="scale">Scale</option><option value="left">Left</option><option value="center">Centre</option><option value="right">Right</option><option value="stretch">Stretch</option></select></Field><Field label="Vertical"><select value={constraints.vertical || 'scale'} onChange={event => patch({ constraints: { ...constraints, vertical: event.target.value } })}><option value="scale">Scale</option><option value="top">Top</option><option value="center">Centre</option><option value="bottom">Bottom</option><option value="stretch">Stretch</option></select></Field></div>
      {selected.length > 1 && <><div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Layout gap" value={layoutGap} min={0} onChange={setLayoutGap}/><Field label="Align"><select value={layoutAlign} onChange={event => setLayoutAlign(event.target.value)}><option value="start">Start</option><option value="center">Centre</option><option value="end">End</option></select></Field></div><div className="button-row"><button onClick={() => createAutoLayout({ direction: 'horizontal', gap: layoutGap, align: layoutAlign })}>Horizontal auto-layout</button><button onClick={() => createAutoLayout({ direction: 'vertical', gap: layoutGap, align: layoutAlign })}>Vertical auto-layout</button></div></>}
      {element.layoutGroupId && <button className="full" onClick={() => detachAutoLayout(element.layoutGroupId)}>Detach auto-layout</button>}
    </InspectorSection>

    {selectedType === 'frame' && <InspectorSection title="Frame layout">
      <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={frameLayout.enabled !== false} onChange={event => patchFrameLayout({ enabled: event.target.checked })}/>Enable automatic layout</label>
      <div className="field-grid"><Field label="Direction"><select value={frameLayout.direction || 'vertical'} onChange={event => patchFrameLayout({ direction: event.target.value })}><option value="vertical">Vertical</option><option value="horizontal">Horizontal</option></select></Field><Field label="Wrap"><select value={frameLayout.wrap ? 'wrap' : 'nowrap'} onChange={event => patchFrameLayout({ wrap: event.target.value === 'wrap' })}><option value="nowrap">No wrap</option><option value="wrap">Wrap</option></select></Field></div>
      <div className="field-grid"><Field label="Align"><select value={frameLayout.align || 'start'} onChange={event => patchFrameLayout({ align: event.target.value })}><option value="start">Start</option><option value="center">Centre</option><option value="end">End</option><option value="stretch">Stretch</option></select></Field><Field label="Justify"><select value={frameLayout.justify || 'start'} onChange={event => patchFrameLayout({ justify: event.target.value })}><option value="start">Start</option><option value="center">Centre</option><option value="end">End</option><option value="space-between">Space between</option></select></Field></div>
      <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Main gap" value={frameLayout.gap ?? 24} min={0} onChange={gap => patchFrameLayout({ gap })}/><NumberField label="Row gap" value={frameLayout.rowGap ?? frameLayout.gap ?? 24} min={0} onChange={rowGap => patchFrameLayout({ rowGap })}/><NumberField label="Column gap" value={frameLayout.columnGap ?? frameLayout.gap ?? 24} min={0} onChange={columnGap => patchFrameLayout({ columnGap })}/></div>
      <div className="field-grid four"><NumberField label="Pad top" value={framePadding.top} min={0} onChange={top => patchFramePadding({ top })}/><NumberField label="Pad right" value={framePadding.right} min={0} onChange={right => patchFramePadding({ right })}/><NumberField label="Pad bottom" value={framePadding.bottom} min={0} onChange={bottom => patchFramePadding({ bottom })}/><NumberField label="Pad left" value={framePadding.left} min={0} onChange={left => patchFramePadding({ left })}/></div>
      <div className="field-grid"><Field label="Frame width"><select value={frameLayout.widthMode || 'fixed'} onChange={event => patchFrameLayout({ widthMode: event.target.value })}><option value="fixed">Fixed</option><option value="hug">Hug content</option></select></Field><Field label="Frame height"><select value={frameLayout.heightMode || 'fixed'} onChange={event => patchFrameLayout({ heightMode: event.target.value })}><option value="fixed">Fixed</option><option value="hug">Hug content</option></select></Field></div>
      <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!element.clipChildren} onChange={event => patchOne({ clipChildren: event.target.checked })}/>Clip children to frame</label>
      <p className="help">Drag layers into this frame to create a nested hierarchy. Children can use fixed, fill-container, or hug-content sizing.</p>
    </InspectorSection>}

    {element.parentId && <InspectorSection title="Child layout" open={false}>
      <div className="field-grid"><Field label="Width"><select value={childSizing.width || 'fixed'} onChange={event => patchOne({ layoutSizing: { ...childSizing, width: event.target.value } })}><option value="fixed">Fixed</option><option value="fill">Fill container</option><option value="hug">Hug content</option></select></Field><Field label="Height"><select value={childSizing.height || 'fixed'} onChange={event => patchOne({ layoutSizing: { ...childSizing, height: event.target.value } })}><option value="fixed">Fixed</option><option value="fill">Fill container</option><option value="hug">Hug content</option></select></Field></div>
      <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Grow" value={childSizing.grow || 0} min={0} max={100} step={.1} onChange={grow => patchOne({ layoutSizing: { ...childSizing, grow } })}/><Field label="Self align"><select value={childSizing.alignSelf || 'auto'} onChange={event => patchOne({ layoutSizing: { ...childSizing, alignSelf: event.target.value } })}><option value="auto">Automatic</option><option value="start">Start</option><option value="center">Centre</option><option value="end">End</option><option value="stretch">Stretch</option></select></Field></div>
    </InspectorSection>}

    {selectedType === 'text' && <>
      <InspectorSection title="Text presets">
        <label className="paint-range"><span>Preset intensity {Math.round(textPresetIntensity * 100)}%</span><input type="range" min=".25" max="2" step=".05" value={textPresetIntensity} onChange={event => setTextPresetIntensity(Number(event.target.value))}/></label>
        <div className="filter-presets">{TEXT_PRESETS.map(preset => <button key={preset.id} onClick={() => applyTextPreset(preset)} style={{ fontFamily: preset.typography.fontFamily, fontWeight: preset.typography.fontWeight }}>{preset.name}</button>)}</div>
      </InspectorSection>
      <InspectorSection title="Rich text">
        <Field label="Font"><select value={element.fontFamily || 'Arial'} onChange={async event => { const fontFamily = event.target.value; const report = await ensureFontLoaded(fontFamily); setFontReport(report); editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ fontFamily }); }}>{FONT_CATEGORIES.map(group => <optgroup key={group.label} label={group.label}>{group.fonts.map(font => <option key={font} value={font} style={{ fontFamily: font }}>{font}</option>)}</optgroup>)}</select></Field>
        {fontReport && <p className={`font-status ${fontReport.status}`}><strong>{fontReport.status === 'loaded' ? 'Font loaded' : 'Font fallback warning'}</strong><span>{fontReport.status === 'loaded' ? `${fontReport.fontFamily} is available from ${fontReport.source}.` : `${fontReport.fontFamily} could not be confirmed. Export may use a fallback font.`}</span></p>}
        <NumberField label="Size" value={commonValue(selected, 'fontSize')} min={4} onChange={fontSize => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ fontSize })}/>
        <div className="icon-row"><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ fontWeight: element.fontWeight === 700 ? 400 : 700 })}><Bold size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ fontStyle: element.fontStyle === 'italic' ? 'normal' : 'italic' })}><Italic size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ underline: !element.underline })}><Underline size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ linethrough: !element.linethrough })}><Strikethrough size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ fontSize: Math.max(6, element.fontSize * .65), deltaY: -element.fontSize * .35 })}><Superscript size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ fontSize: Math.max(6, element.fontSize * .65), deltaY: element.fontSize * .25 })}><Subscript size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => { const url = prompt('Link URL'); if (url) editorRef.current?.setLink(url); }}><Link size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.clearTextFormatting()}><RotateCcw size={16}/></button></div>
        <div className="icon-row"><button className={element.textAlign === 'left' ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ textAlign: 'left' })}><AlignLeft size={16}/></button><button className={element.textAlign === 'center' ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ textAlign: 'center' })}><AlignCenter size={16}/></button><button className={element.textAlign === 'right' ? 'active' : ''} onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setTextStyle({ textAlign: 'right' })}><AlignRight size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.applyList('bullet')}><List size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.applyList('number')}><ListOrdered size={16}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.applyList('none')}><Minus size={16}/></button></div>
        <RangeField label="Line height" value={element.lineHeight || 1.16} min={.7} max={3} step={.02} onChange={lineHeight => patch({ lineHeight })}/><RangeField label="Letter spacing" value={element.charSpacing || 0} min={-100} max={500} step={5} onChange={charSpacing => patch({ charSpacing })}/><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!element.autoFit} onChange={event => patch({ autoFit: event.target.checked })}/>Measure and shrink text to fit the frame</label>{element.autoFit && <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Minimum size" value={element.minFontSize || 8} min={4} max={element.fontSize || 1000} onChange={minFontSize => patch({ minFontSize })}/><NumberField label="Maximum lines" value={element.maxLines || 0} min={0} max={100} onChange={maxLines => patch({ maxLines })}/></div>}<Field label="Overflow"><select value={element.overflowBehavior || 'visible'} onChange={event => patch({ overflowBehavior: event.target.value })}><option value="visible">Visible</option><option value="clip">Clip to text frame</option><option value="ellipsis">Fit, then clip</option></select></Field><Field label="Vertical alignment"><select value={element.verticalAlign || 'top'} onChange={event => patch({ verticalAlign: event.target.value })}><option value="top">Top</option><option value="middle">Middle</option><option value="bottom">Bottom</option></select></Field>
        <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Columns" value={element.columns || 1} min={1} max={12} onChange={columns => patch({ columns })}/><NumberField label="Column gap" value={element.columnGap || 24} min={0} max={400} onChange={columnGap => patch({ columnGap })}/></div>
        <div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Widow lines" value={element.widowLines || 2} min={1} max={10} onChange={widowLines => patch({ widowLines })}/><NumberField label="Orphan lines" value={element.orphanLines || 2} min={1} max={10} onChange={orphanLines => patch({ orphanLines })}/></div>
        <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!element.hyphenation} onChange={event => patch({ hyphenation: event.target.checked })}/>Automatic hyphenation</label>
        <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!element.hangingPunctuation} onChange={event => patch({ hangingPunctuation: event.target.checked })}/>Hanging punctuation</label>
        <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!element.opticalMargin} onChange={event => patch({ opticalMargin: event.target.checked })}/>Optical margin alignment</label>
        <NumberField label="Baseline grid step" value={element.baselineGridStep || 0} min={0} max={200} onChange={baselineGridStep => patch({ baselineGridStep })}/>
        <Field label="OpenType features"><input value={element.opentypeFeatures || ''} onChange={event => patch({ opentypeFeatures: event.target.value })} placeholder="liga, kern, smcp"/></Field>
      </InspectorSection>
      <InspectorSection title="Text shape and highlight" open={false}>
        <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!effect.hollow} onChange={event => patch({ effect: { ...effect, hollow: event.target.checked } })}/>Hollow text</label>
        <RangeField label="Curve" value={effect.curve || 0} min={-100} max={100} step={1} onChange={curve => patch({ effect: { ...effect, curve } })}/>
        <Field label="Text highlight"><ColorPicker value={element.textBackgroundColor || '#ffffff'} palette={documentPalette} label="Text highlight" onChange={textBackgroundColor => patch({ textBackgroundColor })}/></Field>
        <button className="full" onClick={() => patch({ textBackgroundColor: '' })}>Remove highlight</button>
        <p className="help">Use the Appearance section for gradient text, outlines, shadows, alpha, and blend modes.</p>
      </InspectorSection>
    </>}

    {selectedType === 'image' && <>
      {selected.length === 1 && <InspectorSection title="Crop, frame and mask"><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!element.isImageFrame} onChange={event => patchOne({ isImageFrame: event.target.checked })}/>Reusable image frame</label>{element.isImageFrame && <Field label="Frame label"><input value={element.frameLabel || 'Drop an image'} onChange={event => patchOne({ frameLabel: event.target.value })}/></Field>}<div className="button-row"><button className="primary" onClick={() => editorRef.current?.setCropMode(true)}><Crop size={15}/>Crop</button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.cropZoom(-.15)}><Minus size={15}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.cropZoom(.15)}><Plus size={15}/></button><button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.resetCrop()}><RotateCcw size={15}/></button></div><RangeField label="Crop zoom" value={element.cropZoom || 1} min={1} max={8} step={.05} onChange={cropZoom => patchOne({ cropZoom })}/><Field label="Mask"><select value={element.mask || 'rect'} onChange={event => patchOne({ mask: event.target.value })}><option value="rect">Rectangle</option><option value="rounded">Rounded</option><option value="circle">Ellipse</option><option value="triangle">Triangle</option><option value="hexagon">Hexagon</option><option value="star">Star</option><option value="heart">Heart</option><option value="arch">Arch</option><option value="blob">Blob</option></select></Field>{element.mask === 'rounded' && <RangeField label="Corner radius" value={element.radius || 24} min={0} max={200} step={1} onChange={radius => patchOne({ radius })}/>}<button className="full" onClick={() => replaceRef.current?.click()}>Replace image</button><input hidden ref={replaceRef} type="file" accept="image/*" onChange={replaceImage}/></InspectorSection>}
      <InspectorSection title={`Image filters${selected.length > 1 ? ` (${selected.length})` : ''}`}>
        {selected.length > 1 && <p className="help">Presets and adjustments apply to every selected picture.</p>}
        <div className="button-row"><button onClick={() => patch({ filters: { brightness: 0, contrast: 0, saturation: 0, hue: 0, blur: 0, vibrance: 0, noise: 0, pixelate: 0, gamma: 1, tint: '#ffffff', tintOpacity: 0, grayscale: false, sepia: false, invert: false } })}><RotateCcw size={14}/>Reset filters</button></div>
        <label className="paint-range"><span>Preset intensity {Math.round(imagePresetIntensity * 100)}%</span><input type="range" min="0" max="2" step=".05" value={imagePresetIntensity} onChange={event => setImagePresetIntensity(Number(event.target.value))}/></label>
        <div className="filter-presets image-filter-presets">{IMAGE_PRESETS.map(preset => <button key={preset.id} onClick={() => patch({ filters: scaleImageFilters(preset.filters, imagePresetIntensity) })}>{preset.name}</button>)}</div>
        {[['Brightness', 'brightness', -1, 1, .02], ['Contrast', 'contrast', -1, 1, .02], ['Saturation', 'saturation', -1, 1, .02], ['Vibrance', 'vibrance', -1, 1, .02], ['Hue', 'hue', -1, 1, .02], ['Gamma', 'gamma', .2, 3, .02], ['Blur', 'blur', 0, 1, .01], ['Film grain', 'noise', 0, 500, 5], ['Pixelate', 'pixelate', 0, 50, 1]].map(([label, key, min, max, step]) => <RangeField key={key} label={label} value={imageFilters[key] ?? (key === 'gamma' ? 1 : 0)} min={min} max={max} step={step} onChange={value => patch(item => ({ filters: { ...(item.filters || {}), [key]: value } }))}/>)}
        <div className="field-grid"><Field label="Tint"><ColorPicker value={imageFilters.tint || '#ffffff'} palette={documentPalette} label="Image tint" onChange={tint => patch(item => ({ filters: { ...(item.filters || {}), tint, tintOpacity: Number(item.filters?.tintOpacity || 0) > 0 ? item.filters.tintOpacity : .35 } }))}/></Field><NumberField label="Tint %" value={Math.round((imageFilters.tintOpacity || 0) * 100)} min={0} max={100} onChange={value => patch(item => ({ filters: { ...(item.filters || {}), tintOpacity: value / 100 } }))}/></div>
        <label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!imageFilters.grayscale} onChange={event => patch(item => ({ filters: { ...(item.filters || {}), grayscale: event.target.checked } }))}/>Grayscale</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!imageFilters.sepia} onChange={event => patch(item => ({ filters: { ...(item.filters || {}), sepia: event.target.checked } }))}/>Sepia</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!imageFilters.invert} onChange={event => patch(item => ({ filters: { ...(item.filters || {}), invert: event.target.checked } }))}/>Invert</label>
      </InspectorSection>
      {selected.length === 1 && <InspectorSection title="Save as asset" open={false}>
        <p className="help">Save this edited image as a new asset in the library. All filters, crops, and masks are baked into the exported image.</p>
        <button className="full" onClick={async () => {
          try {
            const exported = await editorRef?.current?.exportSelectionAsset?.({ multiplier: 2 });
            if (!exported?.dataUrl) return notify('Could not export the image.', 'error');
            const ext = exported.mimeType === 'image/svg+xml' ? 'svg' : 'png';
            const file = await dataUrlToFile(exported.dataUrl, `${element.name || 'image'}.${ext}`);
            const asset = await upload(file, { tags: ['edited-image', 'canvas-object'], sourceType: 'canvas_object' });
            notify(`Image saved as "${asset.original_name}" in the asset library.`, 'success');
          } catch (error) {
            notify(error.message || 'Failed to save the image as an asset.', 'error');
          }
        }}>Save image as asset</button>
      </InspectorSection>}
    </>}

    {selectedType === 'svg' && <InspectorSection title="Custom SVG"><SvgSourceEditor element={element} onApply={patchOne} notify={notify}/></InspectorSection>}

    {selectedType === 'path' && <InspectorSection title="Vector path"><p className="help">Simplify freehand paths, reverse direction, close open shapes, or combine multiple selected paths.</p><div className="button-row wrap"><button onClick={() => simplifyVector(2)}>Simplify</button><button onClick={reverseVector}>Reverse</button><button onClick={closeVector}>Close path</button><button disabled={selected.filter(item => item.type === 'path').length < 2} onClick={() => { try { combineVector(); } catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); } }}>Combine paths</button></div></InspectorSection>}

    {selectedType === 'chart' && <InspectorSection title="Chart data"><Field label="Type"><select value={element.chartType} onChange={event => patchOne({ chartType: event.target.value })}>{['bar', 'line', 'area', 'pie', 'donut', 'kpi'].map(type => <option key={type}>{type}</option>)}</select></Field><Field label="Labels (comma separated)"><textarea value={(element.data.labels || []).join(', ')} onChange={event => patchOne({ data: { ...element.data, labels: event.target.value.split(',').map(value => value.trim()) } })}/></Field><Field label="Values (comma separated)"><textarea value={(element.data.series?.[0]?.values || []).join(', ')} onChange={event => patchOne({ data: { ...element.data, series: [{ ...(element.data.series?.[0] || { name: 'Series 1' }), values: event.target.value.split(',').map(Number) }] } })}/></Field><Field label="Series name"><input value={element.data.series?.[0]?.name || ''} onChange={event => patchOne({ data: { ...element.data, series: [{ ...(element.data.series?.[0] || {}), name: event.target.value }] } })}/></Field><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={element.options?.showLegend !== false} onChange={event => patchOne({ options: { ...element.options, showLegend: event.target.checked } })}/>Show legend</label><label className="check"><input type="checkbox" checked={element.options?.showLabels !== false} onChange={event => patchOne({ options: { ...element.options, showLabels: event.target.checked } })}/>Show labels</label></InspectorSection>}

    {selectedType === 'table' && <InspectorSection title="Table data"><p className="help">Paste tab-separated cells, one row per line.</p><textarea className="data-editor" value={(element.cells || []).map(row => row.join('\t')).join('\n')} onChange={event => { const cells = event.target.value.split('\n').map(row => row.split('\t')); patchOne({ cells, rows: cells.length, columns: Math.max(1, ...cells.map(row => row.length)) }); }}/><div className="field-grid"><NumberField label="Header rows" value={element.options?.headerRows ?? 1} min={0} onChange={headerRows => patchOne({ options: { ...element.options, headerRows } })}/><NumberField label="Font size" value={element.options?.fontSize || 22} min={8} onChange={fontSize => patchOne({ options: { ...element.options, fontSize } })}/></div><Field label="Header colour"><ColorPicker value={element.options?.headerFill || '#111827'} palette={documentPalette} label="Table header colour" onChange={headerFill => patchOne({ options: { ...element.options, headerFill } })}/></Field></InspectorSection>}

    {selectedType === 'qrcode' && <InspectorSection title="QR code"><Field label="Content"><textarea value={element.value} onChange={event => patchOne({ value: event.target.value })}/></Field><div className="field-grid"><Field label="Foreground"><ColorPicker value={element.foreground} palette={documentPalette} label="QR foreground" onChange={foreground => patchOne({ foreground })}/></Field><Field label="Background"><ColorPicker value={element.background} palette={documentPalette} label="QR background" onChange={background => patchOne({ background })}/></Field></div><Field label="Error correction"><select value={element.errorCorrection || 'M'} onChange={event => patchOne({ errorCorrection: event.target.value })}><option>L</option><option>M</option><option>Q</option><option>H</option></select></Field></InspectorSection>}

    {selectedType === 'shape' && <InspectorSection title="Shape options" open={false}><Field label="Shape"><select value={element.shapeKind || 'triangle'} onChange={event => patchOne({ shapeKind: event.target.value })}>{[['triangle','Triangle'],['diamond','Diamond'],['pentagon','Pentagon'],['hexagon','Hexagon'],['star','Star'],['burst','Burst'],['heart','Heart'],['arrow','Arrow'],['chevron','Chevron'],['speech','Speech bubble']].map(([id,name]) => <option key={id} value={id}>{name}</option>)}</select></Field>{['star','burst'].includes(element.shapeKind) && <><NumberField label="Points" value={element.shapeOptions?.points || (element.shapeKind === 'burst' ? 12 : 5)} min={3} max={32} onChange={points => patchOne({ shapeOptions: { ...(element.shapeOptions || {}), points } })}/><RangeField label="Inner radius" value={element.shapeOptions?.innerRatio || .46} min={.1} max={.9} step={.01} onChange={innerRatio => patchOne({ shapeOptions: { ...(element.shapeOptions || {}), innerRatio } })}/></>}</InspectorSection>}

    {['rect', 'frame'].includes(selectedType) && <InspectorSection title="Corners" open={false}><RangeField label="Corner radius" value={element.radius || 0} min={0} max={Math.min(element.width, element.height) / 2} step={1} onChange={radius => patch({ radius })}/><button className="full" onClick={() => patch({ radius: Math.min(element.width, element.height) / 2 })}>Make pill</button></InspectorSection>}

    {element.type !== 'qrcode' && <InspectorSection title="Appearance"><AppearancePanel element={element} selected={selected} patch={patch} document={document}/></InspectorSection>}

    {!selectedType && selected.length > 1 && <p className="help inspector-empty-help">The selection contains different element types. Common transform controls remain available above.</p>}
    {commonsOpen && <CommonsPublishDialog onClose={() => setCommonsOpen(false)} editorRef={editorRef} sourceAsset={selectedSourceAsset} selectedElements={selected}/>}
  </aside>;
}

import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';
import Modal from'./Modal.jsx';import{useEditorStore}from'../store.js';import{api}from'../lib/api.js';
export default function TeamDialog({onClose}){const members=useEditorStore(s=>s.members),load=useEditorStore(s=>s.loadMembers),role=useEditorStore(s=>s.role),changePassword=useEditorStore(s=>s.changePassword);const[email,setEmail]=useState(''),[inviteRole,setInviteRole]=useState('designer'),[invite,setInvite]=useState(null),[currentPassword,setCurrentPassword]=useState(''),[newPassword,setNewPassword]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{load().catch(()=>{})},[]);return <Modal title="Team, roles and security" onClose={onClose} wide><h3>Invite a member</h3><div className="invite-row"><input type="email" placeholder="person@example.com" value={email} onChange={e=>setEmail(e.target.value)}/><select value={inviteRole} onChange={e=>setInviteRole(e.target.value)}><option value="admin">Admin</option><option value="designer">Designer</option><option value="reviewer">Reviewer</option><option value="viewer">Viewer</option></select><button className="primary" onClick={async()=>{const result=await api.inviteMember({email,role:inviteRole});setInvite(result);setEmail('')}}>Create invitation</button></div>{invite&&<div className="share-result"><input readOnly value={`${location.origin}/?invite=${invite.token}`}/><button onClick={()=>navigator.clipboard.writeText(`${location.origin}/?invite=${invite.token}`)}>Copy</button></div>}<table className="members-table"><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Email</th><th>Role</th><th/></tr></thead><tbody>{members.map(m=><tr key={m.id}><td>{m.name}</td><td>{m.email}</td><td><select disabled={role!=='owner'} value={m.role} onChange={async e=>{await api.updateMember(m.id,e.target.value);await load()}}>{['owner','admin','designer','reviewer','viewer'].map(r=><option key={r}>{r}</option>)}</select></td><td>{role==='owner'&&m.role!=='owner'&&<button className="danger" onClick={async()=>{await api.removeMember(m.id);await load()}}>Remove</button>}</td></tr>)}</tbody></table><h3>Change your password</h3><div className="field-grid"><label className="field"><span>Current password</span><input type="password" value={currentPassword} onChange={e=>setCurrentPassword(e.target.value)}/></label><label className="field"><span>New password</span><input type="password" minLength="10" value={newPassword} onChange={e=>setNewPassword(e.target.value)}/></label></div><button disabled={!currentPassword||newPassword.length<10} onClick={async()=>{await changePassword(currentPassword,newPassword);location.reload()}}>Change password and sign out</button></Modal>}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/ThemeToggle.jsx (2026-07-04 12:46:42) =====
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Laptop, Moon, Sun } from 'lucide-react';
import { applyTheme, getThemePreference, saveThemePreference, subscribeToSystemTheme } from '../lib/theme.js';

const OPTIONS = [
  { id: 'light', label: 'Light theme', Icon: Sun },
  { id: 'dark', label: 'Dark theme', Icon: Moon },
  { id: 'system', label: 'Use system theme', Icon: Laptop }
];

export default function ThemeToggle({ compact = false }) {
  const [preference, setPreference] = useState(getThemePreference);
  useEffect(() => {
    applyTheme(preference);
    const onTheme = event => setPreference(event.detail?.preference || getThemePreference());
    globalThis.addEventListener('canvasforge:theme', onTheme);
    const unsubscribe = subscribeToSystemTheme(() => setPreference(getThemePreference()));
    return () => { globalThis.removeEventListener('canvasforge:theme', onTheme); unsubscribe(); };
  }, []);
  const current = OPTIONS.find(item => item.id === preference) || OPTIONS[2];
  const cycle = () => {
    const index = OPTIONS.findIndex(item => item.id === preference);
    setPreference(saveThemePreference(OPTIONS[(index + 1) % OPTIONS.length].id));
  };
  return <button className={`theme-toggle ${compact ? 'compact' : ''}`} type="button" title={`${current.label}. Click to change.`} aria-label={`${current.label}. Click to change.`} onClick={cycle}>
    <current.Icon size={16}/>{!compact && <span>{current.id === 'system' ? 'Auto' : current.id[0].toUpperCase() + current.id.slice(1)}</span>}
  </button>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/TopToolbar.jsx (2026-07-16 02:57:53) =====
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  AlignCenter, AlignHorizontalDistributeCenter, AlignLeft, AlignRight,
  AlignVerticalDistributeCenter, ArrowDown, ArrowDownToLine, ArrowUp,
  ArrowUpToLine, Bell, BookTemplate, ChevronDown, Download, EyeOff, Home,
  Group, Lock, Maximize2, MessageSquare, PanelLeft, PanelRight, Printer, Redo2, Save,
  Share2, Sparkles, Trash2, Undo2, Ungroup, Search, Upload
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useEditorStore } from '../store.js';
import { api } from '../lib/api.js';
import { ResizeDialog, TemplateDialog, ShareDialog, ReviewDialog } from './EditorDialogs.jsx';
import { ESCAPE_EVENT, LEGACY_ESCAPE_EVENT, designFileName } from '../lib/appMeta.js';
import { downloadDataUrl, downloadText, designToHtml, pageToSvg } from '../lib/exportFormats.js';
import { normalizeDocument, svgElement, tableElement } from '../lib/document.js';
import ThemeToggle from './ThemeToggle.jsx';
import PrintSheetDialog from './PrintSheetDialog.jsx';

function saveLabel(status, lastSavedAt) {
  if (status === 'saving') return 'Saving…';
  if (status === 'dirty') return 'Unsaved changes';
  if (status === 'offline') return 'Offline · saved locally';
  if (status === 'save-failed') return 'Save failed';
  if (status === 'conflict') return 'Editing conflict';
  if (status === 'recovered') return 'Recovery found';
  if (status === 'saved' && lastSavedAt) {
    const seconds = Math.floor((Date.now() - lastSavedAt) / 1000);
    if (seconds < 45) return 'Saved just now';
    return `Saved ${new Date(lastSavedAt).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' })}`;
  }
  return status.replaceAll('-', ' ');
}

export default function TopToolbar({ editorRef }) {
  const undo = useEditorStore(state => state.undo);
  const redo = useEditorStore(state => state.redo);
  const history = useEditorStore(state => state.history);
  const future = useEditorStore(state => state.future);
  const save = useEditorStore(state => state.save);
  const status = useEditorStore(state => state.status);
  const lastError = useEditorStore(state => state.lastError);
  const lastSavedAt = useEditorStore(state => state.lastSavedAt);
  const exportDesign = useEditorStore(state => state.exportDesign);
  const refreshExport = useEditorStore(state => state.refreshExport);
  const closeDesign = useEditorStore(state => state.closeDesign);
  const role = useEditorStore(state => state.role);
  const design = useEditorStore(state => state.design);
  const document = useEditorStore(state => state.document);
  const pageIndex = useEditorStore(state => state.pageIndex);
  const selection = useEditorStore(state => state.selection);
  const updateElements = useEditorStore(state => state.updateElements);
  const groupSelection = useEditorStore(state => state.groupSelection);
  const ungroupSelection = useEditorStore(state => state.ungroupSelection);
  const notifications = useEditorStore(state => state.notifications);
  const markNotification = useEditorStore(state => state.markNotification);
  const markAllNotifications = useEditorStore(state => state.markAllNotifications);
  const toggleLeftPanel = useEditorStore(state => state.toggleLeftPanel);
  const toggleRightPanel = useEditorStore(state => state.toggleRightPanel);
  const leftPanelOpen = useEditorStore(state => state.leftPanelOpen);
  const rightPanelOpen = useEditorStore(state => state.rightPanelOpen);
  const notify = useEditorStore(state => state.notify);
  const aiPanelOpen = useEditorStore(state => state.aiPanelOpen);
  const toggleAIPanel = useEditorStore(state => state.toggleAIPanel);
  const toggleCommandPalette = useEditorStore(state => state.toggleCommandPalette);
  const commitDocument = useEditorStore(state => state.commitDocument);
  const addElement = useEditorStore(state => state.addElement);

  const [dialog, setDialog] = useState('');
  const [job, setJob] = useState(null);
  const [menu, setMenu] = useState('');
  const [showNotifications, setShowNotifications] = useState(false);
  const [exportScale, setExportScale] = useState(2);
  const [printPreview, setPrintPreview] = useState('');
  const [importing, setImporting] = useState(false);
  const importRef = React.useRef(null);
  const unread = notifications.filter(notification => !notification.read_at).length;
  const canDesign = ['owner', 'admin', 'designer'].includes(role);
  const canReview = role !== 'viewer';
  const page = document?.pages?.[pageIndex];
  const selected = useMemo(() => (page?.elements || []).filter(element => selection.includes(element.id)), [page, selection]);
  const selectionLocked = selected.length > 0 && selected.every(element => element.locked);
  const selectionHidden = selected.length > 0 && selected.every(element => element.hidden);
  const selectionGrouped = selected.some(element => element.groupId);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!job || !['queued', 'processing'].includes(job.status)) return;
    const id = setInterval(async () => {
      try {
        const next = await refreshExport(job.id);
        setJob(next);
        if (next.status === 'completed') window.open(next.output_url, '_blank', 'noopener');
      } catch {}
    }, 800);
    return () => clearInterval(id);
  }, [job?.id, job?.status]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const close = () => { setMenu(''); setShowNotifications(false); };
    const outside = event => {
      if (!event.target.closest?.('.toolbar-menu-wrap, .notification-wrap')) close();
    };
    window.addEventListener(ESCAPE_EVENT, close);
    window.addEventListener(LEGACY_ESCAPE_EVENT, close);
    globalThis.document.addEventListener('pointerdown', outside);
    return () => { window.removeEventListener(ESCAPE_EVENT, close); window.removeEventListener(LEGACY_ESCAPE_EVENT, close); globalThis.document.removeEventListener('pointerdown', outside); };
  }, []);

  const goHome = async () => {
    if (['dirty', 'saving'].includes(status) && canDesign) {
      try { await save(); } catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); return; }
    }
    if (['offline', 'save-failed', 'recovered', 'conflict'].includes(status) && !confirm('Leave the editor? Your unsaved work will remain in local recovery, but it may not be on the server.')) return;
    closeDesign();
  };

  const doExport = async format => {
    setMenu('');
    try {
      setJob(await exportDesign(format, { multiplier: exportScale, ...(format === 'pdf' ? { print: document.print || null, pageSize: { width: document.width, height: document.height, unit: document.unit || 'px', dpi: document.dpi || 96 } } : {}) }));
    } catch (error) {
      notify(`Export failed: ${error.message}`, 'error');
    }
  };
  const doPrintSheetExport = async imposition => {
    setDialog('');
    try {
      setJob(await exportDesign('pdf', {
        multiplier: exportScale,
        imposition,
        print: document.print || null,
        pageSize: { width: document.width, height: document.height, unit: document.unit || 'px', dpi: document.dpi || 96 }
      }));
    } catch (error) {
      notify(`Print sheet export failed: ${error.message}`, 'error');
    }
  };
  const localExport = format => {
    setMenu('');
    try {
      const base = designFileName(document.title || 'design');
      if (format === 'jpeg' || format === 'webp') downloadDataUrl(editorRef.current?.exportPageDataUrl({ format, multiplier: exportScale, quality: .92 }), `${base}.${format === 'jpeg' ? 'jpg' : 'webp'}`);
      if (format === 'svg') downloadText(pageToSvg(document, pageIndex), `${base}.svg`, 'image/svg+xml');
      if (format === 'html') downloadText(designToHtml(document), `${base}.html`, 'text/html');
      if (format === 'json') downloadText(JSON.stringify(document, null, 2), `${base}.design-commons.json`, 'application/json');
    } catch (error) { notify(`Export failed: ${error.message}`, 'error'); }
  };
  const importFile = async event => {
    const file = event.target.files?.[0]; event.target.value = '';
    if (!file) return;
    setImporting(true);
    try {
      if (/\.pptx$/i.test(file.name)) {
        const result = await api.importPowerPoint(file, { dpi: document.dpi || 96 });
        commitDocument(normalizeDocument(result.document), { label: `Import PowerPoint ${file.name}` });
        const slideCount = result.summary?.slides || result.document?.pages?.length || 0;
        const warningText = result.warnings?.length ? ` ${result.warnings.length} item${result.warnings.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} could not be converted exactly.` : '';
        notify(`Imported ${slideCount} PowerPoint slide${slideCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} as editable pages.${warningText}`, result.warnings?.length ? 'warning' : 'success');
        return;
      }
      const text = await file.text();
      if (/\.json$/i.test(file.name)) {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
        const candidate = parsed.document || parsed;
        if (!Array.isArray(candidate.pages)) throw new Error('This JSON file is not a Design Commons document.');
        commitDocument(normalizeDocument(candidate), { label: `Import ${file.name}` });
      } else if (/\.svg$/i.test(file.name) || file.type === 'image/svg+xml') {
        addElement(svgElement(text, { name: file.name.replace(/\.svg$/i, ''), width: Math.min(640, document.width * .7), height: Math.min(480, document.height * .55) }));
      } else if (/\.csv$/i.test(file.name) || file.type === 'text/csv') {
        const rows = text.split(/\r?\n/).filter(Boolean).map(line => line.split(',').map(cell => cell.trim()));
        addElement(tableElement({ name: file.name.replace(/\.csv$/i, ''), cells: rows, rows: rows.length, columns: Math.max(1, ...rows.map(row => row.length)), width: Math.min(760, document.width * .8), height: Math.min(520, document.height * .5) }));
      } else throw new Error('Import supports PowerPoint PPTX, Design Commons JSON, SVG, and CSV files.');
      notify(`Imported ${file.name}.`, 'success');
    } catch (error) { notify(`Import failed: ${error.message}`, 'error'); }
    finally { setImporting(false); }
  };
  const iconButton = (title, icon, onClick, disabled = false, active = false) => <button className={`toolbar-icon-button ${active ? 'active' : ''}`.trim()} data-tooltip={title} title={title} aria-label={title} onClick={onClick} disabled={disabled}>{icon}</button>;
  const toggleMenu = value => setMenu(current => current === value ? '' : value);

  return <>
    <header className="top-toolbar">
      <div className="toolbar-zone toolbar-left">
        <div className="toolbar-brand" aria-label="Design Commons"><span>DC</span><strong>Design Commons</strong></div>
        {iconButton('Search commands · Ctrl/Cmd+K', <Search size={17}/>, () => toggleCommandPalette(true))}
        {iconButton('Back to dashboard', <Home size={17}/>, goHome)}
        {iconButton(leftPanelOpen ? 'Hide left panel' : 'Show left panel', <PanelLeft size={17}/>, toggleLeftPanel, false, leftPanelOpen)}
        <div className="toolbar-divider"/>
        {iconButton('Undo · Ctrl/Cmd+Z', <Undo2 size={17}/>, undo, !history.length || !canDesign)}
        {iconButton('Redo · Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+Z', <Redo2 size={17}/>, redo, !future.length || !canDesign)}
        <button className={`save-button ${status}`} title={lastError || 'Save · Ctrl/Cmd+S'} onClick={() => save().catch(error => notify(error.message, 'error'))} disabled={status === 'saving' || status === 'conflict' || status === 'recovered' || !canDesign}>
          <Save size={16}/><span>{saveLabel(status, lastSavedAt)}</span>
        </button>
        {status === 'save-failed' && <button className="mini retry-save" onClick={() => save().catch(error => notify(error.message, 'error'))}>Retry</button>}
      </div>

      <div className="toolbar-zone toolbar-context">
        {!selection.length ? <>
          <span className="context-label">Page</span>
          <button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.fit()}>Fit page</button>
          <button onClick={() => editorRef.current?.fitWidth()}>Fit width</button>
        </> : <>
          <span className="context-label">{selection.length === 1 ? selected[0]?.name || selected[0]?.type : `${selection.length} elements`}</span>
          <div className="toolbar-menu-wrap">
            <button onClick={() => toggleMenu('align')}>Align <ChevronDown size={14}/></button>
            {menu === 'align' && <div className="toolbar-popover compact-menu">
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.align('left'); setMenu(''); }}><AlignLeft size={16}/>Left</button>
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.align('center'); setMenu(''); }}><AlignCenter size={16}/>Horizontal centre</button>
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.align('right'); setMenu(''); }}><AlignRight size={16}/>Right</button>
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.align('top'); setMenu(''); }}><ArrowUp size={16}/>Top</button>
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.align('middle'); setMenu(''); }}><AlignCenter size={16}/>Vertical middle</button>
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.align('bottom'); setMenu(''); }}><ArrowDown size={16}/>Bottom</button>
              <hr/>
              <button disabled={selection.length < 3} onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.distribute('horizontal'); setMenu(''); }}><AlignHorizontalDistributeCenter size={16}/>Distribute horizontally</button>
              <button disabled={selection.length < 3} onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.distribute('vertical'); setMenu(''); }}><AlignVerticalDistributeCenter size={16}/>Distribute vertically</button>
            </div>}
          </div>
          <div className="toolbar-menu-wrap">
            <button onClick={() => toggleMenu('position')}>Position <ChevronDown size={14}/></button>
            {menu === 'position' && <div className="toolbar-popover compact-menu">
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.order('forward'); setMenu(''); }}><ArrowUp size={16}/>Bring forward</button>
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.order('backward'); setMenu(''); }}><ArrowDown size={16}/>Send backward</button>
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.order('front'); setMenu(''); }}><ArrowUpToLine size={16}/>Bring to front</button>
              <button onClick={() => { editorRef.current?.order('back'); setMenu(''); }}><ArrowDownToLine size={16}/>Send to back</button>
            </div>}
          </div>
          {iconButton('Group selection · Ctrl/Cmd+G', <Group size={16}/>, () => { try { groupSelection(); notify('Objects grouped.', 'success'); } catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); } }, !canDesign || selection.length < 2)}
          {iconButton('Ungroup selection · Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+G', <Ungroup size={16}/>, () => { try { ungroupSelection(); notify('Objects ungrouped.', 'success'); } catch (error) { notify(error.message, 'error'); } }, !canDesign || !selectionGrouped)}
          {iconButton(selectionLocked ? 'Unlock selection' : 'Lock selection', <Lock size={16}/>, () => updateElements(selection, { locked: !selectionLocked }), !canDesign, selectionLocked)}
          {iconButton(selectionHidden ? 'Show selection' : 'Hide selection', <EyeOff size={16}/>, () => updateElements(selection, { hidden: !selectionHidden }), !canDesign, selectionHidden)}
          {iconButton('Delete selection', <Trash2 size={16}/>, () => editorRef.current?.delete(), !canDesign)}
        </>}
      </div>

      <div className="toolbar-zone toolbar-right">
        <button onClick={() => importRef.current?.click()} disabled={!canDesign || importing}><Upload size={16}/>{importing ? 'Importing…' : 'Import'}</button><input ref={importRef} hidden type="file" accept=".pptx,.json,.svg,.csv,application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation,application/json,image/svg+xml,text/csv" onChange={importFile}/>
        <button className={aiPanelOpen ? 'active ai-toolbar-button' : 'ai-toolbar-button'} onClick={() => toggleAIPanel()} disabled={!canDesign}><Sparkles size={16}/>AI</button>
        <button onClick={() => setDialog('resize')} disabled={!canDesign}><Maximize2 size={16}/>Resize</button>
        <button onClick={() => setDialog('template')} disabled={!canDesign}><BookTemplate size={16}/>Template</button>
        <button onClick={() => setDialog('review')} disabled={!canReview}><MessageSquare size={16}/>Review</button>
        <button onClick={() => setDialog('share')} disabled={!canReview}><Share2 size={16}/>Share</button>
        <ThemeToggle compact/>
        <div className="notification-wrap">
          <button className="notification-button" onClick={() => { setShowNotifications(value => !value); setMenu(''); }} title="Notifications"><Bell size={16}/>{unread > 0 && <span>{unread > 99 ? '99+' : unread}</span>}</button>
          {showNotifications && <div className="notification-popover">
            <header><strong>Notifications</strong><button disabled={!unread} onClick={markAllNotifications}>Mark all read</button></header>
            {notifications.length === 0 ? <p>No notifications.</p> : notifications.slice(0, 20).map(notification => <button key={notification.id} className={notification.read_at ? 'read' : ''} onClick={() => markNotification(notification.id, true)}><strong>{notification.title}</strong><span>{notification.body}</span><small>{new Date(notification.created_at).toLocaleString()}</small></button>)}
          </div>}
        </div>
        <div className="toolbar-menu-wrap">
          <button className="primary download-button" disabled={(!!job && ['queued', 'processing'].includes(job.status)) || !canReview} onClick={() => toggleMenu('download')}><Download size={16}/>Download<ChevronDown size={14}/></button>
          {menu === 'download' && <div className="toolbar-popover download-menu">
            <strong>Download design</strong>
            <label>Resolution<select value={exportScale} onChange={event => setExportScale(Number(event.target.value))}><option value="1">1×</option><option value="2">2×</option><option value="3">3×</option></select></label>
            <button onClick={() => doExport('png')}><span><b>PNG</b><small>High-quality image</small></span></button>
            <button onClick={() => doExport('pdf')}><span><b>PDF</b><small>{document.print?.pdfPreset || 'screen'} · {document.print?.colorSpace || 'rgb'} · print preflight</small></span></button>
            <button onClick={() => { setMenu(''); try { setPrintPreview(editorRef.current?.exportPageDataUrl({ format: 'png', multiplier: .35, quality: .82 }) || ''); } catch { setPrintPreview(''); } setDialog('print-sheet'); }}><Printer size={17}/><span><b>Print sheet PDF</b><small>Business cards, labels, stickers, crop marks, and duplex</small></span></button>
            <button onClick={() => doExport('pptx')}><span><b>PowerPoint PPTX</b><small>Editable slides, text, shapes, images, tables, and charts</small></span></button>
            <button onClick={() => localExport('jpeg')}><span><b>JPEG</b><small>Compressed photo image</small></span></button>
            <button onClick={() => localExport('webp')}><span><b>WebP</b><small>Modern compact image</small></span></button>
            <button onClick={() => localExport('svg')}><span><b>Editable SVG</b><small>Current page as vector markup</small></span></button>
            <button onClick={() => localExport('html')}><span><b>HTML package</b><small>Responsive multi-page preview</small></span></button>
            <button onClick={() => localExport('json')}><span><b>Design Commons JSON</b><small>Editable source and recovery file</small></span></button>
            {job && <div className={`export-job ${job.status}`}><span>{job.status} {job.progress || 0}%</span>{['queued', 'processing'].includes(job.status) && <button onClick={async () => setJob(await api.cancelExport(job.id))}>Cancel</button>}{job.status === 'failed' && <button onClick={async () => setJob(await api.retryExport(job.id))}>Retry</button>}</div>}
          </div>}
        </div>
        {iconButton(rightPanelOpen ? 'Hide inspector' : 'Show inspector', <PanelRight size={17}/>, toggleRightPanel, false, rightPanelOpen)}
        <span className={`status-pill ${design.status}`}>{design.status?.replaceAll('_', ' ')}</span>
      </div>
    </header>
    {dialog === 'resize' && <ResizeDialog onClose={() => setDialog('')}/>}
    {dialog === 'template' && <TemplateDialog onClose={() => setDialog('')}/>}
    {dialog === 'share' && <ShareDialog onClose={() => setDialog('')}/>}
    {dialog === 'review' && <ReviewDialog onClose={() => setDialog('')}/>}
    {dialog === 'print-sheet' && <PrintSheetDialog currentPreview={printPreview} busy={!!job && ['queued', 'processing'].includes(job.status)} onClose={() => setDialog('')} onExport={doPrintSheetExport}/>}
  </>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/components/ui/Primitives.jsx (2026-07-04 12:46:37) =====
import React from 'react';

export function Badge({ tone = 'neutral', children, className = '' }) {
  return <span className={`ui-badge tone-${tone} ${className}`.trim()}>{children}</span>;
}

export function Surface({ as: Component = 'section', className = '', children, ...props }) {
  return <Component className={`ui-surface ${className}`.trim()} {...props}>{children}</Component>;
}

export function EmptyState({ icon, title, description, action }) {
  return <div className="ui-empty-state">{icon && <span className="ui-empty-icon">{icon}</span>}<strong>{title}</strong>{description && <p>{description}</p>}{action}</div>;
}

export function SkeletonCard() {
  return <div className="design-card skeleton-card" aria-hidden="true"><div className="skeleton skeleton-thumb"/><div className="skeleton skeleton-line wide"/><div className="skeleton skeleton-line"/></div>;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/export-renderer-entry.js (2026-07-16 03:43:06) =====
import { StaticCanvas } from 'fabric';
import { elementToObject, paintToFabric } from './lib/fabricAdapter.js';
import { ensureFontsLoaded } from './lib/fonts.js';
import { normalizePrintSettings } from './lib/designSystem.js';

let canvas = null;
let lastPrintSpec = null;

export async function render(document, pageIndex = 0) {
  const page = document.pages[pageIndex];
  if (!page) throw new Error(`Page ${pageIndex} not found.`);
  const requestedFonts = (page.elements || []).flatMap(item => item.type === 'text' ? [item.fontFamily] : ['chart', 'table'].includes(item.type) ? [item.options?.fontFamily] : []).filter(Boolean);
  const fontResult = await ensureFontsLoaded(requestedFonts, { timeoutMs: 15000 });
  if (fontResult.failed.length) {
    const details = fontResult.failed.map(item => `${item.fontFamily}: ${item.error || 'unavailable'}`).join('; ');
    throw new Error(`Export stopped because the design fonts could not be loaded. ${details}`);
  }
  const element = globalThis.document.getElementById('export-canvas');
  if (!element) throw new Error('Export canvas element is missing.');
  canvas?.dispose?.();
  lastPrintSpec = normalizePrintSettings(document.print, document.width, document.height);
  canvas = new StaticCanvas(element, {
    width: document.width,
    height: document.height,
    backgroundColor: page.transparentBackground ? 'transparent' : paintToFabric(page.backgroundPaint ?? page.background, document.width, document.height, '#ffffff'),
    enableRetinaScaling: false,
    renderOnAddRemove: false
  });
  const sorted = [...(page.elements || [])].filter(item => !item.hidden).sort((a,b)=>(a.zIndex||0)-(b.zIndex||0));
  for (const item of sorted) {
    const object = await elementToObject(item);
    object.set({ selectable: false, evented: false });
    canvas.add(object);
  }
  canvas.requestRenderAll();
  await new Promise(resolve => requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(resolve)));
  return { width: document.width, height: document.height, print: lastPrintSpec };
}

export function dataUrl(format = 'png', multiplier = 1, quality = .92) {
  if (!canvas) throw new Error('Render has not completed.');
  return canvas.toDataURL({ format: format === 'jpeg' ? 'jpeg' : 'png', multiplier, quality, enableRetinaScaling: false });
}

export function svg() {
  if (!canvas) throw new Error('Render has not completed.');
  return canvas.toSVG({ suppressPreamble: false });
}


export function printSpec() {
  return lastPrintSpec ? structuredClone(lastPrintSpec) : null;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/accessibility.js (2026-07-10 01:52:52) =====
const luminance = hex => {
  const value = String(hex || '').replace('#', '');
  if (!/^[0-9a-f]{6}$/i.test(value)) return null;
  const channels = [0, 2, 4].map(index => parseInt(value.slice(index, index + 2), 16) / 255)
    .map(channel => channel <= .03928 ? channel / 12.92 : ((channel + .055) / 1.055) ** 2.4);
  return .2126 * channels[0] + .7152 * channels[1] + .0722 * channels[2];
};

export function contrastRatio(foreground, background) {
  const a = luminance(foreground), b = luminance(background);
  if (a == null || b == null) return null;
  return (Math.max(a, b) + .05) / (Math.min(a, b) + .05);
}

export function auditAccessibility(document) {
  const issues = [];
  const push = (severity, rule, message, pageId, elementId, fix = null) => issues.push({ id: `${rule}-${pageId}-${elementId || issues.length}`, severity, rule, message, pageId, elementId, fix });
  for (const page of document?.pages || []) {
    const visible = (page.elements || []).filter(element => !element.hidden);
    const readingOrder = [...visible].sort((a, b) => a.y - b.y || a.x - b.x);
    readingOrder.forEach((element, index) => {
      if (!element.accessibilityLabel && ['image', 'svg', 'chart', 'qrcode'].includes(element.type)) push('warning', 'missing-alt-text', `${element.name || element.type} needs an accessibility description.`, page.id, element.id, { accessibilityLabel: element.name || element.role || element.type });
      if (element.type === 'text') {
        const background = page.elements.find(item => item.id === element.parentId)?.fill || page.background || '#ffffff';
        const ratio = contrastRatio(element.fill, background);
        const minimum = Number(element.fontSize || 16) >= 24 || Number(element.fontWeight || 400) >= 700 && Number(element.fontSize || 16) >= 18.66 ? 3 : 4.5;
        if (ratio != null && ratio < minimum) push('warning', 'wcag-contrast', `${element.name || 'Text'} has ${ratio.toFixed(2)}:1 contrast; ${minimum}:1 is recommended.`, page.id, element.id);
      }
      if (element.readingOrder == null || Number(element.readingOrder) !== index + 1) push('info', 'reading-order', `${element.name || element.type} is not explicitly ordered for assistive technology.`, page.id, element.id, { readingOrder: index + 1 });
    });
  }
  return { issues, counts: issues.reduce((result, issue) => ({ ...result, [issue.severity]: (result[issue.severity] || 0) + 1 }), {}), score: Math.max(0, 100 - issues.filter(issue => issue.severity === 'warning').length * 6 - issues.filter(issue => issue.severity === 'critical').length * 15) };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/analytics.js (2026-07-10 01:52:54) =====
const KEY = 'design-commons-product-events';
const MAX_EVENTS = 500;

function read() {
  try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(KEY) || '[]'); }
  catch { return []; }
}

export function trackProductEvent(name, properties = {}) {
  const event = {
    id: globalThis.crypto?.randomUUID?.() || `${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,
    name,
    properties,
    createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    sessionId: sessionStorage.getItem('design-commons-session-id') || null
  };
  try {
    if (!event.sessionId) {
      event.sessionId = globalThis.crypto?.randomUUID?.() || `${Date.now()}`;
      sessionStorage.setItem('design-commons-session-id', event.sessionId);
    }
    localStorage.setItem(KEY, JSON.stringify([...read(), event].slice(-MAX_EVENTS)));
  } catch {}
  globalThis.dispatchEvent?.(new CustomEvent('design-commons:analytics', { detail: event }));
  return event;
}

export function readProductEvents() { return read(); }

export function analyticsSummary(events = read()) {
  const counts = {};
  for (const event of events) counts[event.name] = (counts[event.name] || 0) + 1;
  return { total: events.length, counts, latest: events.at(-1)?.createdAt || null, recent: events.slice(-50).reverse() };
}

export function clearProductEvents() {
  try { localStorage.removeItem(KEY); } catch {}
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/api.js (2026-07-15 01:22:39) =====
import { readMigratedStorage } from './appMeta.js';
export const apiOrigin = import.meta.env.VITE_API_ORIGIN || '';
const API = apiOrigin;
const PUBLIC_API = import.meta.env.VITE_PUBLIC_API_ORIGIN || '';
const getToken = () => readMigratedStorage('session') || '';
const getWorkspace = () => readMigratedStorage('organization') || '';

async function request(path, options = {}) {
  const headers = new Headers(options.headers || {});
  const token = getToken();
  if (token) headers.set('authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);
  const workspace = getWorkspace();
  if (workspace) {
    headers.set('x-workspace-id', workspace);
    headers.set('x-organization-id', workspace);
  }
  if (options.body && !(options.body instanceof FormData)) headers.set('content-type', 'application/json');
  const response = await fetch(`${API}${path}`, { ...options, headers });
  if (!response.ok) {
    const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
    const error = new Error(payload.error || `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`);
    error.status = response.status;
    error.payload = payload;
    throw error;
  }
  if (response.status === 204) return null;
  return response.json();
}
const jsonBody = value => JSON.stringify(value);

export const api = {
  login: (email, password) => request('/api/auth/login', { method: 'POST', body: jsonBody({ email, password }) }),
  register: input => request('/api/auth/register', { method: 'POST', body: jsonBody(input) }),

  listAssets: (params = {}) => { const q = new URLSearchParams(Object.entries(params).filter(([, value]) => value !== '' && value != null)); return request(`/api/assets${q.size ? `?${q}` : ''}`); },
  listAssetFolders: () => request('/api/assets/folders'),
  createAssetFolder: name => request('/api/assets/folders', { method: 'POST', body: jsonBody({ name }) }),
  uploadAssets: (files, { folderId = '', tags = [], sourceType = 'upload', sourceJobId = '' } = {}) => {
    const body = new FormData();
    for (const file of files) body.append('files', file);

  },
  uploadAsset: async (file, options = {}) => { const result = await api.uploadAssets([file], options); return Array.isArray(result) ? result[0] : result; },
  updateAsset: (id, input) => request(`/api/assets/${id}`, { method: 'PATCH', body: jsonBody(input) }),
  assetUsage: id => request(`/api/assets/${id}/usage`),

  listTemplates: (params = {}) => { const q = new URLSearchParams(Object.entries(params).filter(([, value]) => value !== '' && value != null)); return request(`/api/templates${q.size ? `?${q}` : ''}`); },
  getTemplate: id => request(`/api/templates/${id}`),
