  listComponents: (q = '') => request(`/api/components${q ? `?q=${encodeURIComponent(q)}` : ''}`),

  createExport: (designId, format, options = {}) => request(`/api/designs/${designId}/exports`, { method: 'POST', body: jsonBody({ format, options }) }),
  listExports: designId => request(`/api/designs/${designId}/exports`),

  billingSummary: () => request('/api/billing/summary'),

  billingCheckout: input => request('/api/billing/checkout', { method: 'POST', body: jsonBody(input) }),

  creditLedger: (limit = 100) => request(`/api/credits/ledger?limit=${limit}`),

  marketplaceListings: (params = {}) => { const q = new URLSearchParams(Object.entries(params).filter(([, value]) => value !== '' && value != null)); return request(`/api/marketplace/listings${q.size ? `?${q}` : ''}`); },
  marketplaceListing: id => request(`/api/marketplace/listings/${id}`),
  publishMarketplaceListing: input => request('/api/marketplace/listings', { method: 'POST', body: jsonBody(input) }),

  publishMarketplaceDraft: id => request(`/api/marketplace/listings/${id}/publish`, { method: 'POST' }),
  purchaseMarketplaceListing: id => request(`/api/marketplace/listings/${id}/purchase`, { method: 'POST' }),
  installMarketplaceListing: (id, workspaceId) => request(`/api/marketplace/listings/${id}/install`, { method: 'POST', body: jsonBody({ workspaceId }) }),
  marketplacePurchases: () => request('/api/marketplace/purchases'),
  marketplaceEarnings: () => request('/api/marketplace/earnings'),
  reportMarketplaceListing: (id, reason) => request(`/api/marketplace/listings/${id}/report`, { method: 'POST', body: jsonBody({ reason }) }),

  audit: () => request('/api/audit'),
  publicShare: async (token, password = '') => {
    const headers = password ? { 'x-share-password': password } : {};
    const response = await fetch(`${PUBLIC_API}/api/public/share/${encodeURIComponent(token)}`, { headers });
    if (!response.ok) {
      const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      const error = new Error(payload.error || 'Unable to open share.');
      error.status = response.status; error.payload = payload; throw error;
    }
    return response.json();
  }
};

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/appearance.js (2026-07-05 15:26:03) =====
export const PAINT_TYPES = ['none', 'solid', 'linear', 'radial', 'pattern'];
export const BLEND_MODES = [
  ['source-over', 'Normal'], ['multiply', 'Multiply'], ['screen', 'Screen'], ['overlay', 'Overlay'],
  ['darken', 'Darken'], ['lighten', 'Lighten'], ['color-dodge', 'Colour dodge'],
  ['color-burn', 'Colour burn'], ['hard-light', 'Hard light'], ['soft-light', 'Soft light'],
  ['difference', 'Difference'], ['exclusion', 'Exclusion'], ['hue', 'Hue'],
  ['saturation', 'Saturation'], ['color', 'Colour'], ['luminosity', 'Luminosity']
];
export const PATTERN_TYPES = [
  ['stripes', 'Stripes'], ['dots', 'Dots'], ['grid', 'Grid'], ['checker', 'Checkerboard'],
  ['crosshatch', 'Crosshatch'], ['zigzag', 'Zigzag']
];

const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
const layerId = prefix => `${prefix}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10)}`;
export const clamp01 = value => clamp(Number(value ?? 1), 0, 1);
export const normalizeHex = (value, fallback = '#000000') => {
  const input = String(value || '').trim();
  if (/^#[0-9a-f]{6}$/i.test(input)) return input.toLowerCase();
  if (/^#[0-9a-f]{3}$/i.test(input)) return `#${input.slice(1).split('').map(char => char + char).join('')}`.toLowerCase();
  return fallback;
};
export const colorWithOpacity = (color, opacity = 1) => {
  const hex = normalizeHex(color);
  const alpha = clamp01(opacity);
  const red = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16);
  const green = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16);
  const blue = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16);
  return `rgba(${red}, ${green}, ${blue}, ${alpha})`;
};

export const solidPaint = (color = '#4f46e5', opacity = 1) => ({ type: 'solid', color: normalizeHex(color, '#4f46e5'), opacity: clamp01(opacity) });
export const nonePaint = () => ({ type: 'none' });
export const defaultGradientStops = () => [
  { offset: 0, color: '#4f46e5', opacity: 1 },
  { offset: 1, color: '#ec4899', opacity: 1 }
];

export function normalizePaint(value, fallback = '#4f46e5') {
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    if (!value || value === 'transparent') return nonePaint();
    return solidPaint(value, 1);
  }
  const source = value && typeof value === 'object' ? value : solidPaint(fallback);
  const type = PAINT_TYPES.includes(source.type) ? source.type : 'solid';
  if (type === 'none') return nonePaint();
  if (type === 'solid') return solidPaint(source.color || fallback, source.opacity ?? 1);
  if (type === 'pattern') return {
    type,
    pattern: PATTERN_TYPES.some(([id]) => id === source.pattern) ? source.pattern : 'stripes',
    foreground: normalizeHex(source.foreground || source.color || fallback, fallback),
    background: normalizeHex(source.background || '#ffffff', '#ffffff'),
    foregroundOpacity: clamp01(source.foregroundOpacity ?? source.opacity ?? 1),
    backgroundOpacity: clamp01(source.backgroundOpacity ?? 1),
    scale: clamp(Number(source.scale || 24), 6, 160),
    spacing: clamp(Number(source.spacing || 12), 2, 100),
    lineWidth: clamp(Number(source.lineWidth || 4), 1, 40),
    angle: Number.isFinite(Number(source.angle)) ? Number(source.angle) : 45
  };
  const stops = (Array.isArray(source.stops) && source.stops.length >= 2 ? source.stops : defaultGradientStops())
    .map(stop => ({
      offset: clamp(Number(stop.offset ?? 0), 0, 1),
      color: normalizeHex(stop.color || fallback, fallback),
      opacity: clamp01(stop.opacity ?? 1)
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => a.offset - b.offset);
  if (type === 'linear') return { type, angle: Number(source.angle || 0), stops };
  return {
    type: 'radial',
    centerX: clamp01(source.centerX ?? .5),
    centerY: clamp01(source.centerY ?? .5),
    radius: clamp(Number(source.radius ?? .7), .05, 2),
    stops
  };
}

export function normalizeStroke(value = {}, legacy = {}) {
  const source = value && typeof value === 'object' ? value : {};
  const legacyColor = legacy.stroke && legacy.stroke !== 'transparent' ? legacy.stroke : '#111827';
  const width = Math.max(0, Number(source.width ?? legacy.strokeWidth ?? 0));
  return {
    id: source.id || layerId('stroke'),
    name: String(source.name || 'Stroke').slice(0, 80),
    enabled: source.enabled ?? width > 0,
    color: normalizeHex(source.color || legacyColor, '#111827'),
    opacity: clamp01(source.opacity ?? 1),
    width,
    alignment: ['inside', 'center', 'outside'].includes(source.alignment) ? source.alignment : 'center',
    style: ['solid', 'dashed', 'dotted', 'custom'].includes(source.style) ? source.style : 'solid',
    dash: Math.max(1, Number(source.dash || 10)),
    gap: Math.max(1, Number(source.gap || 8)),
    lineCap: ['butt', 'round', 'square'].includes(source.lineCap) ? source.lineCap : 'round',
    lineJoin: ['miter', 'round', 'bevel'].includes(source.lineJoin) ? source.lineJoin : 'round',
    blendMode: BLEND_MODES.some(([id]) => id === source.blendMode) ? source.blendMode : 'source-over'
  };
}

export function normalizeShadow(value = {}, legacyShadow = null) {
  const source = value && typeof value === 'object' ? value : (legacyShadow || {});
  const legacyEnabled = !!legacyShadow;
  return {
    id: source.id || layerId('shadow'),
    name: String(source.name || (source.type === 'inner' ? 'Inner shadow' : 'Drop shadow')).slice(0, 80),
    enabled: source.enabled ?? legacyEnabled,
    type: source.type === 'inner' ? 'inner' : 'drop',
    color: normalizeHex(source.color || '#000000', '#000000'),
    opacity: clamp01(source.opacity ?? (legacyEnabled ? .3 : .25)),
    blur: clamp(Number(source.blur || 0), 0, 160),
    spread: clamp(Number(source.spread || 0), -100, 200),
    offsetX: clamp(Number(source.offsetX || 0), -200, 200),
    offsetY: clamp(Number(source.offsetY || 0), -200, 200),
    blendMode: BLEND_MODES.some(([id]) => id === source.blendMode) ? source.blendMode : 'source-over'
  };
}

export function normalizeFillLayer(value = {}, fallback = '#4f46e5') {
  const source = value && typeof value === 'object' && 'paint' in value ? value : { paint: value };
  return {
    id: source.id || layerId('fill'),
    name: String(source.name || 'Fill').slice(0, 80),
    enabled: source.enabled !== false,
    opacity: clamp01(source.opacity ?? 1),
    blendMode: BLEND_MODES.some(([id]) => id === source.blendMode) ? source.blendMode : 'source-over',
    paint: normalizePaint(source.paint, fallback)
  };
}

export function normalizeEffect(value = {}) {
  const source = value && typeof value === 'object' ? value : {};
  return {
    id: source.id || layerId('effect'),
    name: String(source.name || (source.type === 'background-blur' ? 'Background blur' : 'Layer blur')).slice(0, 80),
    enabled: source.enabled !== false,
    type: source.type === 'background-blur' ? 'background-blur' : 'layer-blur',
    amount: clamp(Number(source.amount || 0), 0, 160)
  };
}

function legacyStrokeInput(element = {}, existing = {}) {
  const effectStroke = element.effect?.stroke;
  const useEffectStroke = !!effectStroke && !existing.stroke;
  const stroke = useEffectStroke ? effectStroke : element.stroke;
  const strokeWidth = useEffectStroke
    ? Number(element.effect?.strokeWidth || 0)
    : Number(element.strokeWidth || 0);

  return {
    legacy: {
      stroke: stroke || 'transparent',
      strokeWidth
    },
    layer: {
      name: 'Stroke',
      enabled: !!stroke && stroke !== 'transparent' && strokeWidth > 0,
      color: stroke && stroke !== 'transparent' ? stroke : '#111827',
      width: strokeWidth
    }
  };
}

function repairGeometryLeakedStroke(rawStrokes, element, snapshot, fallbackLayer) {
  if (!snapshot || !rawStrokes.length) return rawStrokes;

  const first = rawStrokes[0];
  if (!first || typeof first !== 'object') return rawStrokes;

  const storedWidth = Number(first.width || 0);
  const intendedWidth = Number(snapshot.strokeWidth || 0);

  // Older builds passed the entire element object into normalizeStroke().
  // Because elements also have a `width` field, that geometry width became
  // the outline width (for example, a 676px text box produced a 676px stroke).
  // The generated layer also inherited the element name, which gives us a
  // reliable migration signal without modifying legitimate custom strokes.
  const looksLikeGeometryLeak =
    first.name === element.name &&
    storedWidth > Math.max(32, intendedWidth * 8) &&
    storedWidth !== intendedWidth;

  if (!looksLikeGeometryLeak) return rawStrokes;
  return [{ ...first, ...fallbackLayer }, ...rawStrokes.slice(1)];
}

export function normalizeAppearance(element = {}) {
  const existing = element.appearance && typeof element.appearance === 'object' ? element.appearance : {};
  const transparentByDefault = ['image', 'line', 'path', 'chart', 'table', 'qrcode'].includes(element.type);
  const fallbackFill = element.type === 'text' ? '#111827' : element.fill || '#4f46e5';
  const sourceFill = existing.fill ?? element.fill ?? (transparentByDefault ? { type: 'none' } : fallbackFill);
  const legacyShadow = element.effect?.shadow || null;
  const strokeInput = legacyStrokeInput(element, existing);
  const legacyStroke = strokeInput.legacy;
  const snapshot = existing.legacySnapshot && typeof existing.legacySnapshot === 'object' ? existing.legacySnapshot : null;
  const changed = (value, previous) => snapshot && JSON.stringify(value ?? null) !== JSON.stringify(previous ?? null);

  let rawFills = Array.isArray(existing.fills) && existing.fills.length ? existing.fills : [sourceFill];
  let rawStrokes = Array.isArray(existing.strokes) && existing.strokes.length
    ? existing.strokes
    : [existing.stroke ?? strokeInput.layer];
  let rawShadows = Array.isArray(existing.shadows) && existing.shadows.length ? existing.shadows : [existing.shadow ?? legacyShadow ?? {}];

  rawStrokes = repairGeometryLeakedStroke(rawStrokes, element, snapshot, strokeInput.layer);

  if (changed(element.fill, snapshot?.fill)) {
    rawFills = [...rawFills];
    rawFills[0] = { ...(rawFills[0] && typeof rawFills[0] === 'object' && 'paint' in rawFills[0] ? rawFills[0] : {}), paint: element.fill };
  }
  if (changed(element.stroke, snapshot?.stroke) || changed(element.strokeWidth, snapshot?.strokeWidth)) {
    rawStrokes = [...rawStrokes];
    rawStrokes[0] = { ...(rawStrokes[0] && typeof rawStrokes[0] === 'object' ? rawStrokes[0] : {}), enabled: element.stroke !== 'transparent' && Number(element.strokeWidth || 0) > 0, color: element.stroke || '#111827', width: Number(element.strokeWidth || 0) };
  }
  if (changed(legacyShadow, snapshot?.effectShadow)) {
    rawShadows = [...rawShadows];
    rawShadows[0] = legacyShadow ? { ...(rawShadows[0] || {}), ...legacyShadow, enabled: true, type: 'drop' } : { ...(rawShadows[0] || {}), enabled: false };
  }

  const fills = rawFills.map(value => normalizeFillLayer(value, fallbackFill)).slice(0, 12);
  const strokes = rawStrokes.map(value => normalizeStroke(value, legacyStroke)).slice(0, 12);
  const shadows = rawShadows.map(value => normalizeShadow(value, legacyShadow)).slice(0, 12);
  const effects = (Array.isArray(existing.effects) ? existing.effects : []).map(normalizeEffect).slice(0, 12);
  const primaryFill = fills.find(layer => layer.enabled) || fills[0] || normalizeFillLayer(sourceFill, fallbackFill);
  const primaryStroke = strokes.find(layer => layer.enabled) || strokes[0] || normalizeStroke({}, legacyStroke);
  const primaryShadow = shadows.find(layer => layer.enabled) || shadows[0] || normalizeShadow({}, legacyShadow);
  return {
    fills,
    strokes,
    shadows,
    effects,
    fill: primaryFill.paint,
    stroke: primaryStroke,
    shadow: primaryShadow,
    blendMode: BLEND_MODES.some(([id]) => id === existing.blendMode) ? existing.blendMode : 'source-over',
    legacySnapshot: {
      fill: element.fill ?? null,
      stroke: element.stroke ?? null,
      strokeWidth: element.strokeWidth ?? null,
      effectShadow: legacyShadow
    }
  };
}

export function paintPrimaryColor(paint, fallback = '#4f46e5') {
  const normalized = normalizePaint(paint, fallback);
  if (normalized.type === 'solid') return normalized.color;
  if (normalized.type === 'pattern') return normalized.foreground;
  return normalized.stops?.[0]?.color || fallback;
}

export function paintToCss(paint, fallback = '#ffffff') {
  const value = normalizePaint(paint, fallback);
  if (value.type === 'none') return 'transparent';
  if (value.type === 'solid') return colorWithOpacity(value.color, value.opacity);
  if (value.type === 'linear') return `linear-gradient(${value.angle}deg, ${value.stops.map(stop => `${colorWithOpacity(stop.color, stop.opacity)} ${Math.round(stop.offset * 100)}%`).join(', ')})`;
  if (value.type === 'radial') return `radial-gradient(circle at ${Math.round(value.centerX * 100)}% ${Math.round(value.centerY * 100)}%, ${value.stops.map(stop => `${colorWithOpacity(stop.color, stop.opacity)} ${Math.round(stop.offset * 100)}%`).join(', ')})`;
  const fg = colorWithOpacity(value.foreground, value.foregroundOpacity);
  const bg = colorWithOpacity(value.background, value.backgroundOpacity);
  const size = Math.max(8, value.scale);
  if (value.pattern === 'dots') return `radial-gradient(${fg} ${Math.max(1, value.lineWidth)}px, ${bg} ${Math.max(1, value.lineWidth)}px) 0 0/${size}px ${size}px`;
  if (value.pattern === 'grid') return `linear-gradient(${fg} ${Math.max(1, value.lineWidth)}px, transparent ${Math.max(1, value.lineWidth)}px), linear-gradient(90deg, ${fg} ${Math.max(1, value.lineWidth)}px, ${bg} ${Math.max(1, value.lineWidth)}px) 0 0/${size}px ${size}px`;
  if (value.pattern === 'checker') return `conic-gradient(${fg} 25%, ${bg} 0 50%, ${fg} 0 75%, ${bg} 0) 0 0/${size}px ${size}px`;
  return `repeating-linear-gradient(${value.angle}deg, ${fg} 0 ${value.lineWidth}px, ${bg} ${value.lineWidth}px ${Math.max(value.lineWidth + 1, value.spacing)}px)`;
}

export function strokeDashArray(stroke) {
  const value = normalizeStroke(stroke);
  if (!value.enabled || value.style === 'solid') return null;
  if (value.style === 'dotted') return [Math.max(1, value.width), Math.max(value.width * 2, value.gap)];
  return [value.dash, value.gap];
}

export function collectDocumentColors(document) {
  const colors = new Set();
  const addPaint = paint => {
    const value = normalizePaint(paint);
    if (value.type === 'solid') colors.add(value.color);
    else if (value.type === 'pattern') { colors.add(value.foreground); colors.add(value.background); }
    else value.stops?.forEach(stop => colors.add(stop.color));
  };
  for (const page of document?.pages || []) {
    addPaint(page.backgroundPaint ?? page.background);
    for (const element of page.elements || []) {
      const appearance = normalizeAppearance(element);
      appearance.fills.filter(layer => layer.enabled).forEach(layer => addPaint(layer.paint));
      appearance.strokes.filter(layer => layer.enabled).forEach(layer => colors.add(layer.color));
      appearance.shadows.filter(layer => layer.enabled).forEach(layer => colors.add(layer.color));
      if (element.type === 'chart') (element.options?.colors || []).forEach(color => colors.add(normalizeHex(color)));
      if (element.type === 'table') ['headerFill', 'headerText', 'cellFill', 'alternateFill', 'textColor', 'borderColor'].forEach(key => element.options?.[key] && colors.add(normalizeHex(element.options[key])));
    }
  }
  return [...colors].slice(0, 32);
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/appMeta.js (2026-07-13 01:33:20) =====
export const APP_NAME = 'Design Commons';
export const APP_SLUG = 'design-commons';
export const LEGACY_APP_NAME = 'CanvasForge';
export const LEGACY_APP_SLUG = 'canvasforge';

export const STORAGE_KEYS = {
  session: `${APP_SLUG}-session`,
  organization: `${APP_SLUG}-org`,
  workspace: `${APP_SLUG}-workspace`,
  clipboard: `${APP_SLUG}-clipboard`,
  style: `${APP_SLUG}-style`,
  appearanceStyles: `${APP_SLUG}-appearance-styles`,
  recentTools: `${APP_SLUG}-recent-tools`,
  recentColors: `${APP_SLUG}-recent-colors`,
  presetFavourites: `${APP_SLUG}-preset-favourites`,
  presetRecents: `${APP_SLUG}-preset-recents`,
  aiAgent: `${APP_SLUG}-ai-agent`
};

export const LEGACY_STORAGE_KEYS = {
  session: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-session`,
  organization: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-org`,
  workspace: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-workspace`,
  clipboard: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-clipboard`,
  style: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-style`,
  appearanceStyles: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-appearance-styles`,
  recentTools: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-recent-tools`,
  recentColors: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-recent-colors`,
  presetFavourites: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-preset-favourites`,
  presetRecents: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-preset-recents`,
  aiAgent: `${LEGACY_APP_SLUG}-ai-agent`
};

export const CLIPBOARD_PREFIX = 'DESIGN_COMMONS:';
export const LEGACY_CLIPBOARD_PREFIX = 'CANVASFORGE:';
export const ASSET_DRAG_TYPE = 'application/x-design-commons-asset';
export const LEGACY_ASSET_DRAG_TYPE = 'application/x-canvasforge-asset';
export const LAYER_DRAG_TYPE = 'application/x-design-commons-layer';
export const LEGACY_LAYER_DRAG_TYPE = 'application/x-canvasforge-layer';
export const ESCAPE_EVENT = 'design-commons:escape';
export const LEGACY_ESCAPE_EVENT = 'canvasforge:escape';

export function readMigratedStorage(name, fallback = '') {
  const key = STORAGE_KEYS[name];
  const legacyKey = LEGACY_STORAGE_KEYS[name];
  if (!key) return fallback;
  const current = localStorage.getItem(key);
  if (current != null) return current;
  const legacy = legacyKey ? localStorage.getItem(legacyKey) : null;
  if (legacy != null) {
    localStorage.setItem(key, legacy);
    return legacy;
  }
  return fallback;
}

export function writeStorage(name, value) {
  const key = STORAGE_KEYS[name];
  if (!key) return;
  if (value == null) localStorage.removeItem(key);
  else localStorage.setItem(key, String(value));
}

export function removeStorage(name, { includeLegacy = true } = {}) {
  const key = STORAGE_KEYS[name];
  if (key) localStorage.removeItem(key);
  if (includeLegacy && LEGACY_STORAGE_KEYS[name]) localStorage.removeItem(LEGACY_STORAGE_KEYS[name]);
}

export function designFileName(title = 'design') {
  const slug = String(title || 'design').replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]+/gi, '-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '').toLowerCase();
  return slug || `${APP_SLUG}-design`;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/assetIntelligence.js (2026-07-10 01:52:58) =====
const words = value => String(value || '').toLowerCase().split(/[^a-z0-9]+/).filter(item => item.length > 1);

export function inferAssetMetadata(asset = {}) {
  const tokens = words(`${asset.original_name || asset.name || ''} ${(asset.tags || []).join(' ')} ${asset.description || ''}`);
  const tags = new Set(asset.tags || []);
  for (const token of tokens) if (!/^\d+$/.test(token) && token.length <= 40) tags.add(token);
  const width = Number(asset.width || 0), height = Number(asset.height || 0);
  if (width && height) {
    const ratio = width / height;
    tags.add(ratio > 1.25 ? 'landscape' : ratio < .8 ? 'portrait' : 'square');
    if (Math.min(width, height) >= 2000) tags.add('print-ready');
    else if (Math.min(width, height) && Math.min(width, height) < 700) tags.add('low-resolution');
  }
  if (/logo|mark|icon/.test(tokens.join(' '))) tags.add('brand-asset');
  if (/transparent|cutout|isolated/.test(tokens.join(' '))) tags.add('transparent');
  return { tags: [...tags].slice(0, 40), orientation: width && height ? (width > height ? 'landscape' : width < height ? 'portrait' : 'square') : 'unknown', printReady: Math.min(width, height) >= 2000 };
}

export function assetSemanticScore(asset = {}, query = '') {
  if (!query.trim()) return 0;
  const queryWords = words(query);
  const haystack = words(`${asset.original_name || asset.name || ''} ${(asset.tags || []).join(' ')} ${asset.description || ''} ${inferAssetMetadata(asset).tags.join(' ')}`);
  const set = new Set(haystack);
  let score = 0;
  for (const word of queryWords) {
    if (set.has(word)) score += 10;
    else if (haystack.some(token => token.includes(word) || word.includes(token))) score += 4;
  }
  const phrase = query.toLowerCase();
  const full = haystack.join(' ');
  if (full.includes(phrase)) score += 30;
  return score;
}

export function rankAssets(assets = [], query = '') {
  return [...assets].map(asset => ({ asset, score: assetSemanticScore(asset, query), metadata: inferAssetMetadata(asset) }))
    .filter(item => !query.trim() || item.score > 0)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || Number(b.asset.favorite) - Number(a.asset.favorite) || String(a.asset.original_name || '').localeCompare(String(b.asset.original_name || '')));
}

export function probableDuplicateGroups(assets = []) {
  const groups = new Map();
  for (const asset of assets) {
    const name = String(asset.original_name || asset.name || '').toLowerCase().replace(/\s*\(copy\)|[-_ ]copy\d*|\d+(?=\.[a-z]+$)/g, '').replace(/\.[a-z0-9]+$/, '');
    const key = asset.content_hash || `${name}|${asset.width || 0}x${asset.height || 0}`;
    if (!groups.has(key)) groups.set(key, []);
    groups.get(key).push(asset);
  }
  return [...groups.values()].filter(group => group.length > 1);
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/clipboard.js (2026-07-12 19:21:25) =====
const IMAGE_URL = /^(?:https?:|data:image\/)/i;

function decodeHtmlAttribute(value) {
  return String(value || '')
    .replace(/&amp;/gi, '&')
    .replace(/&quot;/gi, '"')
    .replace(/&#39;|&apos;/gi, "'")
    .replace(/&lt;/gi, '<')
    .replace(/&gt;/gi, '>');
}

export function imageSourcesFromHtml(html) {
  const markup = String(html || '');
  if (!markup) return [];
  let sources = [];
  if (typeof DOMParser !== 'undefined') {
    const document = new DOMParser().parseFromString(markup, 'text/html');
    sources = [...document.querySelectorAll('img')].map(image => image.currentSrc || image.src || image.getAttribute('src'));
  } else {
    sources = [...markup.matchAll(/<img\b[^>]*?\bsrc\s*=\s*(?:(["'])(.*?)\1|([^\s>]+))/gi)]
      .map(match => decodeHtmlAttribute(match[2] || match[3]));
  }
  return [...new Set(sources.map(source => String(source || '').trim()).filter(source => IMAGE_URL.test(source)))];
}

export async function imageFilesFromHtml(html, { fetcher = fetch, limit = 20 } = {}) {
  const files = [];
  for (const source of imageSourcesFromHtml(html).slice(0, limit)) {
    try {
      const response = await fetcher(source);
      if (!response.ok) continue;
      const blob = await response.blob();
      const type = String(blob.type || response.headers?.get?.('content-type') || '').split(';')[0].toLowerCase();
      if (!type.startsWith('image/')) continue;
      const pathname = source.startsWith('data:') ? '' : new URL(source).pathname;
      const sourceName = decodeURIComponent(pathname.split('/').pop() || '').replace(/[^a-z0-9._-]+/gi, '-');
      const extension = type.split('/')[1]?.replace('jpeg', 'jpg') || 'png';
      const name = sourceName || `pasted-${Date.now()}.${extension}`;
      files.push(new File([blob], name, { type }));
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('[clipboard] Failed to turn an HTML image into a file.', {
        source: source.startsWith('data:') ? `${source.slice(0, 32)}…` : source,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
      });
    }
  }
  return files;
}

export function logClipboardFailure(context, error, details = {}) {
  console.error(`[clipboard] ${context}`, {
    ...details,
    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    stack: error instanceof Error ? error.stack : undefined
  });
}

export async function imageFilesFromClipboard(data, context = 'clipboard') {
  const items = [...(data?.items || [])];
  const files = [...(data?.files || [])].filter(file => file.type?.startsWith('image/'));
  const seen = new Set(files.map(f => `${f.name}|${f.size}|${f.type}`));
  for (const item of items) {
    if (item.kind !== 'file' || !item.type?.startsWith('image/')) continue;
    const file = item.getAsFile?.();
    if (file) {
      const key = `${file.name}|${file.size}|${file.type}`;
      if (!seen.has(key)) {
        seen.add(key);
        files.push(file);
      }
    }
  }
  const html = data?.getData?.('text/html') || '';
  if (!files.length && html) files.push(...await imageFilesFromHtml(html));
  console.warn(`[clipboard] ${context} received paste.`, {
    types: [...(data?.types || [])],
    items: items.map(item => `${item.kind}:${item.type}`),
    imageFiles: files.map(file => ({ name: file.name, type: file.type, size: file.size })),
    hasHtml: !!html
  });
  return files;
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/collaboration.js (2026-07-10 01:53:02) =====
const randomId = prefix => `${prefix}-${globalThis.crypto?.randomUUID?.() || `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`}`;

export class CollaborationTransport {
  constructor({ designId, actor, onPatch, onPresence, onStatus }) {
    this.designId = designId;
    this.actor = { id: actor?.id || randomId('actor'), name: actor?.name || 'Collaborator', color: actor?.color || null };
    this.onPatch = onPatch;
    this.onPresence = onPresence;
    this.onStatus = onStatus;
    this.instanceId = randomId('client');
    this.channel = null;
    this.socket = null;
    this.closed = false;
    this.seen = new Set();
  }

  connect() {
    if (!this.designId || this.closed) return;
    if (typeof BroadcastChannel !== 'undefined') {
      this.channel = new BroadcastChannel(`design-commons-live:${this.designId}`);
      this.channel.onmessage = event => this.receive(event.data);
    }
    const base = String(import.meta.env?.VITE_COLLABORATION_WS || '').trim();
    if (base && typeof WebSocket !== 'undefined') this.connectSocket(base);
    this.onStatus?.({ state: 'connected', mode: this.socket ? 'network' : 'local' });
    this.publishPresence({ state: 'active' });
  }

  connectSocket(base) {
    try {
      const url = new URL(base, location.href);
      url.searchParams.set('designId', this.designId);
      url.searchParams.set('actorId', this.actor.id);
      this.socket = new WebSocket(url);
      this.socket.onopen = () => this.onStatus?.({ state: 'connected', mode: 'network' });
      this.socket.onmessage = event => { try { this.receive(JSON.parse(event.data)); } catch {} };
      this.socket.onclose = () => {
        if (this.closed) return;
        this.onStatus?.({ state: 'reconnecting', mode: 'local' });
        setTimeout(() => !this.closed && this.connectSocket(base), 1500);
      };
      this.socket.onerror = () => this.socket?.close();
    } catch { this.socket = null; }
  }

  envelope(type, payload) {
    return { id: randomId('event'), type, designId: this.designId, instanceId: this.instanceId, actor: this.actor, payload, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() };
  }

  send(type, payload) {
    const message = this.envelope(type, payload);
    this.seen.add(message.id);
    this.channel?.postMessage(message);
    if (this.socket?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) this.socket.send(JSON.stringify(message));
    return message;
  }

  publishPatch(entry, revision) { return this.send('patch', { entry, revision }); }
  publishPresence(presence) { return this.send('presence', presence); }

  receive(message) {
    if (!message || message.designId !== this.designId || message.instanceId === this.instanceId || this.seen.has(message.id)) return;
    this.seen.add(message.id);
    if (this.seen.size > 2000) this.seen = new Set([...this.seen].slice(-1000));
    if (message.type === 'patch') this.onPatch?.(message.payload, message.actor, message);
    if (message.type === 'presence') this.onPresence?.(message.payload, message.actor, message);
  }

  close() {
    if (this.closed) return;
    this.publishPresence({ state: 'left' });
    this.closed = true;
    this.channel?.close();
    this.socket?.close();
    this.channel = null;
    this.socket = null;
    this.onStatus?.({ state: 'disconnected', mode: 'local' });
  }
}

  }
];

export const DEFAULT_COLORS = DEFAULT_COLOR_GROUPS.flatMap(group => group.colors);

export function normalizeColor(value, fallback = '#000000') {
  const raw = String(value || '').trim();
  if (/^#[0-9a-f]{6}$/i.test(raw)) return raw.toLowerCase();
  if (/^#[0-9a-f]{3}$/i.test(raw)) return `#${raw.slice(1).split('').map(char => char + char).join('')}`.toLowerCase();
  return /^#[0-9a-f]{6}$/i.test(fallback) ? fallback.toLowerCase() : '#000000';
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/commons.js (2026-07-10 01:55:33) =====
export const COMMONS_RIGHTS_BASES = [
  { id: 'original', label: 'I created this work and own the rights' },
  { id: 'client-authorized', label: 'The rights holder authorized me to share it' },
  { id: 'licensed', label: 'I have a licence that allows redistribution' },
  { id: 'public-domain', label: 'The work is in the public domain' }
];

export const COMMONS_LICENSES = [
  { id: 'design-commons-standard', label: 'Design Commons standard asset licence' },
  { id: 'canvasforge-standard', label: 'Legacy CanvasForge standard licence' },
  { id: 'cc0', label: 'CC0 / public domain dedication' },
  { id: 'cc-by-4.0', label: 'Creative Commons Attribution 4.0' },
  { id: 'cc-by-sa-4.0', label: 'Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0' },
  { id: 'custom', label: 'Custom licence' }
];

const clean = (value, max = 1000) => String(value ?? '').trim().slice(0, max);

export function normalizeCommonsRights(input = {}) {
  return {
    basis: COMMONS_RIGHTS_BASES.some(item => item.id === input.basis) ? input.basis : 'original',
    copyrightOwner: clean(input.copyrightOwner, 240),
    sourceUrl: clean(input.sourceUrl, 2000),
    licenceId: COMMONS_LICENSES.some(item => item.id === input.licenceId) ? input.licenceId : 'design-commons-standard',
    customLicence: clean(input.customLicence, 2000),
    attribution: clean(input.attribution, 500),
    evidenceNote: clean(input.evidenceNote, 2000),
    evidenceUrl: clean(input.evidenceUrl, 2000),
    evidenceReference: clean(input.evidenceReference, 500),
    aiGenerated: input.aiGenerated === true,
    aiModel: clean(input.aiModel, 240),
    containsTrademark: input.containsTrademark === true,
    trademarkPermission: input.trademarkPermission === true,
    containsLikeness: input.containsLikeness === true,
    likenessPermission: input.likenessPermission === true,
    provenanceNote: clean(input.provenanceNote, 2000),
    ownsRights: input.ownsRights === true,
    allowsRedistribution: input.allowsRedistribution === true,
    noRestrictedContent: input.noRestrictedContent === true,
    acceptsTakedown: input.acceptsTakedown === true,
    attestedAt: input.attestedAt || null,
    contentHash: clean(input.contentHash, 256)
  };
}

export function validateCommonsRights(input = {}) {
  const rights = normalizeCommonsRights(input);
  const errors = [];
  if (!rights.copyrightOwner && rights.basis !== 'public-domain') errors.push('Enter the copyright owner or rights holder.');
  if (['licensed', 'client-authorized', 'public-domain'].includes(rights.basis) && !rights.sourceUrl) errors.push('Provide a source or licence URL for this rights basis.');
  if (rights.licenceId === 'custom' && !rights.customLicence) errors.push('Describe the custom licence terms.');
  if (['licensed', 'client-authorized'].includes(rights.basis) && !rights.evidenceNote && !rights.evidenceUrl && !rights.evidenceReference) errors.push('Add a permission or licence evidence reference.');
  if (rights.aiGenerated && !rights.aiModel) errors.push('Identify the model or service used to generate this asset.');
  if (rights.containsTrademark && !rights.trademarkPermission) errors.push('Confirm permission to redistribute included trademarks.');
  if (rights.containsLikeness && !rights.likenessPermission) errors.push('Confirm permission to redistribute included person likenesses.');
  if (!rights.ownsRights) errors.push('Confirm that you own the rights or have permission to publish the work.');
  if (!rights.allowsRedistribution) errors.push('Confirm that the rights allow other people to reuse the asset.');
  if (!rights.noRestrictedContent) errors.push('Confirm that the asset does not contain restricted third-party content.');
  if (!rights.acceptsTakedown) errors.push('Accept the Commons takedown and dispute process.');
  return { valid: errors.length === 0, errors, rights };
}

export function buildCommonsListingPayload(input = {}, rightsInput = {}) {
  const validation = validateCommonsRights(rightsInput);
  if (!validation.valid) throw new Error(validation.errors.join(' '));
  const rights = { ...validation.rights, attestedAt: validation.rights.attestedAt || new Date().toISOString() };
  return {
    title: clean(input.title, 200),
    description: clean(input.description, 5000),
    priceType: Number(input.priceCredits || 0) > 0 ? 'credits' : 'free',
    priceCredits: Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(input.priceCredits || 0))),
    tags: Array.isArray(input.tags) ? input.tags.map(tag => clean(tag, 80)).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 40) : [],
    licenceId: rights.licenceId,
    attribution: rights.attribution,
    rightsDeclaration: rights,
    moderationStatus: 'pending_review',
    provenance: { aiGenerated: rights.aiGenerated, aiModel: rights.aiModel, note: rights.provenanceNote, contentHash: rights.contentHash },
    moderationSignals: { containsTrademark: rights.containsTrademark, containsLikeness: rights.containsLikeness, evidenceProvided: !!(rights.evidenceNote || rights.evidenceUrl || rights.evidenceReference) }
  };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/designSystem.js (2026-07-05 19:48:02) =====
import { normalizeAppearance, normalizePaint, paintPrimaryColor, solidPaint } from './appearance.js';

const clone = value => structuredClone(value);
const id = prefix => `${prefix}-${globalThis.crypto?.randomUUID?.() || `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`}`;
const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.max(min, Math.min(max, Number(value)));

export const DESIGN_STYLE_KINDS = ['text', 'color', 'effect', 'stroke', 'spacing', 'radius', 'grid'];
export const ELEMENT_STYLE_REF_FIELDS = {
  text: 'textStyleId',
  color: 'fillStyleId',
  effect: 'effectStyleId',
  stroke: 'strokeStyleId',
  spacing: 'spacingStyleId',
  radius: 'radiusStyleId'
};

export const DEFAULT_PRINT_SETTINGS = {
  trim: { width: null, height: null },
  bleed: { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0 },
  safeArea: { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0 },
  slug: { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0 },
  marks: { crop: false, registration: false, colorBars: false, pageInformation: false },
  colorSpace: 'rgb',
  iccProfile: 'sRGB IEC61966-2.1',
  pdfPreset: 'screen',
  embedFonts: true,
  outlineFonts: false,
  flattenTransparency: false,
  overprintPreview: false,
  minimumEffectiveDpi: 150
};

export const DEFAULT_DESIGN_SYSTEM = {
  tokens: {
    colors: {},
    spacing: { xs: 4, sm: 8, md: 16, lg: 24, xl: 32, '2xl': 48 },
    radii: { none: 0, sm: 4, md: 8, lg: 16, xl: 24, pill: 999 },
    typography: {},
    effects: {}
  },
  styles: { text: [], color: [], effect: [], stroke: [], spacing: [], radius: [], grid: [] }
};

function normalizeInsets(value = {}) {
  if (typeof value === 'number') return { top: Math.max(0, value), right: Math.max(0, value), bottom: Math.max(0, value), left: Math.max(0, value) };
  return {
    top: Math.max(0, Number(value?.top || 0)),
    right: Math.max(0, Number(value?.right || 0)),
    bottom: Math.max(0, Number(value?.bottom || 0)),
    left: Math.max(0, Number(value?.left || 0))
  };
}

export function normalizePrintSettings(value = {}, width = null, height = null) {
  const source = value && typeof value === 'object' ? value : {};
  return {
    ...DEFAULT_PRINT_SETTINGS,
    ...source,
    trim: {
      width: Number(source.trim?.width) > 0 ? Number(source.trim.width) : width,
      height: Number(source.trim?.height) > 0 ? Number(source.trim.height) : height
    },
    bleed: normalizeInsets(source.bleed),
    safeArea: normalizeInsets(source.safeArea),
    slug: normalizeInsets(source.slug),
    marks: { ...DEFAULT_PRINT_SETTINGS.marks, ...(source.marks || {}) },
    colorSpace: ['rgb', 'cmyk', 'spot'].includes(source.colorSpace) ? source.colorSpace : 'rgb',
    pdfPreset: ['screen', 'print', 'pdf-x-1a', 'pdf-x-3', 'pdf-x-4'].includes(source.pdfPreset) ? source.pdfPreset : 'screen',
    minimumEffectiveDpi: clamp(source.minimumEffectiveDpi ?? 150, 36, 2400)
  };
}

function normalizeStyle(kind, style = {}) {
  const value = style.value && typeof style.value === 'object' ? clone(style.value) : {};
  if (kind === 'color') value.paint = normalizePaint(value.paint ?? value.fill ?? style.paint ?? style.fill ?? '#111827');
  if (kind === 'effect' && value.appearance) value.appearance = normalizeAppearance({ appearance: value.appearance });
  if (kind === 'spacing') value.padding = normalizeInsets(value.padding ?? value);
  if (kind === 'radius') value.radius = Math.max(0, Number(value.radius ?? style.radius ?? 0));
  return {
    id: String(style.id || id(`style-${kind}`)),
    name: String(style.name || `${kind[0].toUpperCase()}${kind.slice(1)} style`).slice(0, 160),
    kind,
    description: String(style.description || '').slice(0, 500),
    semanticRole: String(style.semanticRole || '').slice(0, 100),
    value
  };
}

export function normalizeDesignSystem(value = {}) {
  const source = value && typeof value === 'object' ? value : {};
  const styles = {};
  for (const kind of DESIGN_STYLE_KINDS) styles[kind] = (source.styles?.[kind] || []).map(style => normalizeStyle(kind, style));
  return {
    tokens: {
      colors: { ...(source.tokens?.colors || {}) },
      spacing: { ...DEFAULT_DESIGN_SYSTEM.tokens.spacing, ...(source.tokens?.spacing || {}) },
      radii: { ...DEFAULT_DESIGN_SYSTEM.tokens.radii, ...(source.tokens?.radii || {}) },
      typography: { ...(source.tokens?.typography || {}) },
      effects: { ...(source.tokens?.effects || {}) }
    },
    styles
  };
}

export function findDesignStyle(designSystem, kind, styleId) {
  if (!styleId) return null;
  return designSystem?.styles?.[kind]?.find(style => style.id === styleId) || null;
}

export function resolveLinkedElementStyle(element, designSystem) {
  if (!element || !designSystem) return element;
  const text = findDesignStyle(designSystem, 'text', element.textStyleId);
  const color = findDesignStyle(designSystem, 'color', element.fillStyleId);
  const effect = findDesignStyle(designSystem, 'effect', element.effectStyleId);
  const stroke = findDesignStyle(designSystem, 'stroke', element.strokeStyleId);
  const spacing = findDesignStyle(designSystem, 'spacing', element.spacingStyleId);
  const radius = findDesignStyle(designSystem, 'radius', element.radiusStyleId);
  if (text) Object.assign(element, clone(text.value));
  if (color) {
    const paint = normalizePaint(color.value.paint ?? color.value.fill ?? '#111827');
    element.fill = paint.type === 'none' ? 'transparent' : paintPrimaryColor(paint, element.fill || '#111827');
    const appearance = normalizeAppearance(element);
    appearance.fills[0] = { ...(appearance.fills[0] || {}), enabled: paint.type !== 'none', paint };
    appearance.fill = paint;
    element.appearance = appearance;
  }
  if (effect?.value?.appearance) element.appearance = normalizeAppearance({ ...element, appearance: effect.value.appearance });
  if (effect?.value?.effect) element.effect = { ...(element.effect || {}), ...clone(effect.value.effect) };
  if (stroke) {
    const value = stroke.value || {};
    element.stroke = value.color || value.stroke || 'transparent';
    element.strokeWidth = Math.max(0, Number(value.width ?? value.strokeWidth ?? 0));
    const appearance = normalizeAppearance(element);
    appearance.strokes[0] = { ...(appearance.strokes[0] || {}), enabled: element.strokeWidth > 0 && element.stroke !== 'transparent', color: element.stroke, width: element.strokeWidth, opacity: value.opacity ?? 1, style: value.style || 'solid' };
    appearance.stroke = appearance.strokes[0];
    element.appearance = appearance;
  }
  if (spacing) {
    const padding = normalizeInsets(spacing.value?.padding ?? spacing.value);
    if (element.type === 'frame') element.layout = { ...(element.layout || {}), padding };
    else element.internalPadding = padding;
  }
  if (radius) element.radius = Math.max(0, Number(radius.value?.radius || 0));
  return element;
}

export function applyLinkedStyles(document) {
  const designSystem = normalizeDesignSystem(document.designSystem);
  document.designSystem = designSystem;
  for (const page of document.pages || []) for (const element of page.elements || []) resolveLinkedElementStyle(element, designSystem);
  return document;
}

export function upsertDesignStyle(document, kind, input = {}) {
  if (!DESIGN_STYLE_KINDS.includes(kind)) throw new Error(`Unsupported design style kind: ${kind}.`);
  document.designSystem = normalizeDesignSystem(document.designSystem);
  const style = normalizeStyle(kind, input);
  const list = document.designSystem.styles[kind];
  const index = list.findIndex(item => item.id === style.id);
  if (index >= 0) list[index] = style;
  else list.push(style);
  applyLinkedStyles(document);
  return style;
}

export function deleteDesignStyle(document, kind, styleId, { detach = true } = {}) {
  document.designSystem = normalizeDesignSystem(document.designSystem);
  document.designSystem.styles[kind] = document.designSystem.styles[kind].filter(style => style.id !== styleId);
  const refField = ELEMENT_STYLE_REF_FIELDS[kind];
  if (detach && refField) for (const page of document.pages || []) for (const element of page.elements || []) if (element[refField] === styleId) element[refField] = null;
  return document;
}

export function attachDesignStyle(document, elements, kind, styleId) {
  const refField = ELEMENT_STYLE_REF_FIELDS[kind];
  if (!refField) throw new Error(`Style kind ${kind} cannot be attached to elements.`);
  const style = findDesignStyle(normalizeDesignSystem(document.designSystem), kind, styleId);
  if (!style) throw new Error(`Design style not found: ${styleId}.`);
  for (const element of elements || []) { element[refField] = styleId; resolveLinkedElementStyle(element, document.designSystem); }
  return document;
}

function stable(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return `[${value.map(stable).join(',')}]`;
  if (value && typeof value === 'object') return `{${Object.keys(value).sort().map(key => `${key}:${stable(value[key])}`).join(',')}}`;
  return JSON.stringify(value);
}

export function findDuplicateDesignStyles(document) {
  const system = normalizeDesignSystem(document.designSystem);
  const groups = [];
  for (const kind of DESIGN_STYLE_KINDS) {
    const byValue = new Map();
    for (const style of system.styles[kind]) {
      const key = stable(style.value);
      if (!byValue.has(key)) byValue.set(key, []);
      byValue.get(key).push(style);
    }
    for (const styles of byValue.values()) if (styles.length > 1) groups.push({ kind, canonical: styles[0], duplicates: styles.slice(1) });
  }
  return groups;
}

export function mergeDuplicateDesignStyles(document) {
  document.designSystem = normalizeDesignSystem(document.designSystem);
  const groups = findDuplicateDesignStyles(document);
  for (const group of groups) {
    const refField = ELEMENT_STYLE_REF_FIELDS[group.kind];
    const duplicateIds = new Set(group.duplicates.map(style => style.id));
    if (refField) for (const page of document.pages || []) for (const element of page.elements || []) if (duplicateIds.has(element[refField])) element[refField] = group.canonical.id;
    document.designSystem.styles[group.kind] = document.designSystem.styles[group.kind].filter(style => !duplicateIds.has(style.id));
  }
  applyLinkedStyles(document);
  return { document, groups };
}

export function normalizeDataSources(value = []) {
  return (Array.isArray(value) ? value : []).map(source => {
    const rows = Array.isArray(source.rows) ? source.rows.map(row => ({ ...(row || {}) })) : [];
    const columns = Array.isArray(source.columns) && source.columns.length ? source.columns.map(String) : [...new Set(rows.flatMap(row => Object.keys(row)))];
    return { id: String(source.id || id('data')), name: String(source.name || 'Data source').slice(0, 160), columns, rows };
  });
}

function templateValue(template, row) {
  return String(template ?? '').replace(/\{\{\s*([^}]+?)\s*\}\}/g, (_, key) => row?.[key] == null ? '' : String(row[key]));
}

export function applyDataBindings(document) {
  document.dataSources = normalizeDataSources(document.dataSources);
  const sources = new Map(document.dataSources.map(source => [source.id, source]));
  for (const page of document.pages || []) for (const element of page.elements || []) {
    const binding = element.dataBinding;
    if (!binding?.sourceId) continue;
    const source = sources.get(binding.sourceId);
    const row = source?.rows?.[Math.max(0, Number(binding.row || 0))];
    if (!row) continue;
    if (element.type === 'text') element.text = binding.template ? templateValue(binding.template, row) : String(row[binding.key] ?? element.text ?? '');
    if (element.type === 'image' && binding.key && row[binding.key]) element.src = String(row[binding.key]);
  }
  return document;
}

export function createDataSource(document, input = {}) {
  document.dataSources = normalizeDataSources(document.dataSources);
  const source = normalizeDataSources([{ ...input, id: input.id || id('data') }])[0];
  const index = document.dataSources.findIndex(item => item.id === source.id);
  if (index >= 0) document.dataSources[index] = source; else document.dataSources.push(source);
  return source;
}

export function designStyleSchema() {
  return {
    kinds: DESIGN_STYLE_KINDS,
    elementReferenceFields: ELEMENT_STYLE_REF_FIELDS,
    style: { id: 'string', name: 'string', kind: 'text|color|effect|stroke|spacing|radius|grid', semanticRole: 'string', value: 'kind-specific object' },
    examples: {
      text: { name: 'Menu item title', kind: 'text', value: { fontFamily: 'DM Serif Display', fontSize: 31, fontWeight: 700, lineHeight: 1.05 } },
      color: { name: 'Text primary', kind: 'color', value: { paint: solidPaint('#231f20') } },
      spacing: { name: 'Card padding', kind: 'spacing', value: { padding: { top: 24, right: 24, bottom: 24, left: 24 } } },
      radius: { name: 'Card radius', kind: 'radius', value: { radius: 22 } }
    }
  };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/document.js (2026-07-10 01:55:46) =====
import { normalizeAppearance, normalizePaint, paintPrimaryColor, solidPaint } from './appearance.js';
import { DEFAULT_SVG_MARKUP, sanitizeSvgMarkup, svgDataUrl } from './svg.js';
import {
  applyDataBindings, applyLinkedStyles, DEFAULT_DESIGN_SYSTEM, DEFAULT_PRINT_SETTINGS,
  normalizeDataSources, normalizeDesignSystem, normalizePrintSettings, resolveLinkedElementStyle
} from './designSystem.js';

export const uuid = () => {
  if (typeof crypto?.randomUUID === 'function') return crypto.randomUUID();
  return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, char => {
    const value = Math.random() * 16 | 0;
    return (char === 'x' ? value : value & 3 | 8).toString(16);
  });
};
export const clone = value => structuredClone(value);
const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.max(min, Math.min(max, Number(value)));

export const DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS = { horizontal: 'scale', vertical: 'scale', maintainAspectRatio: false };
export const AI_ELEMENT_ROLES = ['headline', 'subheadline', 'body', 'caption', 'price', 'call-to-action', 'logo', 'hero-image', 'background-image', 'decoration', 'legal', 'chart-title', 'chart-data', 'container', 'item-name', 'item-description', 'item-price', 'badge', 'divider', 'footer', 'header', 'illustration'];
export const LAYOUT_SIZING_MODES = ['fixed', 'hug', 'fill'];

export function defaultRegions(width = 1080, height = 1080) {
  const margin = Math.round(Math.min(width, height) * .055);
  return {
    safe: { x: margin, y: margin, width: Math.max(1, width - margin * 2), height: Math.max(1, height - margin * 2) },
    header: { x: margin, y: margin, width: Math.max(1, width - margin * 2), height: Math.round(height * .16) },
    hero: { x: margin, y: Math.round(height * .18), width: Math.max(1, width - margin * 2), height: Math.round(height * .46) },
    content: { x: margin, y: Math.round(height * .2), width: Math.max(1, width - margin * 2), height: Math.round(height * .62) },
    footer: { x: margin, y: Math.round(height * .84), width: Math.max(1, width - margin * 2), height: Math.max(1, Math.round(height * .11)) },
    full: { x: 0, y: 0, width, height }
  };
}

export function defaultDocument(width = 1080, height = 1080) {
  return {
    schemaVersion: 6,
    title: 'Untitled design',
    width,
    height,
    unit: 'px',
    dpi: 96,
    layoutGroups: [],
    localComponents: [],
    masterPages: [],
    variants: [],
    activeVariantId: 'primary',
    accessibility: { language: 'en', readingDirection: 'ltr' },
    provenance: { createdWith: 'Design Commons', assetManifest: [] },
    designSystem: clone(DEFAULT_DESIGN_SYSTEM),
    print: { ...clone(DEFAULT_PRINT_SETTINGS), trim: { width, height } },
    dataSources: [],
    ai: { lastRunId: null, lastRenderUrl: null },
    pages: [{
      id: uuid(), name: 'Page 1', masterPageId: null, masterOverrides: [], section: '', pageNumberStyle: 'decimal', background: '#ffffff', backgroundPaint: solidPaint('#ffffff'), transparentBackground: false,
      grid: { enabled: false, size: 20, subdivisions: 1 }, designGrids: [], baselineGrids: [], margins: { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0 },
      guides: { vertical: [], horizontal: [], locked: false }, regions: defaultRegions(width, height), elements: []
    }]
  };
}

export function normalizeLayout(layout = {}) {
  const source = layout && typeof layout === 'object' ? layout : {};
  const rawPadding = source.padding ?? 32;
  const padding = typeof rawPadding === 'object'
    ? {
        top: Math.max(0, Number(rawPadding.top ?? 0)),
        right: Math.max(0, Number(rawPadding.right ?? 0)),
        bottom: Math.max(0, Number(rawPadding.bottom ?? 0)),
        left: Math.max(0, Number(rawPadding.left ?? 0))
      }
    : { top: Math.max(0, Number(rawPadding)), right: Math.max(0, Number(rawPadding)), bottom: Math.max(0, Number(rawPadding)), left: Math.max(0, Number(rawPadding)) };
  return {
    enabled: source.enabled !== false,
    direction: source.direction === 'horizontal' ? 'horizontal' : 'vertical',
    gap: Math.max(0, Number(source.gap ?? 24)),
    rowGap: Math.max(0, Number(source.rowGap ?? source.gap ?? 24)),
    columnGap: Math.max(0, Number(source.columnGap ?? source.gap ?? 24)),
    padding,
    align: ['start', 'center', 'end', 'stretch'].includes(source.align) ? source.align : 'start',
    justify: ['start', 'center', 'end', 'space-between'].includes(source.justify) ? source.justify : 'start',
    wrap: !!source.wrap,
    widthMode: LAYOUT_SIZING_MODES.includes(source.widthMode) ? source.widthMode : 'fixed',
    heightMode: LAYOUT_SIZING_MODES.includes(source.heightMode) ? source.heightMode : 'fixed'
  };
}

export function baseElement(type, overrides = {}) {
  const element = {
    id: uuid(), type, name: type[0].toUpperCase() + type.slice(1), semanticName: '', role: '', tags: [], contentKey: '',
    aiEditable: true, userLocked: false, parentId: null, groupId: null, layoutRegion: '', createdBy: 'user', sourceId: null,
    x: 120, y: 120, width: 320, height: 180, rotation: 0, opacity: 1, flipX: false, flipY: false,
    locked: false, hidden: false, zIndex: 0, constraints: { ...DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS },
    layoutSizing: { width: 'fixed', height: 'fixed', grow: 0, alignSelf: 'auto' },
    textStyleId: null, fillStyleId: null, effectStyleId: null, strokeStyleId: null, spacingStyleId: null, radiusStyleId: null,
    dataBinding: null, componentPropertyId: null, componentVariant: null,
    accessibilityLabel: '', readingOrder: null, decorative: false, altText: '',
    masterElement: false, masterInstanceId: null, masterSourceId: null,
    ...overrides
  };
  element.appearance = normalizeAppearance(element);
  return element;
}

export function imageFrameElement(overrides = {}) { const placeholder = svgDataUrl('<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 600 400"><rect width="600" height="400" fill="#f3f4f6"/><path d="M175 275l72-82 62 65 48-46 88 93H155z" fill="#cbd5e1"/><circle cx="390" cy="125" r="34" fill="#cbd5e1"/><rect x="12" y="12" width="576" height="376" rx="24" fill="none" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="8" stroke-dasharray="18 14"/></svg>'); return imageElement({ original_name: 'Image frame', url: placeholder, width: 600, height: 400 }, { name: 'Image frame', role: 'hero-image', width: 420, height: 300, isImageFrame: true, frameLabel: 'Drop an image', mask: 'rounded', radius: 24, ...overrides }); }

export function pathElement(pathData = [], overrides = {}) { return baseElement('path', { name: 'Drawing', width: 160, height: 120, pathData: clone(pathData || []), fill: 'transparent', stroke: '#111827', strokeWidth: 6, brush: { preset: 'pen', smoothing: .5, pressure: true }, ...overrides }); }

export function shapeElement(shapeKind = 'triangle', overrides = {}) {
  const labels = { triangle: 'Triangle', diamond: 'Diamond', pentagon: 'Pentagon', hexagon: 'Hexagon', star: 'Star', burst: 'Burst', heart: 'Heart', arrow: 'Arrow', chevron: 'Chevron', speech: 'Speech bubble' };
  return baseElement('shape', { name: labels[shapeKind] || 'Shape', shapeKind, width: 320, height: 260, fill: '#4f46e5', stroke: 'transparent', strokeWidth: 0, radius: 0, shapeOptions: { sides: shapeKind === 'pentagon' ? 5 : shapeKind === 'hexagon' ? 6 : 5, innerRatio: shapeKind === 'burst' ? .68 : .46, points: shapeKind === 'burst' ? 12 : 5, tailPosition: .28 }, ...overrides });
}

function normalizeElement(element, index) {
  element.id ||= uuid();
  element.zIndex = Number.isFinite(element.zIndex) ? element.zIndex : index;
  element.opacity ??= 1; element.rotation ??= 0; element.flipX ??= false; element.flipY ??= false;
  element.locked ??= false; element.hidden ??= false;
  element.constraints = { ...DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS, ...(element.constraints || {}) };
  element.layoutSizing = { width: 'fixed', height: 'fixed', grow: 0, alignSelf: 'auto', ...(element.layoutSizing || {}) };
  element.semanticName = String(element.semanticName || '').slice(0, 500);
  element.role = String(element.role || '').slice(0, 100);
  element.tags = Array.isArray(element.tags) ? element.tags.map(tag => String(tag).slice(0, 100)).slice(0, 50) : [];
  element.contentKey = String(element.contentKey || '').slice(0, 200);
  element.aiEditable = element.aiEditable !== false; element.userLocked = !!element.userLocked;
  element.parentId ||= null; element.groupId ||= null; element.layoutRegion = String(element.layoutRegion || '').slice(0, 100);
  element.createdBy ||= 'user'; element.sourceId ||= null;
  element.accessibilityLabel = String(element.accessibilityLabel || element.altText || '').slice(0, 500);
  element.altText = String(element.altText || element.accessibilityLabel || '').slice(0, 500);
  element.readingOrder = Number.isFinite(Number(element.readingOrder)) ? Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(element.readingOrder))) : null;
  element.decorative = !!element.decorative; element.masterElement = !!element.masterElement;
  element.masterInstanceId ||= null; element.masterSourceId ||= null;
  for (const key of ['textStyleId', 'fillStyleId', 'effectStyleId', 'strokeStyleId', 'spacingStyleId', 'radiusStyleId', 'componentPropertyId', 'componentVariant']) element[key] ||= null;
  if (element.dataBinding && typeof element.dataBinding !== 'object') element.dataBinding = null;
  element.appearance = normalizeAppearance(element);
  if (element.type === 'frame') { element.layout = normalizeLayout(element.layout); element.clipChildren ??= false; }
  if (element.type === 'text') { element.styles ||= {}; element.links ||= []; element.effect ||= { shadow: null, stroke: null, strokeWidth: 0, hollow: false, curve: 0 }; element.lineHeight ??= 1.16; element.charSpacing ??= 0; element.textAlign ||= 'left'; element.listType ||= 'none'; element.autoFit ??= false; element.minFontSize = clamp(element.minFontSize || 8, 4, 1000); element.maxLines = Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(element.maxLines || 0))); element.overflowBehavior = ['visible', 'clip', 'ellipsis'].includes(element.overflowBehavior) ? element.overflowBehavior : 'visible'; element.verticalAlign = ['top', 'middle', 'bottom'].includes(element.verticalAlign) ? element.verticalAlign : 'top'; element.columns = clamp(element.columns || 1, 1, 12); element.columnGap = Math.max(0, Number(element.columnGap ?? 24)); element.hyphenation = !!element.hyphenation; element.widowLines = clamp(element.widowLines ?? 2, 1, 10); element.orphanLines = clamp(element.orphanLines ?? 2, 1, 10); element.hangingPunctuation = !!element.hangingPunctuation; element.opticalMargin = !!element.opticalMargin; element.baselineGridStep = Math.max(0, Number(element.baselineGridStep || 0)); element.opentypeFeatures = String(element.opentypeFeatures || '').slice(0, 300); element.variableAxes = element.variableAxes && typeof element.variableAxes === 'object' ? element.variableAxes : {}; element.textPath = element.textPath && typeof element.textPath === 'object' ? element.textPath : null; }
  if (element.type === 'image') { element.isImageFrame = !!element.isImageFrame; element.frameLabel = String(element.frameLabel || 'Drop an image').slice(0, 120); element.cropX ??= null; element.cropY ??= null; element.cropZoom ??= 1; element.cropAnchorX ??= .5; element.cropAnchorY ??= .5; element.mask ||= 'rect'; element.filters = { brightness: 0, contrast: 0, saturation: 0, hue: 0, blur: 0, vibrance: 0, noise: 0, pixelate: 0, gamma: 1, tint: '#ffffff', tintOpacity: 0, grayscale: false, sepia: false, ...(element.filters || {}) }; }
  if (element.type === 'shape') { element.shapeKind ||= 'triangle'; element.shapeOptions = { sides: 5, innerRatio: .46, points: 5, tailPosition: .28, ...(element.shapeOptions || {}) }; }
  if (element.type === 'path') { element.pathData = Array.isArray(element.pathData) ? element.pathData : []; element.brush = { preset: 'pen', smoothing: .5, pressure: true, ...(element.brush || {}) }; }
  if (element.type === 'chart') { element.data ||= { labels: [], series: [] }; element.options ||= {}; element.chartType ||= 'bar'; }
  if (element.type === 'table') { element.rows ??= element.cells?.length || 2; element.columns ??= element.cells?.[0]?.length || 2; element.cells ||= Array.from({ length: element.rows }, () => Array(element.columns).fill('')); element.options ||= {}; }
  if (element.type === 'qrcode') { element.value ||= 'https://example.com'; element.foreground ||= '#111827'; element.background ||= '#ffffff'; element.errorCorrection ||= 'M'; element.margin ??= 2; }
  if (element.type === 'svg') { try { element.svg = sanitizeSvgMarkup(element.svg || DEFAULT_SVG_MARKUP); } catch { element.svg = DEFAULT_SVG_MARKUP; } element.preserveAspectRatio = element.preserveAspectRatio !== false; }
  return element;
}

function repairHierarchy(page) {
  const byId = new Map(page.elements.map(element => [element.id, element]));
  for (const element of page.elements) {
    if (!element.parentId || !byId.has(element.parentId) || byId.get(element.parentId)?.type !== 'frame' || element.parentId === element.id) {
      element.parentId = null;
      continue;
    }
    const visited = new Set([element.id]);
    let cursor = byId.get(element.parentId);
    while (cursor) {
      if (visited.has(cursor.id)) { element.parentId = null; break; }
      visited.add(cursor.id);
      cursor = cursor.parentId ? byId.get(cursor.parentId) : null;
    }
  }
}

export function normalizeDocument(document) {
  const doc = clone(document || defaultDocument());
  doc.schemaVersion = 6; doc.pages ||= []; doc.layoutGroups ||= []; doc.localComponents ||= []; doc.masterPages ||= []; doc.variants ||= []; doc.activeVariantId ||= 'primary'; doc.accessibility = { language: 'en', readingDirection: 'ltr', ...(doc.accessibility || {}) }; doc.provenance = { createdWith: 'Design Commons', assetManifest: [], ...(doc.provenance || {}) }; doc.designSystem = normalizeDesignSystem(doc.designSystem); doc.print = normalizePrintSettings(doc.print, doc.width, doc.height); doc.dataSources = normalizeDataSources(doc.dataSources); doc.ai = { lastRunId: null, lastRenderUrl: null, ...(doc.ai || {}) };
  doc.pages.forEach((page, pageIndex) => {
    page.id ||= uuid(); page.name ||= `Page ${pageIndex + 1}`;
    page.masterPageId ||= null; page.masterOverrides = Array.isArray(page.masterOverrides) ? page.masterOverrides : []; page.section ||= ''; page.pageNumberStyle ||= 'decimal';
    page.background ||= '#ffffff';
    page.backgroundPaint = normalizePaint(page.backgroundPaint ?? page.background, '#ffffff'); page.transparentBackground ??= false;
    if (page.referenceImage) page.referenceImage = { assetId: page.referenceImage.assetId || null, src: String(page.referenceImage.src || ''), name: String(page.referenceImage.name || 'Reference image').slice(0, 160), opacity: clamp(page.referenceImage.opacity ?? .45, 0, 1), visible: page.referenceImage.visible !== false, mode: ['overlay', 'difference', 'split'].includes(page.referenceImage.mode) ? page.referenceImage.mode : 'overlay', fit: ['contain', 'cover', 'stretch'].includes(page.referenceImage.fit) ? page.referenceImage.fit : 'contain', split: clamp(page.referenceImage.split ?? .5, 0, 1) };
    else page.referenceImage = null;
    page.grid = { enabled: false, size: 20, subdivisions: 1, ...(page.grid || {}) };
    page.designGrids = Array.isArray(page.designGrids) ? page.designGrids.map((grid, index) => ({ id: grid.id || `grid-${index + 1}`, name: String(grid.name || `Column grid ${index + 1}`).slice(0, 120), enabled: grid.enabled !== false, columns: clamp(grid.columns || 12, 1, 48), gutter: Math.max(0, Number(grid.gutter || 0)), margin: Math.max(0, Number(grid.margin || 0)), color: /^#[0-9a-f]{6}$/i.test(grid.color || '') ? grid.color : '#7c3aed', opacity: clamp(grid.opacity ?? .18, 0, 1) })) : [];
    page.baselineGrids = Array.isArray(page.baselineGrids) ? page.baselineGrids.map((grid, index) => ({ id: grid.id || `baseline-${index + 1}`, name: String(grid.name || `Baseline grid ${index + 1}`).slice(0, 120), enabled: grid.enabled !== false, step: clamp(grid.step || 8, 2, 200), offset: Math.max(0, Number(grid.offset || 0)), color: /^#[0-9a-f]{6}$/i.test(grid.color || '') ? grid.color : '#0ea5e9', opacity: clamp(grid.opacity ?? .22, 0, 1) })) : [];
    page.margins = { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0, ...(page.margins || {}) };
    page.guides ||= { vertical: [], horizontal: [], locked: false }; page.guides.vertical ||= []; page.guides.horizontal ||= [];
    page.regions = { ...defaultRegions(doc.width, doc.height), ...(page.regions || {}) }; page.elements ||= [];
    page.elements.forEach(normalizeElement);
    page.elements.forEach(element => resolveLinkedElementStyle(element, doc.designSystem));
    repairHierarchy(page);
  });
  if (!doc.pages.length) doc.pages = defaultDocument(doc.width, doc.height).pages;
  applyLinkedStyles(doc);
  applyDataBindings(doc);
  return doc;
}

export function createMasterPageFromPage(source, pageId, name = 'Master page') {
  const doc = normalizeDocument(source);
  const page = doc.pages.find(item => item.id === pageId) || doc.pages[0];
  if (!page) return doc;
  const master = {
    id: uuid(), name, background: page.background, backgroundPaint: clone(page.backgroundPaint), regions: clone(page.regions),
    elements: cloneElementTree(page.elements.filter(element => !element.hidden), { preserveExternalParents: false }).map(element => ({ ...element, masterElement: true, masterSourceId: element.sourceId || element.id, userLocked: true, createdBy: 'master' }))
  };
  doc.masterPages.push(master);
  page.masterPageId = master.id;
  page.elements = cloneElementTree(master.elements, { preserveExternalParents: false }).map((element, index) => ({
    ...element, masterElement: false, masterInstanceId: master.id, masterSourceId: element.masterSourceId || element.sourceId || element.id,
    userLocked: true, createdBy: 'master', zIndex: index
  }));
  return { document: doc, master };
}

export function applyMasterPage(source, pageId, masterId) {
  const doc = normalizeDocument(source);
  const page = doc.pages.find(item => item.id === pageId);
  const master = doc.masterPages.find(item => item.id === masterId);
  if (!page) return doc;
  const local = page.elements.filter(element => !element.masterInstanceId);
  if (!master) {
    page.masterPageId = null;
    page.elements = local.map((element, index) => ({ ...element, zIndex: index }));
    return doc;
  }
  const elements = cloneElementTree(master.elements || [], { preserveExternalParents: false }).map((element, index) => ({
    ...element, masterElement: false, masterInstanceId: master.id, masterSourceId: element.masterSourceId || element.sourceId || element.id,
    userLocked: true, createdBy: 'master', zIndex: index
  }));
  page.masterPageId = master.id;
  page.background = master.background || page.background;
  page.backgroundPaint = clone(master.backgroundPaint || page.backgroundPaint);
  page.regions = { ...page.regions, ...(master.regions || {}) };
  page.elements = [...elements, ...local].map((element, index) => ({ ...element, zIndex: index }));
  return doc;
}

export function updateMasterPageFromPage(source, masterId, pageId) {
  const doc = normalizeDocument(source);
  const master = doc.masterPages.find(item => item.id === masterId);
  const page = doc.pages.find(item => item.id === pageId);
  if (!master || !page) throw new Error('Master page or source page was not found.');
  master.background = page.background;
  master.backgroundPaint = clone(page.backgroundPaint);
  master.regions = clone(page.regions);
  master.elements = cloneElementTree(page.elements.filter(element => !element.hidden), { preserveExternalParents: false }).map(element => ({ ...element, masterElement: true, masterInstanceId: null, masterSourceId: element.masterSourceId || element.sourceId || element.id, userLocked: true, createdBy: 'master' }));
  for (const target of doc.pages.filter(item => item.masterPageId === master.id)) {
    const refreshed = applyMasterPage(doc, target.id, master.id);
    Object.assign(doc, refreshed);
  }
  return doc;
}

function variantSnapshot(doc) {
  return { width: doc.width, height: doc.height, pages: clone(doc.pages), print: clone(doc.print), updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
}

export function createResponsiveVariant(source, { name = 'Variant', width, height } = {}) {
  const doc = normalizeDocument(source);
  const id = uuid();
  const resized = resizeDocument({ ...clone(doc), variants: [], masterPages: clone(doc.masterPages) }, width || doc.width, height || doc.height);
  doc.variants.push({ id, name, ...variantSnapshot(resized) });
  return { document: doc, variant: doc.variants.at(-1) };
}

export function switchResponsiveVariant(source, variantId) {
  const doc = normalizeDocument(source);
  const currentId = doc.activeVariantId || 'primary';
  if (currentId !== 'primary') {
    const current = doc.variants.find(item => item.id === currentId);
    if (current) Object.assign(current, variantSnapshot(doc));
  }
  if (variantId === 'primary') {
    const primary = doc.provenance?.primaryVariant;
    if (primary) Object.assign(doc, clone(primary));
    doc.activeVariantId = 'primary';
    return normalizeDocument(doc);
  }
  if (currentId === 'primary' && !doc.provenance.primaryVariant) doc.provenance.primaryVariant = variantSnapshot(doc);
  const target = doc.variants.find(item => item.id === variantId);
  if (!target) throw new Error('Responsive variant not found.');
  doc.width = target.width; doc.height = target.height; doc.pages = clone(target.pages); doc.print = clone(target.print || doc.print); doc.activeVariantId = target.id;
  return normalizeDocument(doc);
}

export function deleteResponsiveVariant(source, variantId) {
  let doc = normalizeDocument(source);
  if (doc.activeVariantId === variantId) doc = switchResponsiveVariant(doc, 'primary');
  doc.variants = doc.variants.filter(item => item.id !== variantId);
  return doc;
}

export function collectDescendantIds(page, parentIds) {
  const seeds = parentIds instanceof Set
    ? [...parentIds]
    : Array.isArray(parentIds)
      ? parentIds
      : parentIds == null ? [] : [parentIds];
  const pending = new Set(seeds);
  const result = new Set();
  let changed = true;
  while (changed) {
    changed = false;
    for (const element of page?.elements || []) {
      if (element.parentId && pending.has(element.parentId) && !result.has(element.id)) {
        result.add(element.id); pending.add(element.id); changed = true;
      }
    }
  }
  return result;
}

export function cloneElementTree(elements, { offsetX = 0, offsetY = 0, preserveExternalParents = false, componentId = undefined, componentInstanceId = undefined, componentLinked = undefined, maps = null } = {}) {
  const source = clone(elements || []);
  const sourceIds = new Set(source.map(element => element.id));
  const idMap = new Map(source.map(element => [element.id, uuid()]));
  const groupMap = new Map();
  const instanceMap = new Map();
  const layoutMap = new Map();
  if (maps) Object.assign(maps, { idMap, groupMap, instanceMap, layoutMap });
  return source.map((element, index) => {
    if (element.groupId && !groupMap.has(element.groupId)) groupMap.set(element.groupId, uuid());
    if (element.componentInstanceId && !instanceMap.has(element.componentInstanceId)) instanceMap.set(element.componentInstanceId, uuid());
    if (element.layoutGroupId && !layoutMap.has(element.layoutGroupId)) layoutMap.set(element.layoutGroupId, uuid());
    return {
      ...element,
      id: idMap.get(element.id),
      parentId: element.parentId && sourceIds.has(element.parentId) ? idMap.get(element.parentId) : (preserveExternalParents ? element.parentId : null),
      groupId: element.groupId ? groupMap.get(element.groupId) : null,
      layoutGroupId: element.layoutGroupId ? layoutMap.get(element.layoutGroupId) : undefined,
      componentId: componentId === undefined ? element.componentId : componentId,
      componentInstanceId: componentInstanceId === undefined ? (element.componentInstanceId ? instanceMap.get(element.componentInstanceId) : null) : componentInstanceId,
      componentLinked: componentLinked === undefined ? element.componentLinked : componentLinked,
      x: Number(element.x || 0) + offsetX,
      y: Number(element.y || 0) + offsetY,
      zIndex: index
    };
  });
}

export function reparentElements(page, elementIds, parentId = null) {
  const ids = new Set(elementIds || []);
  const target = parentId ? page.elements.find(element => element.id === parentId && element.type === 'frame') : null;
  if (parentId && !target) throw new Error('The target container is not a frame.');
  const descendants = collectDescendantIds(page, ids);
  if (parentId && (ids.has(parentId) || descendants.has(parentId))) throw new Error('A frame cannot be placed inside itself or one of its descendants.');
  page.elements = page.elements.map(element => ids.has(element.id) ? { ...element, parentId: target?.id || null } : element);
  if (target) applyFrameLayout(page, target.id);
  return page;
}

function rotatePoint(x, y, centerX, centerY, radians) {
  const dx = x - centerX, dy = y - centerY;
  return { x: centerX + dx * Math.cos(radians) - dy * Math.sin(radians), y: centerY + dx * Math.sin(radians) + dy * Math.cos(radians) };
}

export function transformFrameDescendants(page, frameId, before, after) {
  if (!before || !after) return page;
  const ids = collectDescendantIds(page, frameId);
  const scaleX = Math.max(.0001, Number(after.width || 1) / Math.max(.0001, Number(before.width || 1)));
  const scaleY = Math.max(.0001, Number(after.height || 1) / Math.max(.0001, Number(before.height || 1)));
  const oldCenter = { x: before.x + before.width / 2, y: before.y + before.height / 2 };
  const newCenter = { x: after.x + after.width / 2, y: after.y + after.height / 2 };
  const angleDelta = Number(after.rotation || 0) - Number(before.rotation || 0);
  const radians = angleDelta * Math.PI / 180;
  page.elements = page.elements.map(element => {
    if (!ids.has(element.id)) return element;
    const center = { x: element.x + element.width / 2, y: element.y + element.height / 2 };
    const scaled = { x: newCenter.x + (center.x - oldCenter.x) * scaleX, y: newCenter.y + (center.y - oldCenter.y) * scaleY };
    const rotated = rotatePoint(scaled.x, scaled.y, newCenter.x, newCenter.y, radians);
    const width = Math.max(1, element.width * scaleX), height = Math.max(1, element.height * scaleY);
    return { ...element, x: rotated.x - width / 2, y: rotated.y - height / 2, width, height, rotation: Number(element.rotation || 0) + angleDelta };
  });
  return page;
}

function layoutLine(items, bounds, layout, horizontal, crossCursor, crossSize, mainGap) {
  const mainStart = horizontal ? bounds.x : bounds.y;
  const mainSize = horizontal ? bounds.width : bounds.height;
  const fixed = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (horizontal ? item.width : item.height), 0);
  const growItems = items.filter(item => Number(item.layoutSizing?.grow || 0) > 0 || (horizontal ? item.layoutSizing?.width : item.layoutSizing?.height) === 'fill');
  const baseGap = items.length > 1 ? mainGap : 0;
  const available = Math.max(0, mainSize - fixed - baseGap * Math.max(0, items.length - 1));
  const totalGrow = growItems.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Math.max(1, Number(item.layoutSizing?.grow || 1)), 0);
  if (available > 0 && growItems.length) {
    for (const item of growItems) {
      const share = available * Math.max(1, Number(item.layoutSizing?.grow || 1)) / totalGrow;
      if (horizontal) item.width += share; else item.height += share;
    }
  }
  const occupied = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (horizontal ? item.width : item.height), 0);
  let gap = mainGap;
  let cursor = mainStart;
  if (layout.justify === 'center') cursor += (mainSize - occupied - gap * Math.max(0, items.length - 1)) / 2;
  else if (layout.justify === 'end') cursor += mainSize - occupied - gap * Math.max(0, items.length - 1);
  else if (layout.justify === 'space-between' && items.length > 1) gap = Math.max(0, (mainSize - occupied) / (items.length - 1));
  for (const item of items) {
    const align = item.layoutSizing?.alignSelf && item.layoutSizing.alignSelf !== 'auto' ? item.layoutSizing.alignSelf : layout.align;
    const itemCross = horizontal ? item.height : item.width;
    let cross = crossCursor;
    if (align === 'center') cross += (crossSize - itemCross) / 2;
    else if (align === 'end') cross += crossSize - itemCross;
    else if (align === 'stretch') {
      if (horizontal) item.height = Math.max(1, crossSize); else item.width = Math.max(1, crossSize);
    }
    if (horizontal) { item.x = cursor; item.y = cross; cursor += item.width + gap; }
    else { item.y = cursor; item.x = cross; cursor += item.height + gap; }
  }
}

function layoutItems(items, bounds, inputLayout) {
  if (!items.length) return;
  const layout = normalizeLayout(inputLayout);
  if (!layout.enabled) return;
  const horizontal = layout.direction === 'horizontal';
  const mainGap = horizontal ? layout.columnGap : layout.rowGap;
  const crossGap = horizontal ? layout.rowGap : layout.columnGap;
  const mainLimit = horizontal ? bounds.width : bounds.height;
  const lines = [];
  let line = [], used = 0;
  for (const item of items) {
    const size = horizontal ? item.width : item.height;
    const next = line.length ? used + mainGap + size : size;
    if (layout.wrap && line.length && next > mainLimit) { lines.push(line); line = [item]; used = size; }
    else { line.push(item); used = next; }
  }
  if (line.length) lines.push(line);
  const lineCrossSizes = lines.map(itemsInLine => Math.max(1, ...itemsInLine.map(item => horizontal ? item.height : item.width)));
  const totalCross = lineCrossSizes.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) + crossGap * Math.max(0, lines.length - 1);
  let crossCursor = horizontal ? bounds.y : bounds.x;
  const availableCross = horizontal ? bounds.height : bounds.width;
  if (layout.align === 'center' && lines.length > 1) crossCursor += Math.max(0, (availableCross - totalCross) / 2);
  else if (layout.align === 'end' && lines.length > 1) crossCursor += Math.max(0, availableCross - totalCross);
  lines.forEach((itemsInLine, index) => {
    const lineCrossSize = lines.length === 1 ? availableCross : lineCrossSizes[index];
    layoutLine(itemsInLine, bounds, layout, horizontal, crossCursor, lineCrossSize, mainGap);
    crossCursor += lineCrossSize + crossGap;
  });
}

export function applyFrameLayout(page, frameOrId) {
  const frame = typeof frameOrId === 'string'
    ? page?.elements?.find(element => element.id === frameOrId && element.type === 'frame')
    : frameOrId?.type === 'frame' ? frameOrId : null;
  if (!frame) return page;
  const layout = normalizeLayout(frame.layout);
  frame.layout = layout;
  const children = page.elements.filter(element => element.parentId === frame.id).sort((a, b) => a.zIndex - b.zIndex);
  if (!children.length || !layout.enabled) return page;
  const p = layout.padding;
  if (layout.widthMode === 'hug') {
    const contentWidth = layout.direction === 'horizontal'
      ? children.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.width, 0) + layout.columnGap * Math.max(0, children.length - 1)
      : Math.max(...children.map(item => item.width));
