  textPreset('playful-bubble','Bubble','Playful',{fontFamily:'Trebuchet MS',fontWeight:700,textAlign:'center',lineHeight:.9,charSpacing:-25},appearance(solidPaint('#93c5fd'),stroke('#ffffff',6),shadow('#1d4ed8',.28,14,0,8))),
  textPreset('playful-candy','Candy','Playful',{fontFamily:'Verdana',fontWeight:700,textAlign:'center',lineHeight:.92,charSpacing:15},appearance(gradientBy('candy'),stroke('#ffffff',4),shadow('#be185d',.22,12,0,7))),
  textPreset('playful-marker','Marker','Playful',{fontFamily:'Trebuchet MS',fontWeight:700,fontStyle:'italic',textAlign:'left',lineHeight:1,charSpacing:-10},appearance(solidPaint('#111827'))),
  textPreset('playful-mono','Typewriter','Playful',{fontFamily:'Courier New',fontWeight:700,textAlign:'left',lineHeight:1.08,charSpacing:15},appearance(solidPaint('#292524'),stroke(),shadow('#78716c',.16,4,2,2))),
  textPreset('playful-sprinkle','Sprinkle','Playful',{fontFamily:'Verdana',fontWeight:700,textAlign:'center',lineHeight:.95,charSpacing:60},appearance(gradientBy('tropical'),stroke('#ffffff',3),shadow('#0f766e',.24,12,0,6)))
];

const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
const scalePaintOpacity = (paint, factor) => {
  const value = normalizePaint(paint);
  if (value.type === 'solid') return { ...value, opacity: clamp01(value.opacity * factor) };
  if (value.type === 'pattern') return { ...value, foregroundOpacity: clamp01(value.foregroundOpacity * factor), backgroundOpacity: clamp01(value.backgroundOpacity * Math.min(1, .7 + factor * .3)) };
  if (value.type === 'linear' || value.type === 'radial') return { ...value, stops: value.stops.map(stop => ({ ...stop, opacity: clamp01(stop.opacity * factor) })) };
  return value;
};

export function scaleAppearancePreset(input, intensity = 1) {
  const value = normalizeAppearance({ appearance: input });
  const factor = clamp(Number(intensity) || 1, .25, 2);
  const fills = value.fills.map(layer => ({ ...layer, paint: scalePaintOpacity(layer.paint, Math.min(1.35, .65 + factor * .35)), opacity: clamp01(layer.opacity * Math.min(1.35, .65 + factor * .35)) }));
  const strokes = value.strokes.map(layer => ({
    ...layer,
    opacity: clamp01(layer.opacity * Math.min(1.5, factor)),
    width: layer.enabled ? Math.max(.5, layer.width * (.6 + factor * .4)) : layer.width
  }));
  const shadows = value.shadows.map(layer => ({
    ...layer,
    opacity: clamp01(layer.opacity * factor),
    blur: layer.blur * (.55 + factor * .45),
    spread: layer.spread * factor,
    offsetX: layer.offsetX * factor,
    offsetY: layer.offsetY * factor
  }));
  return {
    ...value,
    fills,
    strokes,
    shadows,
    fill: fills.find(layer => layer.enabled)?.paint || fills[0]?.paint || value.fill,
    stroke: strokes.find(layer => layer.enabled) || strokes[0] || value.stroke,
    shadow: shadows.find(layer => layer.enabled) || shadows[0] || value.shadow
  };
}

const neutralFilterValue = key => key === 'gamma' ? 1 : key === 'tint' ? '#ffffff' : key === 'grayscale' || key === 'sepia' ? false : 0;
export function scaleImageFilters(filters, intensity = 1) {
  const factor = clamp(Number(intensity) || 1, 0, 2);
  const result = { ...neutralImage };
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries({ ...neutralImage, ...filters })) {
    const neutral = neutralFilterValue(key);
    if (typeof value === 'number' && typeof neutral === 'number') result[key] = neutral + (value - neutral) * factor;
    else if (typeof value === 'boolean') result[key] = factor >= .45 ? value : false;
    else result[key] = value;
  }
  return result;
}

const paintColors = paint => {
  const value = normalizePaint(paint);
  if (value.type === 'solid') return [value.color];
  if (value.type === 'pattern') return [value.foreground, value.background];
  return value.stops?.map(stop => stop.color) || [paintPrimaryColor(value)];
};
export function recolorPaint(targetPaint, sourcePaint) {
  const target = normalizePaint(targetPaint);
  const colors = paintColors(sourcePaint);
  if (target.type === 'solid') return { ...target, color: colors[0] };
  if (target.type === 'pattern') return { ...target, foreground: colors[0], background: colors[1] || '#ffffff' };
  if (target.type === 'linear' || target.type === 'radial') return { ...target, stops: target.stops.map((stop, index) => ({ ...stop, color: colors[index % colors.length] })) };
  return target;
}

export function mergeAppearancePreset(currentInput, presetInput, options = {}) {
  const current = normalizeAppearance({ appearance: currentInput });
  let incoming = scaleAppearancePreset(presetInput, options.intensity ?? 1);
  if (options.preserveColors) {
    const fills = incoming.fills.map((layer, index) => ({ ...layer, paint: recolorPaint(layer.paint, current.fills[index % current.fills.length]?.paint || current.fill) }));
    const strokes = incoming.strokes.map((layer, index) => ({ ...layer, color: current.strokes[index % current.strokes.length]?.color || current.stroke.color }));
    const shadows = incoming.shadows.map((layer, index) => ({ ...layer, color: current.shadows[index % current.shadows.length]?.color || current.shadow.color }));
    incoming = { ...incoming, fills, strokes, shadows, fill: fills[0]?.paint || incoming.fill, stroke: strokes[0] || incoming.stroke, shadow: shadows[0] || incoming.shadow };
  }
  if (options.mode !== 'merge') return incoming;
  const sections = options.sections || { fill: true, stroke: true, shadow: true, blendMode: true };
  const fills = sections.fill ? incoming.fills : current.fills;
  const strokes = sections.stroke ? incoming.strokes : current.strokes;
  const shadows = sections.shadow ? incoming.shadows : current.shadows;
  return {
    fills,
    strokes,
    shadows,
    effects: incoming.effects?.length ? incoming.effects : current.effects,
    fill: fills.find(layer => layer.enabled)?.paint || fills[0]?.paint || current.fill,
    stroke: strokes.find(layer => layer.enabled) || strokes[0] || current.stroke,
    shadow: shadows.find(layer => layer.enabled) || shadows[0] || current.shadow,
    blendMode: sections.blendMode ? incoming.blendMode : current.blendMode
  };
}

export const PRESET_PACK_VERSION = 1;

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/printLayout.js (2026-07-16 03:32:55) =====
const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.max(min, Math.min(max, Number(value)));
const finite = (value, fallback) => value !== null && value !== '' && Number.isFinite(Number(value)) ? Number(value) : fallback;
const round = value => Math.round(value * 10000) / 10000;

export const SHEET_PRESETS = Object.freeze([
  { id: 'letter', label: 'US Letter', widthIn: 8.5, heightIn: 11 },
  { id: 'a4', label: 'A4', widthIn: 8.2677, heightIn: 11.6929 },
  { id: 'legal', label: 'US Legal', widthIn: 8.5, heightIn: 14 },
  { id: 'tabloid', label: 'Tabloid', widthIn: 11, heightIn: 17 },
  { id: 'custom', label: 'Custom', widthIn: 8.5, heightIn: 11 }
]);

export const PRODUCT_PRESETS = Object.freeze([
  { id: 'source', label: 'Use design size', widthIn: null, heightIn: null },
  { id: 'business-card', label: 'Business card', widthIn: 3.5, heightIn: 2 },
  { id: 'business-card-portrait', label: 'Portrait business card', widthIn: 2, heightIn: 3.5 },
  { id: 'address-label', label: 'Address label', widthIn: 2.625, heightIn: 1 },
  { id: 'shipping-label', label: 'Shipping label', widthIn: 4, heightIn: 6 },
  { id: 'round-sticker-2', label: '2-inch round sticker', widthIn: 2, heightIn: 2 },
  { id: 'square-sticker-2', label: '2-inch square sticker', widthIn: 2, heightIn: 2 },
  { id: 'custom', label: 'Custom item size', widthIn: null, heightIn: null }
]);

export function documentSizeInches(document = {}) {
  const dpi = clamp(finite(document.dpi, 96), 36, 2400);
  return {
    widthIn: Math.max(.01, finite(document.width, 1) / dpi),
    heightIn: Math.max(.01, finite(document.height, 1) / dpi),
    dpi
  };
}

export function defaultImpositionConfig(document = {}, pageIndex = 0) {
  const source = documentSizeInches(document);
  return {
    enabled: true,
    sheetPreset: 'letter',
    orientation: 'portrait',
    sheetWidthIn: 8.5,
    sheetHeightIn: 11,
    itemPreset: 'source',
    itemWidthIn: round(source.widthIn),
    itemHeightIn: round(source.heightIn),
    preserveAspectRatio: true,
    margins: { topIn: 0, rightIn: 0, bottomIn: 0, leftIn: 0 },
    horizontalGapIn: 0,
    verticalGapIn: 0,
    layoutMode: 'auto',
    rows: 1,
    columns: 1,
    alignment: 'start',
    fillOrder: 'row',
    quantity: 10,
    quantityMode: 'fill-sheet',
    sheetCount: 1,
    trimWhitespace: true,
    contentMode: 'repeat-current',
    pageIndexes: [Math.max(0, Number(pageIndex) || 0)],
    outputDpi: 300,
    marks: { crop: false, outlines: true },
    duplex: { enabled: false, frontPageIndex: Math.max(0, Number(pageIndex) || 0), backPageIndex: Math.min(Math.max(0, (document.pages?.length || 1) - 1), Math.max(0, Number(pageIndex) + 1 || 0)), flip: 'long-edge' }
  };
}

export function normalizeImpositionConfig(input = {}, document = {}, pageIndex = 0) {
  const defaults = defaultImpositionConfig(document, pageIndex);
  const source = { ...defaults, ...(input || {}) };
  const sheetPreset = SHEET_PRESETS.find(item => item.id === source.sheetPreset) || SHEET_PRESETS[0];
  const productPreset = PRODUCT_PRESETS.find(item => item.id === source.itemPreset) || PRODUCT_PRESETS[0];
  const sourceSize = documentSizeInches(document);
  const portraitWidth = Math.max(.5, finite(source.sheetWidthIn, sheetPreset.widthIn));
  const portraitHeight = Math.max(.5, finite(source.sheetHeightIn, sheetPreset.heightIn));
  const landscape = source.orientation === 'landscape';
  const sheetWidthIn = landscape ? Math.max(portraitWidth, portraitHeight) : Math.min(portraitWidth, portraitHeight);
  const sheetHeightIn = landscape ? Math.min(portraitWidth, portraitHeight) : Math.max(portraitWidth, portraitHeight);
  const requestedWidth = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(input || {}, 'itemWidthIn') ? source.itemWidthIn : productPreset.widthIn;
  const requestedHeight = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(input || {}, 'itemHeightIn') ? source.itemHeightIn : productPreset.heightIn;
  const preserveAspectRatio = source.preserveAspectRatio !== false;
  const sourceAspectRatio = sourceSize.widthIn / sourceSize.heightIn;
  const itemWidthIn = Math.max(.05, finite(requestedWidth, finite(productPreset.widthIn, sourceSize.widthIn)));
  const unlockedHeight = Math.max(.05, finite(requestedHeight, finite(productPreset.heightIn, sourceSize.heightIn)));
  const itemHeightIn = preserveAspectRatio ? itemWidthIn / sourceAspectRatio : unlockedHeight;
  const marginSource = source.margins || {};
  const margins = {
    topIn: clamp(finite(marginSource.topIn, 0), 0, sheetHeightIn / 2),
    rightIn: clamp(finite(marginSource.rightIn, 0), 0, sheetWidthIn / 2),
    bottomIn: clamp(finite(marginSource.bottomIn, 0), 0, sheetHeightIn / 2),
    leftIn: clamp(finite(marginSource.leftIn, 0), 0, sheetWidthIn / 2)
  };
  const pageCount = Math.max(1, document.pages?.length || 1);
  const safePage = value => clamp(Math.round(finite(value, 0)), 0, pageCount - 1);
  const pageIndexes = [...new Set((source.pageIndexes || []).map(safePage))];
  return {
    enabled: source.enabled !== false,
    sheetPreset: sheetPreset.id,
    orientation: landscape ? 'landscape' : 'portrait',
    sheetWidthIn: round(sheetWidthIn), sheetHeightIn: round(sheetHeightIn),
    itemPreset: productPreset.id,
    itemWidthIn: round(itemWidthIn), itemHeightIn: round(itemHeightIn),
    preserveAspectRatio,
    margins,
    horizontalGapIn: clamp(finite(source.horizontalGapIn, 0), 0, sheetWidthIn),
    verticalGapIn: clamp(finite(source.verticalGapIn, 0), 0, sheetHeightIn),
    layoutMode: source.layoutMode === 'manual' ? 'manual' : 'auto',
    rows: clamp(Math.round(finite(source.rows, 1)), 1, 100),
    columns: clamp(Math.round(finite(source.columns, 1)), 1, 100),
    alignment: ['start', 'center', 'end'].includes(source.alignment) ? source.alignment : 'start',
    fillOrder: source.fillOrder === 'column' ? 'column' : 'row',
    quantity: clamp(Math.round(finite(source.quantity, 1)), 1, 10000),
    quantityMode: source.quantityMode === 'exact' ? 'exact' : 'fill-sheet',
    sheetCount: clamp(Math.round(finite(source.sheetCount, 1)), 1, 1000),
    trimWhitespace: source.trimWhitespace !== false,
    contentMode: ['repeat-current', 'selected-pages', 'all-pages'].includes(source.contentMode) ? source.contentMode : 'repeat-current',
    pageIndexes: pageIndexes.length ? pageIndexes : [safePage(pageIndex)],
    outputDpi: clamp(Math.round(finite(source.outputDpi, 300)), 72, 600),
    marks: { crop: !!source.marks?.crop, outlines: source.marks?.outlines !== false },
    duplex: {
      enabled: !!source.duplex?.enabled,
      frontPageIndex: safePage(source.duplex?.frontPageIndex ?? pageIndex),
      backPageIndex: safePage(source.duplex?.backPageIndex ?? Math.min(pageCount - 1, pageIndex + 1)),
      flip: source.duplex?.flip === 'short-edge' ? 'short-edge' : 'long-edge'
    }
  };
}

function offsetForAlignment(available, used, alignment) {
  if (alignment === 'end') return Math.max(0, available - used);
  if (alignment === 'center') return Math.max(0, (available - used) / 2);
  return 0;
}

export function buildImpositionPlan(document = {}, input = {}, pageIndex = 0) {
  const config = normalizeImpositionConfig(input, document, pageIndex);
  const availableWidth = Math.max(0, config.sheetWidthIn - config.margins.leftIn - config.margins.rightIn);
  const availableHeight = Math.max(0, config.sheetHeightIn - config.margins.topIn - config.margins.bottomIn);
  const autoColumns = Math.max(0, Math.floor((availableWidth + config.horizontalGapIn + 1e-8) / (config.itemWidthIn + config.horizontalGapIn)));
  const autoRows = Math.max(0, Math.floor((availableHeight + config.verticalGapIn + 1e-8) / (config.itemHeightIn + config.verticalGapIn)));
  const columns = config.layoutMode === 'manual' ? config.columns : autoColumns;
  const rows = config.layoutMode === 'manual' ? config.rows : autoRows;
  const perSheet = rows * columns;
  const usedWidth = columns > 0 ? columns * config.itemWidthIn + Math.max(0, columns - 1) * config.horizontalGapIn : 0;
  const usedHeight = rows > 0 ? rows * config.itemHeightIn + Math.max(0, rows - 1) * config.verticalGapIn : 0;
  const warnings = [];
  if (!perSheet) warnings.push('The item does not fit inside the selected sheet and margins.');
  if (usedWidth > availableWidth + 1e-6 || usedHeight > availableHeight + 1e-6) warnings.push('The manual rows or columns overflow the printable area.');
  const startX = config.margins.leftIn + offsetForAlignment(availableWidth, usedWidth, config.alignment);
  const startY = config.margins.topIn + offsetForAlignment(availableHeight, usedHeight, config.alignment);
  const selectedPages = config.contentMode === 'all-pages'
    ? Array.from({ length: Math.max(1, document.pages?.length || 1) }, (_, index) => index)
    : config.contentMode === 'selected-pages' ? config.pageIndexes : [config.pageIndexes[0] ?? Math.max(0, Number(pageIndex) || 0)];
  const requestedQuantity = config.duplex.enabled ? config.quantity : config.contentMode === 'repeat-current' ? config.quantity : Math.max(config.quantity, selectedPages.length);
  const quantity = config.quantityMode === 'fill-sheet' && perSheet ? perSheet * config.sheetCount : requestedQuantity;
  const physicalSheets = perSheet ? Math.ceil(quantity / perSheet) : 0;
  const sides = [];
  const placementAt = (index, sourcePageIndex, back = false) => {
    const localIndex = index % perSheet;
    const row = config.fillOrder === 'column' ? localIndex % rows : Math.floor(localIndex / columns);
    const column = config.fillOrder === 'column' ? Math.floor(localIndex / rows) : localIndex % columns;
    let x = startX + column * (config.itemWidthIn + config.horizontalGapIn);
    let y = startY + row * (config.itemHeightIn + config.verticalGapIn);
    if (back && config.duplex.flip === 'long-edge') x = config.sheetWidthIn - x - config.itemWidthIn;
    if (back && config.duplex.flip === 'short-edge') y = config.sheetHeightIn - y - config.itemHeightIn;
    return { index, row, column, xIn: round(x), yIn: round(y), widthIn: config.itemWidthIn, heightIn: config.itemHeightIn, pageIndex: sourcePageIndex };
  };
  for (let sheetIndex = 0; sheetIndex < physicalSheets; sheetIndex++) {
    const first = sheetIndex * perSheet;
    const count = Math.min(perSheet, quantity - first);
    const front = [];
    for (let offset = 0; offset < count; offset++) {
      const index = first + offset;
      const sourcePageIndex = config.duplex.enabled ? config.duplex.frontPageIndex : selectedPages[index % selectedPages.length];
      front.push(placementAt(index, sourcePageIndex, false));
    }
    sides.push({ sheetIndex, side: 'front', placements: front });
    if (config.duplex.enabled) sides.push({ sheetIndex, side: 'back', placements: front.map(item => placementAt(item.index, config.duplex.backPageIndex, true)) });
  }
  return { config, rows, columns, perSheet, physicalSheets, usedWidthIn: round(usedWidth), usedHeightIn: round(usedHeight), warnings, sides };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/recovery.js (2026-07-03 14:11:47) =====
const DB_NAME='canvasforge-recovery';const STORE='documents';
function openDb(){return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const req=indexedDB.open(DB_NAME,1);req.onupgradeneeded=()=>req.result.createObjectStore(STORE,{keyPath:'designId'});req.onsuccess=()=>resolve(req.result);req.onerror=()=>reject(req.error);});}
export async function saveRecovery(designId,document){if(!designId)return;const db=await openDb();await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const tx=db.transaction(STORE,'readwrite');tx.objectStore(STORE).put({designId,document,updatedAt:new Date().toISOString()});tx.oncomplete=resolve;tx.onerror=()=>reject(tx.error);});db.close();}
export async function loadRecovery(designId){const db=await openDb();const value=await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const req=db.transaction(STORE).objectStore(STORE).get(designId);req.onsuccess=()=>resolve(req.result||null);req.onerror=()=>reject(req.error);});db.close();return value;}
export async function clearRecovery(designId){if(!designId)return;const db=await openDb();await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const tx=db.transaction(STORE,'readwrite');tx.objectStore(STORE).delete(designId);tx.oncomplete=resolve;tx.onerror=()=>reject(tx.error);});db.close();}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/svg.js (2026-07-04 01:29:44) =====
const SVG_NAMESPACE = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';

export const DEFAULT_SVG_MARKUP = `<svg xmlns="${SVG_NAMESPACE}" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="45" fill="#4f46e5"/></svg>`;

function removeScripts(markup) {
  return markup.replace(/<script\b[\s\S]*?<\/script\s*>/gi, '');
}
function removeEventHandlers(markup) {
  return markup.replace(/\s+on\w+\s*=\s*(?:"[^"]*"|'[^']*'|[^\s>]+)/gi, '');
}
function removeForbiddenElements(markup) {
  return markup
    .replace(/<foreignObject\b[\s\S]*?<\/foreignObject\s*>/gi, '')
    .replace(/<(?:iframe|object|embed|audio|video|canvas)\b[\s\S]*?<\/(?:iframe|object|embed|audio|video|canvas)\s*>/gi, '')
    .replace(/<(?:iframe|object|embed|audio|video|canvas)\b[^>]*\/?\s*>/gi, '');
}
function removeExternalReferences(markup) {
  return markup
    .replace(/\b(?:xlink:)?href\s*=\s*"(?!\#)(?!data:image\/)[^"]*"/gi, 'href="#"')
    .replace(/\b(?:xlink:)?href\s*=\s*'(?!\#)(?!data:image\/)[^']*'/gi, "href='#'")
    .replace(/url\(\s*['"]?(?!#|data:image\/)[^)]+\)/gi, 'none');
}
function normalizeRoot(markup) {
  let next = markup;
  if (!/\bxmlns\s*=/.test(next)) next = next.replace(/<svg\b/i, `<svg xmlns="${SVG_NAMESPACE}"`);
  if (!/\bviewBox\s*=/.test(next)) {
    const width = Number(next.match(/\bwidth\s*=\s*["']([\d.]+)/i)?.[1]) || 100;
    const height = Number(next.match(/\bheight\s*=\s*["']([\d.]+)/i)?.[1]) || 100;
    next = next.replace(/<svg\b/i, `<svg viewBox="0 0 ${width} ${height}"`);
  }
  return next;
}

export function inspectSvgMarkup(input) {
  const original = String(input || '').trim();
  const issues = [];
  if (!original) return { valid: false, issues: ['SVG content is empty.'], markup: '', viewBox: null };
  if (original.length > 200000) issues.push('SVG exceeds the maximum allowed size.');
  if (/<script\b/i.test(original)) issues.push('Script elements were removed.');
  if (/\son\w+\s*=/i.test(original)) issues.push('Inline event handlers were removed.');
  if (/<foreignObject\b/i.test(original)) issues.push('foreignObject content was removed.');
  if (/\b(?:xlink:)?href\s*=\s*["'](?!#|data:image\/)/i.test(original)) issues.push('External references were removed.');
  let markup = original;
  if (/^\s*[Mm]\s*[\d\s,\-.]+/.test(markup)) markup = `<svg xmlns="${SVG_NAMESPACE}" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="${markup}"/></svg>`;
  if (!/<svg\b/i.test(markup)) return { valid: false, issues: [...issues, 'SVG content must contain a root <svg> element.'], markup: '', viewBox: null };
  markup = normalizeRoot(removeExternalReferences(removeEventHandlers(removeForbiddenElements(removeScripts(markup)))));
  const viewBoxMatch = markup.match(/\bviewBox\s*=\s*["']\s*([\d+\-.eE]+)[,\s]+([\d+\-.eE]+)[,\s]+([\d+\-.eE]+)[,\s]+([\d+\-.eE]+)\s*["']/i);
  const viewBox = viewBoxMatch ? viewBoxMatch.slice(1).map(Number) : null;
  if (viewBox && (!(viewBox[2] > 0) || !(viewBox[3] > 0))) issues.push('The SVG viewBox width and height must be positive.');
  if (typeof DOMParser !== 'undefined') {
    try {
      const parsed = new DOMParser().parseFromString(markup, 'image/svg+xml');
      const parserError = parsed.querySelector('parsererror');
      if (parserError) issues.push(`SVG parse error: ${parserError.textContent?.trim().slice(0, 240) || 'invalid markup'}`);
      if (parsed.documentElement?.localName !== 'svg') issues.push('The root element must be <svg>.');
    } catch (error) {
      issues.push(`SVG parse error: ${error.message}`);
    }
  }
  const fatal = issues.some(issue => /exceeds|must contain|parse error|must be positive|root element/i.test(issue));
  return { valid: !fatal && !!markup, issues, markup, viewBox };
}

export function sanitizeSvgMarkup(input) {
  const result = inspectSvgMarkup(input);
  if (!result.valid) throw new Error(result.issues.join(' '));
  return result.markup;
}

export function svgDataUrl(svg) {
  const markup = typeof svg === 'string' ? svg : DEFAULT_SVG_MARKUP;
  const encoded = globalThis.btoa ? globalThis.btoa(unescapePercent(encodeURIComponent(markup))) : Buffer.from(markup).toString('base64');
  return `data:image/svg+xml;base64,${encoded}`;
}

function unescapePercent(str) {
  return str.replace(/%([0-9A-F]{2})/gi, (_, hex) => String.fromCharCode(parseInt(hex, 16)));
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/theme.js (2026-07-04 12:46:40) =====
const THEME_KEY = 'canvasforge-theme';
const THEMES = new Set(['light', 'dark', 'system']);

export function getThemePreference() {
  try {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem(THEME_KEY);
    return THEMES.has(saved) ? saved : 'system';
  } catch {
    return 'system';
  }
}

export function resolveTheme(preference = getThemePreference()) {
  if (preference === 'system') {
    return globalThis.matchMedia?.('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light';
  }
  return preference;
}

export function applyTheme(preference = getThemePreference()) {
  const resolved = resolveTheme(preference);
  const root = globalThis.document?.documentElement;
  if (root) {
    root.dataset.theme = resolved;
    root.dataset.themePreference = preference;
    root.style.colorScheme = resolved;
    const meta = globalThis.document?.querySelector('meta[name="theme-color"]');
    if (meta) meta.setAttribute('content', resolved === 'dark' ? '#111319' : '#f4f6fa');
  }
  return resolved;
}

export function saveThemePreference(preference) {
  const safe = THEMES.has(preference) ? preference : 'system';
  try { localStorage.setItem(THEME_KEY, safe); } catch {}
  applyTheme(safe);
  globalThis.dispatchEvent?.(new CustomEvent('canvasforge:theme', { detail: { preference: safe } }));
  return safe;
}

export function subscribeToSystemTheme(listener) {
  const query = globalThis.matchMedia?.('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)');
  if (!query) return () => {};
  const handle = () => {
    if (getThemePreference() === 'system') listener(applyTheme('system'));
  };
  query.addEventListener?.('change', handle);
  return () => query.removeEventListener?.('change', handle);
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/src/lib/vector.js (2026-07-10 01:53:21) =====
const distanceToSegment = (point, start, end) => {
  const dx = end.x - start.x, dy = end.y - start.y;
  if (!dx && !dy) return Math.hypot(point.x - start.x, point.y - start.y);
  const t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, ((point.x - start.x) * dx + (point.y - start.y) * dy) / (dx * dx + dy * dy)));
  return Math.hypot(point.x - (start.x + t * dx), point.y - (start.y + t * dy));
};

export function simplifyPoints(points = [], tolerance = 2) {
  if (points.length <= 2) return [...points];
  let maximum = 0, index = 0;
  for (let i = 1; i < points.length - 1; i++) {
    const distance = distanceToSegment(points[i], points[0], points.at(-1));
    if (distance > maximum) { maximum = distance; index = i; }
  }
  if (maximum <= tolerance) return [points[0], points.at(-1)];
  return [...simplifyPoints(points.slice(0, index + 1), tolerance).slice(0, -1), ...simplifyPoints(points.slice(index), tolerance)];
}

export function normalizePathPoints(pathData = []) {
  return pathData.map(point => Array.isArray(point) ? ({ x: Number(point[0] || 0), y: Number(point[1] || 0), pressure: point[2] }) : ({ ...point, x: Number(point.x || 0), y: Number(point.y || 0) }));
}

export function simplifyPathData(pathData = [], tolerance = 2) {
  return simplifyPoints(normalizePathPoints(pathData), tolerance);
}

export function reversePathData(pathData = []) { return [...normalizePathPoints(pathData)].reverse(); }
export function closePathData(pathData = []) {
  const points = normalizePathPoints(pathData);
  if (points.length < 2) return points;
  const first = points[0], last = points.at(-1);
  return Math.hypot(first.x - last.x, first.y - last.y) < .01 ? points : [...points, { ...first }];
}

export function combinePathElements(elements = []) {
  const paths = elements.filter(element => element.type === 'path');
  if (!paths.length) return null;
  const left = Math.min(...paths.map(item => item.x)), top = Math.min(...paths.map(item => item.y));
  const right = Math.max(...paths.map(item => item.x + item.width)), bottom = Math.max(...paths.map(item => item.y + item.height));
  const pathData = paths.flatMap((item, pathIndex) => normalizePathPoints(item.pathData).map((point, pointIndex) => ({ ...point, x: point.x + item.x - left, y: point.y + item.y - top, move: pathIndex > 0 && pointIndex === 0 })));
  return { ...structuredClone(paths[0]), id: globalThis.crypto?.randomUUID?.() || `${Date.now()}`, name: 'Combined path', x: left, y: top, width: right - left, height: bottom - top, pathData };
}

      snapToGrid: true,

      rightPanelOpen: true,
      leftPanelWidth: 310,
      rightPanelWidth: 300,
      showRulers: true,
      showGuides: true,
      snapToPage: true,

}

}

const AGENT_STORAGE_VERSION = 2;
const AGENT_DB_NAME = 'design-commons-ai';
const AGENT_DB_STORE = 'agent-sessions';
let persistAIAgentTimer = null;
function openAIAgentDatabase() {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    if (!globalThis.indexedDB) return reject(new Error('IndexedDB is unavailable.'));
    const request = indexedDB.open(AGENT_DB_NAME, 1);
    request.onupgradeneeded = () => {
      if (!request.result.objectStoreNames.contains(AGENT_DB_STORE)) request.result.createObjectStore(AGENT_DB_STORE, { keyPath: 'designId' });
    };
    request.onsuccess = () => resolve(request.result);
    request.onerror = () => reject(request.error || new Error('Could not open AI session storage.'));
  });
}
async function writePersistedAIAgent(state) {
  if (!state.aiAgent || !state.design?.id) return;
  const db = await openAIAgentDatabase();
  await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const transaction = db.transaction(AGENT_DB_STORE, 'readwrite');
    transaction.objectStore(AGENT_DB_STORE).put({
      version: AGENT_STORAGE_VERSION,
      designId: state.design.id,
      agent: state.aiAgent,
      aiPlan: state.aiPlan,
      aiPreview: state.aiPreview,
      savedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    transaction.oncomplete = resolve;
    transaction.onerror = () => reject(transaction.error || new Error('Could not save AI session.'));
  });
  db.close();
}
function persistAIAgent(state) {
  if (!state.aiAgent || !state.design?.id) return;
  cancelAIAgentPersistence();
  persistAIAgentTimer = setTimeout(() => writePersistedAIAgent(useEditorStore.getState()).catch(error => console.error('[AI session] persistence failed', error)), 400);
}
function cancelAIAgentPersistence() {
  if (persistAIAgentTimer) { clearTimeout(persistAIAgentTimer); persistAIAgentTimer = null; }
}
async function loadPersistedAIAgent(designId) {
  if (!designId) return null;
  try {
    const db = await openAIAgentDatabase();
    const saved = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const request = db.transaction(AGENT_DB_STORE, 'readonly').objectStore(AGENT_DB_STORE).get(designId);
      request.onsuccess = () => resolve(request.result || null);
      request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);
    });
    db.close();
    if (!saved || saved.version !== AGENT_STORAGE_VERSION) return null;
    const inFlight = ['planning', 'generating_concepts', 'refining_concept', 'compiling_design', 'rendering', 'critiquing'].includes(saved.agent?.status);
    const agent = inFlight ? { ...saved.agent, paused: true, previousStatus: saved.agent.status, status: AGENT_STATES.PAUSED } : saved.agent;
    return { ...saved, agent: { ...agent, restoredAt: new Date().toISOString() } };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[AI session] restore failed', error);
    return null;
  }
}
async function deletePersistedAIAgent(designId) {
  if (!designId) return;
  try {
    const db = await openAIAgentDatabase();
    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const transaction = db.transaction(AGENT_DB_STORE, 'readwrite');
      transaction.objectStore(AGENT_DB_STORE).delete(designId);
      transaction.oncomplete = resolve;
      transaction.onerror = () => reject(transaction.error);
    });
    db.close();
  } catch (error) { console.error('[AI session] delete failed', error); }
}

let agentPersistUnsubscribe = null;
function subscribeAIAgentPersistence() {
  if (agentPersistUnsubscribe) return;
  agentPersistUnsubscribe = useEditorStore.subscribe((state, previous) => {
    if (state.aiAgent === previous.aiAgent && state.design?.id === previous.design?.id && state.aiPlan === previous.aiPlan && state.aiPreview === previous.aiPreview) return;
    if (state.aiAgent) persistAIAgent(state);
    else if (previous.aiAgent) cancelAIAgentPersistence();
  });
}

const persistWorkspace = state => {
  const value = {
    leftPanelOpen: state.leftPanelOpen,
    rightPanelOpen: state.rightPanelOpen,
    leftPanelWidth: state.leftPanelWidth,
    rightPanelWidth: state.rightPanelWidth,
    showRulers: state.showRulers,
    showGuides: state.showGuides,
    snapToPage: state.snapToPage,
    snapToGuides: state.snapToGuides,
    snapToObjects: state.snapToObjects,
    snapToGrid: state.snapToGrid,
    snapToMargins: state.snapToMargins
  };
  writeStorage('workspace', JSON.stringify(value));
};

const summarizeResolvedAssets = results => results.map(item => ({
  requestKey: item.request.key,
  requestName: item.request.name,
  assetId: item.asset.id,
  assetName: item.asset.original_name || item.asset.name,
  resolution: item.resolution
}));

const assetPlanningInstruction = (instruction, { themeHint = '', assetMode = 'reuse-only', pass = 1, priorAssets = [] } = {}) => `${instruction}

ASSET WORKFLOW
- Asset mode: ${assetMode}.
- Theme hint: ${themeHint || 'Infer one coherent theme from the content, brand, and current page.'}
- Planning pass: ${pass}.
- Inspect context.assets before requesting new work.
- Return a top-level theme object and assetRequests array.
- For each suitable existing asset, set reuseAssetId to its exact context asset ID.
- Request only assets that materially improve the composition. Keep a consistent palette, perspective, line weight, lighting, texture, and illustration or photography language.
${priorAssets.length ? `- Assets already resolved in earlier passes: ${JSON.stringify(priorAssets)}. Use these exact IDs and do not request them again.` : ''}
${assetMode === 'reuse-only' ? '- Do not request generation. Use only existing assets, SVG commands, and native shapes.' : assetMode === 'prompts' ? '- Produce production-ready asset prompts for manual generation. Commands may be empty until assets are supplied.' : '- Request missing assets so CanvasForge can generate them, then produce final layout commands after the asset IDs are supplied.'}`;

const agentAssetSource = asset => asset?.thumbnail_url || asset?.preview_url || asset?.url || asset?.thumbnailUrl || asset?.previewUrl || null;
const summarizeAgentHistoryEntry = entry => ({
  ...entry,
  concepts: Array.isArray(entry?.concepts)
    ? entry.concepts.map(concept => ({
      id: concept.id,
      title: concept.title,
      description: concept.description,
      previewUrl: concept.previewUrl || null,
      previewLabel: concept.previewLabel || null,
      previewError: concept.previewError || null,
      previewModel: concept.previewModel || null,
      prompt: concept.prompt || '',
      seed: concept.seed,
      document: concept.document || null,
      pageIndex: concept.pageIndex || 0
    }))
    : entry?.concepts,
  preview: entry?.preview ? {
    ...entry.preview,
    document: entry.preview.document || null,
    pageIndex: entry.preview.pageIndex || Math.max(0, (entry.preview.document?.pages?.length || 1) - 1)
  } : entry?.preview
});
const pushAgentHistoryEntry = (session, entry) => ([...(session?.history || []), summarizeAgentHistoryEntry({ id: uuid(), createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), ...entry })]);

async function collectAIAgentVisuals(state, session, parentConceptId = null) {
  const visuals = [];
  const seen = new Set();
  const add = async (source, label, kind, extra = {}) => {
    if (!source || seen.has(source) || visuals.length >= 8) return;
    try {
      const dataUrl = await sourceToDataUrl(source);
      if (!dataUrl) return;
      seen.add(source);
      visuals.push({ dataUrl, label, kind, ...extra });
    } catch { /* Visual references are helpful, but should not block concept generation. */ }
  };
  const parent = parentConceptId ? session?.concepts?.find(concept => concept.id === parentConceptId) : null;
  if (parent?.previewUrl) await add(parent.previewUrl, `Selected parent concept: ${parent.title}`, 'parent-concept', { required: true });
  for (const asset of (session?.brief?.mustUseAssets || []).slice(0, 5)) {
    const full = state.assets?.find(item => item.id === asset.id) || asset;
    await add(agentAssetSource(full), `Required user asset: ${asset.name}`, 'user-asset', { required: true, assetId: asset.id, description: asset.description || '' });
  }
  for (const asset of (session?.brief?.optionalAssets || []).slice(0, 3)) {
    const full = state.assets?.find(item => item.id === asset.id) || asset;
    await add(agentAssetSource(full), `Optional user asset: ${asset.name}`, 'user-asset', { required: false, assetId: asset.id, description: asset.description || '' });
  }
  return visuals;
}

export const useEditorStore = create((set, get) => ({
  session: readMigratedStorage('session') || '',
  user: null,
  workspaces: [],
  currentWorkspaceId: readMigratedStorage('organization') || localStorage.getItem(workspaceIdKey) || localStorage.getItem(legacyWorkspaceIdKey) || localStorage.getItem(legacyOrgKey) || '',
  organizations: [],
  currentOrganizationId: readMigratedStorage('organization') || localStorage.getItem(workspaceIdKey) || localStorage.getItem(legacyWorkspaceIdKey) || localStorage.getItem(legacyOrgKey) || '',
  role: 'viewer',
  aiMode: loadAIProviderSettings().activeMode,
  billingSummary: null,
  creditLedger: [],
  aiUsage: null,
  marketplaceListings: [],
  marketplacePurchases: [],
  marketplaceEarnings: null,
  commercialBusy: false,

  design: null,
  document: null,
  pageIndex: 0,
  selection: [],
  history: [],
  future: [],
  historyTransactionSnapshot: null,
  historyTransactionRevision: null,

  status: 'idle',
  lastError: '',
  online: navigator.onLine,
  tabConflict: false,
  recoveryPending: false,
  collaborationEnabled: true,
  collaborationStatus: { state: 'disconnected', mode: 'local' },
  collaborators: [],
  workspaceGovernance: loadWorkspaceGovernance(),
  designPreferences: loadDesignPreferences(),
  commandPaletteOpen: false,
  mobilePanel: '',
  documentRevision: 0,
  savedRevision: 0,
  savingRevision: null,
  saveQueued: false,
  lastSavedAt: null,
  lastAutoVersionAt: 0,

  ...workspacePreferences,
  toasts: [],

  aiPanelOpen: false,
  aiBusy: false,
  aiError: '',
  aiPlan: null,
  aiPreview: null,
  aiRuns: [],
  aiRender: null,
  aiRenders: [],
  aiAnnotation: null,
  aiCandidates: [],
  aiRefinementLimit: 3,
  aiTheme: null,
  aiAssetRequests: [],
  aiAssetResults: [],
  aiAssetLoop: null,
  aiAgent: null,

  assets: [],
  assetFolders: [],
  templateFolders: [],
  templates: [],
  components: [],
  brands: [],
  versions: [],
  exports: [],
  comments: [],
  shares: [],
  members: [],
  notifications: [],

  notify(message, type = 'info', timeout = 4500) {
    const id = uuid();
    set(state => ({ toasts: [...state.toasts, { id, message, type }] }));
    if (timeout) setTimeout(() => get().dismissToast(id), timeout);
    return id;
  },
  dismissToast(id) {
    set(state => ({ toasts: state.toasts.filter(item => item.id !== id) }));
  },
  toggleCommandPalette(value) { set({ commandPaletteOpen: typeof value === 'boolean' ? value : !get().commandPaletteOpen }); },
  setMobilePanel(mobilePanel = '') { set({ mobilePanel }); },
  setWorkspaceGovernance(patch) {
    const workspaceGovernance = { ...get().workspaceGovernance, ...(patch || {}) };
    saveWorkspaceGovernance(workspaceGovernance);
    set({ workspaceGovernance });
    trackProductEvent('governance_updated', { keys: Object.keys(patch || {}) });
  },
  learnDesignPreference(input = {}) {
    const current = get().designPreferences;
    const addUnique = (list, value, key = item => JSON.stringify(item)) => value == null ? list : [value, ...list.filter(item => key(item) !== key(value))].slice(0, 12);
    const designPreferences = {
      ...current,
      fontPairs: addUnique(current.fontPairs || [], input.fontPair, item => (item || []).join('|')),
      palettes: addUnique(current.palettes || [], input.palette, item => (item || []).join('|')),
      layouts: addUnique(current.layouts || [], input.layout),
      density: input.density || current.density,
      imagery: input.imagery || current.imagery,
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    saveDesignPreferences(designPreferences); set({ designPreferences });
    trackProductEvent('design_preference_learned', { layout: input.layout || null });
  },
  clearDesignPreferences() { const designPreferences = { fontPairs: [], palettes: [], layouts: [], density: 'medium', imagery: 'mixed' }; saveDesignPreferences(designPreferences); set({ designPreferences }); },
  setCollaborationEnabled(collaborationEnabled) {
    set({ collaborationEnabled });
    if (!collaborationEnabled) { collaborationTransport?.close(); collaborationTransport = null; set({ collaborators: [], collaborationStatus: { state: 'disabled', mode: 'local' } }); }
    else if (get().design) get().connectCollaboration();
  },
  connectCollaboration() {
    const state = get();
    collaborationTransport?.close();
    collaborationTransport = null;
    if (!state.collaborationEnabled || !state.design?.id) return;
    collaborationTransport = new CollaborationTransport({
      designId: state.design.id,
      actor: { id: state.user?.id || tabId, name: state.user?.name || 'Collaborator' },
      onStatus: collaborationStatus => set({ collaborationStatus }),
      onPresence: (presence, actor) => set(current => {
        const others = current.collaborators.filter(item => item.id !== actor.id);
        return { collaborators: presence.state === 'left' ? others : [...others, { ...actor, ...presence, lastSeenAt: Date.now() }] };
      }),
      onPatch: ({ entry }, actor) => {
        const current = get();
        if (!entry?.forward?.length || !current.document) return;
        try {
          const next = normalizeDocument(applyPatches(current.document, entry.forward));
          set(stateNow => ({
            document: next,
            documentRevision: stateNow.documentRevision + 1,
            history: compactPatchHistory([...stateNow.history, { ...entry, label: `${actor?.name || 'Collaborator'}: ${entry.label || 'Edit'}` }]),
            future: [],
            status: stateNow.online ? 'dirty' : 'offline'
          }));
          trackProductEvent('collaboration_patch_received', { actorId: actor?.id, operations: entry.forward.length });
        } catch (error) { get().notify(`Could not merge a collaborator change: ${error.message}`, 'error'); }
      }
    });
    collaborationTransport.connect();
  },
  publishPresence(patch = {}) {
    const state = get();
    collaborationTransport?.publishPresence({ pageIndex: state.pageIndex, selection: state.selection, ...patch });
  },
  toggleAIPanel(value) { set({ aiPanelOpen: typeof value === 'boolean' ? value : !get().aiPanelOpen }); },
  clearAIPlan() { set({ aiPlan: null, aiPreview: null, aiError: '', aiTheme: null, aiAssetRequests: [], aiAssetResults: [], aiAssetLoop: null }); },
  resetAIAgent() {
    agentRunToken++;
    cancelAIAgentPersistence();
    deletePersistedAIAgent(get().design?.id);
    set({ aiAgent: null, aiBusy: false, aiError: '', aiPlan: null, aiPreview: null });
  },
  async startAIAgent(instruction, options = {}) {
    const state = get();
    const context = state.getAIContext();
    if (!context) throw new Error('No design is open.');
    if (!String(instruction || '').trim()) throw new Error('Describe what you want the design agent to create or revise.');
    const session = createAgentSession(instruction, context, options);
    const shouldClarify = session.questions.length > 0 && options.askQuestions !== false;
    set({
      aiAgent: { ...session, status: shouldClarify ? AGENT_STATES.AWAITING_CLARIFICATION : AGENT_STATES.PLANNING },
      aiError: '', aiPlan: null, aiPreview: null
    });
    if (shouldClarify) return get().aiAgent;
    return get().generateAIAgentConcepts();
  },
  async answerAIAgent(answer) {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session) throw new Error('Start an agent session first.');
    const content = String(answer || '').trim();
    if (!content) throw new Error('Add an answer or choose the recommended assumptions.');
    set({
      aiAgent: {
        ...session,
        brief: appendBriefAnswer(session.brief, content),
        questions: [],
        status: AGENT_STATES.PLANNING,
        messages: [...session.messages, { id: uuid(), role: 'user', content, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }],
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      }
    });
    return get().generateAIAgentConcepts();
  },
  async generateAIAgentConcepts({ refinement = '', parentConceptId = null, randomize = false } = {}) {
    const state = get();
    const session = state.aiAgent;
    const context = state.getAIContext();
    if (!session || !context) throw new Error('Start an agent session first.');
    if (session.status === AGENT_STATES.CANCELLED) throw new Error('This agent session was cancelled.');
    const token = ++agentRunToken;
    const status = parentConceptId ? AGENT_STATES.REFINING_CONCEPT : AGENT_STATES.GENERATING_CONCEPTS;
    const variationNonce = randomize ? uuid() : `${parentConceptId || 'initial'}-${Number(session.generationRound || 0) + 1}`;
    set({
      aiBusy: true,
      aiError: '',
      aiAgent: {
        ...session,
        paused: false,
        status,
        tasks: updateAgentTask(session.tasks, 'concepts', {
          status: 'in_progress',
          progress: 20,
          details: refinement || (randomize ? 'Creating three fresh Nano Banana directions' : 'Understanding the request and creating three Nano Banana previews')
        }),
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      }
    });
    try {
      let concepts = [];
      let serverPayload = null;
      const current = get().aiAgent;
      const visuals = await collectAIAgentVisuals(state, current, parentConceptId);
      if (current.options?.provider !== 'local') {
        try {
          serverPayload = await api.aiAgentConcepts(state.design.id, {
            instruction: current.instruction,
            context,
            brief: current.brief,
            count: 3,
            quality: 'low',
            generatePreviews: true,
            previewEngine: 'nano-banana',
            previewImageSize: '1K',
            refinement,
            parentConceptId,
            randomize,
            variationNonce,
            steering: current.steering,
            visuals
          });
          concepts = normalizeAgentConcepts(serverPayload, context, current.brief);
        } catch (error) {
          if (current.options?.provider === 'server' && ![404, 405, 501].includes(error.status)) throw error;
        }
      }

      const localConcepts = createLocalConceptVariants(context, current.brief, {
        refinement,
        parentConceptId,
        classification: current.classification,
        randomize,
        variationNonce
      });
      if (!concepts.length) concepts = localConcepts;
      else concepts = Array.from({ length: 3 }, (_, index) => {
        const local = localConcepts[index];
        const server = concepts[index];
        if (!server) return local;
        return {
          ...local,
          ...server,
          commandBatch: server.commandBatch || local?.commandBatch
        };
      }).filter(Boolean);

      // Server concept planning and image rendering are deliberately separate. Always fill any
      // missing visual preview with the dedicated Nano Banana route instead of silently stopping
      // at the generic structured fallback.
      if (current.options?.provider !== 'local') {
        const width = Number(context.design?.width || 1080);
        const height = Number(context.design?.height || 1080);
        concepts = await Promise.all(concepts.map(async concept => {
          if (concept.previewUrl) return concept;
          try {
            const image = await api.aiGenerateImage({
              purpose: 'concept-preview',
              instruction: current.instruction,
              brief: current.brief,
              understanding: serverPayload?.understanding || current.understanding,
              concept,
              prompt: concept.prompt,
              negativePrompt: concept.negativePrompt,
              refinement,
              parentConceptId,
              randomize,
              width,
              height,
              imageSize: '1K',
              quality: 'draft',
              count: 1,
              seed: concept.seed,
              references: visuals,
              sessionId: current.id,
              conceptId: concept.id
            });
            const first = image?.images?.[0] || image;
            const previewUrl = first?.url || first?.previewUrl || null;
            return previewUrl ? {
              ...concept,
              previewUrl,
              previewMode: 'nano-banana',
              previewEngine: first.previewEngine || image?.previewEngine?.engine || 'nano-banana',
              previewLabel: first.previewLabel || image?.previewEngine?.label || 'Nano Banana',
              previewProvider: first.provider || image?.previewEngine?.provider || 'gemini',
              previewModel: first.model || image?.previewEngine?.model || null,
              previewError: null
            } : { ...concept, previewError: concept.previewError || 'Nano Banana returned no preview image.' };
          } catch (error) {
            return { ...concept, previewMode: 'structured-fallback', previewError: error.message || 'Nano Banana preview generation failed.' };
          }
        }));
      }

      const previewed = concepts.map(concept => {
        if (!concept.commandBatch) return concept;
        const batch = { ...concept.commandBatch, baseRevision: state.documentRevision };
        try {
          const result = applyCommandBatch(state.document, batch, {
            pageIndex: state.pageIndex, selection: state.selection, assets: state.assets, brands: state.brands,
            components: state.components, revision: state.documentRevision
          });
          const lint = lintDocument(result.document);
          return {
            ...concept,
            commandBatch: batch,
            document: result.document,
            pageIndex: Math.max(0, result.document.pages.length - 1),
            diff: diffDocuments(state.document, result.document),
            lint,
            blockingIssues: lint.issues.filter(issue => issue.severity === 'critical')
          };
        } catch (error) {
          return { ...concept, commandBatch: batch, previewError: concept.previewError || error.message };
        }
      });
      if (token !== agentRunToken || get().aiAgent?.paused || get().aiAgent?.status === AGENT_STATES.CANCELLED) return get().aiAgent;
      const latest = get().aiAgent;
      const imageCount = previewed.filter(concept => concept.previewUrl).length;
      const assistantMessage = refinement
        ? `I used the selected preview and created three Nano Banana redesigns based on: ${refinement}`
        : randomize
          ? 'I designed three fresh Nano Banana directions without using the selected concept as a parent.'
          : `I understood this as ${String((serverPayload?.understanding || latest.understanding)?.deliverable || latest.classification.intent).replaceAll('_', ' ')} and created three visual directions.`;
      const nextRound = Number(latest.generationRound || 0) + 1;
      const next = {
        ...latest,
        understanding: serverPayload?.understanding || latest.understanding,
        concepts: previewed,
        selectedConceptId: null,
        generationRound: nextRound,
        history: pushAgentHistoryEntry(latest, {
          type: 'concept-set',
          title: refinement ? `Concept revision round ${nextRound}` : randomize ? `Fresh concept round ${nextRound}` : `Concept round ${nextRound}`,
          summary: assistantMessage,
          round: nextRound,
          parentConceptId,
          refinement,
          randomize,
          understanding: serverPayload?.understanding || latest.understanding,
          concepts: previewed
        }),
        status: AGENT_STATES.AWAITING_CONCEPT_SELECTION,
        messages: [...latest.messages, { id: uuid(), role: 'assistant', content: assistantMessage, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }],
        tasks: updateAgentTask(updateAgentTask(updateAgentTask(updateAgentTask(updateAgentTask(latest.tasks, 'design_system', { status: 'completed', progress: 100 }), 'layout_spec', { status: 'completed', progress: 100, details: 'Canonical editable DesignSpec created' }), 'assets', { status: 'completed', progress: 100 }), 'concepts', { status: 'completed', progress: 100, details: `${imageCount}/3 Nano Banana previews ready` }), 'selection', { status: 'in_progress', progress: 10 }),
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      };
      set({ aiAgent: next, aiError: imageCount ? '' : 'Nano Banana previews could not be generated. Structured editable fallbacks are shown with the provider error.' });
      return next;
    } catch (error) {
      if (token === agentRunToken) set(currentState => ({
        aiError: error.message || 'Concept generation failed.',
        aiAgent: currentState.aiAgent ? { ...currentState.aiAgent, status: AGENT_STATES.FAILED, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } : null
      }));
      throw error;
    } finally {
      if (token === agentRunToken) set({ aiBusy: false });
    }
  },
  async redesignAIAgentConcepts() {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session) throw new Error('Start an agent session first.');
    set({
      aiAgent: {
        ...session,
        selectedConceptId: null,
        messages: [...session.messages, { id: uuid(), role: 'user', content: 'Design again with three fresh random directions.', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }],
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      }
    });
    return get().generateAIAgentConcepts({ randomize: true });
  },
  selectAIAgentConcept(conceptId) {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session) throw new Error('Start an agent session first.');
    const concept = session.concepts.find(item => item.id === conceptId);
    if (!concept) throw new Error('The selected concept no longer exists.');
    set({
      aiAgent: {
        ...session,
        selectedConceptId: conceptId,
        status: AGENT_STATES.AWAITING_CONCEPT_APPROVAL,
        tasks: updateAgentTask(session.tasks, 'selection', { status: 'completed', progress: 100, details: concept.title }),
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      }
    });
    return concept;
  },
  async refineAIAgentConcept(conceptId, feedback) {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session) throw new Error('Start an agent session first.');
    const concept = session.concepts.find(item => item.id === conceptId);
    if (!concept) throw new Error('Select a concept to refine.');
    const content = String(feedback || '').trim();
    if (!content) throw new Error('Describe what should change in the next variants.');
    set({
      aiAgent: {
        ...session,
        selectedConceptId: conceptId,
        steering: [...session.steering, { id: uuid(), content, conceptId, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }],
        messages: [...session.messages, { id: uuid(), role: 'user', content, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }],
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      }
    });
    return get().generateAIAgentConcepts({ refinement: content, parentConceptId: conceptId });
  },
  async approveAIAgentConcept(conceptId) {
    const state = get();
    const session = state.aiAgent;
    if (!session) throw new Error('Start an agent session first.');
    const concept = session.concepts.find(item => item.id === conceptId);
    if (!concept) throw new Error('Select a concept to approve.');
    const compileStartedAt = Date.now();
    const compileLog = (stage, details = {}) => console.info(`[Nano Banana compile] ${stage}`, { conceptId, elapsedMs: Date.now() - compileStartedAt, ...details });
    compileLog('started', { title: concept.title, provider: session.options?.provider, hasPreview: Boolean(concept.previewUrl), fallbackCommands: concept.commandBatch?.commands?.length || 0 });
    set({ aiBusy: true, aiError: '', aiAgent: { ...session, selectedConceptId: conceptId, status: AGENT_STATES.COMPILING_DESIGN, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } });
    try {
      let batch = concept.commandBatch;
      let compileDetails = { hybrid: null, fidelity: null };

      // A Nano Banana preview is the visual source of truth. Reconstruct it with the
      // vision-capable planner even when a deterministic fallback bundle exists.
      let compileSource = concept.commandBatch ? 'structured-fallback' : 'vision-reconstruction';
      if (concept.previewUrl && session.options?.provider !== 'local') {
        try {
          compileLog('collecting visual context');
          const assetVisuals = (await collectAIAgentVisuals(state, session, null)).filter(item => item.kind !== 'parent-concept');
          compileLog('requesting vision reconstruction', { supportingVisuals: assetVisuals.length });
          const payload = await api.aiAgentCompile(state.design.id, {
            instruction: session.instruction,
            context: state.getAIContext(),
            brief: session.brief,
            concept,
            steering: session.steering,
            visuals: assetVisuals,
            quality: 'normal'
          });
          compileSource = payload?.source || 'vision-reconstruction';
          compileDetails = { hybrid: payload?.hybrid || null, fidelity: payload?.fidelity || null };
          batch = payload?.commandBatch || payload?.batch || payload;
          compileLog('vision reconstruction received', { source: compileSource, commands: batch?.commands?.length || 0, hybrid: compileDetails.hybrid?.mode || null });
        } catch (error) {
          console.error('[Nano Banana compile] vision reconstruction failed', { conceptId, elapsedMs: Date.now() - compileStartedAt, status: error.status, error });
          const mayFallback = session.options?.provider !== 'server' || [404, 405, 501].includes(error.status);
          if (!mayFallback || !batch?.commands) throw error;
          get().notify('Vision reconstruction is unavailable, so Design Commons used the structured editable fallback for this direction.', 'info');
        }
      } else if (!batch) {
        const payload = await api.aiAgentCompile(state.design.id, {
          instruction: session.instruction,
          context: state.getAIContext(),
          brief: session.brief,
          concept,
          steering: session.steering,
          visuals: await collectAIAgentVisuals(state, session, null),
          quality: 'normal'
        });
        compileSource = payload?.source || 'vision-reconstruction';
        compileDetails = { hybrid: payload?.hybrid || null, fidelity: payload?.fidelity || null };
        batch = payload?.commandBatch || payload?.batch || payload;
      }

      if (!batch?.commands) throw new Error('The selected preview could not be reconstructed into an editable command bundle. Regenerate the previews or configure the agent compile endpoint.');
      batch = {
        ...batch,
        schemaVersion: Number(batch.schemaVersion || 1),
        baseRevision: state.documentRevision
      };
      const preview = get().previewAICommands(batch, {
        compileSource,
        approvedConceptId: concept.id,
        approvedConceptPreviewUrl: concept.previewUrl || null,
        approvedConceptTitle: concept.title || '',
        approvedConceptDescription: concept.description || '',
        hybrid: compileDetails.hybrid,
        fidelity: compileDetails.fidelity
      });
      compileLog('editable preview validated', { commands: batch.commands.length, lintIssues: preview.lint?.issues?.length || 0, fidelity: preview.fidelity?.overall ?? null });
      const latest = get().aiAgent || session;
      set({
        aiAgent: {
          ...latest,
          selectedConceptId: conceptId,
          history: pushAgentHistoryEntry(latest, {
            type: 'compile-preview',
            title: `Editable reconstruction: ${concept.title}`,
            summary: concept.previewUrl
              ? 'The selected Nano Banana preview was reconstructed into editable objects for final review.'
              : 'The selected structured concept was compiled into editable objects for final review.',
            conceptId: concept.id,
            compileSource,
            hybrid: preview.hybrid || null,
            preview,
            concept: {
              id: concept.id,
              title: concept.title,
              description: concept.description,
              previewUrl: concept.previewUrl || null
            }
          }),
          status: AGENT_STATES.AWAITING_FINAL_APPROVAL,
          tasks: updateAgentTask(updateAgentTask(updateAgentTask(latest.tasks, 'compile', { status: 'completed', progress: 100, details: concept.previewUrl ? 'Reconstructed from the selected Nano Banana preview' : 'Compiled from the structured concept' }), 'quality', { status: 'completed', progress: 100, details: `${preview.lint?.issues?.length || 0} design checks · ${preview.fidelity?.overall ?? '—'}% concept fidelity` }), 'approval', { status: 'in_progress', progress: 20 }),
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
        }
      });
      return preview;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('[Nano Banana compile] failed', { conceptId, elapsedMs: Date.now() - compileStartedAt, status: error.status, error });
      set(current => ({ aiError: error.message, aiAgent: current.aiAgent ? { ...current.aiAgent, status: AGENT_STATES.FAILED } : null }));
      throw error;
    } finally {
      set({ aiBusy: false });
    }
  },
  async steerAIAgent(message) {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session) throw new Error('Start an agent session first.');
    const content = String(message || '').trim();
    if (!content) return session;
    agentRunToken++;
    const steering = { id: uuid(), content, conceptId: session.selectedConceptId || null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() };
    const next = {
      ...session,
      paused: true,
      previousStatus: session.status,
      status: AGENT_STATES.PAUSED,
      steering: [...session.steering, steering],
      messages: [...session.messages, { id: uuid(), role: 'user', content, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }],
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    set({ aiAgent: next, aiBusy: false });
    return next;
  },
  pauseAIAgent() {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session || [AGENT_STATES.COMPLETED, AGENT_STATES.CANCELLED].includes(session.status)) return;
    agentRunToken++;
    set({ aiBusy: false, aiAgent: { ...session, paused: true, previousStatus: session.status, status: AGENT_STATES.PAUSED, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } });
  },
  async resumeAIAgent() {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session || !session.paused) return session;
    const feedback = session.steering.at(-1)?.content || '';
    const selected = session.selectedConceptId;
    const previousStatus = session.previousStatus || AGENT_STATES.PLANNING;
    set({ aiAgent: { ...session, paused: false, restoredAt: null, status: previousStatus, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } });
    if (previousStatus === AGENT_STATES.COMPILING_DESIGN && selected) return get().approveAIAgentConcept(selected);
    if (previousStatus === AGENT_STATES.REFINING_CONCEPT && selected) return get().generateAIAgentConcepts({ refinement: feedback, parentConceptId: selected });
    if ([AGENT_STATES.PLANNING, AGENT_STATES.GENERATING_CONCEPTS].includes(previousStatus) || !session.concepts.length) return get().generateAIAgentConcepts();
    return get().aiAgent;
  },
  cancelAIAgent() {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session) return;
    agentRunToken++;
    set({ aiBusy: false, aiAgent: { ...session, paused: false, status: AGENT_STATES.CANCELLED, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } });
  },
  skipAIAgentTask(taskId) {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session) return;
    set({ aiAgent: { ...session, tasks: session.tasks.map(task => task.id === taskId ? { ...task, status: 'completed', progress: 100, details: task.details || 'Skipped by user' } : task), updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } });
  },
  async retryAIAgentTask(taskId) {
    const session = get().aiAgent;
    if (!session) return;
    const task = session.tasks.find(item => item.id === taskId);
    if (!task) return;
    set({ aiAgent: { ...session, tasks: session.tasks.map(item => item.id === taskId ? { ...item, status: 'in_progress', progress: 10, details: 'Retrying…' } : item), updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } });
    if (['design_system', 'layout_spec', 'assets', 'concepts'].includes(task.type)) return get().generateAIAgentConcepts();
    if (['compile', 'quality'].includes(task.type) && session.selectedConceptId) return get().approveAIAgentConcept(session.selectedConceptId);
    return get().aiAgent;
  },

  setWorkspacePreference(key, value) {
    set({ [key]: value });
    persistWorkspace(get());
  },
  toggleLeftPanel() {
    const open = !get().leftPanelOpen;
    set({ leftPanelOpen: open, ...(open && window.innerWidth <= 900 ? { rightPanelOpen: false } : {}) });
    persistWorkspace(get());
  },
  toggleRightPanel() {
    const open = !get().rightPanelOpen;
    set({ rightPanelOpen: open, ...(open && window.innerWidth <= 900 ? { leftPanelOpen: false } : {}) });
    persistWorkspace(get());
  },

  async login(email, password) {
    const result = await api.login(email, password);
    get().applyAuth(result);
    return result;
  },
  async register(input) {
    const result = await api.register(input);
    get().applyAuth(result);
    return result;
  },
  async tokenLogin(token) {
    const result = await api.tokenLogin(token);
    get().applyAuth(result);
    return result;
  },
  applyAuth(result) {
    writeStorage('session', result.token);
    const rawWorkspaces = result.workspaces || result.organizations || [];
    const workspaces = rawWorkspaces.map(item => ({
      ...item,
      id: item.id || item.workspace_id || item.organization_id,
      workspace_id: item.workspace_id || item.id || item.organization_id,
      organization_id: item.organization_id || item.workspace_id || item.id,
      type: item.type || 'organization'
    }));
    const workspaceId = result.currentWorkspaceId || result.currentOrganizationId || workspaces[0]?.id || '';
    if (workspaceId) {
      writeStorage('organization', workspaceId);
      localStorage.setItem(workspaceIdKey, workspaceId);
      localStorage.setItem(legacyWorkspaceIdKey, workspaceId);
      localStorage.setItem(legacyOrgKey, workspaceId);
    }
    const role = workspaces.find(item => item.id === workspaceId)?.role || 'viewer';
    set({
      session: result.token,
      user: result.user,
      workspaces,
      organizations: workspaces,
      currentWorkspaceId: workspaceId,
      currentOrganizationId: workspaceId,
      role
    });
  },
  async hydrateAuth() {
    if (!get().session) return false;
    try {
      const result = await api.me();
      get().applyAuth({ ...result, token: get().session });
      await get().refreshCommercialData().catch(() => {});
      return true;
    } catch {
      get().logout();
      return false;
    }
  },
  async logout() {
    try { await api.logout(); } catch {}
    removeStorage('session');
    localStorage.removeItem(workspaceIdKey);
    localStorage.removeItem(legacyWorkspaceIdKey);
    localStorage.removeItem(legacyOrgKey);
    removeStorage('organization');
    set({ session: '', user: null, workspaces: [], organizations: [], currentWorkspaceId: '', currentOrganizationId: '', role: 'viewer', design: null, document: null, billingSummary: null, creditLedger: [], aiUsage: null });
  },
  setWorkspace(id) {
    writeStorage('organization', id);
    localStorage.setItem(workspaceIdKey, id);
    localStorage.setItem(legacyWorkspaceIdKey, id);
    localStorage.setItem(legacyOrgKey, id);
    const workspace = get().workspaces.find(item => item.id === id || item.workspace_id === id || item.organization_id === id);
    set({
      currentWorkspaceId: id,
      currentOrganizationId: id,
      role: workspace?.role || 'viewer',
      design: null,
      document: null,
      assets: [],
      assetFolders: [],
      templateFolders: [],
      templates: [],
      components: [],
      brands: [],
      billingSummary: null,
      creditLedger: [],
      aiUsage: null
    });
    get().refreshCommercialData().catch(() => {});
  },
  setOrganization(id) { get().setWorkspace(id); },
  async createWorkspace(input) {
    const workspace = await api.createWorkspace(typeof input === 'string' ? { name: input, type: 'organization' } : input);
    const result = await api.me();
    get().applyAuth({ ...result, token: get().session, currentWorkspaceId: workspace.id });
    return workspace;
  },
  async createOrganization(name) { return get().createWorkspace({ name, type: 'organization' }); },
  async changePassword(currentPassword, newPassword) {
    await api.changePassword(currentPassword, newPassword);
    await get().logout();
  },

  setOnline(online) {
    const state = get();
    const hasUnsaved = state.documentRevision > state.savedRevision;
    const status = !online ? 'offline' : state.tabConflict ? 'conflict' : state.recoveryPending ? 'recovered' : hasUnsaved ? 'dirty' : (state.status === 'offline' ? 'saved' : state.status);
    set({ online, status });
    if (online && state.document && hasUnsaved && !state.tabConflict && !state.recoveryPending) get().save().catch(() => {});
  },
  setSelection(selection) { set({ selection }); queueMicrotask(() => get().publishPresence()); },
  setPageIndex(pageIndex) { set({ pageIndex, selection: [] }); queueMicrotask(() => get().publishPresence()); },
  closeDesign() {
    const closingState = get();
    if (closingState.aiAgent && closingState.design?.id) writePersistedAIAgent(closingState).catch(error => console.error('[AI session] final save failed', error));
    collaborationTransport?.close(); collaborationTransport = null;
    set({
    design: null,
    document: null,
    pageIndex: 0,
    selection: [],
    history: [],
    future: [],
    historyTransactionSnapshot: null,
    historyTransactionRevision: null,
    tabConflict: false,
    recoveryPending: false,
    documentRevision: 0,
    savedRevision: 0,
    aiPlan: null,
    aiPreview: null,
    aiRender: null,
    aiRenders: [],
    aiAnnotation: null,
    aiCandidates: [],
    aiRefinementLimit: 3,
    aiTheme: null,
    aiAssetRequests: [],
    aiAssetResults: [],
    aiAssetLoop: null,
  aiAgent: null,
    aiError: '',
    collaborators: [],
    collaborationStatus: { state: 'disconnected', mode: 'local' }
  });
  },

  async loadDesign(id, { ignoreRecovery = false } = {}) {
    set({ status: 'loading', lastError: '', tabConflict: false, recoveryPending: false });
    channel?.postMessage({ type: 'open', designId: id, tabId });
    const design = await api.getDesign(id);
    const serverDocument = normalizeDocument(design.document);
    const recovery = ignoreRecovery ? null : await loadRecovery(id).catch(() => null);
    const useRecovery = recovery?.updatedAt > design.updated_at && recovery?.document;
    const document = useRecovery ? normalizeDocument(recovery.document) : serverDocument;
    set({
      design,
      document,
      pageIndex: 0,
      selection: [],
      history: [],
      future: [],
      historyTransactionSnapshot: null,
      historyTransactionRevision: null,
      status: useRecovery ? 'recovered' : 'saved',
      recoveryPending: !!useRecovery,
      documentRevision: useRecovery ? 1 : 0,
      savedRevision: 0,
      savingRevision: null,
      saveQueued: false,
      lastSavedAt: design.updated_at ? new Date(design.updated_at).getTime() : Date.now(),
      aiPlan: null,
      aiPreview: null,
      aiRender: null,
      aiRenders: [],
      aiAnnotation: null,
      aiCandidates: [],
      aiRefinementLimit: 3,
      aiTheme: null,
      aiAssetRequests: [],
      aiAssetResults: [],
      aiAssetLoop: null,
      aiError: ''
    });
    subscribeAIAgentPersistence();
    const persisted = await loadPersistedAIAgent(design.id);
    set({
      aiAgent: persisted?.agent || null,
      aiPlan: persisted?.aiPlan || null,
      aiPreview: persisted?.aiPreview || null,
      aiBusy: false
    });
    await get().refreshResources();
    get().connectCollaboration();
    trackProductEvent('design_opened', { designId: id, pageCount: document.pages.length });
  },
  async createDesign(input = {}) {
    const design = await api.createDesign(input);
    await get().loadDesign(design.id);
    return design;
  },
  async refreshResources() {
    const design = get().design;
    const tasks = [api.listAssets(), api.listAssetFolders(), api.listTemplateFolders().catch(() => []), api.listTemplateFolderItems().catch(() => []), api.listTemplates(), api.listComponents(), api.listBrandKits(), api.listNotifications()];
    if (design) tasks.push(api.listVersions(design.id), api.listExports(design.id), api.listComments(design.id), api.listShares(design.id));
    const [assets, assetFolders, templateFolders, templateFolderItems, rawTemplates, components, brands, notifications, versions = [], exports = [], comments = [], shares = []] = await Promise.all(tasks);
    const folderByTemplate = new Map(templateFolderItems.map(item => [item.templateId || item.template_id, item.folderId || item.folder_id || null]));
    const templates = rawTemplates.map(item => ({ ...item, folder_id: item.folder_id || item.folderId || folderByTemplate.get(item.id) || null }));
    set({ assets, assetFolders, templateFolders, templates, components, brands, notifications, versions, exports, comments, shares });
  },
  setAIMode(mode) {
    const settings = saveAIProviderSettings({ activeMode: mode });
    set({ aiMode: settings.activeMode });
  },
  async refreshCommercialData() {
    if (!get().session) return null;
    set({ commercialBusy: true });
    try {
      const [billingSummary, creditLedger, aiUsage] = await Promise.all([
        api.billingSummary().catch(() => null),
        api.creditLedger(50).catch(() => []),
        api.aiUsage().catch(() => null)
      ]);
      set({ billingSummary, creditLedger: creditLedger?.entries || creditLedger || [], aiUsage });
      return { billingSummary, creditLedger, aiUsage };
    } finally { set({ commercialBusy: false }); }
  },
  async loadMarketplace(params = {}) {
    set({ commercialBusy: true });
    try {
      const [marketplaceListings, marketplacePurchases, marketplaceEarnings] = await Promise.all([
        api.marketplaceListings(params),
        api.marketplacePurchases().catch(() => []),
        api.marketplaceEarnings().catch(() => null)
      ]);
      set({ marketplaceListings: marketplaceListings?.items || marketplaceListings || [], marketplacePurchases: marketplacePurchases?.items || marketplacePurchases || [], marketplaceEarnings });
      return marketplaceListings;
    } finally { set({ commercialBusy: false }); }
  },
  async publishAsset(assetId, input = {}) {
    if (!input?.rightsDeclaration?.ownsRights || !input?.rightsDeclaration?.allowsRedistribution) throw new Error('A complete rights declaration is required before an asset can be submitted to the Commons.');
    const listing = await api.publishMarketplaceListing({ listingType: 'asset', sourceAssetId: assetId, commons: true, ...input });
    await get().loadMarketplace().catch(() => {});
    return listing;
  },
  async publishTemplate(templateId, input = {}) {
    const listing = await api.publishMarketplaceListing({ listingType: 'template', sourceTemplateId: templateId, ...input });
    await get().loadMarketplace().catch(() => {});
    return listing;
  },
  async acquireMarketplaceListing(id) {
    const listing = get().marketplaceListings.find(item => item.id === id);
    if (listing?.priceType === 'credits' && Number(listing.priceCredits) > 0) await api.purchaseMarketplaceListing(id);
    const result = await api.installMarketplaceListing(id, get().currentWorkspaceId);
    await Promise.all([get().refreshResources(), get().refreshCommercialData()]);
    return result;
  },

  beginHistoryTransaction() {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.document || state.historyTransactionSnapshot) return;
    set({ historyTransactionSnapshot: clone(state.document), historyTransactionRevision: state.documentRevision });
  },
  commitHistoryTransaction(label = 'Transform') {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.historyTransactionSnapshot) return;
    const before = state.historyTransactionSnapshot;
    const entry = createPatchPair(before, state.document, { label, actorId: state.user?.id || tabId });
    const changed = entry.forward.length > 0;
    set(current => ({
      historyTransactionSnapshot: null,
      historyTransactionRevision: null,
      history: changed ? compactPatchHistory([...current.history, entry]) : current.history,
      future: changed ? [] : current.future
    }));
    if (changed) collaborationTransport?.publishPatch(entry, state.documentRevision);
  },
  cancelHistoryTransaction() {
    set({ historyTransactionSnapshot: null, historyTransactionRevision: null });
  },
  commitDocument(nextDocument, { recordHistory = true, status = 'dirty', label = 'Edit', broadcast = true } = {}) {
    const current = get().document;
    if (!current) return;
    const next = normalizeDocument(nextDocument);
    const entry = recordHistory && !get().historyTransactionSnapshot ? createPatchPair(current, next, { label, actorId: get().user?.id || tabId }) : null;
    if (entry && !entry.forward.length) return;
    set(state => ({
      document: next,
      documentRevision: state.documentRevision + 1,
      history: entry ? compactPatchHistory([...state.history, entry]) : state.history,
      future: entry ? [] : state.future,
      status: state.online ? status : 'offline'
    }));
    if (entry && broadcast) collaborationTransport?.publishPatch(entry, get().documentRevision);
    if (entry) trackProductEvent('document_committed', { label, operations: entry.forward.length, pageCount: next.pages.length });
    clearTimeout(recoveryTimer);
    recoveryTimer = setTimeout(() => saveRecovery(get().design?.id, next).catch(() => {}), 250);
  },
  updatePage(mutator, options = {}) {
    const doc = clone(get().document);
    if (!doc) return;
    const page = doc.pages[get().pageIndex];
    mutator(page, doc);
    applyAllFrameLayouts(page);
    get().commitDocument(doc, options);
  },
  updateElements(ids, patch, options = {}) {
    const targetIds = new Set(ids || []);
    get().updatePage(page => {
      const before = new Map(page.elements.map(element => [element.id, clone(element)]));
      page.elements = page.elements.map(element => targetIds.has(element.id)
        ? { ...element, ...(typeof patch === 'function' ? patch(element) : patch) }
        : element);
      const selectedFrames = page.elements.filter(element => targetIds.has(element.id) && element.type === 'frame');
      const rootFrames = selectedFrames.filter(frame => {
        let parentId = before.get(frame.id)?.parentId;
        while (parentId) {
          if (targetIds.has(parentId)) return false;
          parentId = before.get(parentId)?.parentId;
        }
        return true;
      });
      for (const frame of rootFrames) {
        const previous = before.get(frame.id);
        if (previous && ['x', 'y', 'width', 'height', 'rotation'].some(key => Number(previous[key] || 0) !== Number(frame[key] || 0))) {
          transformFrameDescendants(page, frame.id, previous, frame);
        }
      }
    }, options);
  },
  addElement(element) {
    get().updatePage(page => {
      element.zIndex = page.elements.length;
      page.elements.push(element);
    }, { label: `Add ${element.name || element.type}` });
    set({ selection: [element.id] });
  },
  addElements(elements) {
    get().updatePage(page => {
      const startIndex = page.elements.length;
      page.elements.push(...elements.map((element, index) => ({ ...element, zIndex: startIndex + index })));
    }, { label: `Add ${elements.length} elements` });
    set({ selection: elements.map(element => element.id) });
  },
  removeSelection() {
    const ids = get().selection;
    if (!ids.length) return;
    get().updatePage((page, doc) => {
      const removed = new Set([...ids, ...collectDescendantIds(page, ids)]);
      page.elements = page.elements.filter(element => !removed.has(element.id)).map((element, index) => ({ ...element, zIndex: index }));
      doc.layoutGroups = (doc.layoutGroups || [])
