        .map(group => ({ ...group, elementIds: group.elementIds.filter(id => !removed.has(id)) }))
        .filter(group => group.elementIds.length > 1);
    }, { label: `Delete ${ids.length} element${ids.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}` });
    set({ selection: [] });
  },
  reparentSelection(parentId = null) {
    const ids = get().selection;
    if (!ids.length) return;
    get().updatePage(page => reparentElements(page, ids, parentId), { label: parentId ? 'Move into frame' : 'Move out of frame' });
  },
  groupSelection() {
    const ids = get().selection;
    if (ids.length < 2) throw new Error('Select at least two objects to group.');
    const groupId = uuid();
    get().updatePage(page => {
      page.elements = page.elements.map(element => ids.includes(element.id) ? { ...element, groupId } : element);
    }, { label: 'Group objects' });
    set({ selection: ids });
    return groupId;
  },
  ungroupSelection() {
    const { selection, document, pageIndex } = get();
    const page = document?.pages?.[pageIndex];
    const groupIds = new Set((page?.elements || []).filter(element => selection.includes(element.id)).map(element => element.groupId).filter(Boolean));
    if (!groupIds.size) throw new Error('The current selection is not grouped.');
    get().updatePage(currentPage => {
      currentPage.elements = currentPage.elements.map(element => groupIds.has(element.groupId) ? { ...element, groupId: null } : element);
    }, { label: 'Ungroup objects' });
    return [...groupIds];
  },
  pushHistorySnapshot(snapshot, label = 'Canvas edit') { if (!snapshot || !get().document) return; const entry = createPatchPair(snapshot, get().document, { label, actorId: get().user?.id || tabId }); if (!entry.forward.length) return; set(state => ({ history: compactPatchHistory([...state.history, entry]), future: [] })); collaborationTransport?.publishPatch(entry, get().documentRevision); },
  undo() {
    const { history, document, future } = get();
    if (!history.length) return;
    const entry = history.at(-1);
    const next = normalizeDocument(applyPatches(document, entry.inverse));
    set(state => ({ document: next, history: history.slice(0, -1), future: [entry, ...future].slice(0, 120), status: state.online ? 'dirty' : 'offline', selection: [], historyTransactionSnapshot: null, historyTransactionRevision: null, documentRevision: state.documentRevision + 1 }));
    collaborationTransport?.publishPatch({ ...entry, forward: entry.inverse, inverse: entry.forward, label: `Undo ${entry.label}` }, get().documentRevision);
    trackProductEvent('undo', { label: entry.label });
  },
  redo() {
    const { history, document, future } = get();
    if (!future.length) return;
    const entry = future[0];
    const next = normalizeDocument(applyPatches(document, entry.forward));
    set(state => ({ document: next, history: compactPatchHistory([...history, entry]), future: future.slice(1), status: state.online ? 'dirty' : 'offline', selection: [], historyTransactionSnapshot: null, historyTransactionRevision: null, documentRevision: state.documentRevision + 1 }));
    collaborationTransport?.publishPatch(entry, get().documentRevision);
    trackProductEvent('redo', { label: entry.label });
  },

  async save({ createVersion = false, versionLabel = null, retry = 0, forceOverwrite = false, allowRecovered = false } = {}) {
    const initial = get();
    if (!initial.design || !initial.document) return initial.design;
    if (initial.tabConflict && !forceOverwrite) {
      const error = new Error('This design is open in another tab. Resolve the editing conflict before saving.');
      set({ status: 'conflict', lastError: error.message });
      throw error;
    }
    if (initial.recoveryPending && !allowRecovered) {
      const error = new Error('Choose whether to continue with or discard the recovered version before saving.');
      set({ status: 'recovered', lastError: error.message });
      throw error;
    }
    if (!initial.online) {
      set({ status: 'offline' });
      return initial.design;
    }
    if (activeSavePromise) {
      const designId = initial.design.id;
      set({ saveQueued: true });
      await activeSavePromise.catch(() => {});
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 0));
      const latest = get();
      if (latest.design?.id === designId && latest.documentRevision > latest.savedRevision && !latest.tabConflict && !latest.recoveryPending) {
        return get().save({ createVersion, versionLabel, retry, forceOverwrite, allowRecovered });
      }
      return latest.design;
    }

    const snapshot = clone(initial.document);
    const revision = initial.documentRevision;
    const designId = initial.design.id;
    const autoVersion = !createVersion && Date.now() - initial.lastAutoVersionAt > 5 * 60 * 1000;
    clearTimeout(saveRetryTimer);
    set({ status: 'saving', lastError: '', savingRevision: revision, saveQueued: false });

    activeSavePromise = (async () => {
      try {
        const saved = await api.saveDesign(designId, {
          title: snapshot.title || initial.design.title,
          document: snapshot,
          createVersion: createVersion || autoVersion,
          versionLabel: versionLabel || (autoVersion ? 'Automatic recovery version' : null)
        });
        if (get().design?.id !== designId) return saved;
        await clearRecovery(designId).catch(() => {});
        const current = get();
        const pending = current.documentRevision > revision;
        if (pending) saveRecovery(designId, current.document).catch(() => {});
        set({
          design: saved,
          savedRevision: Math.max(current.savedRevision, revision),
          status: current.tabConflict ? 'conflict' : (pending ? 'dirty' : 'saved'),
          savingRevision: null,
          lastSavedAt: Date.now(),
          lastAutoVersionAt: autoVersion ? Date.now() : current.lastAutoVersionAt,
          recoveryPending: false
        });
        if (createVersion || autoVersion) set({ versions: await api.listVersions(designId) });
        return saved;
      } catch (error) {
        const current = get();
        if (current.design?.id !== designId) throw error;
        set({ status: current.tabConflict ? 'conflict' : (current.online ? 'save-failed' : 'offline'), lastError: error.message, savingRevision: null });
        if (retry < 4 && current.online && !current.tabConflict) {
          clearTimeout(saveRetryTimer);
          saveRetryTimer = setTimeout(() => {
            get().save({ createVersion, versionLabel, retry: retry + 1, forceOverwrite, allowRecovered }).catch(() => {});
          }, Math.min(30000, 1500 * 2 ** retry));
        }
        throw error;
      }
    })();

    try {
      return await activeSavePromise;
    } finally {
      activeSavePromise = null;
      const current = get();
      if ((current.saveQueued || current.documentRevision > current.savedRevision) && current.online && !current.tabConflict && !current.recoveryPending) {
        set({ saveQueued: false });
        queueMicrotask(() => get().save().catch(() => {}));
      }
    }
  },

  continueRecovery() {
    set({ recoveryPending: false, status: get().online ? 'dirty' : 'offline', lastError: '' });
  },
  async discardRecovery() {
    const id = get().design?.id;
    if (!id) return;
    await clearRecovery(id).catch(() => {});
    await get().loadDesign(id, { ignoreRecovery: true });
  },
  async reloadConflict() {
    const id = get().design?.id;
    if (!id) return;
    await get().loadDesign(id, { ignoreRecovery: true });
  },
  async takeOverConflict() {
    const id = get().design?.id;
    if (!id) return;
    set({ tabConflict: false, status: get().online ? 'dirty' : 'offline', lastError: '' });
    channel?.postMessage({ type: 'takeover', designId: id, tabId });
    return get().save({ forceOverwrite: true, allowRecovered: true });
  },

  async ensureAssetFolder(name) {
    let folder = get().assetFolders.find(item => String(item.name).toLowerCase() === String(name).toLowerCase());
    if (!folder) {
      folder = await api.createAssetFolder(name);
      set(state => ({ assetFolders: [...state.assetFolders, folder] }));
    }
    return folder;
  },
  async upload(file, opts = {}) {
    const options = { ...opts };
    if (!options.folderId) {
      const folder = await get().ensureAssetFolder(options.sourceType === 'ai_generation' ? 'AI generated' : 'Uploads').catch(() => null);
      if (folder) options.folderId = folder.id;
    }
    const asset = await api.uploadAsset(file, options);
    set(state => ({ assets: [asset, ...state.assets] }));
    return asset;
  },
  async uploadMany(files, opts = {}) {
    const options = { ...opts };
    if (!options.folderId) {
      const folder = await get().ensureAssetFolder(options.sourceType === 'ai_generation' ? 'AI generated' : 'Uploads').catch(() => null);
      if (folder) options.folderId = folder.id;
    }
    const result = await api.uploadAssets(files, options);
    const list = Array.isArray(result) ? result : [result];
    set(state => {
      const existingIds = new Set(state.assets.map(a => a.id));
      const newAssets = list.filter(a => !existingIds.has(a.id));
      return { assets: [...newAssets, ...state.assets] };
    });
    return list;
  },
  async applyTemplate(id) {
    const item = await api.getTemplate(id);
    const doc = normalizeDocument(item.document);
    for (const page of doc.pages) for (const element of page.elements) {
      element.templateLocked = item.lockedElementIds?.includes(element.id) || false;
      if (element.templateLocked) element.locked = true;
    }
    get().commitDocument(doc);
    set({ pageIndex: 0, selection: [] });
  },
  async saveCurrentAsTemplate(input) {
    const lockedElementIds = get().document.pages.flatMap(page => page.elements.filter(element => element.locked || element.templateLocked).map(element => element.id));
    const item = await api.saveTemplate({
      ...input,
      lockedElementIds,
      thumbnailUrl: get().design?.thumbnail_url || null,
      document: get().document,
      sourceDesignId: get().design?.id
    });
    if (input.folderId) await api.assignTemplateFolder(item.id, input.folderId).catch(() => {});
    const nextItem = { ...item, folder_id: input.folderId || item.folder_id || null };
    set(state => ({ templates: [nextItem, ...state.templates] }));
    return nextItem;
  },
  async saveSelectionAsComponent(input = {}) {
    const page = get().document.pages[get().pageIndex];
    const roots = new Set(get().selection);
    const included = new Set([...roots, ...collectDescendantIds(page, roots)]);
    const selected = page.elements.filter(element => included.has(element.id));
    if (!selected.length) throw new Error('Select at least one element.');
    const data = componentFromElements(selected, input.title || 'Component');
    const item = await api.saveComponent({ ...data, ...input });
    set(state => ({ components: [item, ...state.components] }));
    return item;
  },
  insertComponent(component) {
    const elements = instantiateComponent(component, 120, 120, { linked: component.linked });
    get().addElements(elements);
  },
  createMasterFromCurrentPage(name = 'Master page') {
    const state = get();
    const result = createMasterPageFromPage(state.document, state.document.pages[state.pageIndex]?.id, name);
    get().commitDocument(result.document, { label: `Create master ${name}` });
    return result.master;
  },
  applyMasterToCurrentPage(masterId) {
    const state = get();
    const pageId = state.document.pages[state.pageIndex]?.id;
    get().commitDocument(applyMasterPage(state.document, pageId, masterId || null), { label: masterId ? 'Apply master page' : 'Detach master page' });
  },
  updateMasterFromCurrentPage(masterId) {
    const state = get();
    get().commitDocument(updateMasterPageFromPage(state.document, masterId, state.document.pages[state.pageIndex]?.id), { label: 'Update master page' });
  },
  deleteMasterPage(masterId) {
    let next = clone(get().document);
    for (const page of next.pages.filter(item => item.masterPageId === masterId)) next = applyMasterPage(next, page.id, null);
    next.masterPages = next.masterPages.filter(item => item.id !== masterId);
    get().commitDocument(next, { label: 'Delete master page' });
  },
  createResponsiveVariant(input) {
    const result = createResponsiveVariant(get().document, input);
    get().commitDocument(result.document, { label: `Create ${result.variant.name} variant` });
    return result.variant;
  },
  switchResponsiveVariant(variantId) {
    get().commitDocument(switchResponsiveVariant(get().document, variantId), { label: 'Switch responsive variant' });
    set({ pageIndex: 0, selection: [] });
  },
  deleteResponsiveVariant(variantId) {
    get().commitDocument(deleteResponsiveVariant(get().document, variantId), { label: 'Delete responsive variant' });
  },
  simplifyVectorSelection(tolerance = 2) {
    const ids = get().selection;
    get().updateElements(ids, element => element.type === 'path' ? { pathData: simplifyPathData(element.pathData, tolerance), name: `${element.name || 'Path'} simplified` } : {}, { label: 'Simplify vector path' });
  },
  reverseVectorSelection() {
    get().updateElements(get().selection, element => element.type === 'path' ? { pathData: reversePathData(element.pathData) } : {}, { label: 'Reverse vector path' });
  },
  closeVectorSelection() {
    get().updateElements(get().selection, element => element.type === 'path' ? { pathData: closePathData(element.pathData), fill: element.fill === 'transparent' ? element.stroke || '#111827' : element.fill } : {}, { label: 'Close vector path' });
  },
  combineVectorSelection() {
    const state = get(); const page = state.document.pages[state.pageIndex];
    const selected = page.elements.filter(element => state.selection.includes(element.id));
    const combined = combinePathElements(selected);
    if (!combined || selected.filter(item => item.type === 'path').length < 2) throw new Error('Select at least two drawn paths.');
    get().updatePage(currentPage => { const ids = new Set(selected.map(item => item.id)); currentPage.elements = [...currentPage.elements.filter(item => !ids.has(item.id)), combined].map((item, index) => ({ ...item, zIndex: index })); }, { label: 'Combine vector paths' });
    set({ selection: [combined.id] });
  },
  setAccessibilityMetadata(elementId, patch) {
    get().updateElements([elementId], patch, { label: 'Update accessibility metadata' });
  },
  auditAccessibility() { return auditAccessibility(get().document); },
  async updateComponentFromSelection(component) {
    const page = get().document.pages[get().pageIndex];
    const roots = new Set(get().selection);
    const included = new Set([...roots, ...collectDescendantIds(page, roots)]);
    const selected = page.elements.filter(element => included.has(element.id));
    if (!selected.length) throw new Error('Select replacement elements first.');
    const data = componentFromElements(selected, component.title);
    const item = await api.updateComponent(component.id, {
      ...data,
      title: component.title,
      category: component.category,
      tags: component.tags,
      linked: component.linked,
      syncLinked: true
    });
    set(state => ({ components: state.components.map(componentItem => componentItem.id === item.id ? item : componentItem) }));
    return item;
  },
  createAutoLayout(options) {
    const { document, pageIndex, selection } = get();
    if (selection.length < 2) return;
    get().commitDocument(createLayoutGroup(document, document.pages[pageIndex].id, selection, options));
  },
  detachAutoLayout(groupId) {
    get().commitDocument(detachLayoutGroup(get().document, groupId));
  },
  magicResize(width, height) {
    get().commitDocument(resizeDocument(get().document, width, height));
  },
  async applyBrand(brand, { colors = true, fonts = true } = {}) {
    let doc = get().document;
    if (colors) doc = replaceColors(doc, brand.colors);
    if (fonts) doc = replaceFonts(doc, brand.fonts);
    get().commitDocument(doc);
  },
  async createBrand(input) {
    const item = await api.saveBrandKit(input);
    set(state => ({ brands: [...state.brands, item] }));
    return item;
  },
  async updateBrand(id, input) {
    const item = await api.updateBrandKit(id, input);
    set(state => ({ brands: state.brands.map(brand => brand.id === id ? item : brand) }));
    return item;
  },
  updatePrintSettings(patch) {
    const next = clone(get().document);
    next.print = normalizePrintSettings({ ...(next.print || {}), ...(patch || {}) }, next.width, next.height);
    get().commitDocument(next);
  },
  createDesignStyle(kind, style) {
    const next = clone(get().document);
    const created = upsertDesignStyle(next, kind, style);
    get().commitDocument(next);
    return created;
  },
  updateDesignStyle(kind, styleId, patch) {
    const next = clone(get().document);
    const current = next.designSystem?.styles?.[kind]?.find(style => style.id === styleId);
    if (!current) throw new Error('Design style not found.');
    const updated = upsertDesignStyle(next, kind, { ...current, ...patch, value: { ...(current.value || {}), ...(patch?.value || {}) } });
    get().commitDocument(next);
    return updated;
  },
  deleteDesignStyle(kind, styleId) {
    const next = clone(get().document);
    deleteDesignStyle(next, kind, styleId, { detach: true });
    get().commitDocument(next);
  },
  attachDesignStyle(kind, styleId, elementIds = get().selection) {
    const next = clone(get().document);
    const page = next.pages[get().pageIndex];
    attachDesignStyle(next, page.elements.filter(element => elementIds.includes(element.id)), kind, styleId);
    get().commitDocument(next);
  },
  deduplicateDesignStyles() {
    const next = clone(get().document);
    const result = mergeDuplicateDesignStyles(next);
    get().commitDocument(result.document);
    return result.groups;
  },
  addDataSource(input) {
    const next = clone(get().document);
    const source = createDataSource(next, input);
    get().commitDocument(next);
    return source;
  },
  getAIVisuals() {
    const state = get();
    const renders = state.aiRenders?.length ? state.aiRenders : (state.aiRender?.url ? [state.aiRender] : []);
    const pageIndices = renders.length ? [...new Set(renders.map(item => item.pageIndex ?? state.pageIndex))] : [state.pageIndex];
    const pageVisuals = [];
    for (const pageIndex of pageIndices) {
      const render = renders.find(item => (item.pageIndex ?? state.pageIndex) === pageIndex);
      if (render?.url) pageVisuals.push({ source: render.url, url: render.url, label: `Clean render · ${state.document?.pages?.[pageIndex]?.name || `page ${pageIndex + 1}`}`, pageIndex, kind: 'page-render' });
      const svg = createInspectionSvg(state.document, pageIndex, { includeGrid: true, includeLabels: true });
      if (svg) pageVisuals.push({ source: svgToDataUrl(svg), dataUrl: svgToDataUrl(svg), label: `Structural inspection · ${state.document?.pages?.[pageIndex]?.name || `page ${pageIndex + 1}`}`, pageIndex, kind: 'inspection-render' });
    }
    if (!state.aiAnnotation?.dataUrl || state.aiAnnotation.revision !== state.documentRevision) return pageVisuals;
    return [{ source: state.aiAnnotation.dataUrl, dataUrl: state.aiAnnotation.dataUrl, label: 'User-annotated screenshot', pageIndex: state.aiAnnotation.pageIndex, kind: 'annotation' }, ...pageVisuals];
  },
  setAIAnnotation(annotation) {
    set({ aiAnnotation: annotation || null });
  },
  getAIContext() {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.document) return null;
    return { ...createAIContext({
      document: state.document, design: state.design, pageIndex: state.pageIndex, selection: state.selection,
      assets: state.assets, brands: state.brands, components: state.components, revision: state.documentRevision,
      renderUrl: state.aiRender?.url || null, renders: state.aiRenders, annotation: state.aiAnnotation?.revision === state.documentRevision ? state.aiAnnotation : null
    }), workspaceDesignPreferences: state.designPreferences };
  },
  getAIHandoffPackage(request = '', options = {}) {
    const context = get().getAIContext();
    if (!context) throw new Error('No design is open.');
    const origin = globalThis.location?.origin || 'http://localhost';
    const base = apiOrigin ? new URL(apiOrigin, origin).href.replace(/\/$/, '') : origin;
    const skillsUrl = new URL('skills.md', globalThis.document?.baseURI || `${base}/`).href;
    const visuals = options.visuals ?? get().getAIVisuals();
    return createLLMHandoffPackage({ context, request, scope: options.scope || 'page', skillsUrl, apiBase: base, visuals });
  },
  previewLLMText(text, options = {}) {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.document) throw new Error('No design is open.');
    const batch = normalizeLLMCommandBatch(text, { revision: state.documentRevision, instruction: options.instruction || '' });
    return get().previewAICommands(batch);
  },
  previewAICommands(batch, provenance = {}) {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.document) throw new Error('No design is open.');
    const validation = validateCommandBatch(batch, { revision: state.documentRevision });
    if (!validation.valid) throw new Error(validation.errors.join(' '));
    const result = applyCommandBatch(state.document, batch, {
      pageIndex: state.pageIndex, selection: state.selection, assets: state.assets, brands: state.brands,
      components: state.components, revision: state.documentRevision
    });
    let hybrid = provenance.hybrid ? clone(provenance.hybrid) : null;
    if (hybrid && provenance.approvedConceptPreviewUrl) {
      const exactPageIndex = result.document.pages.findIndex(page => page.name === hybrid.exactPageName);
      hybrid.exactPageIndex = exactPageIndex >= 0 ? exactPageIndex : result.document.pages.length - 1;
      const editableNames = new Set(hybrid.editablePageNames || []);
      for (const [index, page] of result.document.pages.entries()) {
        if (index === hybrid.exactPageIndex || (editableNames.size && !editableNames.has(page.name))) continue;
        page.referenceImage = {
          assetId: null,
          src: provenance.approvedConceptPreviewUrl,
          name: provenance.approvedConceptTitle || 'Approved Nano Banana concept',
          opacity: .45,
          visible: true,
          mode: 'split',
          fit: 'contain',
          split: .5
        };
      }
    }
    const lint = lintDocument(result.document);
    const preview = {
      ...result,
      baseRevision: state.documentRevision,
      diff: diffDocuments(state.document, result.document),
      lint,
      fidelity: provenance.fidelity || (batch.designSpec ? evaluateDesignSpecFidelity(result.document, batch.designSpec) : null),
      hybrid,
      compileSource: provenance.compileSource || batch.source || null,
      approvedConceptId: provenance.approvedConceptId || null,
      approvedConceptPreviewUrl: provenance.approvedConceptPreviewUrl || null,
      approvedConceptTitle: provenance.approvedConceptTitle || '',
      approvedConceptDescription: provenance.approvedConceptDescription || '',
      blockingIssues: lint.issues.filter(issue => issue.severity === 'critical'),
      generatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    set(state => ({ aiPlan: batch, aiPreview: preview, aiError: '', aiCandidates: [{ id: uuid(), score: preview.lint?.score?.overall ?? 0, generatedAt: preview.generatedAt, preview, plan: batch }, ...state.aiCandidates].slice(0, 12) }));
    return preview;
  },
  selectAICandidate(candidateId) {
    const candidate = get().aiCandidates.find(item => item.id === candidateId);
    if (!candidate) throw new Error('AI candidate not found.');
    set({ aiPreview: clone(candidate.preview), aiPlan: clone(candidate.plan || get().aiPlan), aiError: '' });
    return candidate;
  },
  applyAISafeFixes() {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.aiPreview) throw new Error('Generate a preview first.');
    const commands = [];
    const seen = new Set();
    for (const issue of state.aiPreview.lint?.issues || []) for (const command of issue.suggestedCommands || (issue.suggestedFix ? [issue.suggestedFix] : [])) {
      const key = JSON.stringify(command);
      if (!seen.has(key)) { seen.add(key); commands.push(command); }
    }
    if (!commands.length) throw new Error('No safe automatic fixes are available.');
    const batch = { schemaVersion: 1, instruction: 'Apply safe design-check fixes', commands };
    const result = applyCommandBatch(state.aiPreview.document, batch, {
      pageIndex: state.pageIndex, selection: state.selection, assets: state.assets, brands: state.brands,
      components: state.components, revision: null
    });
    const lint = lintDocument(result.document);
    const preview = {
      ...state.aiPreview,
      ...result,
      diff: diffDocuments(state.document, result.document),
      lint,
      blockingIssues: lint.issues.filter(issue => issue.severity === 'critical'),
      generatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    set(current => ({
      aiPreview: preview,
      aiPlan: { ...(current.aiPlan || batch), commands: [...(current.aiPlan?.commands || []), ...commands], instruction: current.aiPlan?.instruction || batch.instruction },
      aiCandidates: [{ id: uuid(), score: lint.score?.overall ?? 0, generatedAt: preview.generatedAt, preview, plan: current.aiPlan || batch }, ...current.aiCandidates].slice(0, 12)
    }));
    return preview;
  },
  async prepareAIPlan(instruction, options = {}) {
    const state = get();
    const context = state.getAIContext();
    if (!context) throw new Error('No design is open.');
    set({ aiBusy: true, aiError: '' });
    try {
      const visuals = options.useVisuals === false ? [] : await Promise.all(state.getAIVisuals().map(async item => ({
        label: item.label,
        pageIndex: item.pageIndex,
        kind: item.kind,
        dataUrl: await sourceToDataUrl(item.source || item.url)
      })));
      const plan = await api.aiPlan(state.design.id, {
        instruction,
        context,
        visuals,
        options: { ...options, mode: options.mode || state.aiMode, provider: undefined }
      });
      if (plan.commands && !plan.schemaVersion) plan.schemaVersion = 1;
      if (!Array.isArray(plan.commands)) plan.commands = [];
      if (!Number.isInteger(plan.baseRevision)) plan.baseRevision = state.documentRevision;
      const currentPlanningState = get();
      const theme = normalizeAITheme(plan.theme || currentPlanningState.aiTheme || { name: options.themeHint || 'Page theme' });
      const plannedRequests = normalizeAIAssetRequests(plan.assetRequests || []);
      const assetRequests = plannedRequests.length || options.assetPlanning !== false ? plannedRequests : currentPlanningState.aiAssetRequests;
      plan.theme = theme;
      plan.assetRequests = assetRequests;
      set({ aiTheme: theme, aiAssetRequests: assetRequests, aiPlan: plan });
      const preview = options.preview === false ? null : get().previewAICommands(plan);
      get().refreshCommercialData().catch(() => {});
      return { plan, preview, theme, assetRequests };
    } catch (error) {
      set({ aiError: error.message || 'AI planning failed.' });
      throw error;
    } finally { set({ aiBusy: false }); }
  },
  getAIAssetPromptList() {
    return assetRequestPromptList(get().aiAssetRequests, get().aiTheme || {});
  },
  async resolveAIAssetRequests(requests = null, { preferExisting = true, maxAssets = 8 } = {}) {
    const list = normalizeAIAssetRequests(requests || get().aiAssetRequests).slice(0, Math.max(1, Math.min(16, Number(maxAssets) || 8)));
    const theme = normalizeAITheme(get().aiTheme || {});
    const results = [];
    set({ aiAssetLoop: { status: 'resolving', total: list.length, completed: 0 }, aiAssetResults: [] });
    for (const [index, request] of list.entries()) {
      let match = request.reuseAssetId ? get().assets.find(asset => asset.id === request.reuseAssetId) : null;
      let resolution = match ? 'reused-exact' : '';
      if (!match && preferExisting) {
        const found = findReusableAsset(get().assets, request);
        if (found) { match = found.asset; resolution = 'reused-search'; }
      }
      if (!match) {
        const prompt = buildThemedAssetPrompt(request, theme);
        const generated = await get().generateAIAsset({
          kind: request.kind,
          mode: get().aiMode,
          prompt,
          aspectRatio: request.aspectRatio,
          transparent: request.transparent,
          tags: [...request.tags, 'ai-theme-asset', request.role, theme.name].filter(Boolean),
          requestKey: request.key
        });
        match = generated.asset;
        resolution = 'generated';
      }
      const item = { request, asset: match, resolution };
      results.push(item);
      set({ aiAssetResults: [...results], aiAssetLoop: { status: 'resolving', total: list.length, completed: index + 1 } });
    }
    set({ aiAssetResults: results, aiAssetLoop: { status: 'complete', total: list.length, completed: list.length } });
    return results;
  },
  async prepareAIPlanWithAssets(instruction, options = {}) {
    const assetMode = options.assetMode || 'reuse-only';
    const passes = Math.max(1, Math.min(3, Number(options.assetRounds || 1)));
    if (assetMode === 'reuse-only') return get().prepareAIPlan(assetPlanningInstruction(instruction, { themeHint: options.themeHint, assetMode }), { ...options, assetPlanning: true, preview: true });

    let resolved = [];
    let planning = null;
    for (let pass = 1; pass <= passes; pass++) {
      planning = await get().prepareAIPlan(assetPlanningInstruction(instruction, { themeHint: options.themeHint, assetMode, pass, priorAssets: summarizeResolvedAssets(resolved) }), { ...options, assetPlanning: true, preview: false, useAssets: true });
      if (assetMode === 'prompts') return planning;
      const unresolved = normalizeAIAssetRequests(planning.assetRequests).filter(request => !resolved.some(item => item.request.key === request.key));
      if (!unresolved.length) break;
      const passResults = await get().resolveAIAssetRequests(unresolved, { preferExisting: true, maxAssets: options.maxGeneratedAssets || 8 });
      resolved = [...resolved, ...passResults];
    }

    const manifest = summarizeResolvedAssets(resolved);
    const finalInstruction = `${instruction}

FINAL ASSET MANIFEST
${JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2)}
Use these exact asset IDs in the final design. Preserve one coherent theme: ${JSON.stringify(get().aiTheme || {})}. Return the complete final command bundle. Do not request any asset already listed in the manifest.`;
    const result = await get().prepareAIPlan(finalInstruction, { ...options, assetPlanning: false, preview: true, useAssets: true, generatedAssets: manifest });
    set({ aiAssetResults: resolved, aiAssetLoop: { status: 'complete', total: resolved.length, completed: resolved.length } });
    return result;
  },
  applyAIPlan({ approved = false, keepAgentOpen = false } = {}) {
    const state = get();
    if (!approved) throw new Error('AI changes require explicit approval.');
    if (!state.aiPreview || !state.aiPlan) throw new Error('Generate and preview an AI plan first.');
    if (state.aiPreview.baseRevision !== state.documentRevision) throw new Error('The design changed after this preview was generated. Generate the preview again.');
    if (state.aiPreview.blockingIssues?.length) throw new Error(`Fix the ${state.aiPreview.blockingIssues.length} blocking design issue${state.aiPreview.blockingIssues.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} before applying these commands.`);
    const runId = uuid();
    const approvedSpec = state.aiPlan.designSpec;
    const next = clone(state.aiPreview.document);
    const approvedPageIndex = Number.isInteger(state.aiPreview.hybrid?.exactPageIndex)
      ? state.aiPreview.hybrid.exactPageIndex
      : state.pageIndex;
    next.ai = { ...(next.ai || {}), lastRunId: runId, lastRenderUrl: state.aiRender?.url || null };
    get().commitDocument(next, { recordHistory: true, label: 'Apply approved AI design' });
    if (approvedSpec) get().learnDesignPreference({ fontPair: approvedSpec.theme?.fonts, palette: approvedSpec.theme?.palette, layout: approvedSpec.layout?.type, density: approvedSpec.layout?.density, imagery: approvedSpec.intent?.imagery });
    set(current => ({
      pageIndex: Math.max(0, Math.min(approvedPageIndex, next.pages.length - 1)),
      selection: state.aiPreview.hybrid ? [] : (state.aiPreview.createdIds || []),
      aiRuns: [{ id: runId, instruction: state.aiPlan.instruction || '', commandCount: state.aiPlan.commands.length, diff: state.aiPreview.diff, warnings: state.aiPreview.warnings, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, ...current.aiRuns].slice(0, 50),
      aiPlan: null,
      aiPreview: null,
      aiError: '',
      aiAgent: current.aiAgent ? {
        ...current.aiAgent,
        status: keepAgentOpen ? AGENT_STATES.ASSEMBLING_DESIGN : AGENT_STATES.COMPLETED,
        paused: false,
        tasks: keepAgentOpen
          ? updateAgentTask(current.aiAgent.tasks, 'quality', { status: 'in_progress', progress: 55, details: 'Rendering the reconstructed design for visual correction' })
          : updateAgentTask(current.aiAgent.tasks, 'approval', { status: 'completed', progress: 100 }),
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      } : null
    }));
    return runId;
  },
  async applyAIPlanAndRefine({ multiplier = 1 } = {}) {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.aiPlan || !state.aiPreview) throw new Error('Generate and preview an AI plan first.');
    const session = state.aiAgent;
    if (session && session.correctionLoop >= session.maxCorrectionLoops) throw new Error(`The agent reached its ${session.maxCorrectionLoops}-loop safety limit. Review the current design or start another refinement.`);
    const originalInstruction = state.aiPlan.instruction || 'Improve the design';
    const pageIndex = state.pageIndex;
    get().applyAIPlan({ approved: true, keepAgentOpen: !!session });
    if (session) set(current => ({ aiAgent: current.aiAgent ? { ...current.aiAgent, status: AGENT_STATES.RENDERING, correctionLoop: current.aiAgent.correctionLoop + 1, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } : null }));
    const render = await get().renderAIImage({ multiplier, pageIndex });
    if (get().aiAgent?.paused) return { render, paused: true };
    if (session) set(current => ({ aiAgent: current.aiAgent ? { ...current.aiAgent, status: AGENT_STATES.CRITIQUING, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } : null }));
    const result = await get().prepareAIPlan(
      `Act as a visual QA agent. Review the latest rendered PNG at ${render.url}. Refine the editable design to better match the approved direction, improve hierarchy, spacing, typography, image treatment, and alignment, and resolve any lint issues. Preserve correct copy and exact prices. Return only a focused correction command bundle. Original request: ${originalInstruction}`,
      { provider: 'server', scope: 'document', useBrand: true, useAssets: true, iterationOf: originalInstruction }
    );
    if (session) set(current => ({
      aiAgent: current.aiAgent ? {
        ...current.aiAgent,
        status: AGENT_STATES.AWAITING_FINAL_APPROVAL,
        tasks: updateAgentTask(current.aiAgent.tasks, 'quality', { status: 'completed', progress: 100, details: `Visual correction loop ${current.aiAgent.correctionLoop} ready for review` }),
        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      } : null
    }));
    return result;
  },
  async autoRefineAIPlan({ rounds = null, multiplier = 1 } = {}) {
    const limit = Math.max(1, Math.min(5, Number(rounds || get().aiRefinementLimit || 3)));
    let previousScore = get().aiPreview?.lint?.score?.overall ?? 0;
    let completed = 0;
    for (let round = 0; round < limit; round++) {
      const state = get();
      if (!state.aiPlan || !state.aiPreview) break;
      if (state.aiPreview.blockingIssues?.length) throw new Error('Resolve blocking design issues before automatic refinement.');
      const originalInstruction = state.aiPlan.instruction || 'Improve the design';
      get().applyAIPlan({ approved: true });
      await get().renderAIImage({ multiplier, pageIndex: state.pageIndex });
      await get().prepareAIPlan(
        `Refinement round ${round + 1} of ${limit}. Inspect both the clean render and structural inspection image. Correct alignment, spacing rhythm, typography hierarchy, repeated-component consistency, print safety, and any design-check findings. Preserve all correct content. Original request: ${originalInstruction}`,
        { mode: get().aiMode, scope: 'page', useBrand: true, useAssets: true, useVisuals: true, iterationOf: originalInstruction }
      );
      completed++;
      const score = get().aiPreview?.lint?.score?.overall ?? 0;
      if (score <= previousScore && round > 0) break;
      previousScore = Math.max(previousScore, score);
    }
    return { completed, candidates: get().aiCandidates, preview: get().aiPreview };
  },
  async renderAIImages({ multiplier = 1, scope = 'page', pageIndex = null } = {}) {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.design || !state.document) throw new Error('No design is open.');
    const pageIndices = scope === 'document'
      ? state.document.pages.map((_, index) => index)
      : [pageIndex ?? state.pageIndex];
    set({ aiBusy: true, aiError: '', aiRender: { status: 'saving', progress: 0, url: state.aiRender?.url || null } });
    try {
      await get().save({ createVersion: false, allowRecovered: true });
      const completed = [];
      const exportJobs = [];
      for (const [position, targetPageIndex] of pageIndices.entries()) {
        let job = await api.createExport(state.design.id, 'png', { multiplier, pageIndex: targetPageIndex, purpose: 'ai-preview' });
        exportJobs.push(job);
        set({ aiRender: { status: job.status, progress: Math.round((position / pageIndices.length) * 100), jobId: job.id, url: null, pageIndex: targetPageIndex } });
        for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 240 && ['queued', 'processing'].includes(job.status); attempt++) {
          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
          job = await api.getExport(job.id);
          const pageProgress = Number(job.progress || 0) / 100;
          set({ aiRender: { status: job.status, progress: Math.round(((position + pageProgress) / pageIndices.length) * 100), jobId: job.id, url: job.output_url || null, pageIndex: targetPageIndex } });
        }
        if (job.status !== 'completed' || !job.output_url) throw new Error(job.error || `The AI preview for page ${targetPageIndex + 1} did not complete.`);
        const url = new URL(job.output_url, globalThis.location?.origin || 'http://localhost').href;
        completed.push({ status: 'completed', progress: 100, jobId: job.id, url, pageIndex: targetPageIndex, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() });
        exportJobs[exportJobs.length - 1] = job;
      }
      const currentRender = completed.find(item => item.pageIndex === (pageIndex ?? state.pageIndex)) || completed[0];
      set(current => ({
        aiRender: currentRender,
        aiRenders: completed,
        exports: [...exportJobs, ...current.exports.filter(item => !exportJobs.some(job => job.id === item.id))]
      }));
      return completed;
    } catch (error) {
      set(current => ({ aiError: error.message || 'Could not render the AI preview image.', aiRender: { ...(current.aiRender || {}), status: 'failed', error: error.message } }));
      throw error;
    } finally {
      set({ aiBusy: false });
    }
  },
  async renderAIImage({ multiplier = 1, pageIndex = null } = {}) {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.design || !state.document) throw new Error('No design is open.');
    set({ aiBusy: true, aiError: '', aiRender: { status: 'saving', progress: 0, url: state.aiRender?.url || null } });
    try {
      await get().save({ createVersion: false, allowRecovered: true });
      let job = await api.createExport(state.design.id, 'png', { multiplier, pageIndex: pageIndex ?? state.pageIndex, purpose: 'ai-preview' });
      set({ aiRender: { status: job.status, progress: job.progress || 0, jobId: job.id, url: null } });
      for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 240 && ['queued', 'processing'].includes(job.status); attempt++) {
        const agent = get().aiAgent;
        if (agent?.paused || agent?.status === AGENT_STATES.CANCELLED) throw new Error(agent.status === AGENT_STATES.CANCELLED ? 'The agent session was stopped.' : 'The agent was paused. The server export may finish, but no further loop steps will run.');
        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
        job = await api.getExport(job.id);
        set({ aiRender: { status: job.status, progress: job.progress || 0, jobId: job.id, url: job.output_url || null } });
      }
      if (job.status !== 'completed' || !job.output_url) throw new Error(job.error || 'The AI preview image did not complete.');
      const url = new URL(job.output_url, globalThis.location?.origin || 'http://localhost').href;
      const render = { status: 'completed', progress: 100, jobId: job.id, url, pageIndex: pageIndex ?? state.pageIndex, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() };
      set(current => ({ aiRender: render, exports: current.exports.some(item => item.id === job.id) ? current.exports.map(item => item.id === job.id ? job : item) : [job, ...current.exports] }));
      return render;
    } catch (error) {
      set(current => ({ aiError: error.message || 'Could not render the AI preview image.', aiRender: { ...(current.aiRender || {}), status: 'failed', error: error.message } }));
      throw error;
    } finally {
      set({ aiBusy: false });
    }
  },
  async generateAIAsset(input) {
    set({ aiBusy: true, aiError: '' });
    try {
      const references = await Promise.all((input.references || []).slice(0, 6).map(async file => ({
        name: file.name || 'Reference image',
        dataUrl: await sourceToDataUrl(file)
      })));
      const generated = await api.aiGenerateAsset({
        kind: input.kind,
        mode: input.mode || get().aiMode,
        prompt: input.prompt,
        references,
        aspectRatio: input.aspectRatio,
        transparent: !!input.transparent
      });
      if (generated.kind === 'svg') generated.svg = sanitizeSvgMarkup(generated.svg);
      const safeBase = String(input.prompt || 'ai-asset').slice(0, 48).replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/gi, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '').toLowerCase() || 'ai-asset';
      const extension = generated.kind === 'svg' ? 'svg' : (generated.mimeType?.includes('jpeg') ? 'jpg' : generated.mimeType?.includes('webp') ? 'webp' : 'png');
      const source = generated.kind === 'svg' ? `data:image/svg+xml;base64,${btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(generated.svg)))}` : generated.dataUrl;
      const file = await dataUrlToFile(source, `${safeBase}.${extension}`);
      const aiFolder = get().assetFolders.find(folder => String(folder.name).toLowerCase() === 'ai generated');
      const asset = await get().upload(file, { folderId: aiFolder?.id || '', tags: [...new Set(['ai-generated', input.mode || get().aiMode, ...(input.tags || [])].filter(Boolean))], sourceType: 'ai_generation', sourceJobId: generated.jobId || input.requestKey || '' });
      await get().refreshCommercialData().catch(() => {});
      return { ...generated, dataUrl: source, asset };
    } catch (error) {
      set({ aiError: error.message || 'AI asset generation failed.' });
      throw error;
    } finally { set({ aiBusy: false }); }
  },

  async exportDesign(format, options = {}) {
    const { design } = get();
    await get().save({ createVersion: false, allowRecovered: true });
    const job = await api.createExport(design.id, format, options);
    set(state => ({ exports: [job, ...state.exports] }));
    return job;
  },
  async refreshExport(id) {
    const job = await api.getExport(id);
    set(state => ({ exports: state.exports.map(item => item.id === id ? job : item) }));
    return job;
  },
  async addComment(input) {
    const item = await api.addComment(get().design.id, input);
    set(state => ({ comments: [...state.comments, item] }));
    return item;
  },
  async resolveComment(id, resolved = true) {
    const item = await api.resolveComment(id, resolved);
    set(state => ({ comments: state.comments.map(comment => comment.id === id ? item : comment) }));
  },
  async markNotification(id, read = true) {
    const item = await api.markNotification(id, read);
    set(state => ({ notifications: state.notifications.map(notification => notification.id === id ? item : notification) }));
    return item;
  },
  async markAllNotifications() {
    const notifications = await api.markAllNotifications();
    set({ notifications });
  },
  async setStatus(status) {
    const design = await api.setDesignStatus(get().design.id, status);
    set({ design });
    return design;
  },
  async createShare(input) {
    const item = await api.createShare(get().design.id, input);
    set(state => ({ shares: [item, ...state.shares] }));
    return item;
  },
  async loadMembers() {
    const members = await api.listMembers();
    set({ members });
    return members;
  }
}));

window.addEventListener('online', () => useEditorStore.getState().setOnline(true));
window.addEventListener('offline', () => useEditorStore.getState().setOnline(false));

channel?.addEventListener('message', event => {
  const message = event.data;
  if (message?.tabId === tabId) return;
  const state = useEditorStore.getState();
  if (!state.collaborationEnabled && message?.type === 'open' && message.designId && state.design?.id === message.designId) {
    useEditorStore.setState({ tabConflict: true, status: 'conflict', lastError: 'This design is open in another tab.' });
    channel.postMessage({ type: 'conflict', designId: message.designId, tabId });
  }
  if (!state.collaborationEnabled && message?.type === 'conflict' && message.designId === state.design?.id) {
    useEditorStore.setState({ tabConflict: true, status: 'conflict', lastError: 'This design is open in another tab.' });
  }
  if (!state.collaborationEnabled && message?.type === 'takeover' && message.designId === state.design?.id) {
    useEditorStore.setState({ tabConflict: true, status: 'conflict', lastError: 'Another tab took over editing this design.' });
  }
  if (message?.type === 'close' && message.designId === state.design?.id && state.tabConflict) {
    const unsaved = state.documentRevision > state.savedRevision;
    useEditorStore.setState({ tabConflict: false, status: state.online ? (unsaved ? 'dirty' : 'saved') : 'offline', lastError: '' });
  }
});

window.addEventListener('pagehide', () => {
  const id = useEditorStore.getState().design?.id;
  if (id) channel?.postMessage({ type: 'close', designId: id, tabId });
});

if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
  window.DesignCommonsAI = {
    version: 2,
    appName: APP_NAME,
    capabilities: () => getAICapabilities(),
    context: () => useEditorStore.getState().getAIContext(),
    handoff: (request = '', options = {}) => useEditorStore.getState().getAIHandoffPackage(request, options),
    lint: () => lintDocument(useEditorStore.getState().document),
    validate: batch => validateCommandBatch(batch, { revision: useEditorStore.getState().documentRevision }),
    preview: batch => useEditorStore.getState().previewAICommands(batch),
    previewText: (text, options = {}) => useEditorStore.getState().previewLLMText(text, options),
    apply: (batch, options = {}) => {
      if (batch) useEditorStore.getState().previewAICommands(batch);
      return useEditorStore.getState().applyAIPlan(options);
    },
    plan: (instruction, options = {}) => useEditorStore.getState().prepareAIPlan(instruction, options),
    render: options => useEditorStore.getState().renderAIImage(options),
    refine: options => useEditorStore.getState().applyAIPlanAndRefine(options),
    agent: {
      start: (instruction, options = {}) => useEditorStore.getState().startAIAgent(instruction, options),
      answer: answer => useEditorStore.getState().answerAIAgent(answer),
      concepts: options => useEditorStore.getState().generateAIAgentConcepts(options),
      redesign: () => useEditorStore.getState().redesignAIAgentConcepts(),
      select: conceptId => useEditorStore.getState().selectAIAgentConcept(conceptId),
      refine: (conceptId, feedback) => useEditorStore.getState().refineAIAgentConcept(conceptId, feedback),
      approve: conceptId => useEditorStore.getState().approveAIAgentConcept(conceptId),
      steer: message => useEditorStore.getState().steerAIAgent(message),
      pause: () => useEditorStore.getState().pauseAIAgent(),
      resume: () => useEditorStore.getState().resumeAIAgent(),
      cancel: () => useEditorStore.getState().cancelAIAgent(),
      state: () => useEditorStore.getState().aiAgent
    },
    undo: () => useEditorStore.getState().undo()
  };
  window.CanvasForgeAI = window.DesignCommonsAI;
  subscribeAIAgentPersistence();
}

   system. The stage owns the padded workspace size; Fabric's wrapper must not
   participate in normal flow or shift the drawing surface a second time. */

  background:transparent!important;
  box-shadow:none!important;
  overflow:visible;
}

  position:absolute!important;
  left:0!important;
  top:0!important;
  z-index:2;
  margin:0!important;
  background:transparent!important;
}

.canvas-stage .upper-canvas{
  position:absolute!important;
  left:0!important;
  top:0!important;
  display:block;
  margin:0!important;
  background:transparent!important;
}

.canvas-stage .upper-canvas{z-index:2}

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/ai-command-regression.test.js (2026-07-13 02:00:20) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
import { defaultDocument } from '../src/lib/document.js';
import { sanitizeSvgMarkup } from '../src/lib/svg.js';
import { FONT_FAMILIES, FONT_CATEGORIES } from '../src/lib/fonts.js';
import { applyCommandBatch, getAICapabilities, validateCommandBatch } from '../src/ai/engine.js';

test('SVG sanitization accepts valid documents', () => {
  const result = sanitizeSvgMarkup('<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="#4f46e5"/></svg>');
  assert.ok(result.includes('xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"'));
  assert.ok(result.includes('<circle'));
});

test('SVG sanitization wraps bare path data', () => {
  const result = sanitizeSvgMarkup('M10 10 L90 90');
  assert.ok(result.includes('xmlns'));
  assert.ok(result.includes('M10 10'));
});

test('SVG sanitization removes script elements', () => {
  const result = sanitizeSvgMarkup('<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><script>alert(1)</script><rect width="10" height="10"/></svg>');
  assert.ok(!result.includes('<script'));
  assert.ok(result.includes('<rect'));
});

test('SVG sanitization removes event handlers', () => {
  const result = sanitizeSvgMarkup('<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" onclick="alert(1)" fill="red"/></svg>');
  assert.ok(!result.includes('onclick'));
  assert.ok(result.includes('<circle'));
});

test('SVG sanitization rejects empty input', () => {
  assert.throws(() => sanitizeSvgMarkup(''), /empty/);
});

test('font families include common names', () => {
  assert.ok(FONT_FAMILIES.includes('Arial'));
  assert.ok(FONT_FAMILIES.includes('Montserrat'));
  assert.ok(FONT_FAMILIES.includes('Poppins'));
  assert.ok(FONT_FAMILIES.length > 30);
});

test('font categories cover all families', () => {
  const all = FONT_CATEGORIES.flatMap(group => group.fonts);
  const unmatched = FONT_FAMILIES.filter(font => !all.includes(font));
  assert.equal(unmatched.length, 0, `Uncategorized fonts: ${unmatched.join(', ')}`);
});

test('create_svg operation is registered', () => {
  const capabilities = getAICapabilities();
  assert.ok(capabilities.operations.includes('create_svg'));
  assert.ok(capabilities.operations.includes('create_from_csv'));
  assert.ok(capabilities.operationSchemas.create_svg);
  assert.ok(capabilities.operationSchemas.create_svg.allowedFields.includes('svg'));
});

test('validateCommandBatch detects unknown fields', () => {
  const result = validateCommandBatch({
    schemaVersion: 1,
    commands: [{ op: 'create_element', element: { type: 'text', text: 'Hello' }, unknownField: true }]
  });
  assert.equal(result.valid, false);
  assert.ok(result.errors.join(' ').includes('unknownField'));
});

test('validateCommandBatch reports warnings', () => {
  const result = validateCommandBatch({
    schemaVersion: 1,
    commands: [{ op: 'create_element', element: { type: 'text', text: 'Hello', fontFamily: 'NotFoundFont123' } }]
  });
  assert.ok(result.warnings.length > 0);
  assert.ok(result.warnings.join(' ').includes('NotFoundFont123'));
});

test('insert_asset accepts editable image geometry from vision reconstruction', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(1080, 1080);
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    baseRevision: 0,
    commands: [{
      op: 'insert_asset',
      assetId: 'hero-asset',
      element: { width: 420, height: 280, cropZoom: 1.15, altText: 'Hero photograph' },
      layout: { x: 90, y: 160, width: 420, height: 280 }
    }]
  };
  assert.equal(validateCommandBatch(batch, { revision: 0 }).valid, true);
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch, {
    revision: 0,
    assets: [{ id: 'hero-asset', original_name: 'hero.png', preview_url: '/hero.png', width: 1200, height: 800 }]
  });
  const image = result.document.pages[0].elements.at(-1);
  assert.equal(image.type, 'image');
  assert.equal(image.x, 90);
  assert.equal(image.y, 160);
  assert.equal(image.width, 420);
  assert.equal(image.altText, 'Hero photograph');
});

test('create_element produces correct element with explicit placement', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(1080, 1080);
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    commands: [{
      op: 'create_element',
      element: { type: 'text', text: 'Headline', fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 64, fill: '#111827', x: 80, y: 80, width: 600, height: 120 }
    }]
  };
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch);
  const element = result.document.pages[0].elements[0];
  assert.equal(element.type, 'text');
  assert.equal(element.x, 80);
  assert.equal(element.y, 80);
  assert.equal(element.width, 600);
  assert.equal(element.height, 120);
});

test('create_svg creates a valid SVG element', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(1080, 1080);
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    commands: [{
      op: 'create_svg',
      svg: '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path fill="#4f46e5" d="M50 5 95 95H5Z"/></svg>',
      element: { x: 100, y: 100, width: 300, height: 300 }
    }]
  };
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch);
  const element = result.document.pages[0].elements[0];
  assert.equal(element.type, 'svg');
  assert.ok(element.svg.includes('viewBox'));
  assert.equal(element.width, 300);
  assert.equal(element.height, 300);
});

test('create_from_csv creates a table element', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(1080, 1080);
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    commands: [{
      op: 'create_from_csv',
      mode: 'table',
      csv: 'Item,Qty,Price\nTacos,2,$12\nChurros,1,$6',
      element: { x: 80, y: 200, width: 620, height: 300 }
    }]
  };
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch);
  const element = result.document.pages[0].elements[0];
  assert.equal(element.type, 'table');
  assert.equal(element.cells.length, 3);
  assert.equal(element.cells[0][0], 'Item');
});

test('create_from_csv with chart mode creates chart element', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(1080, 1080);
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    commands: [{
      op: 'create_from_csv',
      mode: 'chart',
      csv: 'Month,Sales\nJan,100\nFeb,200',
      chartType: 'bar',
      element: { x: 80, y: 200, width: 620, height: 300 }
    }]
  };
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch);
  const element = result.document.pages[0].elements[0];
  assert.equal(element.type, 'chart');
  assert.equal(element.chartType, 'bar');
  assert.equal(element.data.labels[0], 'Jan');
  assert.equal(element.data.series[0].values[0], 100);
});

test('pageRef targets correct page', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(1080, 1080);
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    commands: [
      { op: 'create_page', ref: 'pg2', page: { name: 'Second' } },
      { op: 'create_element', pageRef: 'pg2', element: { type: 'rect', x: 10, y: 10, width: 100, height: 100 } }
    ]
  };
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch);
  assert.equal(result.document.pages.length, 2);
  assert.equal(result.document.pages[1].elements.length, 1);
  assert.equal(result.document.pages[0].elements.length, 0);
});

test('create_svg with bare path wraps automatically', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(1080, 1080);
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    commands: [{
      op: 'create_svg',
      svg: 'M10 10 L90 90 Z',
      element: { x: 100, y: 100, width: 200, height: 200 }
    }]
  };
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch);
  const element = result.document.pages[0].elements[0];
  assert.equal(element.type, 'svg');
  assert.ok(element.svg.includes('xmlns'));
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/ai-design-features.test.js (2026-07-12 23:33:19) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
import { applyCommandBatch, validateCommandBatch } from '../src/ai/engine.js';
import { extractLLMJson } from '../src/ai/handoff.js';
import { defaultDocument, imageFrameElement, normalizeDocument } from '../src/lib/document.js';
import { inspectSvgMarkup, sanitizeSvgMarkup } from '../src/lib/svg.js';
import { normalizeAgentConcepts } from '../src/ai/agent.js';
import { buildConceptPreviewPrompt, closestImageAspectRatio, conceptPreviewRoute } from '../server/commercial/aiGateway.js';

test('image frames retain mask and reusable-frame metadata', () => {
  const frame = imageFrameElement({ mask: 'circle', width: 160, height: 160 });
  assert.equal(frame.type, 'image');
  assert.equal(frame.isImageFrame, true);
  assert.equal(frame.mask, 'circle');
  assert.match(frame.src, /^data:image\/svg\+xml;base64,/);
});

test('AI can set a page reference and create a filled image frame', () => {
  const asset = { id: 'asset-1', original_name: 'menu-reference.png', preview_url: '/assets/menu-reference.png', width: 816, height: 1056 };
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    baseRevision: 0,
    commands: [
      { op: 'set_reference_image', assetId: asset.id, opacity: .4, mode: 'split', split: .55 },
      { op: 'create_image_frame', assetId: asset.id, element: { x: 40, y: 220, width: 150, height: 150, mask: 'circle' } }
    ]
  };
  assert.equal(validateCommandBatch(batch, { revision: 0 }).valid, true);
  const result = applyCommandBatch(defaultDocument(816, 1056), batch, { assets: [asset], revision: 0, pageIndex: 0 });
  assert.equal(result.document.pages[0].referenceImage.assetId, asset.id);
  assert.equal(result.document.pages[0].referenceImage.mode, 'split');
  assert.equal(result.document.pages[0].elements[0].isImageFrame, true);
  assert.equal(result.document.pages[0].elements[0].assetId, asset.id);
});

test('normalization preserves measured text-fit options', () => {
  const document = defaultDocument();
  document.pages[0].elements.push({ id: 'text-1', type: 'text', text: 'Dense menu copy', width: 220, height: 80, autoFit: true, minFontSize: 7, maxLines: 3, overflowBehavior: 'clip' });
  const text = normalizeDocument(document).pages[0].elements[0];
  assert.equal(text.autoFit, true);
  assert.equal(text.minFontSize, 7);
  assert.equal(text.maxLines, 3);
  assert.equal(text.overflowBehavior, 'clip');
});

test('LLM parser ignores instruction examples and finds the command bundle', () => {
  const batch = { schemaVersion: 1, baseRevision: 0, commands: [{ op: 'set_document_title', title: 'Menu' }] };
  const noisy = `Instructions example: {"schemaVersion":1,"commands":[]}\nActual response:\n${JSON.stringify(batch)}`;
  const parsed = extractLLMJson(noisy);
  assert.deepEqual(parsed, batch);
  const proseThenBundle = `Do not paste this example: {"foo":1}\n${JSON.stringify(batch)}`;
  assert.deepEqual(extractLLMJson(proseThenBundle), batch);
});

test('SVG sanitizer removes active content and supplies a viewBox', () => {
  const input = '<svg width="100" height="50"><script>alert(1)</script><path onclick="x()" d="M0 0h100v50z"/></svg>';
  const inspection = inspectSvgMarkup(input);
  assert.equal(inspection.valid, true);
  assert.ok(inspection.issues.length >= 1);
  const safe = sanitizeSvgMarkup(input);
  assert.doesNotMatch(safe, /script|onclick/i);
  assert.match(safe, /viewBox="0 0 100 50"/);
});


test('Nano Banana concept previews use the dedicated stable Gemini route', () => {
  const route = conceptPreviewRoute();
  assert.equal(route.provider, 'gemini');
  assert.equal(route.engine, 'nano-banana');
  assert.equal(route.model, process.env.AI_CONCEPT_PREVIEW_MODEL || 'gemini-3.1-flash-image');
  assert.equal(closestImageAspectRatio(816, 1056), '3:4');
});

test('concept preview prompt asks for the finished flat design and exact copy', () => {
  const prompt = buildConceptPreviewPrompt({
    instruction: 'Create a gift card',
    width: 816,
    height: 1056,
    understanding: { action: 'new_design', summary: 'Create a printable restaurant gift card', requiredCopy: ['TacoTaco Gift Card'] },
    concept: { title: 'Tropical Celebration', description: 'Warm tropical leaves and a clear value area', prompt: 'Premium tropical gift card' }
  });
  assert.match(prompt, /flat, front-facing design canvas/i);
  assert.match(prompt, /Do not show an editor UI/i);
  assert.match(prompt, /"TacoTaco Gift Card"/);
  assert.match(prompt, /Never output gibberish/i);
});

test('agent concept normalization preserves Nano Banana preview metadata', () => {
  const [concept] = normalizeAgentConcepts({ concepts: [{
    id: 'c1', title: 'Gift Card', previewUrl: 'data:image/png;base64,abc', previewEngine: 'nano-banana',
    previewLabel: 'Nano Banana 2', previewProvider: 'gemini', previewModel: 'gemini-3.1-flash-image'
  }] }, { assets: [] }, { goal: 'Create a gift card', constraints: {} });
  assert.equal(concept.previewMode, 'nano-banana');
  assert.equal(concept.previewEngine, 'nano-banana');
  assert.equal(concept.previewLabel, 'Nano Banana 2');
  assert.equal(concept.previewModel, 'gemini-3.1-flash-image');
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/ai-engine.test.js (2026-07-03 22:36:10) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
import { defaultDocument, textElement } from '../src/lib/document.js';
import { applyCommandBatch, createAIContext, lintDocument, validateCommandBatch } from '../src/ai/engine.js';

test('AI commands create semantic elements without mutating the source', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(1080, 1080);
  const batch = { schemaVersion: 1, baseRevision: 3, commands: [{ op: 'create_element', element: { type: 'text', role: 'headline', semanticName: 'Hero headline', text: 'Hello' }, layout: { region: 'header', align: 'center' } }] };
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch, { revision: 3, pageIndex: 0 });
  assert.equal(source.pages[0].elements.length, 0);
  assert.equal(result.document.pages[0].elements.length, 1);
  assert.equal(result.document.pages[0].elements[0].role, 'headline');
  assert.equal(result.createdIds.length, 1);
});

test('AI revision guard rejects stale commands', () => {
  const validation = validateCommandBatch({ schemaVersion: 1, baseRevision: 2, commands: [] }, { revision: 3 });
  assert.equal(validation.valid, false);
  assert.match(validation.errors.join(' '), /changed/i);
});

test('AI protected elements are not updated', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument();
  const item = textElement({ text: 'Protected', role: 'headline', userLocked: true });
  source.pages[0].elements.push(item);
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, { schemaVersion: 1, commands: [{ op: 'replace_text', target: { role: 'headline' }, text: 'Changed' }] }, { revision: 0 });
  assert.equal(result.document.pages[0].elements[0].text, 'Protected');
  assert.equal(result.warnings.length, 1);
});

test('AI context is compact and includes render URL', () => {
  const document = defaultDocument();
  const context = createAIContext({ document, design: { id: 'design-1' }, revision: 4, renderUrl: 'https://example.test/render.png' });
  assert.equal(context.design.revision, 4);
  assert.equal(context.render.url, 'https://example.test/render.png');
  assert.ok(context.capabilities.operations.includes('create_element'));
});

test('design linter reports out-of-bounds content', () => {
  const document = defaultDocument(500, 500);
  document.pages[0].elements.push(textElement({ x: 480, y: 480, width: 200, height: 100, text: 'Overflow' }));
  const result = lintDocument(document);
  assert.ok(result.issues.some(issue => issue.rule === 'out-of-bounds'));
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/ai-handoff.test.js (2026-07-03 22:48:12) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
import { createLLMHandoffPackage, extractLLMJson, normalizeLLMCommandBatch } from '../src/ai/handoff.js';

const context = {
  design: { id: 'design-1', title: 'Test', revision: 7, width: 1080, height: 1080 },
  currentPage: { index: 0, id: 'page-1', name: 'Page 1', regions: {}, elements: [] },
  selection: [], assets: [], brands: [], components: [],
  capabilities: { operations: ['create_element'], elementTypes: ['text'], targetFields: ['id'], semanticRoles: ['headline'] },
  render: { url: 'https://example.test/render.png', pageIndex: 0 }
};

test('extracts command JSON from a fenced LLM response', () => {
  const parsed = extractLLMJson('Here are the commands:\n```json\n{"schemaVersion":1,"baseRevision":7,"commands":[]}\n```');
  assert.equal(parsed.baseRevision, 7);
});

test('normalizes array command responses and adds revision', () => {
  const batch = normalizeLLMCommandBatch('[{"op":"create_element","element":{"type":"text"}}]', { revision: 7 });
  assert.equal(batch.schemaVersion, 1);
  assert.equal(batch.baseRevision, 7);
  assert.equal(batch.commands.length, 1);
});

test('handoff package includes instructions, context, render and direct endpoints', () => {
  const result = createLLMHandoffPackage({ context, request: 'Improve the headline', scope: 'page', apiBase: 'https://canvas.example' });
  assert.match(result.prompt, /Improve the headline/);
  assert.match(result.prompt, /SKILLS\.md/);
  assert.match(result.prompt, /render\.png/);
  assert.equal(result.endpoints.context, 'https://canvas.example/api/designs/design-1/ai/context');
  assert.match(result.instructions, /Return exactly one JSON object/);
});

import test from'node:test';import assert from'node:assert/strict';import fs from'node:fs';import os from'node:os';import path from'node:path';import{spawn}from'node:child_process';import{exportPowerPoint}from'../server/powerpoint.js';import{defaultDocument,textElement}from'../src/lib/document.js';
const temp=fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(),'canvasforge-api-')),port=4391;let child;
async function waitFor(url){for(let i=0;i<80;i++){try{const r=await fetch(url,{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:'{}'});if(r.status<500)return;}catch{}await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,100));}throw new Error('API did not start');}
async function request(pathname,{token,org,method='GET',body}={}){const headers={};if(token)headers.authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;if(org)headers['x-organization-id']=org;if(body!==undefined)headers['content-type']='application/json';const response=await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}${pathname}`,{method,headers,body:body===undefined?undefined:JSON.stringify(body)});const payload=response.status===204?null:await response.json();return{response,payload};}
test.before(async()=>{child=spawn(process.execPath,['server/index.js'],{cwd:path.resolve(import.meta.dirname,'..'),env:{...process.env,API_PORT:String(port),SQLITE_PATH:path.join(temp,'db.sqlite'),STORAGE_DIR:path.join(temp,'storage'),ADMIN_EMAIL:'api@test.local',ADMIN_PASSWORD:'api-password-123',OWNER_TOKEN:'owner-token-test',WEB_ORIGIN:'http://127.0.0.1:4173'},stdio:['ignore','pipe','pipe']});await waitFor(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}/api/auth/login`)});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/appearance-regression.test.js (2026-07-05 15:26:09) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';

import { lintDocument } from '../src/ai/engine.js';
import { normalizeAppearance } from '../src/lib/appearance.js';
import { defaultDocument, rectElement, textElement } from '../src/lib/document.js';

test('element geometry is not interpreted as a stroke width', () => {
  const card = rectElement({
    name: 'Cocktail card',
    width: 330,
    height: 280,
    stroke: '#231f20',
    strokeWidth: 2
  });

  const appearance = normalizeAppearance(card);
  assert.equal(appearance.stroke.enabled, true);
  assert.equal(appearance.stroke.width, 2);
  assert.equal(appearance.stroke.color, '#231f20');
});

test('text without an outline keeps its stroke disabled', () => {
  const headline = textElement({
    name: 'Menu headline',
    width: 676,
    height: 88,
    fill: '#231f20'
  });

  const appearance = normalizeAppearance(headline);
  assert.equal(appearance.stroke.enabled, false);
  assert.equal(appearance.stroke.width, 0);
});

test('normalization repairs appearances saved by the geometry-width bug', () => {
  const headline = textElement({
    name: 'Menu headline',
    width: 652,
    height: 88,
    fill: '#231f20'
  });

  headline.appearance = {
    ...headline.appearance,
    strokes: [{
      ...headline.appearance.strokes[0],
      name: 'Menu headline',
      enabled: true,
      color: '#111827',
      width: 676
    }],
    legacySnapshot: {
      ...headline.appearance.legacySnapshot,
      stroke: null,
      strokeWidth: null
    }
  };

  const repaired = normalizeAppearance(headline);
  assert.equal(repaired.stroke.enabled, false);
  assert.equal(repaired.stroke.width, 0);
});

test('design checks block page-covering strokes', () => {
  const document = defaultDocument(816, 1056);
  const card = rectElement({ name: 'Bad card', width: 330, height: 280 });
  card.appearance.strokes[0] = {
    ...card.appearance.strokes[0],
    name: 'Custom outline',
    enabled: true,
    width: 330
  };
  document.pages[0].elements = [card];

  const lint = lintDocument(document);
  assert.ok(lint.issues.some(issue => issue.rule === 'oversized-stroke' && issue.severity === 'critical'));
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/commons-ai-assets.test.js (2026-07-05 21:27:05) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';

import { buildCommonsListingPayload, validateCommonsRights } from '../src/lib/commons.js';
import { buildThemedAssetPrompt, findReusableAsset, normalizeAIAssetRequests } from '../src/ai/assetPlanning.js';
import { validateCommandBatch } from '../src/ai/engine.js';

test('Commons publishing requires a complete rights attestation', () => {
  const incomplete = validateCommonsRights({ basis: 'original' });
  assert.equal(incomplete.valid, false);
  assert.ok(incomplete.errors.length >= 4);

  const payload = buildCommonsListingPayload({ title: 'Original icon', priceCredits: 25, tags: ['icon'] }, {
    basis: 'original',
    copyrightOwner: 'Example Creator',
    licenceId: 'canvasforge-standard',
    ownsRights: true,
    allowsRedistribution: true,
    noRestrictedContent: true,
    acceptsTakedown: true
  });
  assert.equal(payload.priceType, 'credits');
  assert.equal(payload.rightsDeclaration.copyrightOwner, 'Example Creator');
  assert.equal(payload.moderationStatus, 'pending_review');
});

test('asset planning reuses a relevant existing asset', () => {
  const request = normalizeAIAssetRequests([{ key: 'lime', name: 'Lime illustration', prompt: 'Outlined lime wheel', kind: 'svg', reuseQuery: 'lime citrus vector' }])[0];
  const result = findReusableAsset([
    { id: 'photo', original_name: 'restaurant.jpg', tags: ['photo'] },
    { id: 'lime', original_name: 'lime-citrus-wheel.svg', tags: ['vector', 'lime', 'transparent'], type: 'svg' }
  ], request);
  assert.equal(result.asset.id, 'lime');
});

test('themed prompts carry one consistent visual direction', () => {
  const prompt = buildThemedAssetPrompt({ name: 'Cocktail', prompt: 'A martini glass', transparent: true }, {
    summary: 'Warm retro cocktail menu', palette: ['#fff8ef', '#d5482f'], consistencyKey: 'thick charcoal outlines and subtle paper grain'
  });
  assert.match(prompt, /Warm retro cocktail menu/);
  assert.match(prompt, /#fff8ef/);
  assert.match(prompt, /thick charcoal outlines/);
  assert.match(prompt, /transparent background/);
});

test('AI command batches accept bounded theme and asset requests', () => {
  const validation = validateCommandBatch({
    schemaVersion: 1,
    baseRevision: 0,
    instruction: 'Plan assets',
    theme: { name: 'Retro' },
    assetRequests: [{ key: 'hero', name: 'Hero glass', prompt: 'Cocktail glass', kind: 'svg', aspectRatio: '1:1', transparent: true }],
    commands: []
  }, { revision: 0 });
  assert.equal(validation.valid, true, validation.errors.join(' '));
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/document.test.js (2026-07-03 14:16:00) =====
import test from'node:test';import assert from'node:assert/strict';import{defaultDocument,rectElement,textElement,resizeDocument,createLayoutGroup,componentFromElements,instantiateComponent,chartElement,tableElement,qrElement}from'../src/lib/document.js';
test('magic resize follows element constraints',()=>{const doc=defaultDocument(1000,500);doc.pages[0].elements=[rectElement({x:100,y:50,width:200,height:100,constraints:{horizontal:'right',vertical:'bottom',maintainAspectRatio:false}}),textElement({x:100,y:100,width:300,height:80,fontSize:40,constraints:{horizontal:'scale',vertical:'scale'}})];const resized=resizeDocument(doc,2000,1000);assert.equal(resized.pages[0].elements[0].x,1100);assert.equal(resized.pages[0].elements[0].y,550);assert.equal(resized.pages[0].elements[1].fontSize,80)});
