test('components get fresh ids and preserve relative positions',()=>{const a=rectElement({x:50,y:60}),b=textElement({x:100,y:120});const component={id:'component-1',...componentFromElements([a,b],'Card')};const instances=instantiateComponent(component,200,300);assert.notEqual(instances[0].id,a.id);assert.equal(instances[0].x,200);assert.equal(instances[1].x,250)});
test('chart table and QR elements include editable source data',()=>{assert.equal(chartElement().data.labels.length,4);assert.equal(tableElement().cells[0][0],'Item');assert.match(qrElement().value,/https:/)});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/e2e.test.js (2026-07-03 14:25:20) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
import fs from 'node:fs';
import path from 'node:path';
import { chromium } from 'playwright-core';

const root = path.resolve(import.meta.dirname, '..');
const dist = path.join(root, 'dist');
const contentType = file => file.endsWith('.js') ? 'text/javascript' : file.endsWith('.css') ? 'text/css' : 'text/html';
const baseDocument = {
  schemaVersion: 3,
  title: 'Browser design',
  width: 1080,
  height: 1080,
  unit: 'px',
  dpi: 96,
  layoutGroups: [],
  pages: [{ id: 'page-1', name: 'Page 1', background: '#ffffff', guides: { vertical: [], horizontal: [], locked: false }, elements: [] }]
};
let savedDocument = structuredClone(baseDocument);

function json(route, body, status = 200) {
  return route.fulfill({ status, contentType: 'application/json', body: JSON.stringify(body) });
}

test('creates a design and adds chart, table, and QR elements in Chromium', async t => {
  const browser = await chromium.launch({ executablePath: process.env.CHROMIUM_PATH || '/usr/bin/chromium', headless: true, args: ['--no-sandbox', '--disable-dev-shm-usage'] });
  try {
    const page = await browser.newPage();
    await page.route('https://canvasforge.test/**', async route => {
      const url = new URL(route.request().url());
      if (url.pathname.startsWith('/assets/')) {
        const file = path.join(dist, url.pathname);
        return route.fulfill({ status: 200, contentType: contentType(file), body: fs.readFileSync(file) });
      }
      if (url.pathname === '/' || url.pathname === '/index.html') {
        return route.fulfill({ status: 200, contentType: 'text/html', body: fs.readFileSync(path.join(dist, 'index.html')) });
      }
      const method = route.request().method();
      if (url.pathname === '/api/auth/login' && method === 'POST') return json(route, { token: 'test-session', expiresAt: '2099-01-01T00:00:00.000Z', user: { id: 'u1', email: 'browser@test.local', name: 'Browser User' }, organizations: [{ organization_id: 'o1', name: 'Browser Org', slug: 'browser-org', role: 'owner' }], currentOrganizationId: 'o1' });
      if (url.pathname === '/api/designs' && method === 'GET') return json(route, []);
      if (url.pathname === '/api/designs' && method === 'POST') return json(route, { id: 'd1', title: 'Browser design', width: 1080, height: 1080, status: 'draft', document: savedDocument, created_at: new Date().toISOString(), updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }, 201);
      if (url.pathname === '/api/designs/d1' && method === 'GET') return json(route, { id: 'd1', title: 'Browser design', width: 1080, height: 1080, status: 'draft', document: savedDocument, created_at: new Date().toISOString(), updated_at: new Date().toISOString() });
      if (url.pathname === '/api/designs/d1' && method === 'PUT') {
        const body = route.request().postDataJSON(); savedDocument = body.document;
        return json(route, { id: 'd1', title: body.title, width: savedDocument.width, height: savedDocument.height, status: 'draft', document: savedDocument, created_at: new Date().toISOString(), updated_at: new Date().toISOString() });
      }
      if (/^\/api\/(assets|assets\/folders|templates|components|brand-kits|notifications)$/.test(url.pathname)) return json(route, []);
      if (/^\/api\/designs\/d1\/(versions|exports|comments|shares)$/.test(url.pathname)) return json(route, []);
      return json(route, { error: `Unhandled mock route: ${method} ${url.pathname}` }, 404);
    });
    try {
      await page.goto('https://canvasforge.test/', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' });
    } catch (error) {
      if (String(error).includes('ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ADMINISTRATOR')) {
        t.skip('Chromium navigation is blocked by the execution environment policy.');
        return;
      }
      throw error;
    }
    await page.getByLabel('Email').fill('browser@test.local');
    await page.getByLabel('Password').fill('browser-password-123');
    await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Sign in' }).click();
    await page.getByRole('button', { name: /Square post/ }).click();
    await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Chart' }).click();
    await page.getByText('Chart data').waitFor();
    await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Table' }).click();
    await page.getByText('Table data').waitFor();
    await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'QR code' }).click();
    await page.getByText('QR code', { exact: true }).last().waitFor();
    assert.ok(await page.locator('canvas').count());
    assert.equal(savedDocument.pages[0].elements.length >= 3, true);
  } finally {
    await browser.close();
  }
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/export.test.js (2026-07-15 01:23:32) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
import fs from 'node:fs';
import os from 'node:os';
import path from 'node:path';
import { spawn } from 'node:child_process';

const temp = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'canvasforge-export-'));
const port = 4393;
let apiProcess;
let workerProcess;
let token;
let org;

async function waitFor(url) {
  for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
    try { const r = await fetch(url); if (r.status < 500) return; } catch {}
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
  }
  throw new Error(`Service did not start: ${url}`);
}
async function request(pathname, { method = 'GET', body } = {}) {
  const headers = { authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, 'x-organization-id': org };
  if (body !== undefined) headers['content-type'] = 'application/json';
  const response = await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}${pathname}`, { method, headers, body: body === undefined ? undefined : JSON.stringify(body) });
  const payload = response.status === 204 ? null : await response.json();
  if (!response.ok) throw new Error(payload?.error || `${response.status}`);
  return payload;
}
async function waitForExport(id) {
  for (let i = 0; i < 240; i++) {
    const job = await request(`/api/exports/${id}`);
    if (job.status === 'completed') return job;
    if (job.status === 'failed') throw new Error(job.error || 'Export failed');
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 250));
  }
  throw new Error('Export did not complete.');
}

test.before(async () => {
  const env = {
    ...process.env,
    API_PORT: String(port),
    SQLITE_PATH: path.join(temp, 'canvasforge.sqlite'),
    STORAGE_DIR: path.join(temp, 'storage'),
    ADMIN_EMAIL: 'export@test.local',
    ADMIN_PASSWORD: 'export-password-123',
    OWNER_TOKEN: 'export-owner-token',
    WEB_ORIGIN: 'http://127.0.0.1:4173',
    CHROMIUM_PATH: process.env.CHROMIUM_PATH || '/usr/bin/chromium',
    EXPORT_TIMEOUT_MS: '60000'
  };
  apiProcess = spawn(process.execPath, ['server/index.js'], { cwd: path.resolve(import.meta.dirname, '..'), env, stdio: 'ignore' });
  workerProcess = spawn(process.execPath, ['server/worker.js'], { cwd: path.resolve(import.meta.dirname, '..'), env, stdio: 'ignore' });
  await waitFor(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}/api/healthz`);
  const login = await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}/api/auth/login`, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ email: 'export@test.local', password: 'export-password-123' }) });
  const payload = await login.json(); token = payload.token; org = payload.currentOrganizationId;
});

test('exports editable charts, tables and QR codes to PNG, PDF and PowerPoint', async () => {
  const document = {
    schemaVersion: 3, title: 'Export parity', width: 900, height: 700, unit: 'px', dpi: 96, layoutGroups: [],
    pages: [{
      id: 'p1', name: 'Page 1', background: '#ffffff', guides: { vertical: [], horizontal: [], locked: false }, elements: [
        { id: 'chart', type: 'chart', name: 'Revenue chart', x: 40, y: 40, width: 500, height: 280, rotation: 0, opacity: 1, zIndex: 0, hidden: false, locked: false, chartType: 'bar', data: { labels: ['A','B','C'], series: [{ name: 'Revenue', values: [15, 35, 25] }] }, options: { showLegend: true, showLabels: true, grid: true, colors: ['#4f46e5'], background: '#ffffff', fontFamily: 'Arial' } },
        { id: 'table', type: 'table', name: 'Table', x: 40, y: 360, width: 500, height: 260, rotation: 0, opacity: 1, zIndex: 1, hidden: false, locked: false, rows: 3, columns: 3, cells: [['Item','Qty','Price'],['Tacos','2','$12'],['Churros','1','$6']], options: { headerRows: 1, headerFill: '#111827', headerText: '#ffffff', cellFill: '#ffffff', alternateFill: '#f3f4f6', textColor: '#111827', borderColor: '#d1d5db', borderWidth: 1, fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 22, padding: 10 } },
        { id: 'qr', type: 'qrcode', name: 'QR code', x: 600, y: 120, width: 220, height: 220, rotation: 0, opacity: 1, zIndex: 2, hidden: false, locked: false, value: 'https://canvasforge.test/menu', foreground: '#111827', background: '#ffffff', errorCorrection: 'M', margin: 2 },
        { id: 'text', type: 'text', name: 'Heading', x: 590, y: 390, width: 260, height: 100, rotation: 0, opacity: 1, zIndex: 3, hidden: false, locked: false, text: 'Scan for menu', fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 42, fontWeight: 700, fill: '#111827', textAlign: 'center', lineHeight: 1.1, charSpacing: 0, styles: {}, links: [], effect: { shadow: null, stroke: null, strokeWidth: 0, hollow: false, curve: 0 } }
      ]
    }]
  };
  const design = await request('/api/designs', { method: 'POST', body: { title: document.title, document } });
  for (const format of ['png', 'pdf', 'pptx']) {
    const job = await request(`/api/designs/${design.id}/exports`, { method: 'POST', body: { format, options: { multiplier: 1 } } });
    const completed = await waitForExport(job.id);
    const file = path.join(temp, 'storage', completed.output_url.replace('/storage/', ''));
    assert.equal(fs.existsSync(file), true);
    assert.ok(fs.statSync(file).size > (format === 'pptx' ? 8000 : 2000), `${format} output should not be empty`);
  }
});

test.after(() => {
  apiProcess?.kill('SIGTERM'); workerProcess?.kill('SIGTERM');
  setTimeout(() => { apiProcess?.kill('SIGKILL'); workerProcess?.kill('SIGKILL'); }, 500).unref();
  fs.rmSync(temp, { recursive: true, force: true });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/interaction-ui.test.js (2026-07-15 18:00:49) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';

import { DEFAULT_COLOR_GROUPS, DEFAULT_COLORS, normalizeColor } from '../src/lib/colors.js';
import { buildImageFilters } from '../src/lib/fabricAdapter.js';

const filterName = filter => String(filter?.type || filter?.constructor?.name || '').toLowerCase();

test('the palette-first colour picker has a broad, grouped default palette', () => {
  assert.ok(DEFAULT_COLOR_GROUPS.length >= 6);
  assert.ok(DEFAULT_COLORS.length >= 80);
  assert.equal(new Set(DEFAULT_COLORS.map(color => color.toLowerCase())).size, DEFAULT_COLORS.length);
  for (const expected of ['#000000', '#ffffff', '#ef4444', '#3b82f6', '#22c55e', '#8b5cf6']) {
    assert.ok(DEFAULT_COLORS.includes(expected), `missing expected default colour ${expected}`);
  }
  assert.equal(normalizeColor('#AbC'), '#aabbcc');
  assert.equal(normalizeColor('not-a-colour', '#123456'), '#123456');
});

test('image tint is applied after grayscale and is omitted only at zero opacity', () => {
  const active = buildImageFilters({ grayscale: true, tint: '#ef4444', tintOpacity: .4 });
  const names = active.map(filterName);
  const grayscaleIndex = names.findIndex(name => name.includes('grayscale'));
  const tintIndex = names.findIndex(name => name.includes('blendcolor') || name.includes('blend-color'));
  assert.ok(grayscaleIndex >= 0, `expected grayscale filter, received ${names.join(', ')}`);
  assert.ok(tintIndex > grayscaleIndex, `tint must follow grayscale, received ${names.join(', ')}`);

  const inactive = buildImageFilters({ grayscale: true, tint: '#ef4444', tintOpacity: 0 }).map(filterName);
  assert.equal(inactive.some(name => name.includes('blendcolor') || name.includes('blend-color')), false);
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/p0-p4-upgrades.test.js (2026-07-12 19:15:25) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
import { applyPatches, createPatchPair } from '../src/lib/patchHistory.js';
import { applyMasterPage, createMasterPageFromPage, createResponsiveVariant, defaultDocument, switchResponsiveVariant, textElement } from '../src/lib/document.js';
import { createAIContext, applyCommandBatch, validateCommandBatch } from '../src/ai/engine.js';
import { createAgentSession, createLocalConceptVariants } from '../src/ai/agent.js';
import { auditAccessibility } from '../src/lib/accessibility.js';
import { probableDuplicateGroups, rankAssets } from '../src/lib/assetIntelligence.js';
import { imageFilesFromClipboard, imageSourcesFromHtml } from '../src/lib/clipboard.js';

test('clipboard HTML extracts remote and data image sources', () => {
  const html = '<p><img src="https://eattaco.ca/images/Patio1.jpg?size=large&amp;crop=1"><img src="javascript:alert(1)"><img src="data:image/png;base64,AAAA"></p>';
  assert.deepEqual(imageSourcesFromHtml(html), [
    'https://eattaco.ca/images/Patio1.jpg?size=large&crop=1',
    'data:image/png;base64,AAAA'
  ]);
});

test('clipboard image extraction accepts native image files and emits routing diagnostics', async () => {
  const file = { name: 'clipboard.png', type: 'image/png', size: 42 };
  const messages = [];
  const previousWarn = console.warn;
  console.warn = (...args) => messages.push(args);
  try {
    const files = await imageFilesFromClipboard({
      files: [file],
      items: [{ kind: 'file', type: 'image/png', getAsFile: () => file }],
      types: ['Files'],
      getData: () => ''
    }, 'test canvas');
    assert.deepEqual(files, [file]);
    assert.match(messages[0][0], /test canvas received paste/);
    assert.deepEqual(messages[0][1].items, ['file:image/png']);
  } finally {
    console.warn = previousWarn;
  }
});

test('keyed document patches are reversible without replacing the pages array', () => {
  const before = { title: 'Before', pages: [{ id: 'page-1', elements: [{ id: 'a', x: 10 }, { id: 'b', x: 20 }] }] };
  const after = { title: 'After', pages: [{ id: 'page-1', elements: [{ id: 'b', x: 45 }, { id: 'c', x: 30 }] }] };
  const entry = createPatchPair(before, after, { label: 'Edit objects' });
  assert.equal(entry.forward.some(patch => patch.path === '/pages' && patch.op === 'replace'), false);
  assert.deepEqual(applyPatches(before, entry.forward), after);
  assert.deepEqual(applyPatches(after, entry.inverse), before);
});

test('master pages do not duplicate source objects and responsive variants preserve primary', () => {
  let document = defaultDocument(816, 1056);
  document.pages[0].elements.push(textElement({ text: 'Shared heading' }));
  const created = createMasterPageFromPage(document, document.pages[0].id, 'Editorial master');
  document = created.document;
  assert.equal(document.pages[0].elements.length, 1);
  assert.equal(document.pages[0].masterPageId, created.master.id);
  document = applyMasterPage(document, document.pages[0].id, created.master.id);
  assert.equal(document.pages[0].elements.length, 1);
  const variant = createResponsiveVariant(document, { name: 'Square', width: 1080, height: 1080 });
  document = switchResponsiveVariant(variant.document, variant.variant.id);
  assert.equal(document.width, 1080);
  document = switchResponsiveVariant(document, 'primary');
  assert.equal(document.width, 816);
});

test('agent concepts compile from a canonical DesignSpec into valid editable commands', () => {
  const document = defaultDocument(1080, 1080);
  const context = createAIContext({ document, design: { id: 'design-1' }, revision: 0 });
  const session = createAgentSession('Create a premium restaurant launch poster for local diners', context, { askQuestions: false });
  const concepts = createLocalConceptVariants(context, session.brief, { classification: session.classification });
  assert.equal(concepts.length, 3);
  for (const concept of concepts) {
    assert.ok(concept.designSpec);
    assert.equal(validateCommandBatch(concept.commandBatch, { revision: 0 }).valid, true);
    const result = applyCommandBatch(document, concept.commandBatch, { revision: 0, assets: [], brands: [] });
    assert.ok(result.document.pages.length > 1);
  }
});

test('accessibility and asset intelligence surface actionable metadata', () => {
  const document = defaultDocument();
  document.pages[0].elements.push({ id: 'image-1', type: 'image', name: 'Food photo', x: 0, y: 0, width: 300, height: 200, hidden: false });
  assert.ok(auditAccessibility(document).issues.some(issue => issue.rule === 'missing-alt-text'));
  const assets = [
    { id: 'a', original_name: 'taco hero.jpg', width: 2400, height: 1600, tags: ['food'] },
    { id: 'b', original_name: 'taco hero copy.jpg', width: 2400, height: 1600, tags: ['food'] }
  ];
  assert.ok(['a', 'b'].includes(rankAssets(assets, 'landscape taco')[0].asset.id));
  assert.equal(probableDuplicateGroups(assets).length, 1);
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/powerpoint.test.js (2026-07-15 01:23:43) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
import { exportPowerPoint, importPowerPoint } from '../server/powerpoint.js';
import { chartElement, defaultDocument, imageElement, rectElement, tableElement, textElement } from '../src/lib/document.js';

const PIXEL = 'data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+M/wHwAF/gL+X8q7WQAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==';

test('PowerPoint round-trip preserves slide size and editable core elements', async () => {
  const document = defaultDocument(1280, 720);
  document.title = 'PowerPoint round trip';
  document.pages[0].name = 'Overview';
  document.pages[0].background = '#FFF8EF';
  document.pages[0].elements = [
    rectElement({ id: 'panel', name: 'Panel', x: 48, y: 40, width: 1184, height: 640, fill: '#F5C451', radius: 24, zIndex: 0 }),
    textElement({ id: 'heading', name: 'Heading', x: 100, y: 85, width: 780, height: 110, text: 'Editable PowerPoint', fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 64, fontWeight: 700, fill: '#231F20', zIndex: 1 }),
    imageElement({ original_name: 'Pixel', url: PIXEL, width: 1, height: 1 }, { id: 'picture', x: 940, y: 80, width: 210, height: 160, zIndex: 2 }),
    tableElement({ id: 'table', x: 100, y: 260, width: 520, height: 280, cells: [['Item', 'Value'], ['Sales', '$125'], ['Guests', '42']], rows: 3, columns: 2, zIndex: 3 }),
    chartElement({ id: 'chart', x: 680, y: 280, width: 470, height: 260, chartType: 'bar', data: { labels: ['A', 'B'], series: [{ name: 'Revenue', values: [25, 40] }] }, zIndex: 4 })
  ];
  document.pages.push({ ...structuredClone(document.pages[0]), id: 'page-2', name: 'Second slide', elements: [textElement({ text: 'Second slide', x: 160, y: 180, width: 900, height: 180, fontSize: 84 })] });

  const exported = await exportPowerPoint(document);
  assert.equal(exported.buffer.subarray(0, 2).toString(), 'PK');
  assert.ok(exported.buffer.length > 8000);

  const imported = await importPowerPoint(exported.buffer, { title: 'Imported presentation' });
  assert.equal(imported.document.pages.length, 2);
  assert.ok(Math.abs(imported.document.width - 1280) <= 2);
  assert.ok(Math.abs(imported.document.height - 720) <= 2);
  assert.ok(imported.document.pages[0].elements.some(element => element.type === 'text' && element.text.includes('Editable PowerPoint')));
  assert.ok(imported.document.pages[0].elements.some(element => ['rect', 'frame'].includes(element.type)));
  assert.ok(imported.document.pages[0].elements.some(element => element.type === 'image'));
  assert.ok(imported.document.pages[0].elements.some(element => element.type === 'table'));
  assert.ok(imported.document.pages[0].elements.some(element => element.type === 'chart'));
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/print-layout.test.js (2026-07-16 03:33:10) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
import { buildImpositionPlan, documentSizeInches } from '../src/lib/printLayout.js';

const document = {
  width: 1050, height: 600, dpi: 300,
  pages: [{ id: 'front' }, { id: 'back' }]
};

test('converts the design canvas to physical inches using document DPI', () => {
  assert.deepEqual(documentSizeInches(document), { widthIn: 3.5, heightIn: 2, dpi: 300 });
});

test('lays ten business cards on a Letter sheet without gaps', () => {
  const plan = buildImpositionPlan(document, {
    itemPreset: 'business-card', quantity: 10,
    margins: { topIn: .5, rightIn: .5, bottomIn: .5, leftIn: .5 },
    horizontalGapIn: 0, verticalGapIn: 0
  });
  assert.equal(plan.columns, 2);
  assert.equal(plan.rows, 5);
  assert.equal(plan.perSheet, 10);
  assert.equal(plan.physicalSheets, 1);
  assert.equal(plan.sides[0].placements.length, 10);
});

test('continues quantities across physical sheets', () => {
  const plan = buildImpositionPlan(document, {
    itemPreset: 'business-card', quantityMode: 'exact', quantity: 23,
    margins: { topIn: .5, rightIn: .5, bottomIn: .5, leftIn: .5 },
    horizontalGapIn: 0, verticalGapIn: 0
  });
  assert.equal(plan.physicalSheets, 3);
  assert.equal(plan.sides.at(-1).placements.length, 3);
});

test('fills every available slot on the requested number of sheets automatically', () => {
  const plan = buildImpositionPlan(document, { itemPreset: 'business-card', sheetCount: 2 });
  assert.equal(plan.perSheet, 10);
  assert.equal(plan.physicalSheets, 2);
  assert.equal(plan.sides.flatMap(side => side.placements).length, 20);
});

test('uses minimum spacing and trims empty canvas by default', () => {
  const plan = buildImpositionPlan(document);
  assert.deepEqual(plan.config.margins, { topIn: 0, rightIn: 0, bottomIn: 0, leftIn: 0 });
  assert.equal(plan.config.horizontalGapIn, 0);
  assert.equal(plan.config.verticalGapIn, 0);
  assert.equal(plan.config.trimWhitespace, true);
});

test('duplex output mirrors backs for a long-edge flip', () => {
  const plan = buildImpositionPlan(document, {
    itemPreset: 'business-card', quantityMode: 'exact', quantity: 2,
    margins: { topIn: .5, rightIn: .5, bottomIn: .5, leftIn: .5 },
    horizontalGapIn: 0, verticalGapIn: 0,
    duplex: { enabled: true, frontPageIndex: 0, backPageIndex: 1, flip: 'long-edge' }
  });
  assert.equal(plan.sides.length, 2);
  const [front, back] = plan.sides;
  assert.equal(front.side, 'front');
  assert.equal(back.side, 'back');
  assert.equal(back.placements[0].pageIndex, 1);
  assert.equal(back.placements[0].xIn, plan.config.sheetWidthIn - front.placements[0].xIn - front.placements[0].widthIn);
});

test('reports layouts that cannot fit an item', () => {
  const plan = buildImpositionPlan(document, { itemPreset: 'custom', itemWidthIn: 20, itemHeightIn: 20 });
  assert.equal(plan.perSheet, 0);
  assert.ok(plan.warnings.length > 0);
});

test('preserves the source design aspect ratio by default', () => {
  const plan = buildImpositionPlan(document, { itemPreset: 'custom', itemWidthIn: 4, itemHeightIn: 4 });
  assert.equal(plan.config.preserveAspectRatio, true);
  assert.ok(Math.abs(plan.config.itemWidthIn / plan.config.itemHeightIn - document.width / document.height) < .0001);
});

test('allows exact unlocked item dimensions when requested', () => {
  const plan = buildImpositionPlan(document, { itemPreset: 'custom', itemWidthIn: 4, itemHeightIn: 4, preserveAspectRatio: false });
  assert.equal(plan.config.itemWidthIn, 4);
  assert.equal(plan.config.itemHeightIn, 4);
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/canvasforge/tests/professional-design.test.js (2026-07-15 01:23:46) =====
import test from 'node:test';
import assert from 'node:assert/strict';

import { applyCommandBatch, getAICapabilities, lintDocument, validateCommandBatch } from '../src/ai/engine.js';
import { defaultDocument } from '../src/lib/document.js';

function context(revision = 0) {
  return { pageIndex: 0, selection: [], assets: [], brands: [], components: [], revision };
}

test('AI command refs build a hierarchy and place repeated cards on a grid', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(816, 1056);
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    baseRevision: 0,
    commands: [
      { op: 'create_element', ref: 'card-a', element: { type: 'frame', name: 'Menu card', semanticName: 'Menu card', x: 60, y: 300, width: 320, height: 240 } },
      { op: 'create_element', ref: 'title-a', parentRef: 'card-a', element: { type: 'text', name: 'Item title', role: 'item-name', contentKey: 'name', text: 'First drink', width: 220, height: 60 } },
      { op: 'duplicate_element', ref: 'card-b', target: { ref: 'card-a' }, offsetX: 360, offsetY: 0 },
      { op: 'create_grid', ref: 'menu-grid', bounds: { x: 60, y: 300, width: 696, height: 520 }, columns: 2, rows: 1, columnGap: 24 },
      { op: 'place_in_grid', target: { semanticName: 'Menu card' }, gridRef: 'menu-grid' }
    ]
  };
  assert.equal(validateCommandBatch(batch, { revision: 0 }).valid, true);
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch, context());
  const cards = result.document.pages[0].elements.filter(element => element.semanticName === 'Menu card');
  assert.equal(cards.length, 2);
  const title = result.document.pages[0].elements.find(element => element.name === 'Item title');
  assert.ok(title.parentId);
  assert.equal(cards[0].width, cards[1].width);
  assert.notEqual(cards[0].x, cards[1].x);
});

test('linked styles, component variants, data sources, and print settings survive normalization', () => {
  const source = defaultDocument(816, 1056);
  const batch = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    baseRevision: 0,
    commands: [
      { op: 'create_design_style', ref: 'item-style', kind: 'text', style: { name: 'Menu item', semanticRole: 'item-name', value: { fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 30, fontWeight: 700, lineHeight: 1.1 } } },
      { op: 'create_element', ref: 'card', element: { type: 'frame', name: 'Card', semanticName: 'Menu card', x: 60, y: 300, width: 320, height: 240 } },
      { op: 'create_element', ref: 'title', parentRef: 'card', element: { type: 'text', role: 'item-name', contentKey: 'name', text: 'Placeholder', width: 220, height: 60 } },
      { op: 'attach_design_style', target: { ref: 'title' }, kind: 'text', styleRef: 'item-style' },
      { op: 'create_component', ref: 'menu-card', target: { ref: 'card' }, title: 'Menu card', variants: [{ id: 'yellow', name: 'Yellow', values: { theme: 'yellow' } }] },
      { op: 'instantiate_component', componentRef: 'menu-card', x: 420, y: 300, variant: 'yellow', overrides: { name: 'Second drink' } },
      { op: 'create_data_source', ref: 'menu-data', source: { name: 'Menu', columns: ['name'], rows: [{ name: 'Lychee Margarita' }] } },
      { op: 'bind_data', target: { ref: 'title' }, sourceRef: 'menu-data', row: 0, key: 'name' },
      { op: 'set_print_settings', settings: { colorSpace: 'cmyk', pdfPreset: 'pdf-x-4', bleed: { top: 12, right: 12, bottom: 12, left: 12 }, safeArea: { top: 24, right: 24, bottom: 24, left: 24 } } }
    ]
  };
  const result = applyCommandBatch(source, batch, context());
  const document = result.document;
  const title = document.pages[0].elements.find(element => element.role === 'item-name' && element.componentInstanceId == null);
  assert.equal(title.text, 'Lychee Margarita');
  assert.equal(title.fontSize, 30);
  assert.equal(document.localComponents.length, 1);
  assert.equal(document.localComponents[0].variants.length, 1);
  assert.equal(document.dataSources.length, 1);
  assert.equal(document.print.pdfPreset, 'pdf-x-4');
  assert.equal(document.print.bleed.left, 12);
});

test('professional lint returns score, safe fixes, and consistency findings', () => {
  const document = defaultDocument(816, 1056);
  document.print.safeArea = { top: 40, right: 40, bottom: 40, left: 40 };
  document.pages[0].elements = [
    { id: 'a', type: 'text', name: 'Item title A', semanticName: 'Menu card title', role: 'item-name', x: 20, y: 20, width: 250, height: 20, text: 'An awkwardly long title that will overflow', fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 30, fontWeight: 700, lineHeight: 1.2, fill: '#cccccc', appearance: {}, zIndex: 0 },
    { id: 'b', type: 'text', name: 'Item title B', semanticName: 'Menu card title', role: 'item-name', x: 302, y: 22, width: 250, height: 70, text: 'Second', fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 600, lineHeight: 1.1, fill: '#111827', appearance: {}, zIndex: 1 }
  ];
  const lint = lintDocument(document);
  assert.ok(Number.isFinite(lint.score.overall));
  assert.ok(lint.score.overall < 100);
  assert.ok(lint.issues.some(issue => /safe-area|typography|alignment|overflow/.test(issue.rule)));
  assert.ok(lint.safeFixCount >= 0);
});

test('capabilities publish nested professional schemas and recipe library', () => {
  const capabilities = getAICapabilities();
  assert.equal(capabilities.documentSchemaVersion, 6);
  assert.ok(capabilities.operations.includes('create_grid'));
  assert.ok(capabilities.operations.includes('create_component'));
  assert.ok(capabilities.operations.includes('create_design_style'));
  assert.ok(capabilities.recipes.includes('cocktail-menu'));
  assert.ok(capabilities.nestedSchemas?.appearance);
  assert.ok(capabilities.nestedSchemas?.print);
});

    }
  },
  preview: {
    port: 3020,
    proxy: {
      '/api': 'http://localhost:4300',
      '/storage': 'http://localhost:4300'
    }
  }
});
